9a0043fd4258a1286db1e253ca591662b3aac849.text: mir hat der service gut gefallen.

es war eine super schöne und angenehme nacht ! die unterkunft ist so familiär und man fühlt sich total willkommen ! 
das zimmer war in einem sauberen und gepflegten zustand .. 
ein groses lob an hotelwirtin,  so eine nette person trifft man nur noch selten , sehr sehr liebevoll !
immer wieder gerne !

very kind owner who takes a personal interest in her guests. clean. comfortable beds.  free mineral water.
on the negative side, there are no fridges in rooms and tv reception was poor.   also there used to be a very good restaurant downstairs which is now under different management and is much less appealing.
very clean, comfortable beds, friendly and helpful proprietor

dusche war innen voll mit schimmel. also ich mir ein handtuch genommen habe kamen mir etliche motten entgegen.
das bett hat bei der kleinsten bewegung so geknarzt das wir nicht schlafen konnten.
die dame ist aber wirklich sehr nett. hilft nur nicht über den rest hinweg

neu renoviertes zimmer, tolles bett (modell strandkorb). 
bad war sehr klein, nur mit einer sehr wackeligen falttür getrennt und die duschkabine an der schrägwand auch sehr klein.

ik verbleef hier 2 nachten vrijdag 30 november tot zondag 2 december en het is mij zeer goed bevallen. het is een heel gezellig klein hotelletje met heel vriendelijk personeel die er voor zorgt dat je er helemaal thuis voelt. ontbijt perfect, goed bed en alles schoon.
i liked the friendly staff and quiet locatin.  rooms are a little chilly this time of year though
günstig gelegenes schönes |MASK|, trotz restaurant unten sehr ruhig. sauberes sehr gepflegtes zimmer, sehr freundliche zuvorkommende besitzerin. es fehlte uns an nichts. nur zu empfehlen!
gute anbindung an u-bahn,           freundliches personal

vriendelijke dame bij ontvangst, hondjes waren ook zeer welkom. mevrouw heeft zelf ook hondje . alles netjes wie wenst kan gezellig ontbijten helaas hadden wij daar geen tijd voor . wij komen zeker terug .
super nettes personal,sehr gutes essen, aureichend parkplätze, sehr gute verkehrsanbindung mit övm

we loved our stay at the hotel |MASK| |MASK| in bochum. highly recommended.
welcoming and just perfect. thank you for a great and amazing stay.
der empfang war unglücklich, weil an diesem tag ruhetag war.
etwas in die jahre gekommen, aber sonst ok. personal sehr freundlich.
das hotel ist schlecht zu finden, da das äußere mittlerweile verändert hat
in need of updating and refurbishing.
the staff were incredibly friendly, my room was better than i expected. it was exactly what i needed and i will stay there again!
es war alles super, nur bin ich kein leichtgewicht. die matratze war zu dünn, sonst alles bestens
gemütliche unterkunft zum fairen preis.
👍 supernett

das bestechendste war die freundlichkeit, offenheit und bemühtheit des personals! selten so erlebt! vielen dank für alles! 
auf wunsch wird sogar glutenfreies frühstück serviert! 
das w-lan ist sehr instabil.
etwas unangenehm waren die gerüche; von fettgeruch bis abgestandener zigarettenrauch. dies war nur bei tag und nacht geöffnetem fenster und raumdeo aushaltbar.
kamer was erg koud, en de verlichting werkte maar half

die unterkunft war sauber, gut und sehr freundliches personal. frühstück gab es schon ab 7°°uhr bis 11°°uhr.
es war reichhaltig, guter kaffee, frische bröchen usw.
die anbindung zur stadt ist super, nur 3haltestellen mit der u-bahn.
sehr gute lage - netter empfang - wir kommen gerne wieder
beim frühstück war es schon recht eklig, dass der hund die wurst vom tablett gezogen hat. insgesamt wirkt das hotel düster und staubig. für eine nacht kann man es dort aber aushalten.
dame à l'accueil très sympa.
die hotelinhaberin ist sehr liebevoll und herzlich
sehr in die jahre gekommen. überall teppichboden. unangenehmer geruch durch die gaststätte im erdgeschoß. sehr liebevolle besitzerin.
sehr freundliche und familiäre atmosphäre. nur im navi etwas schwer zu finden. dafür klein und gemütlich. war sehr schön.
das personal war sehr freundlich und ist schnellstens auf alle wünsche eingegangen.

sehr freundliche und zuvorkommende wirtin. frühstück bekam ich auf wunsch eine halbe stunde früher. dafür brachte sie mir dann noch extra etwas vom bäcker mit. und der preis war mehr als fair. ich kann dieses |MASK| wärmstens empfehlen. grüße

ein nettes hotel, nicht neu, etwas rustikal, aber angenehm. das personal ist sehr freundlich und versucht jeden wunsch zu erfüllen. sollte ich wieder mal in bochum übernachten müsse, dann weiß ich wo ich hingehe. ich habe mich sehr wohl gefühlt und
quite ok for few nights, ~25 min walking to centre.
ich war nur für eine nacht dort. es hat alles gut geklappt und ich habe gut geschlafen.

das personal ist sehr freundlich und bemüht 
 sich auf jeden wünsch der gäste zu erfüllen
sehr. familien freundlich. ich kann nur gutes sagen
besitzerin sehr nett, frühstück super, zimmer einfach gehalten aber sauber, für einen zwischenstopp in bochum kann ich es empfehlen. daneben eine wunderbare weinbar.
great location. short walking distance to the train

freundliches personal, gute küche, alles sauber und alles vorhanden.
gerne wieder.
uschi und klaus aus wolfsburg
sehr gute und preiswerte unterkunft.  ich komme gerne wieder.

die zimmer sind bereits ein wenig "abgerockt". fernseher ohne privatfernsehen ( rtl, sat 1 o.ä. ), weil kein ci-modul verfügbar. betten und bettwäsche sind sauber. die bettwäsche selbst ist funktional allerdings nicht neuwertig. teilweise fehlen knöpfe oder teile sind abgerissen.  badezimmer sauber und ordentlich. allerdings sind die handtücher auch ein wenig in die jahre gekommen (an den seiten ausgefranst). positiv ist mir aufgefallen, dass wir ein fliegengitter vor dem fenster hatten. allerdings im bad und in dem anderen zimmer nicht. 
das frühstück ist sehr einfach gehalten: eine sorte wurst und eine sorte käse aus der packung. verschiedene süssaufstriche aus kleinen einwegpackungen. eierspeisen auf nachfrage. brötchen schienen frisch und nicht aufbackware. müsli auch verschiedene sorten vorhanden. mir fehlte frisches obst und gemüse sowie quark oder naturjoghurt. etwas schöner angerichtet wäre sicher auch möglich gewesen. es macht aber satt.
das personal ist wirklich sehr freundlich, zimmer wurden gut gemacht. für mich gewöhnungsbedürftig die lage am kreisel ( ziemlich laut ), die combo mit einem restaurant ( riecht halt im zimmer nach speisen, wenn unten gekocht wird; check-in ist dann auch etwas komisch ) und die wirklich hellhörigen zimmer( gruß an die kollegen mit ihrem "nachttrunk" um drei uhr in der frühe ).

an excellent experience. room simple but very clean. the host is very friendly, there are water and fruit on the house, available 24/7. excellent german style breakfast that will be prepared on demand.
the location is especially convenient, only 3-4 min walking from the underground station (3 stops from train station), in very quiet area.
recommend without reservation.

personal sehr freundlich
unterkunft wie in der beschreibung
hab die nacht dort sehr gut geschlafen
sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit für unsere gäste aus den us.
sehr nett, alles gut. matratze könnte etwas härter sein
alles super gerne wieder, sehr nettes personal, klasse frühstück,
the owner of hotel was very friendly,she help us getting another room without question.
das personal war sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit.das frühstück war lecker und zu vollsten zufriedenheit. nachreichungen waren kein problem. würde immer wieder dort übernachten.
ein absolut empfehlenswertes kleines hotel mit der besten und nettesten besitzerin die es gibt. mann fühlt dich fast wie zuhause. sehr leckeres frühstück wir kommen wieder!
sehr freundliche inhaberin, sowie auch das ganze personal …wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt…immer wieder gern
my room was small but totally alright for one guest. beautiful color combinations in the room.

sehr nette inhaberin. zimmer sauber und ordentlich. leide etwas in die jahre gekommen. was uns am wenigsten gefallen hat, das es keine vernünftigen vorhänge oder jalousien zum abdunkeln gab. es war bereits morgends um 6.30 uhr taghell im zimmer und dadurch leider eine kurze nacht. auch die bettwäsche war für die sommertage viel zu dick. die matratzen sind auch schon sehr durchgelegen. alles in allem war es aber für zwei tage ok da wir die meiste zeit eh unterwegs waren.

zimmer mittelgroß, gut und sauber. tv mit usb-anschlußmöglichkeit. bad geräumig, alles gut angeordnet. sehr nettes und hilfsbereites personal. dusche hoch genug für große menschen und mit temperaturwahl (optimal). gratis parken für gäste. u-bahn-station in der nähe, zu fuß sind es 20 bis 30 minuten in die innenstadt.

wir sind mit einem kleinen hund angereist. das 1. zimmer im 2. og das wir zuerst zugeteilt bekamen war für mich sehr enttäuschend, sodass ich dachte einmal und nie wieder.
wie wurden dann , aufgrund einer anreise einer grossfamilie in ein anderes zimmer gebracht. ( zum glück) dieses zimmer war top.
die hotelinhaberin war sehr nett und entgegenkommend. hat sich immer wieder um die gäste gekümmert. schade fand ich, dass nur an bestimmten tagen mittagessen angeboten wurde. das sollte man beim check in erwähnen, 
das hatte man leider versäumt , sodass wir an dem einem mittag uns das essen selbst besorgen mussten, ansonsten war alles ok,
hotel machte aüßerlich kein gepflegten eindruck, daher haben wir garnicht eingecheckt

klein en gezellig, wel wat gedateerd....
wel lekker eten en toffe sfeer
sehr nette gastgeberin, sehr bemüht, den gästen alles recht zu machen.
nette leute, sauberes zimmer und bad, glutenfreies frühstück für mich auf wunsch. alles gut.
angenehmer aufenthalt, nettes personal und super frühstück.

an sich ein schönes, familiäres hotel, auch die gastfreundlichkeit sollte man an dieser stelle einmal hervorheben. allerdings kam es teilweise vor, dass ein rauchergeruch durch das hotel zog. der frühstücksraum wirkte etwas älter, das zimmer war aber schön.
nice hotel clean quiet and close to public transit we had everything we needed for the price we paid close to the stadium if you are going to a game
close to our clients and we enjoyed the restaurant
super nettes personal, sehr gastfreundlicher empfang und leckeres frühstück!
laut zimmer zur straße,  ausstattung veraltet,  nettes personal
alles wie immer einfach perfect!
warm staff, good breakfast, peaceful ambiance, free bottled sparkling water
eine nette gegend. die straßenbahn ist gleich um die ecke. die betten sind super weich und bequem. leider keine klimaanlage und kein wlan. gerne wieder.

sehr freundliches und hilfsbereites personal.
einrichtung etwas in die jahre gekommen aber alles sauber .extrawünsche werden problemlos erfüllt.gerne wieder.

the room was clean and standard. check in was a problem. we arrived around 3.30 p.m. there didn't seem to be antone about. i had to ask next door in the wine shop about checking in. after ringing the door bell and elderly lady looked out the window and dircetsd me in to the building. i eventually managed to locate appropriate person, who looked like she'd just awoken.  she showed me to our room and and we didn't see her until breakfast the next day.  we would have had a meal there but due to first impressions we decided to go elsewhere.
breakfast was adequate.

sehr nette besitzerin super freudlich und sehr tolle zimmer, sehr lekeres frühstück. wir werden das hotel auf jedenfall weiterempfehlen und gerne wieder kommen.

viellen dank für die gastfreundlichkeit 

weiter so

familie str.

freitag ist ruhetags für das restaurant.
das personal war sehr nett und hilfsbereit.
die ausstattung ist zwart alt aber alles völlig ok so. würde immer wieder dort übernachten wenn ich in bochum bin.

9a0043fd4258a1286db1e253ca591662b3aac849.title: zustand des hotels
9a0043fd4258a1286db1e253ca591662b3aac849.text: trotz nichraucherzimmer stank es im bad sehr stark nach rauch. auch mit lüften ging es nicht weg. hatte zwei zimmer reserviert, nur eines war für uns freigehalten worden, da die dame an fer rezeption es übersehen hatte. keinerlei infos über frühstück, wlan... personal beim frühstück sehr nett!
gewoon een simpele accommodatie. dat merk je ook aan het ontbijt. alles basis.
super plek super host

9a0043fd4258a1286db1e253ca591662b3aac849.title: som att bo hemma hos någon
9a0043fd4258a1286db1e253ca591662b3aac849.text: väldigt snälla och trevliga på hotellet. tyvärr hade jag klantat mig och bokat fel men det löste personalen smidigt och det är jag väldigt glad för. dock vaknade vi två timmar innan vi tänkt gå upp av att det drog in massa cigarettrök i rummet och bägge började få ont i huvudet av det. trafiken på gatan var i full gång redan vid sextiden också så att somna om efter att ha ställt upp fönsterna var omöjligt. det kändes verkligen som att sova över hos en sparsmakad släktings hus, inget koncept som jag gillade dock. men allt var städat och fint, dock ej rökfritt.
ontzettend aardig personeel! de kamers zijn klein, maar goed en schoon.
das personal war absolute spitze im service, die betten zum träumen geeignet, leckeres frühstück mit individuell zubereiteten eierspeisen, auch das restaurant sollte man unbedingt mal mit einplanen
sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. wlan funktioniert nur eingeschränkt. ansonsten alles okay
sehr freundliches personal, das preis-/leistungsverhältnis passt sehr gut, gerne nutzen wir wieder die unterkunft.

chaleureux et professionnel. repas excellent et rapport qualité prix au top. pdj simple et copieux.
silencieux aucun bruit d'extérieur.

nice quiet suburban hotel with excellent transport link 5min to city centre and university 

wifi was being repaired but there was an open neighbourhood wifi suite which was adequate
personal
sehr guter kaffee. gutes frühstück mit klasse brötchen am sonntag.
alles in ordnung. nettes personal. unkomplizierte abwicklung. gerne wieder
wir haben uns dort sehr wohlgefühlt! das frühstück war sehr abwechslungsreich und lecker!

die gastfreundschaft, das hervorragend gezapfte pils in gemütlich natürlicher atmosphäre bei gutem preis-leistungsverhältnis sind besonders hervorzuheben. 
zimmer sind sehr sauber und ruhig.
fußweg im die innenstadt mit 20 minuten okay.

zimmer ordentlich und sauber. service einwandfrei. late check out war kein problem und ein sehr leckeres frühstück aufs zimmer bekommen. 
wir kommen gerne wieder.
das personal ware sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. das zimmer war sehr ruhig und sehr sauer. die möblierung ist etwas älter aber in einem sehr guten zustand.
preis leistungsverhaeltnis gut. ubahn in der naehe.
alles wie beschrieben

9a0043fd4258a1286db1e253ca591662b3aac849.title: immer wieder gerne.. familiäres ambiente
9a0043fd4258a1286db1e253ca591662b3aac849.text: toller aufenthalt bei familiärer stimmung. essen super lecker im restaurant.
liebevoll und familiär geführtes hotel. wir haben uns sehr willkommen gefühlt.

der hund der eigentümerin rannte im frühstücksraum und in der küche rum.in den zimmern fehlt mal staub wischen,bei allen zwei zimmern der gleiche mangel,den man gleich sah und das frühstücksangebot war minimal und frisch aus supermarktverpackung abgelegt

unterkunft war sauber, badezimmer war in ordnung.
fernseher hat funktioniert.
frühstück war sehr gut und reichlich.

gute unterkunft, leider war ein weinparty unter meinem fenster bis mitternacht. beim buchen empfehle ich darüber zu informieren. auch wäre es bequem wenn der wlan-gebrauchername beim einchecken mitgegeben würde. früstück war auch prima.
das personal war super freundlich. das zimmer war sehr gut. das frühstück war wirklich ausreichend.
nahe der stadtbahn gelegen, - bald im zentrum. angenehmer aufenthalt. freundliches personal, schönes zimmer.
sehr freundliche und natürliche aufnahme. gerne wieder.
very helpful and friendly staff; great food and friendly service.
sehr freundliches personal und saubere, gut ausgestattete zimmer!
zimmer sauber, frühstück gut, personal hilfsbereit und zuvorkommend.
es war super freundliches personal und dankeschön an conny für ihr freundliches auftreten und der rest der crew super danke macht weiter so
the staffs are very nice.  you will feel warm to stay here.

9a0043fd4258a1286db1e253ca591662b3aac849.title: nette hotel
9a0043fd4258a1286db1e253ca591662b3aac849.text: ich habe dort nach einem konzertbesuch eine nacht verbracht. das personal war freundlich. das zimmer groß, hell und ruhig. das frühstück war gut. kostenlose parkplätze direkt am hotel.

die e unterkunft ist sehr sauber, wird familiär geführt. man fühlt sich hier sehr wohl.
würde ich weiterempfehlen

personal super freundlich!
problemloses parken vor dem |MASK|.

das inventar ist ein bisschen in die jahre gekommen, aber erfüllt alles noch seinen zweck. das bett war sehr bequem und ein neuer riesiger fernseher war im zimmer. 
frühstück war sehr lecker, man kann sich selbst frischen orangensaft pressen und alles was man braucht ist vorhanden. 
preis-leistungs-verhältnis top!
aufgrund des günstigen preises ist es in ordnung. personal sehr freundlich und zuvorkommend. ein etwas in die jahre gekommendes hotel mit rustikalen charme. preis leistung passt.
man hat alles was man braucht im hotel (frühstück, parkplatz, tv im zimmer, dusche/klo, bequemes bett).

db38b19b897dbece3e34919c662b3fd66d23b615.text: great
the staff were super friendly and helpful.
sicky awesome great time good food good booze foos ball!
woke up to snow.   they offered to pull up my car for me and had the scraper to borrow to clean the car.
the entire hotel property provides lots of large spaces for hanging out or entertaining large groups of people. the spaces are nicely designed for any event or holiday.
one of the best hotels i've stayed at. great deal from expedia! thanks.
excellent place to stay . would definitely recommend it to all of my friends.
the service and restaurants were top notch.  the shuttle was very convenient and the driver was super-friendly and helpful.
great!
beautiful hotel. a little pricey dinner in the maritage.
very convenient location.  easy drive into boulder or denver
awesome staff

the property offers a relaxing atmosphere. there is an outdoor hot tub which was pleasant in the colder temps. the  staff are courteous and kind. this is a nice hotel for a get away from the city bustle.

great spot, helpful staff. but, no dining for breakfast or lunch. safe & phone in room didn’t work,pool wasn’t tended to very well. hoping they can staff up as i always stay here when first visiting denver area.
top nitch all the way, thank you!  first class establishment
outdoor pool and hot tub were amazing in the cold and snow.
everything was absolutely fabulous.  just wish the pool was indoors.

amazing staff at check in and check out, in the tap room and also the meritage. above courteous compared to other hotels and it is really appreciated. all staff should be commended for their thoroughness and thoughtfulness. rooms were very clean, comfy and had needed amenities. i loved the lobby area with fireplace, cozy and quiet rooms and overall a restful stay. the most takeaway is the the overall hotel amenities, amazing staff and convenience, you can eat a nice breakfast that won't break the bank, a nice dinner and drink at a very fun restaurant/bar and both in the hotel. next time i hope to stay longer.

they advertise 2 pools and the whole week we were there only one pool was open to the public as appearantly they put too much chemicals in the pool. we normally wouldn't mind but the other pool is quite small and was absolutely packed with young kids.  then we tried to book a massage and they told us they were booked out the 4 days we were there! when you pay the amount of money we payed to stay you would think that they could have all the facilities working. the saving grace was the staff, rachel up at the front desk was very friendly and accommodating. elijah in the tap room bar is a great server and a lot of fun, they should give that guy a raise! the staff makes the stay worth it..
extremely nice as always and professional.
enjoyed the room. nice pools and hot tub. sunday breakfast in restaurant was excellent
i loved the spa on property.  the many pools were nice for people to spread out.  loved the apples in the lobby.
scenery and amenities.  restaurant needs to be open later.
the pools are fantastic

this was a great place to stay. the staff and hotel overall exceeded our expectations. the room was spacious, clean and had a great view. it was worth the cost and it didn't take long for us to get to the rocky mountains for days of hiking and taking in the beauty of this area.
front desk was friendly and helpful. room was clean and comfortable. robes are a nice touch. the property is well maintained. we had an excellent experience.
very lovely place. very accommodating and friendly
beautiful pool area.  hot tub and pool could use more cleaning. carpet in hotel was disgusting. service was very slow at pool, coffee shop, etc. overall nice hotel but don’t think we’d go back.
great service and great location. will be back again soon.
great pool area, friendly staff, close to boulder and denver.
would never stay here again absolutely zero good things to say about this place.
a good place to stay and a cut above normal chain hotels
the staff was super friendly and accommodating! we had a stressful travel day and they made sure to take great care of us and our dogs!
front desk very efficient and kind.  the pool and small gym were clean and comfortable.  nice stay overall and only 10 min drive to boulder.  will come back again.
nice and clean easy parking and there is so much things to do in the area.
the pools are heated and the entire staff keeps the property beautiful...all with smiles on their faces. everyone was kind and respectful and happy to see us! we will definitely be going back!!
staff was very friendly, elevators were broken often, pictures were misleading. no fitted sheet so had pleasure of waking up touching mattress. limited cleaning. bathrooms were very dated.

property appearance was pretty. pool was very nice. outdoor movie was nice on friday but need every night. elevators were terrible (always long waits). pool bar closed at 7pm which is too early...should stay open until at least 9pm (especially on weekends); having to go to tap room to get a drink and bring it to the pool was very inconvenient...you're missing revenue on this decision.
awesome service, food and close to shopping.  staff went out of their way to make us feel wecome.
we only stayed one night for the cu game, but it was a nice property. would like to stay here again & spend the day at the pool.
property showing its age… last remodel done poorly…staff wonderful and property clean
i think the staff at the hotel were very interested in their guests.  they were very kind!

this hotel was great, clean, fancy and all the staff were super friendly and helpful. they were always so happy to help the guests. all staff everywhere seemed so happy and full of energy to help however they could. the restaurant in the hotel,  the taproom was really good. we ate there 2 nights in a row since it was convenient and good. also they have 2 pool tables and several televisions to watch sports on. it was a delightful hotel and the breakfast in the meritage is really delicious and worth the money. we didn’t do the breakfast buffet but we ordered off the al la carte menu and the breakfast croissant was amazing along with my sons blueberry pancakes. it’s packed with blueberries. the host and staff were super nice and happy for morning time. we had a great experience with this hotel and it was a delight. i would stay here again if it was near my destination. thank you |MASK| for your hospitality and your service, it was a great experience in kindness and professionalism. thank you from a family of 4 from texas!
it’s a nice hotel.

friendly staff. decent pool/fitness area. the rooms were nice aside from the fridge being small and while nitpicky, a microwave would have been a great addition as there is no complimentary breakfast. 
 there was a power outage for more than 8 hours and it took the hotel over 5 hours to notify guests, then anohter hour to obtain hot water. very frustrating to start the day. overpriced for what you get, food isn't great and extremely expensive onsite. as long as you have a car , you can get around easily. if you like to golf, probably a fantastic place for you.
staff was great and food options. excellent. parking was ample. close to boulder.
staff was friendly! property is well kept as well as the amenities!
staff was welcoming. property was clean. location was great.

the staff was pleasant...but a wee bit forgetful! waited an hour for an appetizer order at the pool, but was then told that "the kitchen never got the order". my sister called the front desk from oh to order chocolate-covered strawberries and champagne to be delivered to our room while we were off eloping. again, the staff "forgot". when my sister called again, they delivered it the next day with a card congratulating us - but it was signed by the |MASK| hotel staff!! they took credit for it! pretty bogue! on day 3, i called the front desk at 10:30 am and asked for clean towels. having gotten a feel for their "forgetfulness", we grabbed extra towels from the pool area that afternoon. glad we did, because those towels never came. the rooms are a bit dated and the tv remote and channel guide reminded me of the early 2000s. they have two lovely pools - but why not make one "adults only"? the hot tub was big, but filled with hair and bugs. location was decent - 30 min to downtown denver or boulder. again, the employees were all very friendly, but fell short on the simplest of requests.

the hotel room furnishings, bathroom, and carpet were worn out and tattered.  we switched rooms and it was the same..well worn and in need of renovations.  not a 4 star hotel at all.  the staff was fantastic and very accommodating.  the pool area was wonderful.  if not for the staff and pool area, we would have checked into a different hotel.

great pool! huge pool with full bar and a great bartender. although i think they forgot to vacuume the pool bottom.. a few floaters... leaves and bugs in the water.  the rest of the hotel was spotless. great service!  awesome food at the tap house. really relaxing and beautiful hotel.
dated
food options were great. quiet place and very friendly staff all around. would definitely stay here again

great heated lap pool open until 11 pm &
excellent registration staff!
front desk staff was so friendly and helpful! rooms are nice and pool areas are too! lots of restaurants and shopping nearby. would definitely stay here again.
the staff here were so wonderful and helped us have a great stay.

the bed was amazing. didnt want to get out of bed
room was clean and tidy.
property provided what was needed for my time and stay in denver.
the hotel was spacious and clean. the restaurant had really good food! they went above and beyond and we were very happy with our stay.
no complaints
the staffs were very helpful and friendly. the room was neat and cleaned.
nice big property, but not budget friendly. no free wifi, no free breakfast, and they charge you a “destination fee” when you check out. for the price, it should include everything.

heated pool although didn’t use
furniture in rooms need to be replaced paint coming off corners looks like something at motel not hotel
very nice room and pool area

i enjoyed my stay at |MASK|. it has everything inside the hotel for convenience. it is located near a shopping mall. ample parking. the hotel room was average - nothing extraordinary. when we first arrived, we noticed that our bathroom sink was clogged but we called front desk and they sent someone immediatley to fix it. overall a good hotel.

very clean, beautiful hotel and grounds. room was very spacious and comfortable. the pool was nice. we chose this hotel because they are pet friendly and our tucker dog loved it. we would definitely stay here again

very nice property and interior design. staff was wonderful - so friendly and attentive. 

had the pan seared salmon in the tap room - perfectly cooked with beautiful presentation. breakfast was delicious as well. 

outdoor pool and hot tub were a treat to swim in in december. fire pits were a nice addition. 

i didn’t use the fitness center but it looked great. 

only small drawback were the sheets were a little rough - could have been a softer linen but first world problem. bed was otherwise very comfortable 

highly recommend.
the view was great, and the area was clean. staff was very friendly.
clean, quiet and friendly.
great hotel with access to many activities, shopping, and restaurants. always receive great service.

beautiful location!
all of it

it was okay. the room service food was average and there was no kid's menu. the furniture was nice but rundown. it was mostly clean but minor issues here and there. the pool and hot tub had a lot of debris in them, including dead flies. the water pressure was very very weak, so filling the bathtub for my four year old took 30 minutes. no one helped us with our bags even though we were carrying a lot and had a little kid with us. at the end of our stay, a staff member gave our daughter a kid's activity bag, and said it should've been given at check-in. when we asked for more towels, or help getting the heater fixed, the response was excellent. we loved the complimentary bath products. overall, it was comfortable and sufficient, but i expected it to be a bit more luxurious and more kid-friendly based on the website and what i was told to expect.
great property- great restaurant - close to boulder
had a hard time getting spa appts. good staff. bar service was great!

the view of the flat irons and mountians is amazing! we booked a room with a balcony, which was really nice. we went to a concert at the 1st bank center and took the shuttle from the hotel there. the driver was excellent and gave us a lot of pointers.  we ubered back since the concert went past midnight.  great place to stay.
we had a wonderful time and will return.
enjoyed the outdoor space- resort style setting was refreshing

luxury resort featuring two pools, a hot tub, a spa, a gym and a sauna in room 1140.  the three stars for staff and service is an average of a five for most of the employees we encountered and a one (or lower) for management.  there was something odd from check-in — the front desk couldn’t find the suite and had to go behind to check with the manager.  the clerk appeared to be apologizing in advance.  when we got into the suite, it was evening and the suite was warm but we figured it would cool down.  it didn't - turns out the a/c hardware just wasn’t working.  not a glitch -- broken.  per staff, hotel had been working on the broken a/c, and claimed they thought it was fixed when they checked us in.  isn’t there a pretty simple way to verify whether a/c works?  hotel grudgingly offered to rack rate rooms in replacement, but i had to go to expedia to get the charges ironed out.  boooo!
our stay was very short, but i was impressed with the night service. turning lights on, closing blinds and bringing milk/cookie for my child.
pool was too busy with local residents who were not guests of the hotel.

the personnel in all phases were exceptional.  the manager and hostess were so friendly and helpful.  if you go there request sunny for your waitress.  food was exceptional too!
this was old school friendly across the board from the reception desk, the restaurant, and housekeeping!  very refreshing!!  thank you!
great service at the front desk each time, loved the onsite restaurant and the ability to get a "to go" order and bring it to our room. great experience and beautiful and premium hotel!

small bathroom and the staff at check in weren’t very friendly. the hotel seemed to be undergoing minor renovations. some of the baseboards were removed, yet no one mentioned this when we booked. they also didn’t provide enough toilet paper, which is needed since we passed on housekeeping during the pandemic.

the only reason to book are the pools and go see melissa at the tap room. she and the runners provided the best service while we were there.
beautiful and great service!

what “makes” the |MASK| |MASK| amazing is the staff! from even before our arrival for an 8-night stay, staff was attentive and courteous. the covid pandemic has pressed some restrictions on hotels and restaurants, so some areas were limited, but the |MASK| did its best during these pandemic times. we would love to return someday when the hotel is in “full swing” and the smoke from nw forest fires- our home base- isn’t blurring the views of the beautiful flatirons! the location can’t be beat: so close to denver downtown, quaint towns like louisville and lafayette- and cities like boulder, not to mention chataqua, and of course, rocky mountain national park! thank you |MASK| for a clean, safe and truly enjoyable vacation destination. (i didn’t even mention the amazing golf!!!) 😀
i came in very late in the evening, so i really cannot comment.  it was clean, elegant and very inviting.

the staff in the tap room were exceptionally kind and friendly, even after hours of dealing with some rude, drunk wedding guests.  the young soccer player who was our waitress was a joy.  she needs a raise!
i absolutely love this hotel. this was my third stay with the |MASK| |MASK|.

room needs additional outlets for electrical devices.

we had two fire drills while at the hotel.  one was at 2am due to a faulty wire and the second was at 9:00am two days later.  not sure why the second one happened but going down 11 flights of stairs was crazy. they need to update this hotel. it is really the nicest in the area overall. offers many amenities and the staff is great!  need to get better coffee.  both times i ordered coffee it was sub-par. had to run to starbucks and dunkin'.

the staff was very friendly & accommodating.  heated pool a definite plus & hot tub was large.  mostly the fact that the pool & hot tub remained open most of the day so that guest could use them at their leisure.  will recommend this resort to friends.  wonderful stay

really, my only gripe had to do with the hotel restaurant. it was a bit pricey and pretentious. i wasn't feeling well and just wanted one egg for breakfast, but the menu consists only of full meals. $23 for the buffet, or $17 for an omelet. the

the hotel itself needs some upgrades for the prices they charging. the front door was boarded up cause the front door glass was broken. a little noisy by the freeway.

the property is under renovations, but the resort does a great job managing it.
personal sehr freundlich, super ambiente. aktuell wird renoviert, wir waren bereits in einem modernisierten raum/stockwerk.
grounds were great as was the staff. the rooms were somewhat dated and could use some tlc. our iron and refrigerator didn’t work. the bathroom had no fan and there are very few outlets.
great property. clean and high quality bd
the pool is great. were very excited for the renovation to be complete.
didn’t clean my room one night
great views and staff is very helpful about going above and beyond
great front desk check in rep
i am still waiting for a full refund on my credit card for the stay which we left within a few hours of checking in because of the lackluster facilities.

we had no maid service after our first night.
the shower water was barely warm and that was after having it run for several, 4-5 minutes.

we loved everything about this property.  our room was lovely and quiet with a fabulous view too!  

the staff was friendly and the service and food at the little tavern down the hall from check in was great.
great resort, has all the amenities you need. large pools and updated pool chairs with drinks by the pool. front desk staff is great.

beautiful resort hotel!  the front desk staff bent over backward to accommodate our needs. we thoroughly enjoyed the beautifully prepared meals in both the tap room and main dining room. the staff made us feel very special. the hotel and the grounds were first class all the way. would recommend it to anyone visiting the area

bummer expedia didn’t mention or include the $25 daily resort fee so it would have been cheaper on property’s website. bummer both days one of the pools was closed for 24 hours. the pools and hot tub are awesome remodeled rooms are nice.

checking in was simple and quick. employees were polite and greeted at all times. the room itself was fine; however, there was no microwave in the room and the coffee machine looked like it hadn’t been used in months.
lovely property and the staff were excellent!!
great property - pool and rooms are really nice.

db38b19b897dbece3e34919c662b3fd66d23b615.title: hotel room
db38b19b897dbece3e34919c662b3fd66d23b615.text: had to request items to make room handicap friendly, even though i made prior arrangements with tyler wright.   serious lack of reachable electrical wall outlets.  serious dust behind bed -- noticed when searching for outlets.  requested fridge for our meds storage; was not there -- requested one and got one at 2 a.m.  then had to request a larger replacement.  both were in very poor condition.  wife slipped in shower; had to request a safety mat.   very poor coordination and very poor room.

the hotel seemed very dated and i was hoping for somewhere that i wanted to lounge at for the whole day but i had to go else where for food and i thought facilities and cleanliness would be much better for the cost...the paint was coming off the walls in the room and the halls were very dirty they had simply just not been vacuumed
the bed was one of the best i've ever slept on.

really enjoyed my stay 
john and brenda and the rest for the front desk team was amazing
honestly, our first impression was not good and the rest of the days were average.
beautiful grounds and pool area, room was clean and comfy.
everything was fine.  great staff. nice amenities.
amazing place, great hotel. love it.
very nice property, friendy and helpful staff.
good property with a nice golf course and pool area. excellent staff, except housekeeping was sloppy and required frequent follow ups. front desk and restaurant staff were excellent and very helpful.
the best i’ve ever received from all of the staff members very very professional bar none.
amazing service and the pools are fantastic!
the property is beautiful and in good condition. the evening reception. the great staff: front desk, guests reception, and the tap room.
very nice hotel. the staff was very friendly. the two pools were very nice as well. we enjoyed our stay.
everything was great
great hotel! staff and other guests were respectful. i stay here every year for a conference and i’ll keep coming back.
starting to age and become worn out

for a higher priced property things were not as implied.  no internet service.  passed to a machine answered extension that asked for information i did not have.  hung up on me twice.  actual room no better than a...la quinta.  scratched furniture.  cheap amenities.  web site said, simply, "breakfast".  assumed that would be provided.  none provided.  did the cost of the room include the first floor lobby features which we didn't have time to use?
nice pool area , they have golf but did not play

spacious, inviting, and convenient to boulder and denver.    would definitely come back - the restaurants and tap room are 5* because of the food and the service.  the hotel is 5* as well (i didn't see valet but i wasn't looking i guess).  everything was nice and new.  the weird decor for the lounge areas was a lot of mix/match - but that won't matter because everything is lovely.
always get just what u expectt. nice people and great  rooms for the price. my 3rd time staying here and i will be staying with them again.
property needs a renovation. boring, tired, stale.
great
excellent check in and check out great staff wonderful view great stay can not speak of how great the desk staff was very helpful

nice property. exceptional service from dylan at the front desk. dylan helped us fined a good place for breakfast.  this |MASK|’s method of serving breakfast is disappointing.  one has to wait in a usually long line, with only one employee to order off their breakfast menu.  it’s a snack shop that they turned into the only place to order breakfast ?  just not |MASK| standard :(. 

comfortable beds and a nice / smaller property.

might return when traveling in this area.
we enjoyed our stay a great deal! we recommend this location.
great location, nice room,

db38b19b897dbece3e34919c662b3fd66d23b615.title: nice hotel , great staff! perfect for famiies
db38b19b897dbece3e34919c662b3fd66d23b615.text: my children love this hotel, i wish they had more eating options, but overall they are great. very very family friendly and staff is very nice and accommodating.

stayed at the |MASK| |MASK| for one night to celebrate my birthday. the gentleman at the front desk who checked me in was amazing. he went above and beyond to welcome me to the resort. i wish i could remember his name!! i was gifted with a welcome bottle of champagne and chocolate covered strawberries to toast my birthday! thank you again! 

i spent the day saturday at the spa on site, and had an amazing time. i do wish there was a steam room available, and a sauna that you didn't have to reserve time at... but other than that it was wonderful and i will be back. 

overall... i had a great time, enjoyed the room... the bed was comfortable... the bathroom could use a bit of updating, but other than that... no complaints!

hotel is beautiful and very clean, poolside table service was slow and the dining options are limited to one restaurant for breakfast and one for dinner and lunch. breakfast was great, nice buffet. the gym, pool, and hot tub are lovely. location is convenient and very easy to get in and out of.
nice looking hotel with spacious room and good food options. very close to shopping.
it was a great stay no complaints
very noisy till late due to several party's going on outside with loud music

the a/c cover and filter n our room was removed (little loud),

there was one towel in the room.
really comfortable bed, great breakfast at camper, nice lobby areas and pools
property staff very friendly and room was very comfortable with a very comfortable bed!

the |MASK| |MASK| has an amazing view of the rockies if you choose a room with mountain view. it is certainly worth the extra $ the reception and greeting staff are amazing! the location is great and if you have time don't forget to pamper yourself and your loved one at mokara spa!

love the year round outdoor pool
and hot tub. this is a big asset because hard to find hotels that have these amenities. the gym is big and offers a ton of weights and cardio machines.
they accept dogs but it’s a $100 fee which we were unaware about so be prepared. overall good experience.
the property should not be listed as 4 star. it's in a terrible condition and need renovation. the bed was the worst.

my husband and i had a christmas party was there only one night, didn’t even shower the next day 312.50 was taken out of my account. i called they said oh you had a spa treatment. no i didn’t i wasn’t even there a full 10 hours. it’s been 6 days and they still haven’t refunded me the money. i call every day they just said it could take 3-5 days. haven’t even offered me anything for my trouble. it’s a week before christmas i have 3 kids i don’t have 300.00 just sitting around.... very disappointed. sad thing is they put on a great christmas party but my boss and owners know what they are doing so we probably won’t be back.
the hotel was clean and the staff was very friendly. i would absolutely come back the next time i’m in town.

i have stayed here several times when i could enjoy the pool and golf.  property has a resort feel.  i was disappointed the main restaurant was not open for dinner.  parking very easy.  a lot of shopping and eating options close by.

beautiful pool and friendly staff. the room was clean but the hvac never allowed the room to get cold, the shower and sink barely drained and the door was hard to open. these rooms need updating. there also needs to be updated tvs that allow you to stream from your phone.
the staff was impressively nice!  everyone seemed to genuinely care about your experience at the hotel.  the rooms were nice, pool and restaurants were fantastic!   overall perfection for us!
loved everything about this hotel!  staff, pool, restaurants, rooms, and location!  everything was ideal!!!

it is a beautiful property in a good location. 
the staff was outstanding for the most part. the tap room staff was uneducated and seemed to be held back by communication issues with the kitchen. 
we were on the 8th floor and did not have hot water for long periods of time each morning, which was a significant issue. our room had an adjoining door and a young couple with an infant was placed in that adjoining room for a night, so we very clearly heard the baby cry all evening and off and on throughout the night. the hotel had many empty rooms and placing an infant next to us with only that door between our rooms as a sound muffler seemed inconsiderate.
the hotel was amazing except exhaust fan didnt work and a/c in room didnt work well.

this property is really run down and not at all a fancy resort you might think it is from the pretty picture of the pools. the pools were supposed to be heated and reasonable to use in all seasons, but they were frigid. the hot tub was out of order during our stay. our room had cracks in the walls and a chunk missing off the mirror. restaurants were closed much of the time, and room service was not available during our stay. the staff was not wearing masks, including someone who came to our room with additional towels, which i found really inconsiderate in the middle of a pandemic. the whole place was a ghost town - i guess everyone else got the memo that this isn't a very nice hotel.
staff was so kind and helpful, both front desk, and in the camper restaurant. only complaint was not knowing we were on a floor with pets, and a dog across the hallway was barking a lot.
was a lovely stay
just perfect in every way! outstanding service! from check in to housekeeping to room service, absolutely totally satisfied
all good

i booked a suite with a balcony.  the large size was very cozy and provided more than ample space for us.  i was traveling with my teenage daughter, so in the morning i would close the pocket doors to the bedroom and allow her to sleep while i worked (i love pocket doors, by the way - very efficient space saver).  
although this was a great feature, the room does need some serious updating.  carpet, drapery, sofa, chair with ottoman, etc. - too much fabric!  nowadays, people want as little of that heavy fabric as possible!
and the obviously dated decor is in need of some serious modernization.
shower was pretty good, except there was a shower curtain instead of a door (ewww).   
towels were well stocked.
housekeeping was superior.  hats off to you guys.
all lamps and overhead bulbs were in good working order.  
robe was provided, which was nice.
a/c worked well, although it made a clicking sound every night (my fault for not addressing it with front desk or maintenance - wasn't bad enough for me to remember until the bedtime).
the pool was pretty nice with an outside bar.  
staff exceptionally courteous and accommodating.  big ups to every department.  
restaurant bar was stocked nicely.  could have used a nicer selection of wines by the glass.
gym was great - superior, in fact.  
ample parking in lot.  well lit and safe.
all in all,good value.  i really appreciated the sitting area. just please, please spiff up the rooms.people feel better with less fabric!
excellent service-both pool bar staff were awesome. great food at the bar-clean rooms. definitely will return.
the staff. hands down impressive!
second pool was empty. main pool area does not look like photos. other than that overall great stay.
i cancelled the reservations 3 times and i keep getting notifications that it started and how it’s….i better not get charged for the stay…last time i use expedia.
unfortunatly the restraunt was under construction when we stayed. the hotel is nice and is close to lots of shopping. the hot tube though it is luke warm was a plus. totaly set up for conventions.
great service, terrific rooms and overall aesthetic, nice breakfast menu at the camper. coffee should be more available to guests early in the morning before the shop and restaurants open.

i have stayed here every year for my birthday since i was 10!!!! celebrating 23 this year. i love this place! amazing service, comfortable rooms, and wonderful amenities!! will be back in a few months
the bathroom shower in room 602 had a great deal of black mildew.

this property is great to visit our child at boulder.  very close (10 min short drive) and more affordable than hotels in boulder.  plus the area around the hotel is great for morning or evening walks.  close to lots of shopping and grocery (and costco)!
great hotel within an easy drive of denver and boulder.  excellent restaurant and a separate tap room/ sports bar.
always friendly staff, my second time staying there and 10/10 recommended to anyone that asks. forgot his name, but ryan or dylan was super helpful and efficient
highly recommend it! the staff was extremely friendly- they had kiddy bags filled with goodies when we checked in. the pools, hot tub, and fire pits were great. highly recommend!
beautiful views of the mountains and city. this place has everything you need to relax and the location is great to be about 15 minutes from boulder and 20 minutes to denver.

pool was excellent.  property ver nice. staff was accommodating. room, 2 queen beds m, mountain view, was fine, clean, quiet, larger than most.  mountain view overlooks the parking lot. pool view may be preferred.
nice pool area rooms were clean check in was easy
the staff was amazing and helpful! highly recommend the |MASK| |MASK|. we will for sure be back!!!
awesome!!
the spa was great!

best part of our stay is the hotel staff. they went above and beyond to make our stay wonderful. their sous chef sean really took care of us with his extra touches and attention.
our room was clean and the bed and pillows were very comfortable.
staff were sooooo nice!
great facility across the board.
friendly, clean, but furniture worn could use fresh up
beautiful view of mountins quite tucked away from busy streets

hotel was ok.  room furnishings were getting a little worn.

staff was very nice.
hotel was clean and quiet.   staff was very polite and professional.

bad things. entire lobby was filled with a really loud benefit auction with costumed, unmasked people. so loud and obnoxious we considered not staying. when we went to use hot tub it was filled (8-10) with loud, rambunctious kids, no parental supervision, jumping in and out, yelling. we left really disappointed.

the staff is amazing here, the nicest staff ever. we loved the pool as well. the restaurant was great. convenient location. the rooms are a little dated for an |MASK|- but we really had a nice stay and would for sure stay again.
great!

the property was nice, but the food was not to our liking. we asked for well done eggs and they were presented to us as runny whites. for the price, you would think that the cook could have gotten it right. and 1 piece of toast!
rooms could use a little updating, but nevertheless, loved the hotel and staff and amenities.  was clean also.  will be back
its great for a staycation or just to get some r&r

i called this property on the day of my arrival to let them know that i would be arriving after midnight. the man at the hotel front desk said that he made a note on my reservation, so that my room wouldn’t be given away. well, my room was given away. i arrived in the middle of the night with two children and they said that they didn’t have our room. everyone in our group was staying at the hotel. they gave me a piece of paper and sent me to a nearby hotel of lesser quality. the nearby hotel was charging less per night that weekend and they did not have the mountain view that i had paid extra for at the time of reservation, the hotel said that they would bill the |MASK|, but, instead, there was no bill under my door or anywhere at checkout time. they merely charged my credit card for what i was paying at the |MASK|, regardless of the room downgrade and lesser price they were charging other patrons. i am very disappointed that expedia says there is nothing they can do.

my husband and i stayed at this hotel for 4 nights, october 5-9. we chose it because of the location, outside of denver but still close enough to everything, and closer to rocky mtn national park as well. we were very happy with the location, everything that we wanted to do was within reasonable distance. the hotel itself is located in a business park area, but there are restaurants and a shopping mall very close by. the hotel itself was lovely, very large, we liked the dining options right on site. we got room service one night which was very quick and delicious food/desserts.
very nice hotel, we enjoyed our stay.  the large lobby is lovely, and we love the morning breakfast buffet, it was our second time there and would stay again.
staff most helpful.  send personal note to gm.  would have liked better jets on hot tub, but adequate.

booked the room and was about to arrive when a staff member called and said that they didn't know how but they booked us a room even though they were all booked for the night and that they couldn't do anything for us. so no money for another hotel, we slept in our car.
very nice. great view.
nice hotel.
nice look and great location
love the pools
given the nightly rate of a usually above average hotel chain, this place is under renovation and should charge accordingly!
perfect stay during cu homecoming
i would definitely recommend this property to anyone staying in the broomfield, co area! the staff was amazing we had a blast they made us feel welcome!
it is always a pleasant stay.

this is a beautiful resort with a lovely lobby and grounds.  the dinner bar/ restaurant had a limited selection of food and an unusual take on the lowly burger.  it wasn't a hit with the tomato paste.  i mistakenly checked out a day early.  we turned in our keys and walked out.  when i realized my error and returned that afternoon, there was a bit of a delay as the room had been given away and the manager had to be consulted to get our "paid in advance" room back.  this error of mine could have been caught if the desk clerk had asked us what room and verified.
nice looking property, big and open.

absolutely loved the experience provided. as a solo female traveling i felt completely safe at all times here and i loved all the amenities from the incredibly comfortable robes to the easily accessible room service. already recommended to friends.
very nice hotel convenient to denver, boulder, fort collins, and estes park.

found hair on my bed sheets and in the tub.  there was also a mouse i saw in my room and recorded it on video.  went to the assistant manager who apologized, but all she did to make it right was offer a free bottle of water.  it was insulting to say the least since there were already 2 free bottles in my room.  she basically did nothing about it and didn't seem to care. you can see the mouse to the right of the trash can.

overall, a central location between denver and boulder. great hotel staff that was willing to accommodate needs (early check in and  late check out) and a shuttle that provides transport to near by shopping. the pub, on site bar, staff did not appear to want to serve patrons that were not white. decided not to eat or drink there my entire stay.
golfing was great

didn't spend a lot of time around the property, as it was winter and i also was largely there on during sleeping hours and wasn't able to have time to try to enjoy being at the resort.  still, it looked as if it had seen better days and needed to be refreshed a bit.  a little old and tired, needed some tlc around the edges.
great hotel/resort. everything done right, but 20 years old & needs refreshing.
the staff was extremely helpful and friendly.  the dining options for such a beautiful hotel were very limited and lacking.
staff was great, extremely friendly and helpful. really enjoyed my stay and look forward to staying again in the near future.
the food in the restaurant was awesome. what ever i needed they got for me instinctly . everyone was polite and very helpful
amazing bartenders
nice location to several destinations.
swimming pool, fitness center, fire pits, drinks on site.
the staff couldn't be nicer and were so helpful with any query we had.   nothing was too  much trouble.   i would definitely stay there again.
whoever checked us in was amazing. he was from india. because of him we will be back. great service he made the trip wonderful.

first night room was in pour condition , broken items etc 
changed rooms and second room was great
it was very clean and well maintained
property was well maintained. staff was wonderful. rooms were clean and comfortable. the only con was all the bees outside when you were trying to dine or sit at the pool with a drink.

great hotel for a part of our colorado stay. no restaurant for breakfast but they did try an order/delivery option - it wasn’t ideal. we had to ask for housekeeping twice in 5 days but it was immediately taken care of. good place to come back to and relax in after a day out!

so the |MASK| |MASK| is not a resort -- it is closer to a convention hotel. all the dining options were diminished from c-19 (not their fault) but it was not what we were expecting. rooms were ok, but a tad tired. hallways weren't clean from yesterday's room service/ice buckets at 3:00 the following day. pool was ok, but nothing else to do.
it was completely disappointing! for all that money i coild ofbrented at motel 6 and had a better room!

my stay was okay however i did fall in the hotel lobby because of an uneven section in the flooring that is now covered by a chair. i’m going to be okay but i was disappointed that there were two employees present one on the phone behind the front desk and a manager who was chatting with another and neither bothered to see if i was okay until my husband asked the female employee at the desk for ice because i’d fallen and twisted my ankle. they all saw.  the manager who i had to pass by in order to sit in the chair continued chatting with the guest he was already conversing with when i fell. the female employee brought ice and finally asked if i was okay and said if i needed anything she or her manager could assist me. i asked who was the manager, she mentioned his name (but i can’t recall it).  i said oh he’s the guy saw me fall but continued chatting with the other guest and didn’t bother to see if i was okay, he’s the guy i limped past to sit on the chair, and he said nothing, but he’s the manager. the female employee replied yes he’s the manager. she mentions the incident to him and he finally comes over but not before he chats again with the same guest he was chatting with when i fell. he asked if i was okay i said yes but my ankle hurts. he offered some tylenol and i accepted. i also told him to cover that area because someone else could fall and twist their ankle too. a hotel guest who witnessed the incident moved a chair over it to cover the uneven section.

the rooms were spotless and housekeeping did an impeccable job each day.  furniture in the rooms was very worn, woodwork in the rooms, elevators and hallways very worn and old looking.  pool chairs were dirty and amenities at the pool were extremely limited or non existent. i have stayed here several times over the past 10 years and the hotel has definitely seen better days, especially the rooms.
rooms are dated, but the amenities make up for it! great pool & golf course.  s'mores and movies on saturday night!

i purchased a mountain view room and when i arrived i was put in a room on the other side. their excuse was it was because i purchased through a third-party and the information didn’t transfer. fortunately, they had a mountain view to switch me into. the room card deactivated every day. it took three days of me requesting housekeeping for them to come even though i didn’t put the card in the door that told them not to. while they were prompt and courteous in fixing the issues, for a resort style hotel, it was not worth the value.

three false fire alarms.   only very not water in the shower.    phone did not work.  tv did not work. 
furniture frayed in the lobby.  

staff was great
great spot for a long weekend. the property pictures make it look more secluded than it is.

this hotel is charging room rate along with incidental charges during the check in even when the room had been already prepaid.
we will try to avoid it in the future.

the staff was very friendly and the hotel itself was very nice.  i would have enjoyed the pools and spa had i stayed in the summer months.  

however, the location was not very convenient for tourist.  you definitely need a car if you are staying at this hotel and want to do things in denver, bolder or the other tourist activities.

we have stayed at other omnis before and this one just missed the mark. first, it was under construction when we arrived.  the message we received prior to booking stated that all construction would be finished by october.  that wasn’t the case. due to the renovations, the hotel smelled like chemicals or paint.  we could not use the outside facilities due to inclement weather, but when we went to sit inside in the evening we were told we could not go to the lounge/or any of the seating areas due to a private party. there was an event two nights in a row. there was no place to sit other than our room.  this was a disappointment.  however, the rooms were renovated and clean. the beds were incredibly comfortable.  despite the remodel, the bathroom did not have a working fan.  the location was in a business park which was surprising, but the parking was free.
i think charging a 'resort fee' is crazy.  for what?  it is purely extra profit. nice property but that isn't cool.
great property - good bar and i liked all the seating areas they have - outside and inside. food wasn’t great. that’s my only complaint.

it just seemed old. beds were uncomfortable. pillows were terrible and lumpy. the fabric on the chairs was frayed. shower curtains…gross. it’s time to upgrade to shower doors. elevators were loud and could be heard running all night long and we were at the opposite end of the building.
love this place
el hotel es excelente todo muchas gracias.

on arrival the property is nice. the decor in our room seemed outdated though. dinner in restaurant was a disappointment, the menu did not have anything for kids, and the same goes for breakfast as well. the restaurant was out of half of the 10 or 12 beers they had on tap. customer service at check in was brief and dry, the guy did not take time to explain any of the property’s amenities. the servers at dinner and breakfast were ok. we had booked four nights but checked out after one. the woman that checked us out seemed the most personable but did not seem terribly surprised we were leaving early. we tried this |MASK| hotel as we had not stayed at one before, will not do it again.
great views and close proximity to other venues. didn’t care for the construction noise.
live
love the |MASK|. they are remodeling and need to fix up the hot tub, spa, and fitness center
great pool and outdoor space during winter
it was everything amazing
everyone was very nice!

refreshing upgrades in the room. cleanliness. lovely view from the window. staff services were excellent. people had amazing vibes. breakfast at camper was yummy. 

there’s scope to upgrade/restyle the gym and bring it to more modern scale.
everything was great

this was the worst experience ever in a hotel!!!  hotel room was in total disrepair. shower didn't work - only scalding hot water would come out, toilet made noise, and paper-thin walls could easily hear guests next room over, and had to switch to another room due to shower valve broken and couldn't even take a shower the 1st night - was too late at night to switch rooms once realized broken shower valve. switched rooms the 2nd night and the room was dirty with food on the floor right by the bed, tray with ice bucket was really dirty, refrigerator not working and had to ask for an alarm clock wasn't in the room.  ice maker was out on almost all floors, going floor to floor to look for an ice maker that wasn't broken.  elevator sounded strange one time going up.  was charged twice for the restaurant bill not discovered until checked out of the hotel and closely reviewed the receipt. the breakfast buffet in the restaurant was really expensive and awful for the money - the eggs were cold and still charging a very high premium price for the buffet.  an event going on in the hotel made the hotel guests 2nd class citizens where event attendees took over the hotel amenities, reserving all spots in the bar restaurant at tables so my husband and i couldn't even have a table to sit at since all reserved for an event and had to go out of hotel for dinner was snowing really hard and we both slipped/fell at entrance of hotel since there was no salt or sand put down.
property was nice, pools were great and heated. a little bit off the beaten path. rooms need to be updated.
pasamos un momento muy agradable con mi familia todo estuvo muy bien en especial el personal todos muy atentos, lo recomiendo ☺️
staff was helpful and friendly.
2nd time staying here.  cozy quiet and well maintained hotel with a bar and dining options and heated pools and jacuzzi all year around
lovely remodeled and refurbished suite and hotel.
i’d recommend this beautiful hotel to anyone.
i thought the property was beautiful - the carpet was clean and completely new looking and the rooms were gorgeous - great view of the mountains as well - highly recommend.

outdated, no hot water, analog tv, ac in room worked like a motel 6 

very disappointed booked 2 nights left after first
staff was very helpful and the facility is beautiful and peaceful.
the property is out dated, not very clean the hot water in our room took 8min to warm up the staff was not very friendly. i will never stay there again for the price it was not worth it.
restaurant was very slow. the breakfast.
beautiful hotel. would have liked mountain view. hairdryers need to be replaced.
1995 style furnishings ! well maintained room and beds. excellent views on 8th floor. two swimming pools and has exercise room. $9.95 a day wifi . keurig coffee in the morning. great am showering !!!
nice hotel near to shops, mall, and restaurants.  i booked this over another place due to the tee pee.  but the tee pee has been taken down.  a little disappointing.  otherwise, it's a nice place.
i loved the place it was clean friendly and very accommodating close to things to do and see and the food was amazing
no room service, rooms weren’t ready on time, no open slots for the pool.
great staff.

disappointing stay – not worth the money.
the room was noisy, and i could clearly hear traffic from outside. there were no slippers, and the floor felt sticky. overall, it didn’t meet expectations for the price.

love the grounds, so beautiful and quiet. great area for walking and enjoying the outdoors. the recent remodel of the hotel is welcoming, and the new restaurants have wonderful food with great service. we will return soon.

although the poolside bar/bistro was not open during our stay due to weather? - that is one of my favorite things about staying at the |MASK|.
the tap house bar/grill was also wonderful - hopefully their full menu will return soon.
i really liked the area and staff was great. heated pool came in handy. i was disappointed there was no breakfast, not even coffee. come on for that price should of had more.

this was a great place to stay at, somewhat vintage but very cleanly and nice. we had absolutely no issues during our stay and had great service. the only thing i would wish for would be a device for streaming in rooms.
very nice

pool was wonderful 
coffee shop in lobby was fantastic

i loved the pools and got tub.  the bar service was excellent with friendly servers who were efficient.  it made for a very relaxing day.

the breakfast buffet was also excellent.  the food was absolutely fresh & delicious.  it made for a great start to your day.  

you are close enough to denver or boulder without all the traffic and noise.

definitely recommend!!!

the top sheet had black hairs. had some kind of red stains like there was gum on the sheet.
no openings for services at the spa.
steam room was gone. no hot water...to take a bath.
when you would move in the bed lights would go off and on...
beautiful hotel and staff very friendly.

what i didn’t like was the food choices. my breakfast had rubbery eggs and the barbecue dinner was ok.  luckily, there are many restaurants in the area to go eat.  there are about 12 floors in the hotel and only two of the four elevators seemed to work.  with the crowds and only two elevators, there were long waits to get places.

overall a nice property with a large pool area.  the bed pillows totally flatten when you lay your head on them.  it’s almost like sleeping without pillows.  the hotel allows dogs, which i don’t mind, but our neighbors had a dog that constantly barked and we had to call the front desk to ask them to please fix the issue.
i was surprised that there wasn't free wi-fi offered and also disappointed with no complimentary breakfast.  there was a breakfast buffet, but that price was $23/pp.
we had a wonderful night away and really enjoyed sitting by the pool.

starting with the good… the location is great (we had a kid at cu), 100% the staff we encountered seemed uniformly cordial and welcoming, and the public areas of the property are quite nice.

the not so good… we’d reserved a king room but were given one with two queens at check-in. whatever. arriving late our first of four nights, we went straight to bed. in the morning, we discovered our toilet wouldn’t flush. again, whatever. we had to go to the lobby for coffee anyway. but then we tried to shower. it took everything that poor shower had just to spit a meager stream of water 8 inches from the wall. 

so, we bathed alla puttanesca and reported our issues to the front desk. they assured us that maintenance would fix the toilet but that the feeble water pressure was just due to everyone taking a shower at the same time. sure.

when we came back that night, the toilet worked (tho it hadn’t been cleaned) but the sink would now burp up a little drain water every time you’d flush. unfortunately, the shower still dispensed water like a spray bottle. 

the next morning, we went down to the front desk and again complained. this time we given a new room and everything was fine. 
at check-out, i asked about a reduction of the $454 (plus all the taxes) cu graduation rate we paid for each of the first two nights, given that we had a room with such janky plumbing. “sure, i can take off the $25 destination charge.” that’s it? “i will talk to my manager and see what we can do.” evidently, t

title: a fantastic stay at |MASK| |MASK| hotel!

title: a fantastic stay at |MASK| |MASK| hotel!

we had a wonderful experience at the |MASK| |MASK| hotel! our room was comfortable with a lovely balcony, perfect for morning caffeine fixp. the beds were cozy, and the customer service was top-notch throughout our stay. we enjoyed delicious meals at the restaurants and had a great time relaxing by the pool. 

while we had a minor issue with one staff member, olivia, it didn't detract from our overall positive experience. we highly recommend this hotel for anyone looking to unwind and enjoy excellent accommodations. we can’t wait to return!

upon check in, we were told there was a smoker friendly event happening. it was loud, took up most of the outdoor space and services, and people were having drunken fights in the hall at1am. was just trying to do a little staycation with my kids before school starts, but not the greatest experience.

beautiful property.  overall the staff was amazing accommodating.  our only disappointment was the staff at shep’s.  bartenders were excellent, but wait staff was rude or completely ignores us on nearly every interaction for food.

stayed 4 nights and our experience was amazing! upon check in we inquired about transportation to the red rocks and audrey working the desk gave us the name of a 3rd party service…our driver was wonderful! we mentioned it was our daughter’s birthday and audrey had sent up a birthday card and dessert for her. shep’s restaurant was delicious! my husband espcially enjoyed the bison chili. the drinks were great also. there are games (billiards, shuffleboard, ping pong and darts in the restaurant, we enjoyed those. the fire pits out back were so nice and relaxing to sit by. the pools and hot tub also very clean and comfortable. we had services in the spa and had a great experience. we picked the |MASK| |MASK| because it was pretty center to all the things we wanted to do. colorado springs, pikes peak, red rocks amphitheater, and rmnp all within 1-1.5hr drive to the hotel. best trip ever! all the staff we encountered so friendly. highly recommend!
tiffany at the front desk was wonderful, friendly and very informative. we will definitely be back!
i loved the view of the mountains from  my room.

friendly staff and great accommodations

absolutely terrible experience with housekeeping department. would never recommend this property to anyone. room not cleaned, and incompetent housekeeping staff who carelessly discarded several of my wife’s items (including expensive shoes and personal items from our daughter’s wedding the night before) into their trash. it took them all day to recover them.
poolside our order got skipped and then my son got food poisoning so that was less than ideal..outside of that. truly, everything was fabulous.

corporate resort for golfers   families. this gem needs a major dusting off and upgrades to return it to former glory. the limited staff was very friendly and eager to please. upper pool was closed due to a broken pump for more than 3 days. i would have liked more attention to detail with cleaning and upgrades to rooms   bathrooms. only one restaurant was open- a brew pub with limited menu. the food situation was so dire due to lack of staff that they contracted with a phenomenal food truck that parked behind upper pool area. you won’t be disappointed by the surrounding landscape and golf course.

the |MASK| is a go-to hotel whenever i have business associates in town. it is low-key, but nicely appointed. so many smaller hotels use smelly cleaning solutions, but the smells at the |MASK| are pleasant and uplifting.

the hotel is nice, staff was friendly but not always available. i needed wash cloths and towels i called downstairs no one answered. i called three more times over a 15 min span. no answer, called back once more was told they would be up 10 min. 30 min later , my sister went down and waited for someone to help her. no one was at the desk for some time. same issue for a blanket needed, had to go down and waited close to 20 min for someone to come to the desk. shower was a little dated, but overall, the property was nice and clean. i would say the biggest issue is the staff being available. however, my encounters with the staff were always pleasant. there was some very loud guest at night, extremely noisy and arguing, however these were guests, i don't blame the establishment for that, just know if someone is arguing, you will hear it as well

this hotel is located in a perfect spot, it is close to just about everything in frisco from the star, stonebriar mall, and all sorts of shops and restaurants. the room was beautiful and was the first hotel i’ve stayed in that had hardwood floors instead of carpet. the restaurant and bar were closed due to covid but we frequented many restaurants around us and had no issue finding a place for food and drinks around us. my issue with this stay was that we had to request our room to be cleaned. every hotel i’ve stayed at, ranging in price from $60 a night to $250 a night has cleaned our room for us daily, no request needed. we were informed this was due to covid and being short staffed as the hotel only had one cleaning employee working for the rest of the week. we made a request monday night and tuesday afternoon we saw 3 cleaning women who were near our room who hadn’t gotten to ours yet. it was apparent there were 2 more housekeeping employees present than the one that the front desk informed is we’re working, so this rubbed us the wrong way since we were lied to. i understand water conservation and had no issue reusing towels and bed linens but i was hoping that we could come back to a clean room daily considering we are in a pandemic. if they really were short staffed i understand that, as just about every company is struggling due to the issue that covid is presenting businesses of all kinds, but you would think hotels would have a higher standard of cleanliness.
