i love the |MASK| hotels.
great property, efficient check-in, great location

this was an experience we will never forget. arrived a day later than planned due to mechanical issues with our plane.  called several times to confirm our room would be available when we were arrived, but this was not actually clear until we arrived on site. they refused expedia's request for a refund for the unused night, though they had ample notice from the day prior. we were given keys to our room, headed up, unlocked the door and walked in on a woman showering in "our" room. awkward! the front desk apologized - the woman had (obviously) called down as well.  the room was nice, except for a horribly designed shower head that would not stay in position and hosed down the bathroom more than once.  i do not see us returning to |MASK| hotel |MASK|.
nice, updated, spacious rooms. wish we would have taken advantage of the breakfast and dinner options! one thing i will say is that our room did not come with a fridge if that’s important to you.
the front desk is not so honest, and everything else are pretty good

i had booked a room with 2 queen beds, but only given a room with 1 king bed and a roll out bed. this was very upsetting, being the 2 queen room costed more than the 1 king room. had i planned to stay there for longer, i would have canceled my reservation.
friendly staff, meals are good and house keeping personal very helpful.
the staff are very nice and the rooms are clean

the first night the woman at the front desk was amazing but it went completely down hill after that. we couldn’t get more toilet paper or towels. rug in room was absolutely disgusting. lobby decorated nice. restaurant terrible service. i do not recommend this hotel
this is a beautiful hotel and will not get a nicer hotel for the price, nothing comes close
friendly & helpful. room was very good. access easy.

very modern, spacious and well designed in general.
ease of access to all services.
minimalistic decor very attractive.
the property was clean. food was great. staff was friendly.

ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.title: hip hotel width stylish interiors
ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.text:
this hotel was fantastic!! the rooms are decorated wonderfully. 
the cleanliness matched the perfect interiors and the beds were comfy.  you'll feel like your in your  own private loft.
i would definitely stay here again!!
great place to stay.

there was no fridge in my room, even though my booking listed a fridge. apparently there are only fridges in rooms on odd numbered floors. there was also no ice maker on the floor. when asked for a room with a fridge, they said they would get me a fridge, but never did.
terrific getaway hotel - easy access to all things frisco. only negative is our room fridge didn’t work.
everything
the suite was perfect, nice large table that we used to play games.  bartender was super nice and let us borrow their bottle opener.
the gentleman at the front desk was very kind and professional.
nice hotel. the front lady was very nice. enjoyed staying there and will visit again.
great location comfortable be clean room. i don’t know why expedia has a minimum number of characters
this is our second time at |MASK| and it’s wonderful!

the receptionist at checkin was a bit rude, but the receptionist at checkout was friendly. the towels smelled a bit strange. aside from these minor issues, i had a great stay. it was quiet, clean, and i felt relaxed during my stay. i would book this hotel again.
i loved this hotel. it was so beautiful and quiet.
very friendly and helpful staff. clean rooms and great environment. will definitely be staying with hotel |MASK| on aves of stars next time!
the establishment was extremely clean and excellent customer service.
the food was fabulous, property so wonderful. staff was so accommodating. this place is the real deal!! recommend highly!
friendly staff- good food- clean and comfortable room!
first time at this property. it was a great experience. the staff was friendly and accommodating for our group. location was close to all our weekend activities.
the young lady up front knew my name and was very surprised, that’s when you know that front counter is driving the guest experience!

location, location, location!!! 
it was a great stay. minor cosmetics, but overall great condition. the location is very convenient. there is a shopping center, and plenty of other activities all within a 10 minute radius. we will definitely book again.
the lobby as well as the room was very clean nicely decorated
clean and beautiful decor missed having a small refrigerator.  dinner menu should've been accessible in the rooms on display.
ok
we had the best experience. the hotel was beautiful! location was amazing! staff was so friendly- thank you for a great stay- we will be back.
i really enjoyed the friendly stuff. whenever i needed something the front desk immediately fulfilled my wishes.

enjoyed our stay, though was surprised the hotel’s restaurant food was not very good.  i had the shrimp tacos and had to literally spit out the shrimp in the first bite it was so gross. my husbands omelet at breakfast was overcooked in oil and had a bad taste to it.  besides those things, everything else was great.
convenient for what we were here for.
great location. very clean. modern decoration. awesome staff
i wish my room had a microwave
away from downtown, great for sport events, and plenty of shopping and resturants.

nice property and layout; perfect executive king room; great small conference room for our training meeting
unfortunate i stayed there during initial stages of covid pandemic so multiple services were not available.  staff did everything they could to make my stay pleasant.
great location, minimal noise, clean rooms and easy check-in process.

ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.title: several members of staff had a poor attitude.
ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.text:
1. i was told over the phone that we could check in at 1:30. 
the front desk curtly told me not before 2pm. 
2. after waiting 10 minutes for her to get off the phone, i was told that they did not have iced tea available. 
3. room service trays in the hallways all afternoon and overnight... indicates nobody is walking the halls.  serious attraction for roaches and rats.
nice clean room for a decent price- very modern and comfortable- highly recommended if you can pay a little more.

the shower door is at the wrong end of the shower. it opens towards the wall and you have to squeeze past the door and the wall to get in the shower and the towel hook is at the wrong end of the shower.

i reserved a suite. the room had a bedroom and an outer room.  for some reason, the outer room does not have a sofa and chair - instead it has a table and four chairs - why?  does the hotel think i'm playing poker every night?  other than that - great place to stay.

the expedia booking made it look like breakfast was included and when i got there it was not, and ironically there was nothing set up and no one eating breakfast either.  in the evening when i tried to order a beer and something eat at the bar, most of the food wasn't available and the server appeared to be distracted with other issues and i was given a glass of water, no beer. so i went back to my room to watch the football.
hotel is very nice and clean. staff is friendly. rooms need to have a small refrigerator.
i will stay here every time i’m in the dallas area! beautiful room. wonderful staff!
great location.  rooms were very spacious and clean.  perfect spot for a girls weekend.

room was uncomfortable. would not recommend. we had king suite and found this room type is literally wrapped around elevator making it noisy. also there is a table for 4 but no sofa or place to relax comfortably. the bedroom only had 1 nightstand so no place for phone or set down a beverage. we travel to this area monthly and i would not choose again.
wonderful amenities, clean, safe, great location!
the restaurant and the location was great
the hotel was clean and staff was nice!
very clean, nice staff, rooms are bigger than i thought they’d be, beautiful walking trails! would stay here again!
the room was really nice and clean. the bar inside of the hotel had really good food and drinks.

upon arriving after 5 hour drive, not only did they not have a room for us but gave away our reserved room (we came in a day later- which i notified hotel and expedia to make sure they would not mark us a a no show.) expedia was very helpful and refunded all of our money but the front desk clerk could have cared less. i literally walked out and made reservations down the street at the hampton. never again.
atmosphere has character, and staff super kind and helpful .
easy to park, friendly staff

the lobby was beautiful and smelled fresh throughout the facility. i noticed the decorative bed covering on both beds were dirty. the white comforter also had stains therefore i requested another one. staff said they are low due to the hotel was booked but was able to find one which i was pleased. 2 of the pillows didn’t appear to be fresh so i removed them. on the day of checkout we noticed yellow fluid stains on 1 bed and old dried blood drips on the other while we were looking for our belongings. to sum it up, the room was clean but the bedding had not been changed.
lovely property, centrally located between comerica center, dr. pepper ballpark and the ford star. great hotel bar, be sure to ask for the old fashioned, my husband says theirs is the best.
nice comfortable room but they didn't make it up after the first night of our three night stay.  apologized and brought clean towels when we pointed this out on our return.
the rooms were very nice with a large bathroom, and very comfortable beds. we will definitely stay here again.

don’t like the outdoor pool because we are unable to use it in january every year.    it would also be nice to have in ground parking as well so if by any chance bad weather comes thru your vehicle is protected.     

other than those two things it is an awesome place to stay.
everything was up to par . clean , enjoyable and good service
love this place every time i come. large rooms. comfortable beds. great shampoo and stuff
shower grout was not clean. but everything else was great
place is clean, friendly staff. convenient.
the look the layout the serenity the location you can easily walk to a lot of different establishments from this property this is a 5 star hotel without the 5 star price  thanks!!!!!!!!!!!
check in clerk was a bit short and curt. shower leaked into the room and kitchen faucet was loose

we really enjoyed the bar and restaurant and the close proximity to shopping,  restaurants,  and the higjway. in addition,  the location of the area it was in was very upscale and nice area. 
the only thing we really didn't like is that the walls are pretty thin so unfortunately we heard our neighbors come in very late and talked loudly and then early in the morning the other neighbors kids were up yelling

the hotel was well cleaned and had plenty of comfort! i recommend this hotel because of their professionalism, cleanliness, great rooms, onsite food, and easy access to local offices. 

i was disappointed a couple mornings during my one week stay when the onsite restaurant was not open for breakfast until 1- 1.5hrs later due to staff not showing up.
boutique hotel with a wonderful friendly staff. the hotel now offers very good breakfast ( not included). there is a nice park close by and lots of shops

our stay far exceeded our expectations, especially the friendliness and helpfulness of the staff. everyone we encountered including the staff at check in and check out, the bartender, and room service/ restaraunt staff and the housekeeping staff all went out of their way to ensure our stay was excellent.
staff was nice… hotel nice overall… room could have been cleaner… hair strands all over bed and floor and walls could use a good wipe down.
great location and friendly staff. clean rooms and good places for entertainment nearby.
except for getting my breakfast right after 3 senbacks, would have given an exceptional rating.
i loved this hotel. it is a very artsy hotel. it's very clean. everyone was helpful. i did wish they had breakfast included but they did have a good buffet style breakfast.

love it all!!
bar and restaurant access at oown convinience, cleaness, staff memeber so freindly, safe...

i loved my stay at |MASK|! the staff was so nice and i was lucky enough to snag a front row parking spot each day. room was super clean and the housekeeping staff had my bed made and fresh towels out each day.
they had a power outage before we arrived so our room was not ready when we got there but omar at the front desk took great care of us while we waited . we will definitely be back.
great stay! convenient location.
clean and comfy stay. beautiful walking areas outside. only thing was tree shower head didn't stay on straight (it was a hose). other than that it was very nice!

what discouraged us is they had a water leak that was coming up all over the floor…called for the manager to get us some towels and he never brought any. called again and the night lady came right away with towels so we could lay them on the floor. hopefully they will reach out to us regarding this
great location and experience. we’ll be back when visiting!
when the ac turns on in room 303 something in the vent raddled. it was difficult getting sleep. besides that it was good.

great lil getaway for us!  we rented two rooms and the place was perfect for a quick getaway.  close to legacy hall and the star, so great choices for restaurants and things to do even during covid.  highly recommend!
the front desk staff was amazing! they were attentive and fulfilled all of my requests. i would definitely recommend and will be staying again.
was there for 3 nights and my room only got clean 1 time
staff were very friendly and it was clean and safe.
great place
it was nice and quiet!  can't wait to stay again...
beautiful hotel and friendly staff   very clean also
great location - easy in/out - thousands of places to eat nearby
great

ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.title: overnight stay
ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.text: was only there a short time but was very comfortable and would enjoy a longer stay and to enjoy the amenities
un lugar muy limpio
staff was friendly and helpful.

outstanding hotel! if i could give this a 10 rating i would. friendly staff, clean facility, very nice room, great food and just a block to the comerica center in frisco. this hotel is also adjacent to a beautiful walking path with a stream. highly recommended!
excellent service, exceptional amenities. will definitely return.
hotel is very clean and staff is very nice.  i definitely will come back
the staff was just wonderful. the food and beverages at the lobby bar were great.
nice clean updated property .... beautiful furnishings comfortable kind staff
would definitely stay again. everything was nice and clean and hotel it self is very nice and comfortable

ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.title: hotel front desk
ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.text: i dreaded coming to this hotel after dealing with their front desk employee caitlyn. she unfortunately does not have what it takes in the customer service industry. she was disrespectful and rude and i watched her give the same treatment to others with the color of my skin. if all are not going to be welcomed into this establishment, please reconsider caitlyn and let curtis handle the front desk, he was amazing!
great hotel! definitely gonna stay there again.

this hotel was beautiful inside and out. i had a super late check in and they made it so easy. the staff was super helpful and nice! the hotel restaurant had amazing breakfast and dinner. it is centrally located for shopping and food. i highly recommend staying here.
it was clean, and staff friendly.
the beds were very comfortable
great clean hotel
great location. room and lobby were clean. nice walking trail close by.
i thought it was very nice!  thank you for the great service!
everything was clean. staff was friendly.
the staff was very nice. everything was clean and well cared for.
i liked the property design, the rooms and amenities.   what i was very disappointed in was the restaurant food and service, staff was very friendly but overwhelmed.
no one made up the room
great atmosphere!
the property is beautiful and the staff is friendly. the only issue i had was that my room was not cleaned even when i requested to please clean the room. but everything else was perfect.
great atmosphere, great service and people
very nice property and staff super friendly!
the staff is the best part of the experience!
nice, clean, convenient & very helpful friendly staff.
it’s a really nice place, the room was missing a mini fridge
nice
great spot. super friendly staff especially omar at the front desk .
a clean, beautiful property! this is our second time to stay her and we will return! great location!

such a beautiful, well kept property and cheap kleenex and toilet paper.  come on guys, get up off the money - have been in the business too long - do not nickle and dime a property when there is so much competition out there.  it does not cost that much more to go first class.   so easy to get on and off the tollway - a breeze for traveling.  made it home to sa in 4 hours.
muy buena regresaria
the front desk personnel they we’re rude he was saying talk with his manager but manager didn’t show up because we booked through expedia
enjoyed my 5 hour stay.
great hotel
helpful staff.
cute, clean and great service! the room was spotless and the hotel was close to everything!
price excellent
very nice and affordable.
great and beautiful

the stay was alright until the last night we were not able to get any rest due to this loud noise coming from the air conditioning unit. i had requested to speak with the rm but i assumed this message wasn’t past the night we were given the run around stating that they were trying to contact a on-site manager so no sleep the night before we had to get on the road also the front desk informed me that he would have the rm to give us a call about this also they blamed this on the city being building that night. but other than that everything was fine. would have appreciated a follow up call

i didnt like that we didnt get a daily supply of towels & trash pickup even after i asked for it. we stayed 4 nights. otherwise,  it was great with very comfortable beds & nice shower with nice water pressure.
i like the uniqueness of the |MASK| hotels.  they are my go to!

i very much enjoyed my stay at hotel |MASK|! all the front desk team members were very courteous and helpful. the bartender was also very nice! overall i enjoyed interacting with the staff. my room was very clean and spacious and was very modern. i would definitely stay here again!
i liked the location and quality.
real classy hotel. friendly staff. excellent food & service.
our favorite hotel in the area.
coffee was awful
modern
bath door make strong noise when open or close
great hotel and quite serene location.
the staff was exceptionally pleasant and helpful. hotel was very clean and well kept.  i would definitely stay again!

nice hotel, everything seemed to be new. room, lobby bathroom, furniture was all really clean. friendly staff! great location, close to a lot of restaurants and coffee shops right near the ford center in frisco. lobby is sleek and modern offering a lot of seating areas. pool area was smaller than most hotels we've been too, but cool design and water features makes for a great area to chill out for a few.
wouldn't alloy early check in even though we calles to confrim they would.
nice staff, clean, easy check in. staff was friendly.
would’ve been much better if refrigerator in room
great service
hotel is nice and rooms are okay, water pressure is  terrible in the shower and no refrigerators in the room. good location.
half used amenities. shower leaked. half ingredients on the menu missing for breakfast - had to go somewhere else for breakfast. comfortable enough but not much attention to detail
the spaciousness and decor of the rooms was wonderful.  the staff were very polite, professional and friendly. all in all it was a wonderful experience.

i had the most scariest time of life - actually at 2:30 am someone came inside my hotel room !! seems like the staff at the from desk allocated the same room !! i was so scared two people opened the door and switched on the lights - trust me i was scared for my life !! don’t ever do this - this property i so nice and clean but this experience was a night mare !!
very nice and clean hotel!
great hotel and amazing service
staff was awesome and the room was excellent. definitely will stay there again.

i arrived on thursday and the system was down. means no internet or cables tv. i was told it will be fixed within a few hours and it didn’t fixed till the next day. also, no fridge in the room. you will need to add extra $20.00 a day if  you would like to add a fridge.
the room comes with no fridge.
i love this hotel i will be back you will be crazy if u pass this place up the chef is also great try the wings
the hotel is very nice. however, the lighted mirror in the bathroom didn't work. i also thought there would've been a fridge/microwave in the room.
|MASK| was a pleasant stay, very clean, comfortable beds, hot water, quiet and as a solo traveler i felt safe.
cleanliness!

room reserved and verified in expedia was not available at check in time.  staff's attitude was wonderful and that made up for all the trouble to have to accommodate my children in a couch rather than a queen bed.  however, as nice as all the people were, it shows a significant lack of training on the operational side.  they are wonderful pr reps, and make you feel at home, but they are not properly trained to run the front desk operations, and to me that is not their fault but management's.

from the email we received before our visit, to the first steps we took into the hotel, we felt extremely welcomed and taken care of. the facilities are very well maintained and clean. we will stay here again!
lounge area was nice. staff were not overly friendly. bathrooms had little to no usable space. no counter space, no towel bars.
very clean and nice
great place!! will definitely go back!! staff is great and friendly
terrible service. really bad experience. never staying again
cute rooms. pretty comfy beds. dinner was good. breakfast was awful

the hotel itself is new... very nice. my experience though was enough to cause me to book elsewhere. if you book through a 2nd party beware... your reservation may or may not be secured. mine was not. but the gentleman at the front desk called and sorted it out. when we arrived in our room we found that the tv remote did not work. the maintenance guy again was very nice... helpful, etc. there  was shampoo but no conditioner. they were glad to bring some up. the bathroom light around the mirror did not work... switch did nothing (which i believe to be electrical). by this point we were tired and only wanted to unwind and relax. we did not call maintenance a 2nd time. also if you have booked for multiple nights you have to request extra towels/rags etc. they don’t check your room. a single incident i can understand. things happen. but ...all together just seemed like management not paying enough attention and created a frustrating experience. more attention to details needed here guys. having to call for every single thing was more than i care for in a hotel.

we liked everything about it.  do know that if you book through a 3rd party like expedia, you only get 2 breakfast vouchers per day, even if you have 4 people saying in the room, and you put 4 people when you booked the hotel.  that was the only thing that was frustrating. we will stay there again.
proximity

overall it was ok!
expected more from the other reviews…

ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.title: nice hotel close to the dr. pepper center
ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.text: this hotel was very nice and well appointed. the decor was modern and the beds in the room were amazing!!! we were there for a gymnastics competition and the location of hotel |MASK| was within walking distance of the venue. we had an excellent experience here and the staff was great!
nice area, good parking. small but nice pool. close to shopping mall. good breakfast.
nice place
enjoyed our stay overnight at |MASK|.  check-in and check-out was quick and easy, staff was more than courteous.  rooms were clean and coffee was really.

the over all atmosphere inside is so nice. the open social area and dinner area is open and clean. the room is devine. mr. ray at the front desk was very kind and informative. amazing customer service. we will definitely visit again.
good rooms excellent service easy check in processes

the walls are paper thin and i’m pretty sure the woman in the room next to mine was filming / on a call service for adult content all night . it was absolutely horrible . i wanted to get out of the hotel as fast as i could. i complained at check out but the manager said there was nothing he could do about the walls. the fact that someone felt the freedom to use that type of hotel for that makes me never want to stay there again.
everything was excellent

room keys were tried multiple times with assurances that they’d been fixed, then advised the room door had been broken for days and had to change rooms. ac rattled loudly entire stay. shower was pooling water. staff was polite.
very good
great place. i will return soon. thanks for the great stay!!!!!
overall good
facility conditions did not meet expectations.

very nice hotel! staff was amazing! everything was clean and beautifully decorated! only suggestion would be maybe to heat the pool a little when the weather hasn’t quite broken yet. the water was freezing cold!
great check in.  front desk lady was wonderful.

overall it was an ok experience, initially i was given a room that hadn’t been cleaned. the employee at the front desk corrected it immediately. the next room i was given was cleaner, but you can tell it’s just surface level clean. the floor corners were grimy and there were a couple stains on some of the walls. all of the amenities were unavailable when i stayed there, the restaurant, bar, gym, all closed. location is great, check in/out was pretty quick.
great hotel, rooms are spacious and clean. smells great!!
great place to stay
property was clean, quiet, nicely decorated, nice staff.
very friendly and helpful staff.  nice facilities at a very reasonable price.
loved everything about this hotel. will stay again when in town!!
loved it and it's location. it was clean and the room was excellent!
clean and nice
excellent location for comerica
many food choices
beautiful hotel!

we loved our 2 night stay at hotel |MASK|!!  the staff was so friendly; smelled and looked so clean as soon as we walked in to the hotel.  anything we needed, they were so willing and ready to accommodate.  we will be staying here again for sure.
beautiful, comfortable, clean room. great breakfast and coffee. staff, amazing!
its convenient. but needs maintenance in few rooms.
great bar, service & affordability.

the first morning, saturday, an awesome breakfast was served in 15-20 minutes.  staff were polite and attentive.  different story on sunday morning as it took over 45 minutes to receive our food and staff weren’t engaged.  we left for the airport feeling rushed and disappointed.

great property and convenient area. the only thing i would hope is that their contact line is made available i tried calling several times and was unable to get in contact but other than that everything was perfect.
super clean and friendly! nice location and nice hotel!
the room was very nice especially for the price and the staff was very friendly
this hotel was awesome.  the staff was friendly and everything was super clean.  when back in frisco we will definitely stay there again. loved our stay!!
in every respect i had an enjoyable day! i felt welcomed and had no issues whatsoever.
this was a great hotel. we had recently held a small meeting there and knew we wanted to come back and stay.
clean and spacious rooms
like how it was in walking distance of dining and shopping. unfortunately kitchen wasn’t open and shuttle wasn’t working, staff was rude about it.

i literally asked my husband when i got to the room how much we paid for our stay.  unbelievable hotel great price great bar great atmosphere our pet loved it and the park near by. ray the front desk great guy!!! he handled our accommodations with kindness and professionalism.. are changing to this chain as of today!  thank you |MASK| so much !!
great location! close to shopping and dining. also, we felt very safe.
the bartenders were just fabulous! good drinks - good conversation- and we kind of enjoyed the trivia game….
bartenders make a phenomenal mojito
the stay was pleasant i would definitely book again!

loved the restaurant/bar. although when we went down this morning for breakfast they didn’t have any cream or sugar for our coffee?! the rooms a nicely decorated and spacious. king bed was very comfortable. i would stay here again.
awesome hotel, very clean and the staff are polite.
everyone was great and friendly!! i just wished i could’ve stayed longer 😱 for sure will be staying there again
great location, secluded area. friendly staff and clean facility.
beautiful room and lobby area. the staff was very friendly and the food for breakfast was a good price and very tasty. would definitely stay here again in the future.
great location and friendly staff.

the room was cleaned daily. guest representative went out of his way to acknowledge any guest entering or leaving. the bed was super comfortable. it was a good stay.

now, i ordered room service for breakfast and fruit bowl was spoiled. i just didn’t partake in the restaurant anymore during the stay.

loved the stay. hated the lack of attention by the restaurant.
it was a great place to stay!
very nice and convenient
great location, close to shopping and dinning. the room was nice and the bed was very comfortable.
friendly staff and a comfortable, clean stay! couldn’t ask for a better experience!
food was great, friendly staff. loved the bar.
the toilet was clogged before we arrived and this has been a problem before.

great property. staff was very friendly. room was nice and clean and decor was updated! 
would stay here again!
room, staff and amenities were all great!!
nice, quiet, comfortable, very nice place. great accommodations. great decorations
nothing much to say other than my stay was comfortable. no issues at all

their tv system was horrible for a property of this price, no breakfast included, no cleaning done at all in the room for 3 days i stayed, not even restocking of toiletries or in room coffee supplies.  very small pool.  overall a fairly disappointing stay compared to previous years at the embassy across the street. embassy was $40/night more but value wise it is worth far more.
friendly staff, good food at the bar, clean gym with variety of equipment.
i had a great experience. very nice hotel. the gentleman working the front desk was very nice and professional. i will definitely be back
we felt very safe in our stay. staff was helpful and friendly
hotel is nice however i wished i would have read that the rooms are cleaned every 5 days and towels need to be requested every morning.  it was a bit of a hassle for us.
the hotel was nice and clean.  the room didn't have a refrigerator.
i loved the interior design and comfortable feeling
liked it! will use this hotel again..friendly service

i have stayed at many hotels. i must say this is undoubtedly one of my favorites. it is probably the best value i have ever found. the staff are courteous and helpful. housekeeping personnel service the room every day; post-pandemic, such service is very unusual. i rarely am particularly impressed with a hotel. |MASK| frisco is exceptional and excellent. i cannot recommend it highly enough. i did not want to check out.
cleanliness and friendliness of staff! also the room setup an comfort of the bed. the size of restroom was great which made it easy for my wife and i to share the mirror.
clean and nice.  no coffee in the am as promised.  really my only complaint. otherwise, the hotel is very nice!
property clean and comfortable. close proximity to restaurants and shops. alright there were issues with power,  was still a great stay.
excellent stay, nice staff and clean accommodations.

i will definitely stay again.  staff was very friendly & made you feel welcome.  chef mathew food is excellent…you must try his burger! 
highly recommend this hotel

the air conditioner in hotel was not working properly. the staff did what they could do. the staff said the building was built so fast that a lot of issues are being experienced with air conditioners & plumbing.

nice clean modern hotel in a convenient location. the bar is has a good selector drinks and a small food menu. bar/ food service can be a little slower than you’d like but they don’t have many staff on. the atmosphere isn’t the best, they have really tried with the decor and lighting but it’s a little bright for a relaxing evening and the constant sports channel gets a bit much. the rooms are great only let down by the aircon which is a bit noisy. on the whole i did enjoy my stay and will return.
great hotel. friendly staff. beautiful furnishings and decor.
top hotel in frisco, i loved it
great property. clean, stylish and great, friendly staff. we will be back!

the hotel was clean and quiet. i love the simplicity of this hotel. easy to check in and get to your room! i consider it 5 stars. not much around unless you have a vehicle but uber’s arrived in less than 5 minutes.

i absolutely love this hotel.  i stay here every year.  the only negative remark is that there are no microwaves or refrigerators in the rooms. but the pool is amazing!   another positive is that the beds are extremely comfortable.
loved this stay! staff was amazing, property was pretty and clean!
great location and easy to find.  rooms are spacious and clean.  the bed is a little on the firm side for me but overall a good nights sleep.
2nd time staying here and was very pleased
great hotel
everything
im just so glad its over but so sad because i feel i waist my time and money there.
beautiful hotel and amenities! we are definitely returning!

i would like to extend a very warm and huge thank you to the hotel |MASK| that accommodated most of the participants in the 2021 lonestar shootout car audio event this past weekend. of all of the hotels i have stayed at, their hospitality has been rarely matched! to the entire staff at hotel |MASK|...thank you!

this is a great hotel and the location is right across from the basketball arena and walking distance to the mall. chef michelle prepared an excellent dinner for us and her team was amazing. also, alexis at the bar makes the best drinks. the room was clean and has lots of space. i was really imoressed.
the staff were like family 👪..absolutely wonderful ❤
very clean and in a good area
good
sheets were dirty
pleasantly surprised in clean,  modern aesthetic. lovely desk and restaurant staff and clean property. will return for business.
the check in staff seemed to be confused about my reservation. i also did not feel they were very friendly. the room is clean and beautiful and iran been a comfortable stay otherwise.
i didn’t like that, we had to change rooms due to issues, i was unaware that you had to ask for the rooms to be clean,
the showers suck big time. door opens backward so you can’t get your towel hung on the wall, water leaks under the door and floods the bathroom and the sprayer won’t stay up.
great stay!
great experience!
the overall experience was excellent. frisco is a wonderful location for this hotel.

thus was by far the best hotel ive stayed in in a very long time. its surrounded by tons of shopping close to the highway and stull in a quiet area. they hitel is beautiful from the lobby to the rooms. it was spotless i almost walked on the floor with no shoes. they have everything you need except a fridge but the rest of the property was so comfortable we didnt mind. the bed was so comfy and did i mention clean. 10 out of 10 will definitely stay again!!

very nice property. the chef at the restaurant was amazing!!! however, the woman who checked me in must have had a bad day. very unfriendly face and i tried to be over nice but she stayed with an attitude. the shuttle was also down which would have be nice to know. interesting that it’s down due to covid but i had literally got off a completely packed plane and left a very busy airport soooo doesn’t make sense to me that the shuttle wouldn’t be available. otherwise, nice stay.
great stay
best service!
loved our stay! parking spaces a little tight and only 2 handicap spaces. staff were very friendly and helpful. easy to get to restaurants.
very clean!!
staff was great, hotel was amazing, will be staying here again!!!!
loved how clean it was and it had a restaurant option and bar loved it
excellent service

they changed to new menu that had shrimp cheesy grits. biscuits and gravy.yummy.  hotel in a nice area with activites closeby. mall. cowboys training at ford center.  roomy rooms.  cozy beds. big shower. reasonably  priced.  get breakfast package with room. worth it.   helpful staff.
stayed multiple times

my stay at the |MASK| was so nice!! it was affordable, clean, the staff was friendly and helpful. it was conveniently located, so it was easy to get to all the places i needed to get to. i will definitely recommend this hotel to frinds and family.

beautiful place.
my room key never worked causing too much inconvenience for me.
the hotel was very clean, the staff were kind and quick to respond to our needs, the bar was great, breakfast was delicious. we were very impressed overall by this hotel.

the hotel is cool looking but a few issues that i just don't understand.  first the elevators.  they are slow.. but the main issue is it has a loud chime it rings on every floor.  like an old grandfather clock.  for me being on the 6th floor having to hear 6 loud chimes every time i went up or down, was terribly annoying and unnecessary, doesn't make any sense and isn't cool or helpful to your customers in any way!  no refrigerator in room,.. sure the room looks neat.. but instead of having some useful bench below the tv would rather have had a refrigerator.  the towel hook in bathroom... why would you install that behind where the door is when it opens?  there is a spot right when the door first opens.  the place it is now, means there's no way to get my towel without walking out of the shower and walking around the door???
wishing we had more time to spend in the super cool, funky bar area. unfortunately we were away from the hotel at another event most of our stay.
great for the price and nicely updated. great food and service.
great property. we stayed here twice.
there is not enough outlets in the rooom if there is going to be a suite there should be a couch and the shower head was not user friendly it almost fell on me
great hotel, price and location. highly recommend
nice  hotel  decor but does  not have  your basic hotel   suit amenities like microwave or refrigerator otherthan that it's  a peaceful  and quiet environment.

mold on the shower ceiling. advertised amenities on website we no longer in existence and the staff did not care to make compensatory acts. prices on restaurant menu were cheaper than the items actually rang up in computer.

you have to specifically ask for housekeeping if you stay more than one night. we asked at check in for service the following day. we were away and expected the room cleaned by the time we returned at 3 pm. unfortunately it had not been cleaned and we were told they could drop off clean towels and sheets. very disappointing that you can't get full cleaning service and they only give you 2 towels.
lack of amenities. messy outer area,trash all around creek outside of hotel
friendly staff, clean facility, comfortable bed

“the guy on friday night” (our bartender) was amazing and made the best espresso martinis! 
rooms were lovely and clean and probably the most comfortable hotel bed we have ever slept in! will be sure to book here again if we come back this way!
very nice experience!
ok

i recently stayed at hotel |MASK|, frisco, when i arrived i gave the receptionist my last name. he was unable to locate any reservations for me. i showed him my confirmation number still nothing. he was finally able to find my information and he mentioned expedia had not done their part whatever they do in providing the hotel with the booking info. he was finally able to confirm my reservation and from there on everything went smooth. i cannot recommend it enough!  from the moment i arrived, the staff was warm, welcoming, and extremely attentive to every detail. the rooms were immaculate, beautifully decorated, and incredibly comfortable, with all the amenities i needed for a relaxing stay. the location was perfect, close to all the attractions yet peaceful and quiet. overall, my stay exceeded all expectations, and i look forward to returning soon!"
great clean hotel great area! good food!
great place to stay. very friendly staff.
great property and staff.
truly amazing
excellent
good location.  cleanliness , friendly staff. we enjoyed our stayed.
check in was disappointing. i was given a key to an occupied room.
professional and helpful staff. everything spot clean and new

i enjoyed my stay at hotel |MASK| frisco. all staff i interacted with were great & friendly! the restaurant food was fresh & delicious. everything felt like home. i’d definitely recommend this property to my family & friends. thank you all so much!!
was great! always clean and friendly!

breakfast not included was
a disappointment. consider a basic continental.  bed was hard.
this was our second time staying here and it did not disappoint. our stay was great, convenient location to everything. room was clean and quiet. really enjoyed our stay will be back again.

our room has a weird dark spot by the ceiling which we were not sure if it was mold or what. the bathroom had hair strands on the floor, there were also hair strands on the pillow cases.rooms do not get serviced, unless you ask/schedule this. there's also no fridge to keep your water cold, when i asked about this--i was directly told that this was to encourage people to purchase from the hotel and/or restaurant. which is ridiculous, since this has nothing to do with keeping your drinks cold.

very nice and clean property…i enjoyed my stay even though i was awaken by the guest in the next room arguing really loud at 5 a.m. the staff was right there getting it under control and apologized to me. i would definitely stay here again. the location was perfect.
great stay! staff was so nice and helpful! rooms were beautiful and so clean!
location was very clean, great staff. rooms do not have a fridge or a microwave and the pool has no day time sun was my only negative comment. will stay again.
lamar checked us in and made the experience great! the hotel is clean. the decor was unique. it is conveniently located to shops and restaurants.
loved my stay and staff ver friendly. i will book again
staff were pleasant and professional. love the decor in the lobby area.

the hotel lobby/bar area was beautiful!  would love to come back and stay here after covid because the bar and restaurant were closed.  the room was very clean and comfortable.  plenty of space to spread out!  very quiet area and there is plenty of shopping and restaurants within a 2 minute drive.  will definitely stay here again!

looks very nice, i would not stay at this location again, no microwave or mini fridge, you can’t print boarding passes for flights so why have a so call business center? two computers connected and you email to the front desk to have them printed.

i loved the friendliness of the front desk staff. the room was great and the food hot and delicious. the pool is undesirable at best. it's nothing more than a hot tub on steroids. if i can stand up in the deepest end and two people can outstretch their arms and reach from side to side, it's not a pool!
wonderful! my fave hotel in texas
a great place to stay

the property is in a pretty quite area, everything looks so clean, the staff is friendly and the room was fantastic in space, design, comfortable bed and nice bathroom. i was really happy with my selection and would surely book again whenever i go back to frisco
new and clean. the rooms are set up nicely and the staff was wonderful.

our stay at hotel |MASK| frisco was fantastic! facility is beautiful, fresh, modern, and very clean. our room was great and stay was amazing. we slept great as the walls are much thicker than other hotels and noise outside our room was so minimal. we will stay here every time we visit frisco.
our new favorite place to stay in frisco. perfect for traveling with pets, also.
friendly staff and bartenders. room was nice and great location to frisco nightlife
super clean, quiet, and felt really safe. we loved it!!
beautiful facilities, staff very friendly and helpful, very clean, aveda products for showering and delicious food. the place had a very comforting and hip vibe.
building and room was clean and staff was friendly
location close to everything, free and plenty parking, breakfast, nice clean rooms , would definitely stay again
beautiful hotel, minimal interaction with staff but check in and out were efficient and courteous.
very nice
very nice property and in a really good location.
the pool was tiny, laundry is apparently not included for guest and when we called for maintenance they didn’t even remove the trash.
staff was cold and not welcoming.
our staybwas great. the staff was wonderful and best of all we didn't need to wear those masks.

restaurant service hours are very limited.  some older staff at night have no clue what to recommend in the area. a/c unit in room was so loud and sleep disrupting. tv is old.  can’t cast anything from your mobile. housekeeping is only by request.  pool and gym are tiny.  the staff however we’re always very welcoming and pleasant to talk to.
love this hotel.
loved it especially 12 pm check out !
everything thing perfect for our stay
cleaning didn’t get in the room to even take trash out, we stayed 2 days
great stay with an amazing and easy experience
had to wait for our room even though it was ready due to a card key issue. some people had to wait over an hour to get into their rooms.
very clean and the staff was nice.  great location in frisco.

ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.title: well thought out hotel concept.
ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.text: loved the local style of this chain hotel and their attention to detail. from the food and drinks to decor and attire. breakfast was great, rooms large and very comfortable. hang out in the living room style lobby or work in your room where it is set up for business travel.
very friendly staff
quiet. attractive neighborhood.
wonderful stay
convenient

there wasnt anything really bad about property except maybe parking and appearance of shower...
parking- convenient and no charge but it's open to people to park and walk along the park/water, limiting spots for hotel customers
shower appearance- shower was great, temperature and easy to use, but the ceiling could be painted or something cuz it's unappealing...
overal, the hotel is a 9, would recommend...

we stayed one night and it was great. hotel was clean except for a couple of hairs found on the bed. check in was quick and easy and service was friendly. pool was small but looked nice. bar closed at 9. hotel was quiet and room was spacious. will stay again
clean, conveniently located, friendly staff. will stay here again.
room door was left open by cleaning staff one day.  hair conditioner never replaced.  room wasn’t cleaned at all one day. towels weren’t replaced at all one day.  cleaning was very sporadic

it’s really well appointed. lovely bar, reception,
lounge area and the bedrooms are a much higher quality than i expected. the only downer was the bar had run out of wine by sunday and the shower is a cheap plastic insert - it was stark in contrast to the rest of the fittings.

the first night was rough for us because the guests next door were making out through the night creaming and shouting. and this is because the way the rooms are made … there is no sound proof at all. in the morning we complained at the front desk to be relocated to a corner room upstairs. this hotel is nice and clean but the walls should be sound proof. but, we were happy with room 500.. very quiet and peaceful. staff were amazing, house keeping was perfect. i would recommend there take serious consideration in this matter. the rooms on 2nd floor are meant to be connecting room and should be assigned to one family not two different guests. over all, we had a good stay.
i enjoy that the hotel was right next to the river and kathy seei park. it made it easy to fit in outdoor time on a business trip. it was also close to local shopping and dining.
staff was extremely pleasant, and restaurant was wonderful
we really enjoyed our stay at the hotel |MASK|. we will be looking for these hotels to stay at in the future.
good

did not stay. received a call from the property. it was obviously overbooked. tried to put us in the staybridge. if i wanted to stay in a motel with transient workers, i would book it myself. absolutely will not try the |MASK| again. the omni worked out great

only problem we had was no hand towels or washcloths in the room. they gave me hand towels and said they were short on washcloths. when i insisted on a washcloth the gentleman at the desk seemed a little put out but eventually had some sent up. otherwise everyone was very friendly.
it was very clean and pleasant. the food at the “bar and bistro” was good. the surrounding area is lovely with a nice walking path behind the hotel. comerica center is a short easy walk.
it said breakfast included and it were not
the location wasn’t too far away from every place i needed to travel while visiting.

ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.title: modern, stylish, clean, and cozy
ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.text:
very nice hotel. clean, stylish and cozy. we were very pleased with the comfort mattresses,  soft towels, quality toiletries, modern upgrade. 
very good quality hotel. would stay again!

seemed to be short on staff personnel or personnel did not seem to be knowledgeable of where certain things of request were located at the facility. 

there is no refrigerator to store and keep drinks cool. 

the complimentary water station was not refreshed and available  at the start of each day. 

suggest paper cups in the rooms vice coffee mug to enhance safety measures and reduce potential illness from unclean mugs.

we liked having a king suite at a reasonable price. the people at the front desk were super friendly. overall, it was great!
the bathroom in the king suite needs a fan or some noise to make it a little more private. the shower tends to leak water out from under the glass door onto the floor - not sure if they can do anything about that though.
the light switches in the entry room make no sense. i could not figure out how to turn on just one of the lights, except random combinations of the two switches on the door going in and the one switch by the entry to the bedroom. an electrician should fix that as, like i said, it doesn't make any sense how they work currently!
also, the restaurant was a little pricey for the food that they served for breakfast. we found a lot better food at more reasonable prices at other restaurants like "the biscuit". the waitress was not very attentive. 
we were on the 4th floor, which didn't have an ice machine, so that was slightly inconvenient. 
other than those few items, we enjoyed our stay!

enjoyed my recent two night stay at the |MASK|.  i would strongly recommend that you set up an early morning coffee station since your restaurant does not open until 7:00am...i had to leave for an early flight this morning (6:30) and could not even get a coffee when i checked out. i saw several other guests in the lobby as well...i think this would enhance the services your hotel provides quite nicely.  thank you.  c.visconti
very nice amd clean hotel.
the porperty was clean, well taken care of and conviently located. the staff were kind and professional.

the front desk people were the best.  lobby is inviting. my husband and i had a room and my sister was across the hall. we enjoyed meeting downstairs for coffee and breakfast, and were served often by the same sweet girl (vanessa?)  who also did room service.  she was so pleasant and worked a lot.  
we will stay again when visiting.
nice property as it's fairly new. it's a bit far away from any restaurants that are walk-able if the weather is bad. rooms are nice and the lobby as well.
great stay

it was a horrible experience when i arrived. they gave us a room with a king bed, when we had booked a room with double queen beds since we had both our children with us . they gave us a handy cap room and the shower was a challenge with our children, and they only gave us two towels   with our stay !
i love that it’s a small beautiful quiet hotel. second time staying here and will continue to stay here when i visit my family in frisco.
the hotel staff was very helpful and professional.
no food and beverage service was available, glasses in room were not clean, general appearance of property not clean. checked out after first night.
great stay!
everything was great!
we looooooooooooooooooved it
amazing hotel and staff. our new fav stay when we visit texas, lamar is the best!!! 👏
the front staff are awesome, that is what makes me keep coming back
nice modern decor. breakfast was very slow.
the staff is very helpful and friendly.
nice hotel! would book again!
great location, nice hotel and staff had a nice time.
great location - cozy, chic ambiance that’s clean and has great customer service.

paid for breakfast as part of our room booking. came downstairs and ordered from the menu. after we waited for food, the employee came back and said their food supply was “wiped out” because of some parties. apparently all breakfast food was eaten at the parties the evening before. we weren’t offered any refund or anything for the inconvenience.
nice spacious room. friendly, helpful staff. will stay at hotel |MASK| whenever i travel!
.great place to stay.   highly recommend.   modern look  clean and comfortable

we got there and we were in the wrong room. my mom had to wait hours before her room was available and was told she could only stay one night because other rooms weren’t available.

we finally got into a room and it was dirty with big spots on the floor and we had to clean out own bathroom
beautiful facility...breakfast service was a little slow. one staff member was overwhelmed.
wonderful accommodations. room was modern and clean. nicely updated. great property will stay again.
no negatives. pride of ownership, clean, quiet, great location.
different atmosphere and decor. very nice and cute. loved the pool area as well.

our first impression was the wonderfully friendly staff that greeted my wife and i as we entered the lobby.  from that moment until we checked out, we were impressed with the quality, cleanliness, and charm of this lovely hotel.  we will definitelty keep hotel |MASK| frisco in mind anytime we're in the area in the future.  
thank you for a wonderful stay!
wish we had a frig in room but loved the atmosphere of hotel

beds not comfortable, bugs, poop in the pool couldn’t swim, food service and food options poor. so we packed up and moved to a different hotel and it was 100 times better. the charge that we got was definitely not worth the stay.

ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.title: a bang for your buck
ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.text: one of the most affordable hotels in the area but it is still one of the nicests. the hotel itself has an amazing and very hip design. our room had this amazing wooden floor that anyone would like in their home. our bed was comfy, not too plushy where you sick right into it and not too hard where you break your back. checking in was fast and easy. we decided to added another night to our room and was able to get it done within a matter of seconds. it is also conveniently located in frisco and is a short drive to all the other cool places in plano. would definitely recommend to anyone who is traveling on a budget but don't want to stay at an inn or motel.
no debería estar en expedia este hotel, esto debería usarse para una demanda, expedia nos envió a un hotel lleno de drogadictos, prostitutas, no es nada como en las fotos, tuvimos que huir del sitio
nice hotel close to the star
hospitality was wonderful. i’d definitely come back. thank you.

it is a beautiful hotel but they had no outdoor seating areas besides the small pool area we were a group from many different areas and would have liked to sit and visit outside. the bar was way overpriced $45 for 2 drinks but also not allowed to bring our own. i will not stay there again for these reasons

we have stayed here 3 times in the past few months. it is ok for the money. last time the room wasn’t cleaned well. there were tissues sticking out under the couch and the beds weren’t made well. the dresser had something spilled down the front of it. ice machine on our floor didn’t work. the lobby and pool are nice but the rooms need deep cleaning. not all rooms have mini refrigerators. 
i will most likely try somewhere else next time.

room was clean but bathroom shower side slab was broken and water was coming out from glass.
though, staff changed my room which was great.
also, the late night till early morning the receptionist is in little angry mode, dont care to smile or even greet.

overall, we had a great stay. there were issues with the restaurant two out of the three evenings that we were there, but the overall the staff was friendly and courteous and the area was wonderful. we would definitely stay here again.
seemed like everyone was new and had a hard time answering any questions. but the hotel itself was great!

came here to visit family during summer 2020 and was appreciate the covid safety protocols while still having access to the cool of the pool and a comfortable room.  staff was all friendly and helpful
the hotel is very nice & is close to several restaurants, malls, & more. i love the style of the place, our quiet it is, & all the features they’ve added to make the place more accessible.
i had an issue with the bugs crawlers, the situation was handled by management in the great manner.
great place to stay and convenient to baylor scott and white hospital.

this was one best overall hotels that we have stayed at! staff was super friendly and helpful. room was absolutely perfect with comfy beds and tons of space for our son to play with his toys at night. overall great trip. definitely will stay next time in the area!
muy mal servicio, por unos minutos tarde en la l checkout cobraron 100$ me parece un total robo.
the chef gregory is awesome.best hotel staff 9ve evere uncountered

staff told different answers daily about the pool being open, tried to speak to someone and he just walked away from me while i was asking questions very rude in front of me and my children. housekeepers were more friendly than front desk we will not return here.
very nice property and nice staff
staff were incredibly helpful . great stay

i asked for more towels 3 times and even went down to the desk to ask and still did not get them. that was not okay. me and my girlfriend had to keep using the same wet towels. other than that things were good.
excellent hotel ! very clean !
my new favorite getaway spot
i love the comfort cleanliness and morning and afternoon staff are great. i didn't get a chance to interact with any ithers
thank you for being great host!

i love love love staying at this property. from breakfast on to the cozy room. i typically stay here at least once a year but i may have to find another to be in the area to have a reason to stay again.
excellent hospitality and beautiful property

i have stayed here on other occasions and never had any issues. upon me walking up to the front desk to check in this time however i was immediately insulted by taibian the guy who worked the front desk. he insulted me for my dress insulted my name. insulted my religion and tried to ask me about private and protected health information. he was very rude, racist, and should be fired as his one job is to greet guest and make them feel wanted. i wish that was it but at breakfast the next day ( which i paid extra for) i was barely greeted. i wasn’t offered anything to drink. i wasn’t given a napkin or followed up before i left.
nice
stayed at this location for 3 nights and it was amazing. i have no complaints. the bed was so comfortable like no other! i would definitely go back to this location
clean property
staff was friendly and property clean. unique lobby was inviting.
great hotel for good price. very quiet.
the motief is amazing. i love the modern feel to the hotel

this was an excellent hotel with a lot of style and very well organized by staff. surrounding areas were also really cool.

would recommend this hotel to anyone traveling to dallas :)
would go back again..
good

hotel property and rooms were nice. pool is small, but fine for adults.  not really a pool for kids and jumping.  restaurant seemed understaffed. only questionable thing i saw was the complimentary water jug at the front desk.  hotel had fresh fruit in the water for flavor, but noticed the water and fruit was not changed the entire weekend.  by checkout the container was pretty gross - possibility for food poisoning.
all good.
me gustó mucho la ubicación, el parque y lago junto al hotel. no me gustó las pocas acciones y cuidados con el covid. el personal no se cuida, ni usa cubrebocas
i didn't like the fact that there was no mini fridge/microwave in the room.
i thought the bed eas very hard.  an uncomfortable few nights stay.  loved everything else.
food is amazing. staff is friendly and quick to help.
very nice room and very comfortable and clean
will stay here again
clean!!!
lovely place to stay
great little boutique style hotel. very beautiful lobby and rooms we nice as well.
the property is next to a walking trail and easy easy to the highway and shops
this was a lovely stay and i really enjoyed it. i will definitely come back

the hotel was a great place to stay! we enjoyed that the location was so walkable and pretty. they are a block away from comerica center and have a nice walking trail/pond right next to the hotel with carp which were fun to see! we especially loved the bar/restaurant staff. food and drinks were great! damien was friendly, funny, and ensured we were taken care of all night, every night! the only complaint we have is regarding having to pay for breakfast. we didn’t end up paying and bought our own breakfast elsewhere. not a huge deal, and we would definitely book the hotel again, but it would’ve been nice to have a free breakfast.

my first visit to dallas was an inspiring experience, drawn to this hotel by its stunning loft-style decor. i was truly impressed by its cleanliness and high standards. the staff delivered exceptional service, earning a perfect 10 out of 10 from me, both in the morning and at night. i wholeheartedly recommend this place to anyone visiting dallas!
great hotel very clean and great location
just appreciate the cleanliness and the style that the hotel offers.
everything was excellent
super nice. friendly and quick check in process. great parking. amenities are awesome. the bar is spectacular. lobby area is elegant and relaxed. rooms are very modern and cozy.
friendly professional staff. my room was great…clean, nice decor and amazing bed!
felt very upscale, great food and staff. hotel was quiet and in walking distance to great food and attractions. this is my new favorite hotel.

the lobby was lovely. check-in was easy. the room looked good but had a few scuffs and chipped finishes. the elevator had some kind of food smear inside all of our stay.
we were promised a pool but it was not available.
the bar was nice but the bartender had no help on a friday night.
breakfast saturday morning was strictly okay. not bad but not great. the two waiters were overworked and we had to sit at a dirty table. there is no self-serve coffee in the lobby, and the coffee seved with breakfast was poor.
they wouldn’t accept cash, which i’m pretty sure is against federal law. 
the bed was nice and the “premium” room was pretty good.
i didn’t have a bad stay, but i paid over $220 for a night and was assured it was a premium hotel. this was maybe mid 3-star at best.
would recommend!
loved the design and decor of the hotel rooms and parkour.
this property is so unique.  the gym had good equipment. the bar and kitchen are nice and the staff was extremely friendly.  i had a fantastic stay.
hotel was conveniently located,easy check in,easy parking and staff was great. clean rooms and comfortable seating.
beautiful and clean property. great price & location.
it was a good stay overall. the room didn't get cleaned 2 days in a row
the food was amazing! i had stuffed chicken with mashed potatoes and mushrooms in a chimichuri sauce. the bar is comfy and the staff is super nice. clean room, ac worked like a champ. will return!
very clean property. rooms were spacious. highly recommend.
really great hotel pricing and location. a nice hotel bar in lobby as well with happy hour
staff was friendly and the hotel was just what we needed!
nice property!

1. early checkin was a disaster. first i had to wait for 40 minutes and then to be told it would be another 30 minutes. i don't think so.
2. restaurant staff is very poorly trained (even the chef showed up late one morning)
3. the amenities are horrible
    a. soap is 1" round and 1/8" think - what am i supposed do with it
    b. no laundry bag
    c. pillows are horrid
    d. for an upgraded room, there was a lot of empty space (no couch. no where to lounge)
    e. usually a hotel of this stature will have a larger variety of lotion, shampoo, conditioner.
     f. the pool was dirty and green (i would never set foot into it)
     g. every morning there was a long wait to get coffee. seriously. this is the single most important thing to never run out in the morning. 
     h. when asked if they have mugs, i was told to go get it myself for coffee.
     i. when asked what's for breakfast, i was told to go fetch the menu myself.
4. i had the pancake in the morning. ok 3 soggy pieces of pancake and no butter. where was the chef trained?
5. ... and you had to coffee in your full service bar
hidden gem! quiet area. staff were kind & helpful. enjoyed the bar in the evening and breakfast was delicious!
great staff
this hotel was very nice with happy hour and a very good restaurant. the hotel was walking distance from shopping and restaurants.
very nice hotel, clean and good location. bar and atmosphere were also good
super disappointed i would figured as nice as this hotel was yall would at least have a mini fridge and microwave

i liked lamar who greeted us everyday.  he was a wonderful staff member.
i didn't like that there was no microwave nor fridge in the rooms nor coffee in the lobby.
only stated one night our room was clean and comfortable
overall good and clean hotel, centrally located to several area restaurants and stores. would definitely stay again.

ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.title: nice hotel walking distance from baseball stadium
ff26cdda236b233f7c481f0e896814075ac6bed3.text: great experience. the staff was friendly and helpful.  the food at the bar and the service was great.

the service was great minus the bartender overcharging my daughter’s room for a cocktail. a refund was offered but not before the bartender rudeness. otherwise the other staff was wonderful. oh and request a microwave and refrigerator when booking.
really a nice hotel! good pricing and great location
great property! returning guests

the property itself was fine. edward, at the front desk was very kind and professional. the lady working the next evening was not pleasant. i found it odd that they only serve coffee until 10 am. my friend asked for a cup at 9:45 and they were trying to refuse it until he insisted it was indeed only 9:45. they charged for a glass of water! the bar drinks are ridiculously expensive! my daughter’s room key opened to an occupied room, which i’m not sure how their system allowed that. they almost refused her a room altogether because she was just short of turning 21, even though i was right there with her! the rooms have no fridge or microwave, and the fact that breakfast was not complimentary, the price per night seemed too high. to top it off, my friend tried booking another night, shortly after checking out, the lady at the counter didn’t even look up from the computer screen and said they had nothing left, after i was told they had many rooms. so he ended up finding a room at a better hotel for much less money, with better service and complimentary refreshments and breakfast. although our stay was not terrible, i will not be booking there again.

my only real complaint that i would have is the fact that the rooms don't offer a microwave or fridge option. i feel that having these amenities would be very beneficial, especially if you get food from the restaurant (or restaurant nearby) and need to save it for the next day. it's a pretty big inconvenience, but overall i enjoy the hotel and all the food options nearby. i just wish we could store our leftovers. great hotel in a prime location.

we have stayed at this hotel at least 3-4 times it was my all-time favorite hotel because of beds, housekeeping and space. up until this last stay when the young man who was the breakfast server edwin decided to ignore us over and over again and over. even after a hand wave and smile from my husband for service. my husband then walked up and politely said as he reached for the menus that the young man placed down after my husband waved him down “i guess i have to come get our own menus since you choose to ignore us” and the young man edwin smiled &  walked back to the kitchen. this was a very sad day for me because i had never experienced such discrimination before over wearing a cross. i mean, we do live in america and texas  but to be discriminated & then to be called a liar by the main manager. yep, i kept all the emails, & a letters. yes, i got an apology letter after i had to go through several messages back-and-forth, and the this young man who supposedly wrote this letter, was obviously the manager, and not the actual server that was so obvious. if the young man was truly sorry then the next day when we were leaving…yes, he clearly seen us walking by restaurant he would of come up to us and apologized, but he avoided eye contact, which i tried to gain with him by looking over straight into his face, and he avoided looking at me. it was so obvious & so sad because of that i knew that we would not ever be going back to this hotel again. such a sad experience.

3216b1b7885bffdb336265a8de7322ba0cd477cf.text: overall, i had a very pleasant experience at this hotel.  i was in the process of relocating from the east coast, looking at properties, and found this hotel with a good rating and a fair price. the hotel staff was very friendly and helpful, during my stay.  it's true what they say about california, the weather, and the chill vibe.  the only thing i saw that put a damper on my stay was how one of the young front desk staff yelled and overall mistreated the cleaning staff.  at first i thought he might have just been having a bad day, only to see that it continued happening on other days.  it's not the way people should be treated, and no guest should have to see that during their vacation, business trip, or otherwise a night stay on their way to their final destination.

3216b1b7885bffdb336265a8de7322ba0cd477cf.title: soren helped save this review
3216b1b7885bffdb336265a8de7322ba0cd477cf.text: the location was ok.  it was at least 40 minute drive, thanks to the constant traffic,  to any attraction; beach, la, hollywood, universal studios. it is not in a eye pleasing location and on a very noisy road that you do hear throughout the night.  our first night the attendant who checked us in was not very nice. he gave us the wrong room in a smoking section, when i had requested a non smoking. i did not realize this until the next day.  that was a horrible night!  the people right next to us were very loud and smoked throughout most of the night.  they stood right in front of our door so it kept us up almost the entire night.  the do have a security guard, but unfortunately he visited with them for most of the night. the room was awful too.  it smelled like urine and the beds were hard as a rock.  i was ready to leave. the next morning i went to the desk and met the new attendant.  his name was soren.  he saved my experience for this motel.  i told him of our experience.  he was very apologetic and immediately switched us to another room.  it was now in a non smoking section.  we were pleased that it didn't stink and the beds were actually comfortable. they only drawback, was that we could still hear the road noise at night and it was directly above the breakfast room so we heard the chairs slide around the tile in the morning.  so soren was our hero and saved this motel from getting a 1 star rating.  the breakfast was disappointing,  only toast, cereal and bagels.

3216b1b7885bffdb336265a8de7322ba0cd477cf.text: our experience at the |MASK| inn and |MASK| can be put simply as hell on earth. everything from checking in to the poor excuse of a breakfast was just terrible. they did not except the rules of the booking agency and made check in almost impossible and then lied about when they would charge our account. our room had holes in the comforter, it smelt old and smoky, there was no full length mirror, there were only two pillows provided with no option for more or extra blankets. there is nothing positive i can say about this room. on top of the horrible room, the staff was rude and uninviting. no one smiled and it seemed as if they did not want us there, but were still willing to take our money. the location was terrible as well. there was nothing around except train tracks and homeless people. do not stay here ever you can find infinitely better places to stay in la.

3216b1b7885bffdb336265a8de7322ba0cd477cf.text: i wanted to be close to the bike casino and not pay exorbitant room rates and this |MASK| fit the bill.  there was an issue with the reservation (i had somehow booked a smoking room...) and since the hotel was ostensibly full, i had to spend a night in a room reeking of cigarette smoke.  fortunately i was moved to a bigger, double king or queen non-smoking room the next day.  both rooms had standard amenities (fridge, microwave, tv, coffee maker) and were clean and spacious.  this small hotel has a 'courtyard' type setup and most rooms face away from the main thoroughfare (atlantic ave) and there was sufficient parking.  there were no noise issues though the landscapers started a tad early on day 2 with their leaf blowers.   i didn't get to try their breakfast but there is one available.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: dreibettzimmer gebucht - bekamen juniorsuite im 7.stock mit tollem ausblick! badezimmer großartig mit regendusche und extra badewanne, betten sehr angenehm perfekt zum ausrasten nach dem man den ganzen tag auf den beinen ist. frühstück vielfältig für italienische verhältnisse - tipp: espresso beim kellner bestellen. öffentliche verkehrsmittel gleich ums eck beim bahnhof - somit alles gut zu erreichen und auch leicht wieder ins hotel zurückzufinden. wlan im hotel seehr praktisch. 2 fernsehsender auf deutsch gefunden. auch gepäckaufbewahrung vor checkin und nach checkout hat einwandfrei funktioniert. wir kommen sehr gerne wieder!

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: prima hotel, op loopafstand van station termini. de hop on hop off bus stopt vlakbij. ook in nabijheid goed restaurant (babbo's) waar je vroeg kunt eten en buiten kunt zitten. het hotel heeft een moderne uitstraling en mist daardoor wat charme. ontbijt is uitgebreid, maar wat vlak van smaak. wij hadden drie nachten verblijf in een kamer voor drie personen. dan is het wel vervelend als je een badkamer hebt die iedere keer blank staat na het douchen. is bouwtechnisch euvel, klagen bij receptie loste het probleem niet op (ondanks belofte iemand langs te sturen). dus: zorg dat je een kamer met bad hebt!

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: a really nice hotel - no complaints
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
the hotel is in a nice location close to the railway station with all of the shops in the station complex being very convenient.  it is only a 5 minute walk into the edge of the main (older) part of the city so very well placed.
we flew into fiumicino and decided to use the bus to get into the city as it was the cheapest option and woohoo, the bus terminates directly opposite the the |MASK| |MASK| so is absolutely perfect - don't waste a penny more on shuttle buses or private taxis if you stay at the |MASK| |MASK|..!!
the room is modern, clean with air conditioning and a nice bathroom - all we wanted.  we only ate breakfast there but at three euros for a buffet breakfast it was unbeatable with a big choice of different food from bacon, sausage and scrambled egg to fruit, cooked meats and cheese, pancakes and different sweet cake options - awesome.
the staff are very friendly and helpful - i really would not think of using another hotel if we ever go back to rome again.

basically the hotel is good in being located very close to rome termini, having a good breakfast and others. but we felt that the room (we used, at least) needs reconsideration on designs of the room facility.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 駅近で便利
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
テルミナ駅から徒歩5分ほどの便利な立地にあります。空港からもバスや特急で直行できて、アクセスが良かったです。
ビジネスホテルのような感じで、ローマらしいクラッシック感はないですが、とても清潔感がありました。掃除もきちんとされていて室内は快適でした。
近くにはカフェやレストランもあり、テルミナ駅にはスーパーもありますので、買物にも便利でおすすめです。

this property is conveniently close to the termini train station.  walkable distances to most of rome's major sites within the aurelian wall.  staff will call taxis if requested, and taxis show up within 2-3 minutes.  the breakfast has a great selection of food.  all staff are friendly and helpful.  we had a junior suite (king size bed) on the 7th floor with a balcony.  we approximated this balcony to be 22-feet by 5-feet: huge!!!  we enjoyed magnificent views of rome everyday from the balcony, including st.peter's basilica and santa maria maggiore.
staff were very friendly
