we enjoyed our stay in rome at the |MASK| |MASK| |MASK| |MASK|. the staff were nice and helpful.  the breakfast was really nice.  just down the street from termini train station so very convenient for public transport and hopping on the train to get to our next destination.

we stayed one night at the end of our two week italy trip so we would be near roma termini station for an early morning trip to the airport.  easy check-in and check-out.  less that 5 minute walk to termini.  clean room.  did not try the restaurant or other amenities.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: prima hotel!
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
prima hotel. 
prettige moderne kamers. vriendelijk en behulpzaam personeel.
uitgebreid en goed ontbijtbuffet

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: comfortable room next to termini station
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: comfortable hotel, great location to explore the city.
테르미니 역에서 정말 가까웠으며, 공항 셔틀이 호텔 바로앞에 있어서 정말 편리하였음. 호텔 위치는 최고임

great hotel so close to the train station. everything has been redone so a very modern feel to the rooms and inside property. short walk to the train station. good selection of restaurants in the area. nice little bar in main lobby that has a happy hour with nice munchies. staff was very friendly and helpful.
we stayed only one night in rome at this hotel. it was the greatest value for money. expansive room, great airconditioning. helpful staff. i wish we stayed longer!

right next to the train station, it is ideally located so that you can walk to all of the major sites in 20-30 minutes, vatican is 60 minute walk.

clean with friendly and helpful staff. it made our stay in rome very enjoyable,
the staff were very friendly, the complimentary breakfast was excellent, i would definitely recommend this hotel to anyone visiting rome!
i was given a handicapped room, and the showerhead had issues water sprayed all over the bathroom and i had to mop it up with towels.
would highly recommend to friends
close to train station room' was comfortable breakfast was awesome

outstanding property that catered to the english-speaking community. while this may not sound like much, after a long travel day in a foreign country, it's a very welcome feeling to have a small place to return to where you can relax both physically and mentally. 

the amenities themselves were outstanding and due to the proximity of the train station, everything from the colosseum to the airport was easily accessible. thankfully, it's rome, so most everything is walkable--as long as the weather cooperates.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 로마 테르미니와 정말가깝습니다
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: 교통이 정말편합니다. 객실도 매우깔끔하고 좋습니다. 4성급이라서 가격이 조금 부담되지만 그래도 무난합니다. 여기저기 많이 다니실 분이라면 테르미니 중심으로 돌아다니기에 적절합니다.
location, close to the train station

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: we were a party of 5. the hotel was helpful
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: we were able to get 2 communicaying rooms. great for traveling with children.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: hotel moderno vicino alla stazione
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: ottima posizione, quindi consigliato per chi arriva in treno. da migliorare molto la manutenzione delle camere

excellent location close to termini station - easy to find when we got off our train.  also conveniently the bus to the airport stops right across the street from the hotel.  the hotel is about a half hour walk from the colosseum. the room was beautiful - simple but very clean.  would stay there again.
well located, renovatd, clean, comfortable and excellent breakfast
hotel is central and right next to the first stop of the hop/on/hop/off buss. breakfast is great and inexpensive
it was perfect for catching the train the next day.  it was a great hotel.  the city itself is dirty but your hotel was great

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: great location
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: breakfast was good. room was a good size and clean. very close to main train station termini. would definitely recommend.

hotel che si trova subito fuori dalla stazione termini, facile da raggiungere anche senza mezzi privati. 
personale gentile, cordiale, simpatico e sempre disponibile. 
camere ben arredate e ben tenute, con un ottimo bagno a due locali con dia doccia che vasca. 
unica "pecca" sulla cena. mi aspettavo piatti un po piu tipici di roma che, per un turista o qualcuno che viene da fuori regione, sarebbe il massimo. ma, tutto sommato, la cena è buona e con tre portate.

the room/bathroom was really spacious and clean. staff was friendly and promptly responded to any issues we had. location was good, close to the train station with taxis also readily available. my only complaint was that we had no way to turn the air conditioning on leaving the room temperature uncomfortably warm.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: bel hôtel très bien situé
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
cet hôtel est situé tout près de la gare rome termini (trains et autobus). on peut facilement faire le trajet à pied depuis la gare, même avec des valises. depuis l'aéroport fiumicino, il est facile de prendre une navette (bus) pour se rendre au terminus. 
le déjeuner est très peu cher et offre un très bon choix. on nous fournit une carte de la ville gratuitement. 
nous devions prendre un train à partir de la gare rome termini pour civitavecchia (départ de notre croisière). cela s'est très bien fait et le train est très abordable.
the staff was very professional.  we loved the modern bathroom.  the beds were very comfortable.  the location is stellar!

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: アクセス抜群。
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: 空港から移動してテルミニ駅に着いたのが20時くらいだったので、あまり歩かずに済んでよかったです。ホテルの入り口にホテル名が見つけられなくて、フロントスタッフにおそるおそる聞いたら合っていたって感じでした。スタッフはフレンドリーとは言えず、淡々としていました。ホテル周辺はcoop(スーパー)やレストランもたくさんあるので便利です。翌日はバチカン観光に行きましたが、やはり観光の拠点にするには駅近でよかったなぁと思いました！駅周辺は観光や旅行の人が多く、治安が悪いような印象もありませんでした。
great location for walking to a lot of the site in rome however the are is not well kept by the city.

very pleasant and helpful staff encountered throughout the stay. we had an inside room and a/c kept up with the 37 degree temperatures while there. meals had in the evening at the on-site restaurant were excellent!

|MASK| hotel staff ever!!!
if you feel customer service as exited this world, book here to get your faith restored. 
nice property, comfortable…great washrooms. would return here in a heart beat and recommend you do also!!
hôtel bien situé près de termini centrale mais mal insonorisé. c’était ok pour une nuit avant de reprendre l’avion. personnel très accueillant et sympathique.
enjoyed our stay, nice room and good service

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: nice basic hotel close to the train station
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: great hotel to stay at if you're just arriving or leaving rome. right next door to the train station and access to city and sightseeing buses right nearby as well.
great location adjacent to rome termini; really easy to get buses into town or trains to and from destinations. great breakfast buffet with good coffee.
clean and very comfortable.

good location.  very close to train station.
airport shuttle and city bus tour right in front.
location

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: very comfortable room for 3, next to termini
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: very comfortable beds, and the great buffet breakfast had everything you could want to eat, for €3 a person!
everything was good , location is good just 2 min away from the rome train station

the property location was great.  it is walking distance to termini station.  room was clean and well maintained.  washrooms are decent size as well.  the only drawback is that shower does not close off fully resulting in water spilling out on the floor.  i suggest fully enclosing the shower area with either glass or a shower curtain.
easy access to hotel from termini and easy to go to airport by shuttle bus in front of hotel.
walking distance from rome termini, hoppe n off tour bus . has  excellent hotel staffs  services.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: poor facilities
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
the room is too hot as the air-conditioning cannot be controlled by each room, so we were told to open the windows. 
and i cannot image that the lifts at noon time (peak hour of check-out) were stopped (keep stopping at other floors), so i had to hand carry my luggages to the ground floor.

ローマテルミニ駅から近く便利。
清潔感がありきれい。
スタッフは親切。
レストランもきれいで美味しかった。

o pessoal que nos atendeu foi ótimo, em especial a patrizia no café da manhã e o souré na recepção. além do pessoal maravilhoso, o café da manhã, as instalações, o quarto são ótimos. a localização é muito conveniente, os meios de transporte estão muito perto. fizemos muita coisa à pé.

the room was clean and efficient, but the bathroom fixtures were dumb. we were splashing water everywhere when trying to wash hands or use the shower. the location near the train station couldn’t be better. would still recommend staying here
fantástico
everything and more. breakfast is a 10/10
i would stay there again

the hotel was well located for us. close to termini station.  rooms were clean and all the staff were friendly and helpful.  breakfast was standard hotel breakfast but was more than adequate.  a cappuccino machine would have been nice but staff would make one upon request.
location was great!

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: excellent location close to termini train station
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: comfortable stay, bed was very comfortable and breakfast is excellent value for 3 euros per person.

窓の前が大きな機械が置いてあった。
1階だったので部屋が暗かった。
朝食は3ユーロ/人の割には良かった。

struttura moderna e pulita, letto comodo, disponibilità di cuscini di diversa altezza, personale gentile e disponibile, posizione strategica.
colazione nella media.

notre séjour était court mais très agréable. le personnel - réception, petit déj, femme de chambre - tous étaient gentille et compétent. chambre spacieuse et très propre et pas de bruit dans les chambres. petit déjeuner très bien et bon rapport qualité-prix. je reviendrais

1. the sink is too low & the faucet too high that water always spout out of the sink.
2. the frame in bathroom was rotten at room# 703.
3. air condition was fail for several rooms without any reason.
4. extra charge euro$60 for city/local tax than the total pricing listing in expedia without notice.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 공항에서 밤 늦게 테르미니로 와야할때
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: sit 셔틀버스를 타면 바로 길 건너편에 하차하니 늦은 밤 테르미니에 도착했을때 가장 안전한 것 같다. 다만 컵과 포트 등에서 냄새가 좀 나거나 먼지가 앉아있었던 점이 단점이다.

they were at a convenient location.  they safely stored our luggage before check-in hours and when we checked out but had lots of time to get to the airport. 
the thing we didn't like was that, though it was close to the transportation terminal, it was in an unsafe location, but then pick pockets are all over rome! one night it was pretty noisy outside but it eventually subsided. 
the hotel itself was clean and well maintained.  the staff was nice.
buena atención por parte del personal principalmente yacub quien siempre dio un extra en su servicio.  las habitaciones limpias y modernas

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: おすすめのホテルです。
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
テルミ二駅が近いです。朝食も安いのに種類も沢山あって良かったです。お部屋もバストイレも綺麗でした。
駐車場があって便利です。
el hotel es hermoso, instalaciones modernas,  limpio, seguro y el servicio excelente.

the hotels close location to the train station and one of the hop-on bus stops....magnificent! pretty nice people and definitely a decent property but the furniture in the room is this neon backlit, 1990s modern design that is very impractical. you will stub your toes on the end of the bed as the bed supports exceed the end of the bed. the bathtub shower, which is nice, is difficult to get into and out of and is slippery. there are no bathmats.  that said, the hotel has a nice staff and they are very helpful. the restaurant is good but it is less expensive to walk a hundred yards to dozen's of choices.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: el hotel es lo que nos ha salvado del viaje a roma
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
como era de esperar el viaje a roma ha sido agotador, por eso el hotel nos ha permitido recuperar fuerzas.
todo ha estado magnífico: la habitación con terraza, bien diseñado, funcional y moderno, baño con ducha y bañera, la cama impresionante de calidad y tamaño, el desayuno muy bien, con café expreso si lo pedías.
lo recomiendo sin ninguna duda.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: hotel muy bonito y bien comunicado.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: nos sorprendio la cantidad de facilidades prestadas en el hotel, la red wifi, y lo moderno que era el hotel por dentro. esta apenas a 50 metros de una de las estaciones de tren y metro mas importantes del centro de roma y la comunicacion con los diversos puntos era optima. si volvemos, repetiremos hotel casi con toda seguridad. gran experiencia y muy amable todo el personal del hotel.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: great hotel in an excellent location
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
hotel looks lovely from the outside and is located 2 mins from the main termini station.

staff are friendly, and willing to help!

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: nice for a night.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: good hotel for one night stay near the central train station. somewhat overpriced as the standard rate does not include breakfast, which is fairly standard at other hotels of the same quality/location.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: poor customer service
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: my family and i stayed at this hotel at the recommendation of princess cruise line. we were told it was a premiere hotel in the center of it all. boy were they wrong. the hotel is located near the train station, so tons of sketchy people were walking around at all hours. we walked home from a restaurant at about 8pm and got to see the truth of the area. homeless people were sleeping up and down the streets, and camped out directly across from the hotel. also, the hotel sold us some city sightseeing tickets for a hop on/hop off bus. we were told that the bus ran every 10 minutes until 10pm at night every night. imagine how upset we were when we stood outside on the corner waiting for the bus for over an hour and a half with about 8 other people who were also waiting. when we called the hotel to say we were stranded and that no bus had come, we were blown off. the young lady who answered told us "we only sell the tickets, we don't run the company." i felt that was the wrong attitude to have. at the very least, since we were guests of the hotel, they could have sent a shuttle for us, or at least offered to call the bus line, since they sold us the tickets. all in all, the hotel is mediocre, but topped with bad customer service, in a sketchy area, i would say do not stay here.
great location across from roma termini station, metro, busses & tour bus stop.  staff very helpful.
the property was in a very convenient location to the train station, dining and shopping.
il bw |MASK| |MASK| è una certezza, utilizziamo i suoi servizi tutte le volte che scendiamo a roma. camere pulite e silenziose, staff gentile e professionale, ottima colazione
good location near roma termini. very clean.

we booked the property because of its proximity to the termini station. the area is busy but so are most areas in rome. the room was comfortable and we could regulate the room temperature. the bathroom glass wall is not a favourite- open the light and the bedroom is lit up so that aspect (for us) was not great. there was a kettle with powder coffee and tea, a small refrigerator which contained items for purchase. the reception was welcoming, helpful and solicitous
good location

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 역에서 가까운 호텔
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: 조식이 5유로 밖에 안되는데 우수합니다. 로마에서 아침 식사 하기 애매하니 꼭 드시고 가세요
próximo da estação de trem. quarto pequeno, mas limpo e confortável

staff is very friendly and hotel location is incredible convenient. also, room is very clean. however, the design and layout of the room is a little odd and shower is hard to use. every time after showering, the water will be leaking out everywhere. room is quite small and hard to put stuff out. overall, it's a decent place.
peccato per colazione non compresa..colpa mia per carità..lo davo per scontato in un albergo"normale"

the pros are the hotel is right next to the rome terminal and the bus station to the airport is across the road.  the cons are many designs in the bathroom are not user friendly.  for example, the bathroom sink is big, but the faucet is less than 2 inches away from the inner edge of the sink. the bed frame corner is sharp and it caused a deep scratch to my leg.
clean modern hotel close to train station

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: hotel confortable excelente ubicación.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: cumple con las expectativas que yo esperaba. de fácil acceso para moverse a los lugares interesantes para visitar en roma.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: first-class hotel in centre of rome.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: near to everything. on-off-tourist bus (every 20 mins) opposite hotel. easy walk to shops, churches, etc.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 駅に近くて便利です。
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: テルミニ駅目の前で、移動に便利。バスツアーの集合場所にもなっていて本当に楽でした。部屋も駅の前ですが夜は非常に静かでした。
good location! super near the train and bus station . also the breakfast was very delicious!!!

ok good ok good
 good ok good
ok  good ok good
 good ok good ok good

this property was excellent , the restaurant staff was  extraordinary ..thank you so very much nadia and francesca . your kindness and help really made our stay there a blessing !.. the food was excellent .  the room in the hotel was clean and safe .the hotel is centrally located so getting around rome was easy , thank you |MASK| |MASK| we had fun , j&g

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: good staff, good hotel
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: short and pleasant stay, made better by the friendly staff and great service. downsides were a stained bed sheet, and a longer-than-expected walk to paddington. location was good though, with plenty of food options.
excellent place for visiting rome. cleanliness is at its maximum. warm staff and everything was in its place. the breakfast buffet was great.
good location, value for money
it was a very good hotel, very safe, everything so close, one of my favorites hotels in italy
fantastic stay! small room but that’s normal for rome. clean. friendly staff. |MASK| hotel breakfast i’ve ever had!

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: nice hotel!
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: located near the train and metro station. room was clean and comfortable.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: great hotel
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: everything was great. only complaint is they put two mattresses together for the king size bed and they kept coming apart

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: comfortable hotel in good location
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: it is located close to termini station with easy access to airport transfer and near the city center.
great location...5 mins walking form the train station

sehr modernes, sauberes hotel in busbahnhofsnähe, daher ideal für die erkundung der stadt. der pendelbus vom flughafen campino hält direkt vor der tür. unser zimmer nach hinten raus war so ruhig, dass wir mit offenem fenster schlafen konnten. die aussicht war dann natürlich nicht so toll, aber mann möchte ja die stadt erkunden und nicht den hinterhof.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: convinient location and very affordable
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: this hotel is very close to rome termini which is nice. it's a bit of a walk to all of the historic things but the price is right. it was very clean but our bed was extremely uncomfortable.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: excellent
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: perfect location and a true 4stars for a change.  keep up the excellent job

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title:
ローマ テルミニ駅すぐ近く。
とても便利な立地。
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
とても素晴らしいホテルでした。
従業員の方々はとても親切、朝食は美味しく、綺麗に清掃もされていて、不自由はありませんでした。何より立地が最高です。

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 기차역에서 가깝고 깨끗한 호텔
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
친절한 안내데스크와 깨끗한 객실이 구비된 호텔이었습니다.
로마에 머무는 동안 편안하게 쉴 수 있었으며 기차역과 가까워 이동어도 편리하였습니다.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: great and affordable hotel near termini station
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: this was our second stay at the bw |MASK| |MASK| and it was as great as our first stay last summer. close to the termini and hop on hop off bus right outside our door. staff was terrific, breakfast included is a bonus , and the modern decor rooms are wonderful not to mention comfortable beds and very clean rooms. great place at an affordable price.
great place. nice location. clean and comfortable.

the property is outdated, it’s in a terrible area, close to the termini station but soo many homeless and drunks wandering around it. it’s not safe at all to wander outside at night. most of the staff was friendly. just make sure you look at all of the hidden fees. we were charged €12 every day for state tax. will not be coming back to this location for sure, not worth the money.
staff is great, they go a step beyond which is refreshing. also great location.
la atención de los chicos de recepcion tanto  en la noche como  en la mañana fue perfecta
エアコンが動いてない
staff were exceptionally personable and helpful. meals were well prepared and tasty. our room was well designed and included a good sized bathtub and separate shower.
comodissimo per chi deve prendere il treno, personale del ristorante molto gentile e disponibile
客室はとても、せまく、設備は古く汚い。音漏れはするわ、コストパフォーマンス最悪、100ユーロ以上払いたくない。

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 駅に近い便利なホテル
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
駅から近く、近代的で清潔なホテルでした。スタッフの対応も丁寧で安心して泊まれました。
内庭に面した部屋だったので、眺望はよくなく、その点のみ若干不満でした。
朝食も美味しく、他は全て満足でした。

we had a really great stay here for our trip to rome. the staff were very friendly and helpful, the rooms were modern and a good size and it is well located next to termini station. we'd definitely stay here again!

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: comodissimo, a due passi dalla stazione termini
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: la camera è sufficientemente spaziosa, luminosa e pulita. il bagno, benché privo di finestra, è ampio, con vasca e doccia. i corridoi sono stretti e l'effetto è quello della nave da crociera. penalizzante la scelta dello spazio per la colazione direttamente "connessa" all'entrata dell'albergo.
great location, very modern and clean hotel, walking distance to all major sites
it is very comfy and so close to the termini station.
location is fantastic. close to the termini and sites. the only thing that ruin my stay was we found a small lizard in our room and the cleaning lady was kind enough to remove it without hurting it.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: perfect location so close to termini
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: i was in rome for 3 days / 2 nights; i chose this hotel pretty much at random -- and am so glad i stayed there: could not have been better. highly recommended!

das hotel liegt direkt gegenüber vom termini, also sehr gute metro und busanbindungen. wir hatten ein comfortzimmer zum innenhof und es war für die lage sehr ruhig.
die einrichtung entspricht den bildern. es sind wenig ablagemöglichkeiten vorhanden, besonders im bad.
ganz besonders gut hat uns die dame (patrizia) am empfang des frühstückbuffets gefallen. sie lebt service und freundlichkeit. 
wir würden dieses hotel wieder buchen, auch wenn es sich nicht direkt in der alstadt von rom befindet, aber der service und das personal hat uns dort einfach überzeugt.
it was very convenient to the termini.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: good location
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: the hotel is next to the train station but it is a bit old. not many facilities can be found there. the area nearby is not very tourist-friendly. i saw a lot of gangsters and drinkies there
near station
perfect stay at |MASK| |MASK|, right next to termini which my tour to pompeii start and end there, many good restaurant there too

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: hotel avec de bonnes prestations à côté de la gare
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: très bon hôtel. une seul bémol, l'insonorisation avec certaines chambres quand les occupants ne respectent pas les règles de vie en collectivité.

great location 5 mins walk from the metro and rail station. rooms were clean, staff super friendly and helpful. the breakfast buffet was one of the |MASK| i've experienced. can recommend this hotel without reservation.

the hotel is located conveniently very close to the central rome train and metro station. there is a hop on hop off station right in front of hotel as well as airport shuttle bus. the hotel is clean, the rooms are  very comfortable. the staff are very helpful and polite. my wife and i stayed there for few days before our cruise and we enjoyed our stay there.
great location near the train station.  we were able to take easy day trips to other cities.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 리셉션 직원분들이 엄청 친절합니다.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
지금껏 업무상 최소 80여개 가까이 많은 호텔들을 이용해 봤다고 생각하는데, 

여기 직원분들 대박 친절합니다.

프로정신을 투철합니다.  이분들 덕분에 잃어버린 텍스리펀 서류까지  복사본을 메일로 받아서

무사히 신고도 마치고 기분좋게 귀국할 수 있었습니다.

저렴하면서 직원들 친절만큼은 별 5개를 드려야겠네요.

방 크기나, 조식은 조금 부족하지만,  로마중에서 저렴한 호텔이니 이 정도면 만족을 합니다.

이탈리아를 14일 자유 허니문 여행을 했는데, 가격대비 최고의 호텔이라고 생각합니다.

modern rooms, huge tv, good ac. right next to termini station which was incredibly useful.

tourist buses stop right outside of the hotel and lots of rome's main attractions are walkable from here.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: good location
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: friendly receiption and good service.  modern and clean room. reasonable size toilet.
breakfast is just that!
the staff is friendly and professional. they care about you enjoying your stay.

el hotel esta muy cerca de la estacion roma termini,sirve mucho para usar el tren, el metro y taxis, practicamente el bus que va al aeropuerto sale frente al hotel.
los alrededores son un poco sucios,habrá gente que le puede disgustar.
en la descripcion del hotel dice que se habla español, pero nadie del personal que me atedió hablaba español, al ser una cadena americana se entiende que la mayoria hable inglés. aun con la barrera del idioma el personal es muy amable. 
en el check-in te piden una tarjeta de credito y te hacen un cargo en la tarjeta que se libera hasta el check-out en caso de algun imprevisto, de eso no te hablan en la descripcion. el pago del impuesto municipal es al final de tu estancia en el check-out.
en el lobby te dejan un mapa de la ciudad que te puede ayudar mucho. el desayuno buffet es bueno y tienen buen control para accesar. 
la habitacion es pequeña, camas ok, tv ok, internet ok, en el baño hay detalles de desgaste de los recipientes del jabon y shampoo, observe sarro y oxido, toallas ok, regadera y baño ok. buen hotel 8/10.
역시 깨끗하고 편안한 숙소 로마 테르미니역 근처에서 최고입니다 테르미니역 지하 슈퍼마켓 가깝고 근처 식당 슈퍼 다 가깝고 좋습니다 로마시내관광 투어버스는 가성비가 안나옵니다 한정거장 갔다가 내려서 관광하고 다시 타려면 대기시간이 너무 길고 관광지와 정류장 거리가 있어서 몇번 이용 못하고 하루 끝남
great location.  good staff.  clean and safe hotel.

we liked the location which was convenient to walk around to see the sights. the hotel and rooms looked to be recently updated and was very clean. the front desk staff were efficient, friendly and helpful.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 위치빼고는 딱히...
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
일단 단점만 말하겠습니다.
방음 진짜 안됨. 옆방 목소리가 라이브로 다 들림.
슬리퍼 없음. 엘레베이터가 작음. 
4성급 호텔치곤 우리나라 모텔 수준.

장점.
위치, 위치, 위치, 위치, 위치, 위치,

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 空港からのシャトルバスがホテル前に停まる
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
フィミチーノ空港↔︎ホテルのシャトルバス利便性また、テルミニ駅にも徒歩3分の距離で、ホテルを拠点にローマ観光するには最適です。
但し価格重視で選んだためか、部屋は狭く、景観はng🙅‍♂️でした...
right near the train station and larger than expected.
alles in ordnung außer dem bad. dies entspricgt keinesfalls einem 4* hotel!
across street from train station. perfect location

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 중앙역에서 도보거리
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
호텔에 중앙역에서 도보로 5분 거리이고 객실도 깨끗하여 편안하게 이용하였습니다. 다만 저녁에 근체가 중앙역앞이라 조금 호텔 주변 분위기는 좋지 않았습니다. 

전체적으로 여행자들에 좋은 교통 및 위치의 호텔입니다.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 테르미니역 가까운 호텔
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: 직원분들 친절하시고 객실상태 깨끗합니다.  다만 방음이 잘안되서 복도나 화장실에서 말하는소리가 잘들려 불편했습니다. 위치적으로는 테르미니역과 가까워서 투어신청시 모임장소로 가기편하고 밤10시이후로만 안나가면 주변에 사람이 많아 위험하진 않습니다.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 内装がきれいで快適なホテル
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: 内装がとてもきれいで新しくて、現代風のヨーロッパという印象を受けました。駅からもそこまで遠くないので徒歩5分程度で着くことができます。総合的におすすめですよ。
stayed only one night, but perfect for our needs. very close to train station.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: very close to roma termini
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: great stay before flying home. nice and quiet and awesome it has included breakfast

로마 테르미니역 도보 3분거리
로마에서 가장 깨끗함
시설 우수함
다만 비싼 가격이 조금 부담됨
great location near termini if you need transportation! alesia at front desk was extremely helpful!!

this place was good because of how close the train was. looked good until we got to the room and it smelled horrid. had to spray perfume all over to even be remotely okay sleeping there but that still did not help at all. was a good place to stay for a night but if this is your whole stay and you don’t like horrid smells do not stay here.

this was the |MASK| |MASK| |MASK| property i’ve stayed so far. very clean , room is large enough  for a couple . convenient  to roma termini and staff very friendly . restaurants and shops nearby . i would stay here again . happy customer here :)

very good walkable location not far from main train station. 
everything is very handy.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: excellent
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
excellent location, next to train station
have free mobile for navigation

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: location of hotel in rome's transport hub.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
good quality of room and facilities. buffet breakfast is of wide choice and standard.
service attendance is good from staff.
sehr freundliches personal,  leckeres frühstück und saubere zimmer
조식이 매우 훌륭하고, 룸컨디션도 좋았습니다.
only few minutes walk from the termini. the breakfast is nice.

역과 가까워 체크인하기 편리했습니다.
깨끗한 시설이 마음에 들었습니다.
프런트ㅠ직원들이 친절했습니다.

ao lado do termini, muito prático para aeroporto e trens. tem parada de ônibus turístico em frente. funcionários atenciosos e café bem variado. foi a segunda vez que me hospedei nesse hotel, recomendo!

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: sehr zentral
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: es war alles bestens. zimmer gut. personal freundlich und hilfsbereit. frühstück gut. besonders erwähnenswert waren die günstigen preise in der bar.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: goed hotel, vriendelijk personeel. prima bedden.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: goed hotel, vriendelijk personeel. prima bedden. dicht bij alle bussen en metro. taxistandplaats voor de deur. alle bezienswaardigheden op loopafstand te bereiken (max een half uur). ontbijt prima, vers en wordt constant aangevuld. prima prijs/kwaliteit verhouding.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: ok hotel , would return for the location only
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: ok hotel, |MASK| feature is its closeness to termini where you can access anywhere in rome from.  disappointing breakfast and while staff does their job they don't do much more. lacks security esp in the breakfast area where no one even confirmed room number or if we were even staying in the hotel

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: tutto benissimo!
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
l'hotel si trova a pochi metri dalla stazione termini.
e' la terza volta che scelgo questo hotel per il mio soggiorno a roma insieme a mia moglie e ci siamo sempre trovati molto bene! tutto perfetto, dalla pulizia della camera alla colazione abbondante.
ci ritorneremo sicuramente

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: great, clean, big rooms close to termini station
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: great hotel to base yourself to explore rome and nearby cities with convenience close access to termini station. the hotel is fairly close to many of the attractions within 30 min walking distance.
the location and price are amazing. the rooms are a little tight but that can be expected for rome.
convenient to termini train station,  comfortable clean room. was great for the need of just an overnight waiting for our flight home.  front desk staff friendly and pleasant.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: good location and fantastic breakfast
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
we have stayed at the hotel |MASK| |MASK| three times now and have never been disappointed, although this was the first time we had an inside room, would prefer a street view and if we go back to rome, i will certainly request one.
they also stated that there were international newspapers available by the reception, we only saw 1 american paper on our last morning...but the breakfast was wonderful

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 駅近で立地は良いホテル
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: 今回2泊しました。立地が良いので選んだのですが、ハウスキーピングが良くなかったです。使ったコップもそのままです。フロントに電話するとレストランに回されレストランの従業員には取りに来いと言われました。中途半端なお部屋の管理が残念でした。

基本的にはほぼ満足でした。
なんといってもテルミニ駅近くの立地！石畳の上を大きい重いスーツケースをひいて歩くのは、本当に大変なので、これは本当に助かります。
治安が悪いと書かれている場所ですが、7月の21時くらいならまだ人通りもあり、そこまで危険じゃないかと。もちろん、警戒は必要ですが！フィレンツェに行く予定もありましたし、朝早くからのバチカン観光からのアウトレットへのバスに乗る、という予定でもホテルで一息つけて、かなり役立ちました。
部屋にドライヤーも冷蔵庫もあります！喫煙者の母と泊まり、部屋ではタバコを吸えませんが、ホテルの中庭みたいなところでタバコが吸えました。屋根付きでソファとテーブル、灰皿があり、割と一人でも安全そうな感じでした。部屋は清潔で、十分な広さもありました。
しかし、シャワーの扉が斜めで完全には閉められませんでした。3泊の間に一度停電がありました。設備自体は古いのか？？と思いましたが、十分な宿泊ができたと思ってます。
location is very good.
very well located. it is walking distance from most major attractions
nice hotel nice and senterl for all landmarks and shops

o hotel é super moderno pra roma! mto bem localizado pra quem precisa de metro ou ônibus. 
tem um shuttle bus na frente do hotel q leva até o aeroporto por 6 euros e sai a toda hora. tem um hop on hop off tb no msm ponto. é mto limpo e os funcionários são mto cordeais! voltaria com ctz! 
quarto grande e bonito! 
solicitei berço e fui atendida com mto carinho! super recomendo!

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: テルミニ駅に近くのホテル
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
テルミニ駅に近く　活動しやすい。
部屋も毎日　シーツ交換するほど。浴室も毎日洗剤できれいに掃除している。その為　掃除に時間がかかり　ホテルライフが制限される。
great stay. recommended as location is perfect

it was very modern. 
i didn't like the bathroom shower. the water did not drain properly so there was a water backup.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: decent hotel next to roma termini
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
i specifically chose this hotel given its proximity to termini.  i wanted a hotel near the subway & train given we were only staying a couple of days and using the train to get to our next destination.
overall the room is fine for a couple of days.  its a little tight for two people with big luggage but we managed. 
room was clean, main lobby was clean. the price was right for the location.
good location, easy to get to airport and also across the rest of rome. surprisingly quiet given the location. king size bed and a bath were a bonus
ホテル内レストランでディナーを取ったが、待ち時間が長過ぎる。
a fairly long way to walk to attractions.

i really enjoyed staying at the hotel. however what i did not like about the hotel was the service at the end. we needed a ride to the airport early morning. i requested the taxi service through the hotel. they quoted me a price of 65 euro which was higher than average cost. i understood the higher cost because i knew we are doing the service through the hotel. however they insisted on the cash which i felt very uncomfortable. at the end, they said the card should be okay. but when we had our ride and arrived at the airport this taxi driver charged us 68 euro. honestly.... you shouldn't change the amount at the end just because we are tourists and we do not have cash. i hope the hotel management take this seriously because it leaves bad impression on the country and the people.
rudw staff (not all, but most of them. only one nice lady at the front desk, the men where rude). street cleanliness was terrible.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: great location for getting around rome
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: friendly helpful staff. nice room we liked the little free extras like the small snacks at the bar

部屋も広く快適
駐車場も広く、便利
the location was great, very close to termini station. however, overall the room was very small and washroom needs some renovation especially the bathrub.
nice, clean hotel. close to termini which is convenient but also close to a station which has its drawbacks.
loved staying here! delicious breakfast and right next to the train station.
excelente hotel muy modeno  muy cerca de termini.

staff was outstanding! very helpful. front desk helped arrange a late check out (child had a rough night, so the extra time allowed time to recouperate); the breakfast staff were warm, welcoming and always smiling; housekeeping delivered extra towels right away...everyone was just wonderful! would definitely recommend this hotel.
clean and set to american high quality standards!

the bw |MASK| |MASK| is located next to roma termini which is very convenient and central esp in terms of transportation. it is also safe despite being next to train station and not noisy. 

we enjoyed our stay as the room is quite spacious and the staff was friendly. however, what really disappointed us was the billing problem we faced. they charged us twice even before we checked in. while they refunded us promptly after we discovered the error, we suffered an exchange loss of euro 90 becos of billing in our local currency. when we wrote to hotel after we returned to ask for the additional refund since the loss was purely due to their error, they ignored our email and after a reminder a week later, it was radio silence. how can a reputable chain like bw made such an error and not respond to client’s email???
excelente hotel, muy moderno y cerca de la estacion central termini.
very close to termini station so it is convenient. seemed a bit pricey but it worked for us.
location is excellent- short walk to train station and metro。the mall at the train station is convenient to shop and dine.
great location next to the main station. room was great and breakfast excellent. good location for all the sights of rome
very nice modern hotel. o love the decorations.  staff is very nice. rooms ate clean and comfortable.  close to termini.
buena ubicacion. silencioso. comodo..desayuno muy bueno. personal calido y amable.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: fint hotel sentralt
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: hotellet ligger sentralt til, enkelt fra flyplassen.

at around 2:00 am on 11/19, i was surprised by the loud knock on my room twice, and when i complained to the lobby on the phone, i experienced the disrespectful rudeness of saying sorry that i did it by mistake and hanging up the phone first. i felt very bad. his voice sounded like he was drunk. it's a very pathetic and stupid this guy should cut it for your hotel
hotel is beautiful it's just on the rougher side of town

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: テルミニ駅にめっちゃ近くて便利
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
・とにかく駅に近い
・近くにコンビニっぽいお店ある
・コロッセオまで頑張れば歩ける
・12時ころ到着したのに無料でアーリーチェックインできた
convenient location and friendly staff

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 川沿いの静かなホテル
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: ロケーションは良いがスタッフの中で感じの悪い人が数人いるので非常に残念だ。wi-fiのレスポンスが悪い。
location, location, location

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: good location close to station
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: very friendly helpful staff , comfortable room - airport shuttle bus and sightseeing bus stops next to hotel
wonderful staff. very attentive and friendly. have really enjoyed our stay.
mi primera vez el servicio excelente

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: excellent location close to station & tour buses
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: good location, very comfortable room, breakfast quite good, staff very pleasant although a bit miserable at breakfast time!
excellent stay in great location and with very helpful staff

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: sehr zu empfehlen
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: tolles freundliches personal, wunderbare lage, komme gerne wieder
great hotel staff was great.

the hotel was in a good location, very close to the main rail station. you had good access to shops dining options and transport links. the staff were all friendly and helpful. the hotel room was modern and clean and a good size.
we liked the location next to termini and the staff was very nice and helpful.  it was also nice to have a coffee bar and restaurant on premises
テルミニ駅に近くてとても便利。内装や設備、フロントの対応、荷物預かりなど、どれも満足のいくものでした。

this hotel and staff were wonderful.  we had a jr. suite and it was very spacious and comfortable...	 highly recommend the extra $$.  very close to shopping and many restaurants.  only complaint, and this may be all over europe, there was not a way to get an ice bucket.  they sent our ice in bowls!

great location close to termini. i was a little worried about being so close to the station but it felt safe even at night. hotel room was spacious, modern and clean. i would definitely stay here again!

메인역에서 걸어서 5분도 안걸리는 거리라 너무 좋았음.
한국이 직원이 있어 체크인시에 매우 편안한 마음으로 진행할수 있었음.
약간 고급 모텔 느낌이 나긴 하지만 욕조도 있어서 반신욕도 하고 전신거울도 보기 편한 곳에 있어서 좋았음.
great breakfast.  close to many restaurants and transportation options.
the location is very close to termini station.  the staff is very helpful.
excellent location.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: great launching area for exploring italy.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
hotel is on par with |MASK| westerns in the states. bed wasn't terrible comfortable but after walking all day you will sleep well regardless. staff is awesome, always happy - always helpful. check-in and check-out was extremely easy and hassle free. 

italian tv is not something you can watch and enjoy. be sure to bring an hdmi cable/connection for your phone or tablet so that you can stream netflix or another service.
pésimo el servicio de front desk, súper groseros
mooi en vriendelijk hotel.  een aanrader
great location if you want to be near the train station. standard |MASK| |MASK| hotel and friendly staff
clean, updated hotel with nearby access to the main train station.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: albergo funzionale in pieno centro ( termini )
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
tre giorni di vacanza a roma, abbiamo scelto il treno come mezzo di trasporto e l'albergo era comodissimo.
personale gentilissimo e preparato per consigliarci visite guidate e non e cene. 
inoltre l'ultimo giorno mia moglie non stava bene (influenza) e il ricevimento ci ha lasciato la camera a nostra disposizione tutto il giorno, fino alla nostra partenza (serale) senza alcun addebito.
da consigliare vivamente
we stayed here for 2 nights after arriving in rome. it’s very close to the rome termini so it was great not having to get a taxi but go immediately to the hotel to rest.
manténgala así, el personal muy atento y pendiente de brindarte un muy buen servicio, felicidades
one night stay.  staff were excellent
gutes hotel in direkter lage zum hauptbahnhof termini. alle bereiche roms sind von hier gut zu erreichen

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: schönes hotel im zentrum
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: das hotel ist sehr zentral gelegen! personal ist sehr nett und hilfsbereit! das zummer ist für 2 personen etwas klein gewesen!
rude, unwelcoming staff.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: nice location near train station
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: very friendly & helpful staff...breakfast was not the |MASK| but average in europe i have found...

nice hotel in a convenient location next to termini. it was easy to use the metro from the hotel to get to all the tourist sights during our stay. plenty of restaurants in the area. the hotel was nice and the staff was very friendly. the breakfast was enjoyable and i would recommend |MASK| to anyone.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: excelente escolha em roma!
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: equipe atenciosa. ótima localização. quarto excelente (exceto a cama). café da manhã muito bom.
muy moderno todo perfecto en servicio buenas amenidades y buena ubicación

the location was very convenient. easy access to the roma central station with huge luggage.

but the room is too small and the wall between main room and bathroom is too thin (cannot even close completely), so you will need to hear partner's noise from toilet.

be careful if you and your partner are intimate couple!
modern, clean and conveniently located next to roma termini train station and hub of public transportation.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 동양친화적
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
위치가 우선 최고입니다
방음은 살짝 아쉽네요. 그래도 조식괜찮고 시설깨끗하네요. 한국인 일본인 넘쳐납니다. 서울인지 도쿄인지 헷갈릴정도네요.

totally impractical and potentially dangerous bathroom setup. no handholds in deep shower/tub making it hard to get in or out. no shelves, hooks or towel bars near sink and tub, towels are in the toilet room instead. ?????
로마역에서 가깝고, 주변 관광지 접근성 좋음, 직원 매우 친절하고 조식 좋음, 호텔 방도 창결하고 조용함.

차별과 무시를 당하고 싶으면 이 호텔을 가면 된다.이 호텔의 체크인 카운터 직원들은 차례가 된 사람이 앞에 서도 무시하고 댓구하지 않는다.짜증스런 힐긋거림 만으로 반응한다.불쾌한 눈빛과 무시를 당하고야 겨우 응대 받을수 있다.그나마 보다 못한 백인 여직원의 개입이 있어서 체크인 받아줬는지도 모른다.물론 동양인에게만 그럴 것이다.심지어는 체크 아웃 후 맡긴 가방을 찾으러 갔을때는 손짓으로 물품 보관소를 가르키더니 턱짓으로 나한테 보관소에 들어가서 내 물건을 꺼내라고 하더라.그 짜증스러운 얼굴들이 이 호텔의 얼굴이라면 받아들이든지 가지 말아야 한다.
이탈리아는 원래 그런다고? 아니다.이 호텔은 이탈리아에서 네번째 묵는 숙소였고 다른 곳은 모두 친절하고 맡긴 짐은 조심히 꺼내서 가져다 주었다.
다른 여행중에 어쩌다 느끼는 차별적인 언사나 행동이 매끄럽지 못한 의사 소통 때문이라고 생각했었는데,여기 이 호텔은 아니다.이 호텔의 체크인 카운터는 개새끼들이 맡고 있다.
호텔 관계자들이 이 글을 보고 믿어지지 않으면  내가 체크인,체크 아웃한 시간,짐을 찾아간 시간대의 cctv를 확인해 봐라.과장이 아닌 것을 알게 될것이다.
子供用にプレゼントが置いてあったり、子供に対してのサービスが良かった
modern better than any |MASK| |MASK| in america. i would stay there again.
nice hotel well located next to the train station.  very nice and clean rooms.  staff was friendly and helpful.  the breakfast was very good too.  highly recommend.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: nice hotel and close to transportation hub,
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: the check in was smooth as was the stay at the hotel

we enjoyed our stay at the |MASK| |MASK|. we liked the location close to the train station and the bar staff was especially nice. gianni was very helpful with questions and had a great sense of humor!
we would definitely stay there in the future.
wonderful staff
mooi hotel, goede locatie vlakbij grote station. handig als je met de trein naar rome airport moet. allerlei ov mogelijkheden in de buurt maar ook prima te lopen. hotel is schoon, bed ligt lekker.
great location
just across the road from rome termini station giving easy access to the metro lines and the express train back to the airport. large modern family room with all the usual features.
very good value and close to the train station. somewhat noisy street at night. typical rome noise at night.
excellent
the location was excellent. all staff was very friendly, especially the always smiling and happy lobby attendant.
너무 좋아요. 거리도 가깝고 다른 4성 이상 호텔들보다도 여러방면에서 좋습니다. 개인적으로는 iq호텔보다 더 나았던 것 같네요.

the hotel is very nice and the location is |MASK|. 
the staff was friendly and the breakfast was very good. 
i highly recommend stay at this hotel.
great location , nice room
muy buen hotel, limpio y los trabajadores bien amables
convenient location and super nice continental breakfast, esp. freshly squeezed orange juice and handmade cappuccino

location is excellent, easy to get around. 
our room became very hot, room temp control did not work
overall our stay was very good.
the location can't be beat and the rooms were very nicely decorated and clean.
professional staff very kind and helpful. very convenient location
good stay
very close to the train station, which was very convenient.  room was very clean and bed comfortable.  i like that the bathroom had a tub and separate shower.
breakfast was good.
close to termi station, well appointed hotel, staff very helpful.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: nice hotel close to train station and shops
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: check in till check out is all great.  staff is friendly and accommodating.  listen to your inquiries and needs.  room is spacious enough for 3 adults.  breakfast is great with varieties.  clean and near to train station, shops and restaurant.  will definitely stay here again if in rome.  will recommend this hotel for sure.
second stay at this property in the past two years. fabulous staff that accommodates the guest needs. property is clean and comfortable. the location is superb.
this hotel is very close to everything, very clean and good service.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: small, clean, nice hotel near to centrale roma
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
the hotel gave us a free upgrade which is great. despite the upgrade, the room is very small but it’s clean and comfy. the breakfast had to be paid but reasonably priced at euro$5 per pax. tried their dinner - tasty and reasonably priced like other restaurant out there. 
we had a morning tour that ended at check out time and the hotel was really nice to allow 1hr extension so that we could be back, changed and checked out.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 중앙역에서 도보거리
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: 중앙역에서 도보거리로 주변 관공지는 걸어다닐수있어 매우 편리합니다. 시설도 깨끗하고 객실도 청결합니다.

|MASK| |MASK| |MASK| hotel |MASK| |MASK| had a perfect location for the end of our trip. close to the train station, even closer to the sit bus to terminal shuttle.

check in was a breeze, we had the pleasure of dealing with adam f. he was extremely polite and cordial during the duration of our stay.

property had all the amenities one could ask for. nice clean room, restaurant/bar in the lobby, and outdoor sitting area. 

if ever returning to rome, would definitely stay at the |MASK| |MASK| |MASK| hotel |MASK| |MASK| again!

lovely hotel with nice clean room and comfy beds. very welcoming, helpful and friendly staff. good selection to choose from at breakfast time. ideal location for exploring rome and a stones throw away from the main train station with easy access to the airport.

a comfortable hotel in a great location next to roma termini, the metro and opposite the buses for airport shuttle & hop on off bus. easy walk to the main bus terminus. rooms were spotless, restaurant and bar well priced, good food and generous snacks served with drinks at the bar.
staff were friendly and helpful. our compliments to the restaurant & bar manager, she was an absolute delight. other options for breakfast outside the hotel with cafes and the rail station available.
we spent 4 nights there and definitely recommend to others visiting rome.
the room is a nice size

property was pretty modern, a little small but met our expectations. water pressure was excellent. staff was very helpful. close to train station which made it convenient to catch the train to different cities. would stay here again.
ローマ、ヴァチカン、ベネチア、ナポリを一辺に観光するならここを拠点にすると行きやすい。
very nice property. near main train station.

great rooms; the staff were very helpful & friendly.
fantastic location!
perfect stop after long train ride and they arranged transport to the airport the next morning. slept great, very quiet and comfortable
great place for a nights rest just outside of roma termini.  the rainfall shower was the perfect endcto a long day on a train
not up to 4 star mark. noisy air conditioning; non-working bathroom sink. is definitely close to train station.

le personnel est vraiment très gentil et très attentionné 
les plats servis au restaurant sont excellents 
l'hôtel est juste à côté de la gare et du métro 
très pratique
friendly staff and close to transportation

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: location, location, location
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: the hotel is very central - train station, rental car return and airport shuttle bus to the airport. it is also very close to the the piazza della repubblica,via nazionale and the trevi fountain.
très bien
super hotel total zentral super service wir würden wieder dort hin kommen super leckeres frühstück

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: nice hotel, close to station termini and city
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: nice hotel, close to station termini and central to major sites. room very clean & quiet. great breakfast for 5 euros.

perfect location. easy travel to train stations, souvenir shops, foods. room is spacious, very fancy, amenities good. the guy with a tattoo on the neck and arm in the reception is a bit snobbish. not smiling, not accomodating, seems angry, not an attitude of a good customer service
駅にもスーパーにも近く、部屋も広い。朝食も充実している。
nos encanto, la idea del prestamo de celular es fantastica

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: very good standard
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: very good city in a very atmosphere and good facilities

perfect location just a few minutes away from termini station. 
room was nice and clean but only drain was slow or blocked.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: nice hotel for city trip
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
nice hotel for city trip! 
very close to termini!

洗面台の排水口が初日から詰まっていて、ガッカリした。しかし、明朝、その旨を伝えると部屋に戻るとなおしてくれていた。
部屋は狭いが、清潔でした。
テルミニ駅から近いので、交通、ちょっとした買い物、食事に便利でした。
overall excellent experience
fantastic location. great staff. walking distance to many attractions.
the first night we were there paola greeted us and she was phenomenal in her treatment with us!
el accesso de noche es mug obscure
great services

nice hotel near the train station, taxi and some really great restaurants. 15 fo 20 mins walking distance away from the roman attractions. loved that they gave us a cell phone where we could make long distance calls as well as gps to get around. highly recommend!

hotel piacevole, moderno e pulito.
stanze piccoline e accoglienti. ad un occhio attento materialo scadenti e ancora lantigenica moquette.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 로마 테르미니역에서 도보4분 탁월한 위치!
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
전반적으로 유럽 호텔치고 깨끗하고 깔끔했습니다.
테르미니역에서 도보 4분 정도 거리로 이동도 편리하구요
룸 안에 커피포트가 있어서 이용하기 편리했습니다.
그리고 조식인 1인 5유로인데 꼭 드세요 !! 가격대비 너무나 만족스럽습니다.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: フレンドリー
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: 早朝のチェックアウトでも問題なく清算完了ができました。おじさんの対応もよかったです。朝食も問題なし。高層階の場合は、バスタブは無。禁煙ルーム優先でシャワーです。
very convenient near railway termional

close to station and restaurants.  can walk to most major attractions if you're energetic.  room was large and comfortable and breakfast very good but it is the station right across the road that is the big winner.

all night construction noise across the street was very challenging! 
no notice was given to us prior to arrival that this was the case.
loved the view. very clean.

역에서 가깝고 시설 좋음 
직원들도 친절하고 저녁 비행 전 짐도 안전하게 맡길수 있음 
단점 조식이 좀 부실함

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: central location with a/c
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: the room was very nice and clean. working a/c was also a much needed relief from the heat after a long day of walking tours of rome in the middle of june. taxi, bus and train locations are one block away.
location was great for the convenience of the trains, metro and tour buses.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: excellent choice
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: excellent choice of hotel near train station with low budget. good and cheap breakfast with a lot variaties. 3 mins walk to the train station. the big surprise is the free handphone  inside the room so you no need to buy another tourist sim for internet.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 靠近車站很方便
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: 早餐很棒，房間舒適雖然不大，但整體價格及設備都很好了！值得入住的飯店，對於自助旅行的人很好找到，早餐再次稱讚

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: テルミニ駅至近
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: 2015/12/26-2016/1/1までセミダブルベッドに夫婦２人で宿泊しました。日本人が寝る分には十分な広さです。部屋も小さ目でしたが、スーツケースを１つ、キャリーバックを１つ広げられました。朝食ビュッフェもハム、ベーコン、パン、フルーツなど、品目は少ないですが、おなかを満たせます。ここの売りはなんといっても、テルミニ駅からすごく近いこと。隣接と言ってもよいくらい。到着日は２２：００頃、国鉄テルミニ駅についたので、疲れていて、大きな荷物をもって歩きたくないなと思っていると、マルサラ通り側出口のところからｈｏｔｅｌ　ｓａｎｔｈｉｎａの文字が見え、安心。翌日の地下鉄やバスターミナルの利用も、歩いて２、３分くらいで快適でした。駅地下にスーパーもあり、いったん買ったお土産を部屋に置いてから、また出かけたり、周辺の観光名所を歩いて、トイレに戻ったりとありがたかった。室内もきれいで、スタイリッシュな感じです。カードキー管理で、外出時もフロントに預けずに行けます。アクセス面を重視して、きれいなホテルを探している方に押しのホテルです。

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: ローマテルミニ駅に近い
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: ローマテルミニ駅に近く、個人旅行者には大変便利、周りにイタリアンの食事の店は少ないが、駅まで行けばかなりある、個人的感想だが、中国人宿泊客がかなり多く、あちらもそうだと思うが、少し嫌になった、夜中に廊下で大声で歌を歌い、中国語でどなりちらしていて目が覚めた、中国人御用達のホテルなら次回は利用しない。

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 治安の良い場所とは言えない。
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
ホテル前で、スリにあいました。
治安の良い場所ではないです。
細心の注意をしながらの行動を、余儀なくされました。
sehr schöne unterkunft

close to train station, but zero sound proofing. can hear everything from people leaving and returning to their rooms at all hours, and housekeeping banging and bashing through the rooms next door and above in the morning. no sleep ins here! also, be careful not to leave valuables in your luggage if you are storing them with the hotel after you check out - they will allow anyone to go in and walk off with bags unattended (no one asked us for our bag tags when we returned to retrieve our bags) and also if you attach anything to your bag (e.g., travel pillows, plastic bags), they won’t ask you to remove it but will simply take them off and throw them on the floor after you leave, so they can pack your bags up high on racks. we ended up having to run back to the hotel from the train station as we only noticed our stuff was missing when we got to the station.
perfect location to catch a bus tour of city right at the terminal.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 効率よく観光したい方向けです。
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
インターネットで申し込んだ現地ツアーの出発時間が早かったため、集合場所に指定されたこのホテルを手配しました。
空港行のリムジンバスの停留所も目の前なのも、良い点です。
いわゆるビジネスホテルの部類です。
朝食はブッフェ形式で、肩ひじ張らないのはよかったです。
great location (1 block from train station), great room (nice decor and big tub), great breakfast (good value fo 5 euros).

super clean hotel and staff was really nice. we liked the easy transportation to and from the airport with the proximity of the train station, but it was a little walk to the city center where most action is happening so expect to walk about 1-2km to get to the colosseum or the fountain and 3-4km to the vatican! our room was ready ahead of time which was super helpful and we got a late checkout so we were really grateful for that. would definitely stay there again!
this was a great hotel with a beautiful view of the marina and mt. vesuvius.  the 7th floor garden restaraunt has a stunning panaramic view of the harbor and the volcano.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: テルミニ駅に近く便利なホテル
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
初のイタリア旅行で、1日目に泊まるホテルということで、駅からすぐ近くのホテルを選びました。いろいろな口コミを見ると、テルミニ駅周辺はスリなど治安があまり良くなさそうだったので、そのリスクを下げるためです。
結果ですが、スリやボッタクリなど、全く会うこともなく過ごすことができました。地下鉄ab両線を使えるので、観光に便利でした。また、テルミニ駅地下にあるスーパーにも近いので水などを買うにも便利でした。ホテル自体はというと、ごく普通（部屋のカラフルライト以外）で、スタッフの対応はイマイチといったところです（急いでいても、しゃべってばかりで遅い）。
まあ、観光メインなら利便性を考えてアリかと思います。
convenient location, close to the main train station in rome. clean , spacious room.
great location and wonderful hotel rooms.  the morning breakfast was also a big plus - abundant with lots of choices.

the room was nice and clean, people at the front desk were nice and got us into a room as quickly as possible - we were very happy as we’d just come off of a long flight. the a/c takes a while to cool down the room and didn’t get as cool as i’d like - but certainly cooler than outside, no trouble sleeping.
ubicación junto a termini pero en la zona agradable. moderno.
we were treated great, the property doesn't have smoking rooms as advertised, however there is a wonderful set of rooms with balconies.  couldn't have been more pleased with our stay

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: rome
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
fantastic staff; friendly, helpful.
there was hotel tax due upon checking out that was not included in the expedia rate.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: テルミニ駅近のリーズナブル&ラグジュアリーホテル
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: テルミニから徒歩5分のリーズナブル&ラグジュアリーなホテル。フロントの女性も丁寧な対応で感じが良かったです。

the staff were very friendly and approachable and the service was excellent. the hotel is a 2-3 minute walk away from the roma termini station so you have easy access to the regional trains, buses and metro. also, the sit airport transfer service stops just opposite the hotel so it is very convenient.
great stay
older property , not worth the cost.

this was a very convenient hotel with good access to the airport and other cities.
they kindly accommodated my late check-in.
however, the fire alarm falsely went off at 4am and continued to ring for about 30 minutes, so i couldn't get a good night's sleep.
even so, a tip was taken in addition to tax when i was billed, which bothered me.
moderno hotel y buena ubicación
front desk very helpful. restaurant staff very good.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: top hotel in top lage!!
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: personal sehr nett, zimmer sauber,ruhig, sehr gute frühstück

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: molto accogliente e pulito
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: siamo stati solo 2 notti....personale gentilissimo e camere molto pulite e moderne!!!ci siamo trovati benissimo!!!  ps la colazione e' ricca di tutto dal dolce al salato

this hotel in very central to the roma termini which was great. we had a lovely room which was extremely comfortable and spacious. the staff were very helpful.  it was a lovely modern hotel and the breakfast was good. would definitely stay there again and would recommend it to friends.
centrally located near roma termini station.
transportation outside the door, i liked everything about the location, staff and large room.
very convenient since the hotel is near termini station.
숙박중 전기가 끊겨 아무것도 할수 없음에도 호텔 스태프는 할 수 있는게 앖다며 아무 사과도 하지 않았고 겨단으로 7층까지 다녀야 했음. 위치가 매우 좋고 체인호텔 임에도 불구하고 폄점은 최악임

the staff was extremely professional and helpful. the hotel was across the street from the train station which made it ideal for a place to stay between cities and travel.  the rooms cooled off fairly quickly.  there was shampoo, conditioner, shower gel, hand soap, and lotion in the bathrooms.  the walk in shower had great pressure.

i would return.
tres bon acceuil, personnel à  l'écoute et souriant
everything about the hotel was great except for the air conditioning in the rooms. it was 90 degrees f both days we stayed and the ac just couldn't get the room cool.
excellent location (in front of ternini station). our rate also included breakfast which was very convenient.
every day we had to request face cloths! other than that little issue everything else was perfect!

테르미니 기차역,지하철역,코나드슈퍼도 가까워 편리.
힌식당 가인도 가까움.
대개 남부투어 출발이 호텔 앞이나 근처라 편리.
아이 둘과 퀸,엑베있는 큰 방 이용했는데 괜찮았음. 조식도 나쁘지 않음.
워치가 좋고 깔끔하여 추천함.
the hotel was conveniently located. the room was smaller than i expected, but it was okay. the room was clean. i wish the restaurant had more options on the menu.
location is perfect to whom need to use the train.
muy céntrico, son muy amables
close to train station

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: great location
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: hotel was in a great location, close to rome termini, but away from the chaos on the other side of the station.
excelent.   we will be back

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: als stadthotel ideal
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
trotz touristik und stadthotel mit standardreception u.servise bringt zum frühstück patrizia die persönliche und professionelle note rüber.wie ein privates hotel.
von diesem hotel aus ist rom mit allen fahrtmöglichkeiten zu erkunden.
würde ich immer wieder empfehlen.(familientreffen mit 27 übernachtungen)
great location (a block from the mian train station) great accomodations (including wonderful bathrub), and great breakfast (for 5 euros).
location from airport and location from hop on- hop off bus

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: いろんなバスがホテル前から出てて便利
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: スタッフの対応は全然、良くないと思いますが、テルミニ駅からすぐで判りやすく、ホテルの真ん前からいろんなツアーバスや空港行きバスが出てて便利。スタッフはかなり感じ悪いけど、チェックイン、チェックアウト、朝食時以外は接する事がないので(^.^)
the staff were lovely, bed was so comfy and bathroom was superb (great shower!). overall the room was a bit small but that might just be rome in general.
close to main transport services. great place.

the location of this hotel is excellent. it is within easy walking distance from the main train station in rome (roma termini). it is also a quick walk to the metro with access to both line a and line b which you need for the vatican and the colosseum. there was also lots of good places to eat around the hotel for dinner and a well stocked supermarket around the corner to get some snacks/ fruit etc. friendly staff  who all spoke english. i would definitely recommend this hotel  as a great place to stay when in rome.

very clean
safe and great staff
have been here many times
駅近で立地は大変良い。スタッフも親切でした。部屋のモダンな内装も良かった。朝食も豊富で美味しかった。唯一、シャワーブースと洗面の排水が悪く、使いにくかった点が難点でした。

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: location is good. poor service.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: hotel is very close to train station. reception staff is not friendly. we called reception and ask for help as the ventilation in room is quite bad. the staff who answered the call was not helpful and only advised us to open the window. upon our request, he said he would send someone to check the ventilation system of the room. no one showed up for 30mins and only came after we chased again. another instance we requested a fork and towel to be delivered to our room. again, no one showed up and in the end i need to go down to chase and the reception staff asked me to get the fork from the resturant myself. don't feel that this is a four-star hotel service standard.
we were planning to take an early train and the hotel was 5 minutes away from the platform. also it is walkable to city center and takes 20 minutes.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: rome visit
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
the weather was excellent and we had booked 2 guided tours.
breakfast at the hotel was well stocked and provided us with a good start to the day.
you do need to be very careful on the subway relative to pickpockets. my wallet was taken just before a subway exited the station but i exited the train and confronted the thief who returned my wallet.
the proximity to the main train station is a good feature and the express train to/from the airport is well worth the cost.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: convenient location for termini
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: clean, i think new, hotel close to termini station.
세면대 꼭지가 너무 얼굴 가까이 설치됨. 나와 아내가  두번이나 이마를 찔 정도로 위험했음. 호텔측에서 사과한다 했으나 구조적 문제. 스스로 유의해야 함. 기타는 좋았음. 우산서비스 굿~!!!
clean and safe

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title:
위치좋고 현대적이고 가성비 좋은 호텔
추천합니다
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
시설이나 위치 다 좋아요.
조식은 맛 없지만 매우 저렴합니다.
직원친절도는 보통.
아무튼 충분히 숙박할 가치 있습니다.
추천합니다.
close to rome train station and great service. got upgraded to a junior suite and had wonderful service throughout.
check in staff were not very polite

テルミニ駅からもとても近くて便利でした。
ホテルはとても小奇麗で、スタッフの対応も良く心地よかったです。
次回も機会があれば宿泊したいと思います。

this hotel is good. it’s easy to go to the bus and train station. the staff is good and the morning buffet is good. however the fridge isn’t cold and the staff forgot to refill the soap, shower cap and the facial tissue. will come back again.

didn’t care for hotel personally. overrated for what they offer.  i could have stayed down the street for cheaper and better accommodations. our room was literally 90 degrees and opening the window with full sun doesn’t help. i was told the air conditioning wasn’t available, because technically it was their winter. maybe recirculating the air in the room may have helped a little, but they didn’t accommodate our request.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: テルミニ駅近で便利
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
チェックイン時の説明が丁寧でわかりやすかったです。対応も良かったです。
チェックイン前・後とも荷物を預かってもらえます。
テルミニ駅から近いので利便性がいいです。
ホテルの部屋も綺麗で満足でした。
excellent location from rome termini. travelled as a couple, stayed 4 nights in the deluxe room. great experience overall, would choose this hotel if we ever visit rome again.

modern, clean and spacious room. friendly staff. location is close to the termini station and convenient for transportation especially to the airport via sit bus where the pickup station is just right across the street.
fantastic 2nd stay

location is good. cleanness is good.
no air condition. the room is very very warm due to the sun shining to the room. it is too noisy street so open window is not an option. staff not willing to resolve this problem. this is supposed to be 4 or 5 start hotel. it is very bad!

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 翻新了的傳統酒店
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
好：
近火車站，交通方便，火車也可去機場，一出火車站向右行，直行到出口，過馬路轉左行1-2分鐘就到，房間靚，空間不錯，乾淨，窗口設計幾好，可向上或向左開，床鋪大，電插多。

壞：
可能火車站關係，區份較雜，附近找不到便利店，窗口大和無窗花，比較危險，窗口有小小位置沒有膠邊，大風時會好嘈。
部屋がデザイナーホテルで、ラブホテルの雰囲気。普通の滞在には向かない。駅の近くで便利だが、夜は治安が悪いので注意が必要です。
it was very close to alot of attractions especially the station and bus stops.
good

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 테르미니역에서 가까워 로마 관광 및 다른 도시로 이동이 편리함
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
7층 방을 사용했는데, 생각보다 조용하고 편하게 로마 일정을 보냈습니다.
여행시 작당한 가격의 호텔을 찾는분에게 추천 합니다.

its conveniently located close to the train station making it really easy to use the trains and subway station.  shops and restaurants are all around so you're always 5 minutes away from where you want to be.
テルミニ駅近くの便利で親切なホテルです。部屋はゆったりと広く清潔です。次回も泊まりたいと思います。

the staff is exceptional.very professional and accommodating.the hotel is very close to termini station,which gives easy access to trains and metro.great shopping,restaurants and museums within walking distances.we’ve been to rome many times but my first time at this property,i would highly recommend it.this is my new go to hotel.i had a fabulous stay.

i checked into a smoking room at first, but asked the staff if it was possible to move me because of the smell. they were so helpful and accommodating and the new room was perfect; spacious, clean and a really comfortable bed- i slept so well! everyone i spoke to was polite and helpful, great location near the termini train station too to get to my early morning flight. would recommend
excellent location for train and metro connections
great location for termini, safe hotel, clean and great service
excellent staff and hotel, i am staying on my return back it was so good.

this is a great property and very convenient for american travelers. the breakfast is solid for a chain hotel, and a big bonus—it has air conditioning! the atmosphere is quiet and relaxing. while it’s not located in the heart of historic rome, it’s just a short taxi ride away and directly across the street from termini station and the metro, making it easy to get around. the staff were fantastic—friendly, welcoming, and always helpful.
hotel muy cercano a termini, excelente opción para una noche de paso.
good option close to termini
good location
superb location, clean, tidy, friendly staff. perfect stay.
nice hotel!

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: perfect hotel at perfect location
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: confortable, spacious, impeccably clean room. hotel staff were extremely helpful. a short walk from termini station means that getting about rome is very easy. breakfast was unbelievably good value - pastries, savouries, eggs/bacon, creals juices coffees etc all for €5 and which, at more select hotels, would cost $20 - $25.

clean room, perfect location fair price..tips..take the bus transfer from the airport 7euro...the hop on hop off across the street,,transfer back to fco across the street 6.50 euro every 30 min..termini across the street...shopping , restaurant, pharmacy & grocery store within 5 min walk in termini..the greatest tip is the hotel let you barrow a cellphone that you can use for calling home or locals or use the internet  for free or( as a hotspot(5euro per day)...breakfast at the hotel is only 7.50euro and the staff is great...just be aware of pickpocket at the termini..attraction within 5 min via train, bus, taxi or hop on hop off...rome is great enjoy it, we are going back
the front desk was very helpful. rina gave us all the information and suggestions. the restaurants she suggested were nice! i gave her 5 stars!

very good service "got their by pure coincidence with my fiancée after realizing we had been fooled by false marketing executive at the margareta hotel" paola at the reception made us a wonderful welcome and informing us about an hr ncredibke special. we took the economy room double bed and it was amazing. paola you saved our new year! gracie mile!
excelente ubicación
excelente trato, muy amables en lo que sea que preguntes y excelente ubicación

although this hotel isn't located "next door" to any of the major attractions in rome it does have a few important things going for it.  firstly, the hop on-hop off bus stop is directly across the street from the hotel which makes getting to all the attractions a snap. secondly, rome's main train station is only steps away.  inside the station are numerous shops and fast food restaurants as well as car rental agencies so everything you might need is easily accessible under one roof.

now to the hotel itself. it isn't "grand" but it is quite nice. there is a restaurant although we never used it, choosing to sample some of the other establishments in the area. front desk staff were friendly and helpful. the room itself was very nice. comfortable and modern. we got a kick out of the adjustable mood-lighting.  one night we left it on to fill the room with a nice soft, red glow although we could have also chosen green, blue or white as well. 

a very welcome feature was the free cellphone provided for the duration of our stay. maybe it is only a feature of the premium rooms, but what a perk! it was preloaded with an app that connected you to area restaurants and attractions and also included no-charge calling, including overseas. i carried it all around rome for three days and used it both as a guide map and for phone calls. 

if i were to find myself in rome again, i would have no hesitation using this hotel as my go-to property.
離車站非常近，步行約5分鐘，房間很舒適，員工服務態度一般，周邊餐廳選擇多，可惜不包早餐，如到酒店享用早餐，需付7歐一位，感覺比較貴
夫婦二人なのでダブルベッドにしましたがスーツケース二つを広げるスペースがなく、失敗したなと思いました。朝食やスタッフのサービスも何も問題ありません！
great start for our trip to rome. comfortably slept off jet lag, had a great breakfast, then explored!
sadly the transportation that was arranged by them was late picking us up
across strew from roma termini train station. perfect location.

the rooms are beautiful, clean, and spacious (considering it’s europe).  the location is perfect.  it’s right across the street from termini so it’s very easy to get anywhere (e.g., the colosseum and roman forum are only 10 minutes away by subway).  even though the large train station is across the street, you can’t hear it (or the many buses and shuttles that arrive and depart).  there’s a beautiful basilica about a five minute walk from there, shopping, a movie theater, etc.  i would stay at this hotel again for sure and i would recommend it to friends & family.


the staff at the front desk were friendly.  there were only two rude employees we encountered (when i asked for an iron for my room) but the rest of the staff made up for it.  

with regard to breakfast, it’s not that good, but it’s edible. they didn’t put out any pancakes 3 days, which wasn’t good because that meant we were stuck with unsalted scrambled eggs.  that’s okay, though because there are 3 mcdonald’s across the street (two inside the train station, and one on the other exit of the termini).

also, if you go on tours, many of the shuttles that do hotel pick up will pick up and drop off at the hotel or termini because it’s in the city center.  i don’t think we could have picked a better location in terms of accessibility (e.g., when we had to get to the vatican it was a short subway ride; the tour company for pompeii was able to pick us up and drop us off; airport transport arrives to termini).

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: hotel muito bom com ótima localização
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: acesso fácil a estação de trem e aos ônibus de transporte para os aeroportos
the staff made our trip and site seeing tours extremely easy and helpful! great time was had

great hotel and customer services are awesome, the hotel is very central to the central station, airport shuttle bus to the airport and hop on hop off bus available everywhere. breakfast is affordable for 5 euro. we stayed for 7 nights we feel safe to go out in the night. keep up the excellent service

property is very new and spacious rooms. we had issues with our bathroom smelling of sewage on and off for 2 days before it got fixed. we also had issues with the thermostat for 2 days before they fixed it.
테르미니역과 매우 가까워서 편함. 가성비 좋은 숙소인 것 같음. 28인치 1개 펼치기엔 괜찮으나 캐리어 2개이상 펼치기엔 약간 불편함. 지하에 클럽인지 바? 가 있어서 약간 시끄러울 수 있음. 한국인 직원 있음. 화장실이 약간 낙후돼있으나 나쁘진 않음.
nice hotel
bacon at breakfast was awful.  only criticism
comfortable simple
we met an excellent woman at the front desk that gave wonderful recommendations right upon our arrival. everything was very clean and welcoming.
