second stay here. perfect location near roma termini rail station. very easy to get buses to the rest of the city, also easy to get taxis at the station. good room layout and amenities. i will return!
oo
central. great location. very clean. better than i thought it would be.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: テルミニ駅徒歩5分も掛からない！
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
テルミニ駅着いたら出口が三箇所ありどこから出るか迷いますが、マックやベネトンやmr.paniniが近くにある出口を出て、左100m位で着きます！

駅近なので便利です。係員の対応は日本と同様なものは期待してはダメです。ヨーロッパ人だからか、私が日本人だからか分かりませんが、笑顔や丁寧さというものはありません。部屋は普通です。朝ごはんも普通です。

ホテルと関係ありませんが、テルミニ駅でチケットを自動機で購入してると、駅員でもない人が手伝ってくれようとしますが、必ず断ってください！チケットとお釣りが出てきた時に1ユーロくれと迫って来ます!!
good location! easy access just across the termini station!

this is a nice modern hotel. excellent wifi. located very conveniently by the termini. 
nice dining room with buffet breakfast daily.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 위치&침대가 좋았습니다
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
전반적인 숙박은 좋은데 조식이 저렴해서 좋습니다 
조식은 제입맛에는 맞지않았으며, 중요하게 생각했던 얼음이 없었어요 
한국사람이 많이 묶는 곳이라 들어서 얼음이 있을줄 알았거든요 없더라구요 ,, 
엘리베이터나 침대는 좋았어요 
위치도 역에서 내려서 도보 3분이였어요

the property is right next to the roma termini (train) which was very convenient. hotel staff were pleasant and very helpful. we appreciated the tips on transportation and where to go. the breakfast buffet was good and reasonably priced. we also had dinner the first night in the restaurant and it was excellent! rooms and property were clean and safe - the surrounding area (and all of rome) had a lot of construction in preparation for the 2025 jubilee, which did make for some inconvenience. that said, this hotel made a great base for exploring rome!

very modern
excellent breakfast
very close to the train station

this property is very close to the train station. it’s a very nice hotel, with clean rooms & nice amenities. amenities include toiletries, mini fridge, & on site gym & bar. there are several restaurants near by.
excellent location, close to train station

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: hotel bien situé
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: hotel moderne bien situé ménage de la chambre insuffisant prix parking conseillé par la réception prohibitif 40€ par jour et en cash pas de cb.
close to everything
locaton is excellent. customer service is great. room is awesome and modern. tv channels should have at least few in english language.

sehr gute lage, der shuttle-bus hält vor dem haus, hop-on-off bus ebenso, es ist so ziemlich alles zu fuß erreichbar

die zimmer waren sauber -die nachttischlampen waren länger nicht abgestaubt.
trotz geschlossenem fenster war der straßenlärm extrem zu hören (zimmer war zu straße hin)
great location and excellent services. the hotel was easily accessible by public transportation.
great staff and accommodations that’s close to termini
been close to train station
nearness to roma termino; staff were all very nice and accommodating.
conveniently close to rome termini station. many nice restaurants and cafes within easy walking distance. rooms are nice with a comfortable bed and large bathroom.
great place. close to train terminal. would stay at this hotel again.

this hotel is a great one-night option, especially when arriving in rome by train and departing the following day from the airport.  (or vice versa.)  the hotel is located only steps from rome termini.  the rooms are small but well-appointed and clean.  the bar/restaurant is convenient, and while the food is just so-so, it is a good option for tired travelers.  it is reasonably priced, safe, and convenient!

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: great location
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: 2mins walk from termini, you can see the hotel at the side entrance which is signposted for the street the hotel is on when leaving the platforms. the mini bar had the same price as the main bar which is rare and useful. supermarket downstairs at termini for water and snacks.
it was close to rail station, check in went quick with friendly desk person, comfortable clean room. hop on hop off bus stop right in front of hotel

other than this place being right next to central rome terminal, i would be extremely careful with what the staff at reception tell you. room has a modern appeal however not practicality. we were so exhausted that we didn’t even bother contacting the receptionist late at night when we wanted to take a bath and there were ants by the tub. this was our 10 hotel in the past 2 weeks and i am not even picky but this one was by far the most disappointing
nice location.
the buffett never really got filled and there was only one regular coffee pot that stayed empty and at 8 am should be kept up on still
good location near train station. easy to catch trains, busses and metro. close to via flavia restaurants and la romana gelato the |MASK| gelato place ever!
the hotel was good, the location was excellent. i didn’t like that staff verbally asked for a tip when paying for the city tax.
숙소는 너무 깨끗하고 좋았지만 물도 유료이고 직원들이 친절하지 않았다

overall good facilities, but interestingly enough there was no ac in early march. the room was hot and when we asked for help turning on ac we were told to open the windows… unacceptable in central rome!

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: goede prettige hotel net naast termini.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
prettige uitvalbasis voor een city trip. schone kamers, goed ontbijt en goed bereikbaar. kamers mogen wat mij betreft wat geluids dichter zijn.last van verkeer buiten en andere kamers.
meeste personeel was vriendelijk, maar sommige waren erg bot en niet zo aardig.
enjoyed the time, friendly staff and very accesible to termini!
ottima posizione difronte alla stazione di termini stanza piccola ma pulita colazione ampia ma non particolarmente di qualità, servizio impeccabile

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: modern convenience in old roma
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: the hotel was exceptional  .. all modern conveniences .. the room was beautiful with easy access to roma termini station. a wonderful end to a great vacation.

土曜日の夜窓の外から聞こえてくる騒音が少しうるさく感じました。音楽が響き、声もうるさく、、。
しばらくしたらおさまりましたが少しびっくりしました。しかしホテルはいつもと変わらず部屋も綺麗で浴室もあるので、快適に過ごせました。
i loved the breakfast buffet, near things we needed to get to. room just wasn’t cold enough.

a gem to call home for our time in rome. across the street from rome termini, which had great metro, dining and shopping options. hotel space were friendly and helpful. the only downside was no pool for the hot days in rome!
very good choice for a short overnight stay if travelling on by train or seekjng to get to fiumicino airport. clean hotel, nice rooms, good facilities and very pleasant staff!
good price and clean room
conventionally located near rome's termini station worth two metro stops in the area and plenty of dining and gelato options working walking distance.
great, very clean & comfortable bed
excellent staff, top notch service and immaculate room! will definitely be back

the staff were extremely helpful and friendly. my family arrived bout 5 hours before check-in and the staff, especially adam, worked exceptionally hard to get our rooms ready so we only waited 1 hour. 

the location is perfect for sightseeing. all the major monuments and attractions were walking distance.

modernes hotel am hauptbahnhof, kleine aber funktional eingerichtete zimmer mit dusche, kühlschrank, fernseher und einem bequemen bett. das personal ist hilfsbereit und freundlich, das frühstück für 5 € p.p. und tag ist einfach super und sollte vorbild alle hotelketten sein.
お部屋は広く清潔で機能性があり、テルミニ駅からのアクセスもわかりやすく便利でした。我々は列車で到着して空港へ向かうトランジット利用だったので、利便性は最高でした。
the property was clean and the staff was very hospitable.
good location as its right next to the trian station and everything is around 10 mins away by cab. rooms were ok and acceptable for the price.

muy bien ubicado, ya que desde ahi puedes ir andando al centro. el personal es muy amable y la estancia limpia. como pegas pondria el ruido, ya que se oye todo lo de las habitaciones contiguas y el susto al irte de las tasas de ciudadania.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: 역에서 가까운 편안한 호텔.
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
역에서 가까워서 좋고 객실이 편안한 구조로 되어있다. 호텔조식이 5유로인데 다양한 음식이 구비되어있고 맛도 좋고 안락한 구조로 만족스럽다.
다만, 엘리베이터가 터치버튼이 고장나 있고 객실 샤워부스가 좀 불편했다.
가성비 좋은 편안한 호텔로 적극 추천!
the staff was very friendly and helpful. they stored our luggage and assisted us with directions. our twin bed request was fulfilled.
clean, peaceful and safe. extremely accessible and connected via bus and train. even a walk of 20-30 minutes did not bother me or my teenagers.
a room i booked was supposed to be a city view, but it turned out to be no city view, just other rooms' windows. the room was clean and spacious, but hard to use. it was not worth the money.

esse hotel localizado 100 metros da estação de trem roma termini é muito bom. café da manhã excelente, equipe de atendentes muito educados e profissionais, simpáticos, gentis, restaurante ótimo, facilidade de restaurantes na estação, inclusive o eataly. tem estacionamento para carros, pago, do lado. todas as linhas de metrôs perto. adoramos o hotel.
loved the breakfast buffet, freshly squeezed orange juice and bartista coffee service.

we stayed at the property for one night before our flight back home the next day. it was convenient — across street from train station - so we did not have to bother with a taxi or local train. we enjoyed a nice meal at a restaurant nearby, had a terrific nights sleep on the very clean and comfortable bed (it was also very quiet), and we’re on our way home the next day. terrific for this purpose.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: テルミニ駅に近いホテルです。
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: テルミニ駅に近いホテルの中には利用無料のスマートフォンがあり便利でした。綺麗・広い・親切でした。次回利用します。
great
clean rooms and comfortable bed. bathroom was good.
sehr nettes und unterstützendes personal
スタッフのみなさんが親切でした。
テルミニ駅のすぐそばでわかりやすい。
personale inadeguato, telefono in camera non funzionante e aria condizionata non funzionante per fare caldo, alle nostre indicazioni non hanno saputo dare soluzioni, abbiamo dormito al freddo
rooms were clean and comfortable.

as a solo female traveler, i was concerned about walking around the rome termini station late at night.   then it is a convenient location if you  would like to be close to the train station.  staffs were friendly and respectful: .  marco was especially attentive and helpful.  a good solid hotel!
very clean plus near the train station.
nice hotel. reasonable rates and nice breakfast buffet for 5 euros. really handy to the main train station. and easy to get to most places in rome.
the hotel is well located and the staff is friendly and helpful. i enjoyed my stay.

we really liked our stay at the |MASK| |MASK| |MASK| |MASK|. excellent service, good breakfast buffet, clean rooms and very friendly staff.
we had a very early flight out of fco and they book a taxi for us.
i would definitely stay here again and i would recommend it to family and friends.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: great location
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: as our first time to rome we were unsure where we should be located. this hotel was perfect, right beside the termini and metro central, all buses pass close by too. most of the most famous sites to see are within half an hour walking distance (up and down hills though) - the vatican more like an hour! the hotel was exceptionally clean and extremely comfortable, breakfast was what you'd expect, my only criticism would be that the scrambled eggs could've been hotter. we found out on the day we left that we could've stored our backpacks there on the day we arrived. if we'd known this it would've saved carrying them around the vatican, however we did store them on the day we left, which allowed us to enjoy our last day even more. the hotel staff were friendly and helpful...we would happily go back!
professional and pleasant reception.
it was a clean, quiet and modern hotel. i’m a light sleeper and slept through the night every night.

location is excellent. walkable from roma termini and the “ big bus “ tour is just outside the hotel. a lot of restaurants nearby. had a great dinner at the chinese restaurant “ old chengdu restaurante cinese sichuan” about 500 meter from the hotel. 
the room is spacious and newly renovated. the staff are very friendly. excellent customer service! will definitely go back to this hotel when visiting rome in the future!👍
staff was very helpful printing documents that i needed after being pickpocketed the day i arrived in rome.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: sehr schönes hotel in super lage!
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: das hotel ist ca. 3 gehminuten vom bahnhof termini entfernt und somit optimal für einen stadturlaub gelegen. ich war das 2. mal in rom und habe das 2. mal in der nähe von termini gewohnt. das vorurteil, dass in dieser gegend viele "komische" menschen sind, kann ich nur teilweise bestätigen. ich komme aus berlin, im vergleich finden sie nicht mehr oder weniger merkwürdige (obdachlose) menschen. das hotel ist sehr modern, die zimmer waren sehr sauber und gut ausgestattet. das frühstück war für römische verhältnisse sehr gut, man darf keinen deutschen standard erwarten, aber wir wurden immer gut satt. preis/leistung haben gestimmt.
sehr zentral, problemloser check in, frühstück und minibar günstig. ideal für einen kurzurlaub in rom.
close to the train station
great location. close to train station and an easy walk to many historical sites.

close to the termini so easily accessible transportation and lunch options. the hotel restaurant is excellent. staff is very helpful, especially patrizia, federica, natalia and adam among others. we’ve stayed here before and will stay again!!

we stayed at the hotel for about five days. on our checkout date, we discovered a bed bug in our room and immediately reported it to the front desk staff. when their staff came to investigate, we felt that they initially tried to deny it was a bed bug, suggesting instead that it could be a “bad bug” that flew in during housekeeping. however, after further and more serious discussion, they ultimately admitted that it was indeed a bed bug. we also took a picture of the bug. unfortunately, they did not offer any meaningful solution to address our concern about possibly bringing these highly contagious insects home with us.

since we had an international flight to catch, we left the hotel and were promised that their management team would conduct a formal investigation and get back to us the next day. after we arrived home, however, we did not receive any follow-up email from the hotel until we reached out ourselves. even then, they merely tried to downplay the issue, saying that insects might enter hotels through guests’ luggage and that it is an unavoidable risk for travelers.

for a hotel that charges nearly $400 per night, it is extremely disappointing to receive such a response. i am certain that i will not stay at a bw hotel again.

excellent location, just steps from termini station. very clean, well run hotel, very friendly and professional staff, excellent temperature in the room and absolutely fantastic water pressure. highly recommend 👍
helpful staff and complete amenities
very convenient location - very close to roma termini so easy to get to everything in rome and beyond. clean, modern hotel with friendly, helpful staff
staff was friendly, welcoming and over the top helpful. nice gym. afternoon drinks at the bar woth appetizers.  loved location close to roma train terminal
very clean
easy check in, very close to the train station, great area for dinning and shopping
very good location

部屋は決して広くはなかったですが（夫婦でダブルベッドの部屋をチョイス）リーズナブルな価格で駅近くで立地もよく　部屋にポットとコーヒー、紅茶もありました。ヨーロッパは歯ブラシはないですが
あとのアメニティはそろっていました。
located just outside roma termini. it's easily accessible even carrying luggage.

the hotel is very close to roma termini. the hotel is clean, the rooms are good sized. the bathroom is clean and good sized. we had a room facing the street but had very little noise. the staff was very friendly and helpful.
pas utiliser le restaurant

very friendly and efficient staff in all areas of the hotel. various amenities available. great access to the train station for early morning train. will stay again. a bit surprised by a $8 service charge not mentioned anywhere.
very good, clean, professional

the property was perfect!!!
the staff were amazing and spoke english. 
modern funky rooms that honestly surprised me for being a |MASK| |MASK|. boutique hotel feeling in the heart of rome. loved it would give 10 stars if i could. clean fresh and modern 
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

very clean and modern property. extremely convenient when arriving at the train station. our sink was clogged and the shampoo would not pump (and we could not remove the container from the wall to try to fix it for use). neither was a huge deal since we were only there for a one night stay.
totally happy with this property! great location, large rooms and king size beds. breakfast was simple but worth the price.
clean and spotless
clean
very pleased with this hotel.  my wife’s mobility scooter broke down and this hotel allowed us to store it in their baggage room until we completed our vacation.  very helpful.
staff was very helpful.
all great
easy location from termini train station with suitcases, great location for trevi fountain and easy access to hop on hop off bus.  staff friendly and helpful, family room spacious, would recommend
the staff are very friendly and helpful.
very nice hotel, close to rome termini and transportation.  it was quiet eventhough in the middle of activity.  shower in our room was a bit funky but other than that wonderful place to stay.

|MASK| |MASK| was fine.

ibera airlines did not deliver our bags on our flight. we had to wait 6 hours for the bags to arrive on another flight
excelente ubicacion , habitacion cómoda . conserjes poco serviciales. buena relacion calidad precio.

staff was very friendly and helpful. adam at the front desk was awesome. on site restaurant had good food and service. included breakfast buffet was also good and included american breakfast options. hotel is across from the train station, so bus and taxi access was also very convenient. rooms were comfortable. bed and pillows were great. bathrooms were the only minor issue we saw. no fan in the bathroom and the way the shower is built with only a half wall we felt like we were getting water everywhere despite our attempts not to.
the staff were amazing and very kind. the room was nice and clean. it being next to the termini was perfect for us as we were on the go a lot.
アクセスが良くどこへ行くにも便利だった。大変良い清潔感だった。

we stayed here for 2 nights on our honeymoon. great location conveniently across the street from the termini. the room was clean and modern with a huge bathroom that had a separate tub and shower. colosseum was about a 25 minute walk with lots of cool sights and bars/restaurants along the way. we enjoyed our stay here and would visit again on a future trip to beautiful rome.

il ristorante piuttosto scadente
piatti freddi
servizio buoni

so good, it was really lovely, the staff were so kind. the hotel itself is situated very centrally to termini which enabled us to travel to anywhere. 20 mins from coliseum and other sites too. the rooms are fairly big and clean. the tv was huge and the room was really quiet. will definitely come back
部屋は大きくて清潔。テルミニ駅の隣だが騒音はない。インターネットは無難なところで、動画を観ることはできるが快適、というところまでいかない。朝食は十分なバリエーションだが、変化はない。
personal muy amable , especialmente en el restaurante por la noche. me hicieron sentir en casa
very good location.  big bus across the road. temini for buses & metro 3min walk across the street. handy to lots of restaurants. most of all lovely comfortable bed & pillows quiet.
hotel staff was friendly and helpful, and the location is very convenient!
personale molto cortese e accogliente, camera pulita, ben arredata. un pico piccolo ristoranteve hall
clean room, staff courteous and helpful.

this is the third time i have stayed here and i still love this hotel! it is so convenient to termini train station, metro and busses. airport bus right across the street for only 8 euros! very clean and even though rooms are small, as most are in europe, it is nicely arranged with a great shower, good lighting and plenty of towels. great little bar too!

amazing hotel and convenient location. this property made my first trip to rome effortless.  accommodations were modern. antonello at reception and alex with guest services we’re very, very helpful. grazie.
hotel perfecto, la recepcionista paola fue un encantado nos indico perfectamente y nos ayudo en todo, personal muy atento, el hotel muy bien ubicado cerca el metro y autobus para moverse.

the staff were very helpful and responsive to any requests me or my family had. the rooms were clean and comfortable. the hotel is close to the termini which in itself is great. the tour buses park right outside the hotel and we were able to do a hop on hop off tour. the hotel booked our transfer to the airport on departure.
yes, room was very good
they did accommodate to our needs in a time of an unfortunate emergency
very convenient and comfortable!

super 
bien situé 
chambre petite mais fonctionnelle

テルミニ駅の改札でてすぐの道沿いにあり、空港へのシャトルバスの乗り場前にある立地が最高
地下鉄もバスも利用しやすい
レストランやテルミニ駅の中のお店も沢山あり、とにかく便利

朝食が種類多く、果物やサラダもあり、パンも焼き菓子、ケーキも毎日種類が違うものが提供される

バスタブとは別に独立したシャワーブースもある広い浴室で、毎日の疲れが吹き飛ぶ

私達は2泊目は夕食付きで予約したが、コストパフォーマンスが最高

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: close to termini station
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text: stayed at the hotel for the proximity to the station, but were pleasantly surprised at the rooms and hotel in general

the staff was extremely helpful and knowledgeable about bus/subway routes as well as good places to visit. the hotel is very nice and is only a half block from the termini rail station( the main station). in front of the hotel the s.i.t. bus will take you and your luggage ( under coach storage) to and from fumicino airport  for only 6 euros.
excellent location for catching trains for day trips around italy. also cruise passengers will save money catching a train to the port. breakfast for 7.5 euros is a bargain for a very big buffet of high quality !

fantastic location, really close to the metro and bus station.  breakfast at the hotel was amazing with lots of options.  hotel provided free water, juice, biscuits and nibbles daily.  the hotel had a fabulous selection of cocktails all which were presented by the lovely frederica at the bar who looked after us.  the reception staff were also amazing with advising us of the |MASK| way to get to the main attractions including informing us of the appropriate bus number or metro line.  the hotel also had a mobile phone you could take out which you could use for directions to the main attractions.  would highly recommend.
wonderful hotel. friendly staff, clean rooms, delicious breakfast. would definitely stay there again.
in a central location and close proximity to the train station.

|MASK| |MASK| |MASK| hotel |MASK| |MASK| is a nice hotel and the staff is great. however, by no fault of the hotel itself, the area around termini is very dirty with trash and homeless. the area reflects poorly on the businesses there and rome in general from a tourists point.
conoscevo bene l'hotel per cui sono andata sul sicuro
clean room, friendly staff, good breakfast

hotel was central and easy to get around from.
main train and bus station just over the road
pulizia della camera, colazione abbondante e varia
very convenient and close to station. restaurant and bar staff were amazing. lovely meal.
sticky washroom floor

staff was awesome, extremely polite and helpful. location is the |MASK| especially if you like to use bus or train services. the environment was safe and welcoming. near all of the |MASK| most visited attractions in rome.

good for a short stay.  room gets warm from the sun but the air conditioning helps.

short walkable distance to roma termini.

one of the very few places to have a king size bed. 

the chair and sink are terrible. the chair is trying to be too artistic but takes up too much room. the sink is not practical, the tap is at the corner of the sink causing the water to splash everywhere meaning you can’t place things around the sink area as everything there would get wet.

the room is customizable with various hues such as red, green and blue. it’s an unnecessary artistic gimmick which may be a few seconds of intrigue that’s unnecessary.

with all that said, other than the weird chair that takes up too much room, the weird sink, it actually isn’t too bad. breakfast is reasonably priced, and just downstairs making it incredibly convenient. would recommend overall.

a very nice hotel with an unbeatable location. it is a 5-minute walk away from termini’s east entrance with smooth surfaces all the way, which is extremely convenient for your luggage’s wheels (if you’ve been to other italian hotels, you know cobblestone streets can be awfully rough). rooms and bathrooms are spacious, ac works well, elevators are fine and staff is friendly. breakfast is available from 6:30-10:30 and loaded with options. they also do late check-in, especially if you call in advance! i arrived at 2 am because of a missed connecting flight and they had everything prepared for a hiccupless check-in. an excellent experience all around. 10/10 would recommend and book again!
convenient location close to roma termini especially if you want to venture out of rome into other places
thanks

está cerca de roma termini la estación, lo cual me pareció muy conveniente. el cuarto estaba en bastante buena condición y el restaurante también. el gimansio es un muy básico y algunos miembros del personal no fueron muy cooperadores cuando le hice unas preguntas. en términos generales está muy bien. me volvería a hospedar ahí.

2 night stay at t he end of our trip.  it is so conveniently close to roma termini and also within walking distances of many sites and lovely restaurants. the stall were all pleasant and helpful. i would stay again .
テルミニ駅からとても近く便利でした。ホテルの周辺の治安も悪くはなかったです。部屋はキレイで設備も問題ありません。スタッフの対応も良くとても快適でした。
nice and spacious room. helpful staff at the reception. very convenient location.
great location…. hotel felt modern and clean. staff were fantastic and helpful….definitely my first choice if i revisit rome.

823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.title: x
823fb2499b4e37d99acb65e7198e75965d6496fd.text:
excellent hôtel tout près de la gare/métro.

confort excellent

petit-déjeuner buffet très varié.

personnel toujours prêt à aider
staff was friendly and hotel was clean and quiet
this property was very across from the termini, very convenient.
el lugar muy como silencioso y muy bien ubicado solo recomiendo corregir la ducha no tenia puerta y era un problema toda el agua mojaba el baño
good location right next to termini station. the room was small and they charged a city tax to check out. 6 euro a person per night.

a few minutes from termini station makes it a great location for travelling around rome easily. the hotel is very clean and the staff are friendly and helpful. we have a very enjoyable stay and would highly recommend.

mauvais et pas propre . le service est nul 
décevant comme hotel
very handy to roma central station and within walking distance to all the major sights.  we enjoyed our few days at the hotel.  the rooms are clean and comfortable.  definitely would stay here again.
駅近でロケーションは抜群。部屋は清潔で、朝食バイキングもとても良かった。
everyone was very friendly and helpful
朝食がパターン化しているし、最初に案内されたエコノミーの部屋が非常に狭くて大変でした。娘が風邪を引いたので、部屋を変えてもらったが、その後は快適でした。トイレの排水がちょっと悪いような気がするので、メンテナンス不足を感じた。
great location helpful staff but no breakfast ... but that is ok lots places to eat — easy to get to rome terminal
大変快適な部屋でしたが、ベッドの隅が少し出はっており、足をぶつけてしまうのが難点でしたが、湯舟とシャワー室が別々になっており、とても使い易い部屋でした。朝食も美味しかったです。
convenient location by train station.
the room was fine.  there was a minor issue with the shower.  the location is the |MASK| part of this hotel.  staff were generally friendly.

perfecte locatie om rome te bezoeken. dicht bij het treinstation. mooi schoon hotel, vriendelijk personeel, lekker eten en een uitgebreid ontbijt.  wij hadden een ruime kamer waar onze dochter van 16 goed bij op de slaapbank kon slapen. zouden dit zeker aanrader voor anderen
we asked for an interior room so it would be more quiet because it was close to the train station.  it was very convenient.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: we weren’t allowed to check in early, but that’s just what happens. hotel is very nice. area is safe and walkable to the aquarium and cannery row.
very clean and great location

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: convenient location
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: good .......clean convenient. good breakfast.would recommend and stay there ourselves again.
room a bit old and dated.  no insulation under door to room.  good location

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: near to cannery row
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: this place was very clean and comfortable, breakfast was decent and they had also a wine and cheese happy hour . the service at the desk was excellent . just 1 street up from cannery row and all the shops, restaurants and the monterey aquarium.
there were 2 staircase we had to climb to get to the room. being a senior make it difficult plus carrying our suitcase.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: nettes hotel in zentraler lage
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: hotel mit ausreichend parkplätzen in der tiefgarage. gute lage zum hafen und für den strandspaziergang.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great location, nice hotel
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: we stayed here two nights while exploring monterey and carmel.  our room was on the ground floor near the check-in desk so we really didn't have the opportunity to see much of the rest of the hotel.  the location is excellent, within walking distance of everything in monterey.  the parking is in a garage underneath the hotel.  the breakfast was nice - more than just all those bread products that most hotels offer.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: very nice!
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: it was in walking distance to shops and the aquarium. the continental breakfast was great, and everyone who worked there was very nice.
great location. great price.
we appreciated the friendly and helpfulness of all property staff.

the guy who looks like a manager helped me a lot for parking. because i drove 11 foot height sprinter to there and there was no place for me to park it. and this guy came out of hotel and made a space for sprinter very quickly. thanks again, 👍

it is a great spot to walk to shops and dining.
the only downside is that you can hear  people walking in the rooms above. we were woken up very eay each day because it wasso noisy above us. we complained to the front desk but nothing changed.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: rude staff
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: we got there early and jose let us check in and said come back in 2 hours to get key to rm 107 on first floor. we came back and he said he did not say that and only room left was on third floor. we are 65 yr old and had to go down and then up two flights of stairs with our luggage, i almost fell. location was good but won't go back because of what i just wrote.
like the location. walkable distance to attractions.
great location, restaurant all over, only take 10 minutes to walk to the aquarium.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: nice hotel close to monterey bay aquarium
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: good clean hotel in monterey. walking distance to monterey bay aquarium, cannery row and fisherman's wharf. overall, great stay for families with kids.
everything and everyone was great 👍.
staff, especially the front desk was very helpful. location is a short walk to monterey bay aquarium. the morning breakfast was filling!

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great location near cannery row
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: great value home in great location a 5 minute walk to cannery row. stayed there while an vacation with family and no complaints.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: nice but not fancy
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: nice but not fancy hotel . you are getting a great location .
friendly and courteous staff. check in and out was easy.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great hotel
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: nice hotel with close proximity to monetary bay aquarium. the breakfast spread  was decent. we have requested for early check in and jose ( hotel receptionist) gladly acceded to our request. he even went the extra mile to help my elderly mom to shift the luggages to the room while we were away at monetary bay aquarium. thumbs up for his excellent service !

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: close to the beach
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: breakfast was great and we enjoyed the wine tasting in the evening.
safe streets, no homeless, or concerns like in san francisco.
great location, loved the breakfast, very nice and friendly staff/people at the front desk - especially ben! we will be back!

this property is in a wonderful location. it was easy to walk to the aquarium and many restaurants. the staff was very helpful. the complementary breakfast  had a wide variety of foods. the beds were extremely comfortable with an excellent selection of pillows. i will definitely stay here again
great location, free parking, excellent breakfast
friendly staff. good location.
all was good, however no elevator to our floor, and couldn't take the luggage cart with us because the stairs.
great hotel within walking distance to restaurants, shops & the monterey bay aquarium.
property has a great location that is walking distance to all top attractions. parking and breakfast are included. have a great staff.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: nice hotel close to c row

cool to walk from room to cr
lots of food nearby
monterey is nature at its best
carmel is nature at its finest 
this reviewing process is lame
very cordial staff.
so close to everything, especially the aquarium! the breakfast was delicious and the staff was helpful and kind. we can’t wait to return to monterey and stay here again.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great hotel in heart of cannery row
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text:
hotel has an excellent location at the southeast end of cannery row. a 15min walk to the monterey bay aquarium, tons of great dinning nearby.

would stay here again.

the hotel was well placed in monterey. it was clean and the staff was professional.
but the room gave on the foam street and this road is noising all the day even the night).

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great location
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: everything you need was in walking distance. for people that like to take a small hike there is a great walking trail by the beach.
good for cannery row sightseeing. room is clean.  breakfast is enough for us.

great location!  walking distance to cannery row, monterey aquarium, and fisherman wharf. staff is friendly.  free breakfast and free parking!  coffee and tea station is available all day.  the rooms are very simple and basic.  however, if you just need a place to lodge overnight and have a busy agenda then this place is perfect!
young lady that checked us in was wonderful.
very close to the aquarium ,beach and shops. great for the family.
good location, walking distance to restaurants, great breakfast
good location for cannery row and fisherman’s wharf.
loved the location of the property. the common areas were very updated and clean. the guest rooms could use a little work. overall we enjoyed our stay.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: will come back again.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text:
we had 2 night stay at the hotel with 2 young children. we were placed at the corner unit so the neighbor guests wouldn't hear the baby cries. the hotel location was convenient, about 10 minutes walk to aquarium. the room was spacious and clean. i could use a bigger bathroom but it is clean with sufficient towels. the hot breakfast was nice. 
our room was at second floor. after taking the elevator, we still have 1 set of stairs up and another stairs down to go to our room. that was inconvenient when we have a stroller with a baby and luggage. 
overall and excellent choice for the price and location. will visit again.

they are currently remodeling their lobby so the front desk g breakfast areas are in converted rooms. 

the staff was super friendly & helpful.
the hotel is in a perfect spot. the hotel though seems older so you can hear everything. there is also construction going on there in the hotel currently. overall a good experience but not amazing.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: pleasantly  surprised
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: great  employees excellent location can walk to cannery row aquarium etc even catch  the trolly to go to fishermans  wharf.  my room was updated and clean. great selection of breakfast  items in the lobby.  diffenitly would stay here again
automaking pancake machine was unique and the pancakes were delicious. free breakfast was a great bonus.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great room
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: the room was very large and comfortable. it's not a big hotel so there's not a lot of people staying there. however overal the stay was very pleasant. the parking garage is small but no problem finding a parking.
très bien situé près de cannery row à pied en 5 minutes. quartier sûr et hôtel super.
location was very convenient for my situation parking was good

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: could use some refurbishing, but decent anyway.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: we expected to have a jacuzzi for the kids, but sadly they do not have one due to restrictions or (stupid) laws.  that bummed us out a little.  the beds were soft, but probably too soft, as i woke up with a bad back both nights.  like....really bad.  breakfast was good!  nice to have hot options, one day there was even biscuits and gravy, omelets, and other they had bacon, eggs, and biscuits.  kids loved the pancakes.  the tiles outside are very dated in the courtyard.  and the design wasn't smart - you can't roll the luggage rack to your door in some rooms.  we had to walk up some stairs back and forth to carry in our luggage.  it was nice being in walking distance to a lot of things on cannery row.  overall it was decent, but i wish i had slept better.  sofa bed was very squeaky, so every time hubby rolled over it woke me up.  nice that there are tub/showers, so the kids could have a bath.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: very well located
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text:
decent hotel. 
clean with parking available.
breakfast is just ok but free.
very well located. walking distance to pretty much everything.
would stay again.
great location, impeccable property. they are eenovating the beeakfast area, but did not bother while out during the day. aevice ladies in breakfast super nice and amazing service!
check in was super easy, covered parking is close to the entrance and everything was clean. the neighborhood is also very walkable and we're in close proximity to the shops and restaurants.
it was very comfortable. walking distance from cannery row.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great getaway
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: while there is no view, the staff was great and the location is perfect for the aquarium and cannery row. it is clean, with wifi and parking.  the breakfast was better than most free hotel food. i would definitely stay here again.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: uncomfortable bed

wonderful experience can't wait to return again:)
and enjoy the beach and the shopping.
great breakfast for the family. close enough to walk to the aquarium and restaurants .would stay again!
relatively affordable and pleasant hotel in a great convenient location.
for the price of the hotel you would think they would have more amenities however it felt like a motel 6 instead of a |MASK| in. the access to my room had stairs and was not handicap accessible.
we got a good price for a stay during the week and we chose this hotel because parking was included. typical |MASK| inn with great location and clean.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: stayed for one night on the way down the coast.

front desk was very helpful

walking distance to fishermen‘s wharf and cannary row! clean and bright facility. easy self parking
breakfast could be improved!
location, breakfast and helpful information at the desk wednesday evening at the wine and cheese. very informative- on what to do south of monterey. thank you.

location is conveniently close to the aquarium and restaurants. breakfast is great and there is a 24 hour coffee and tea station. the staff was nice enough to let us use the large communal table for board games at night. we will return to this property in the future.
smell. can not sleep because the old carpet releases bad smell and the bed sheet makes you itchy

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: what we expected
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: the hotel is small with only 44 rooms but very clean.  the staff was friendly and carried out all requests for early check in, extra pillows etc.  breakfast was as expected and wine and cheese in the evening was very nice perk.  what makes this hotel great is its location.  the path for cannery row is literally across the street and you are shopping within a couple of mins.  it is about a 5 to 10 min walk on the path to the aquarium and if you take the path in the other direction from the hotel fisherman's wharf is about a 15 to 20 min walk.  the hotels free parking is located right under the hotel, and we didn't need to drive anywhere once parked.  everything was within walking distance.
it was nice place
was very clean and staff was very friendly

it was a nice place, close to everything we wanted to see. it was a bit noisy at night that the walls couldn’t insulate. most staff members were friendly except for one of the front desk staff who came across confrontational.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: decent hotel,  good location
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: a comfortable hotel located conveniently near cannery row and the aquarium.  it's a drive to the wharf.  parking is onsite.
its was nice and hidden...and walking distance to everything
nice and quiet. easy access to cannery row.
parking was a plus. its being renovated, but there were no problems. didnt even notice any noise or disconfort
location is superb, consider we are only few minutes walk from main tourist area.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: bathtub in the bedroom!

stayed only for a night. very convenient location to walk to the monterey bay aquarium.

this property has a good location for walking but the rooms are dated and very dirty! not the staffs issue- in huge need for updated linens, windows, carpet, paint, etc! there is no elevator to rooms so you are carrying bags up and down. overall disappointed and would not recommend!

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: excellent choice!!!
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: a nice, comfortable place to stay where we could walk or take the trolley anyplace we wanted to go in cannery row, as well as fisherman's wharf. would stay here again!!!

good location for walking to shops on cannery row. hotel was built with lots of different levels so many stairs to maneuver. located on a busy street so lots of traffic noise. room was clean and comfortable.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great!
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: very close to the cannery row and aquarium. friendly and helpful staff. covered parking, good breakfast included. not the place for you if you want to swim- there's no pool/spa. our room was large and clean.
the bed was amazing. the breakfast bar in the morning was perfect with fresh pancakes from a really cool machine. it is super close to cannery row.

conveniently located a block away from canary row. we didn’t have to drive anywhere but we did take the trolly to fisherman’s warf. the beds were very comfortable, that’s a must for our family when traveling. the continental breakfast was good, some great options. overall it was a great stay! would recommend.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: perfect location, great room and nice staff.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: stayed for one night on a quick trip to monterey. my bf and i wished we could have stayed longer. the hotel was great. staff were friendly. the wine and cheese event is a nice perk. the breakfast was great for us. the location could not have been any better, one street over from cannery row. walking distance to everything!!!
wonderful property
nice and friendly staff. property is in a good location.

i enjoyed staying the |MASK| inn |MASK| because the staff was professional, helpful and friendly.  the breakfast is pretty tasty.  my room was a deluxe king so it was very spacious with a nice view.  the only downside is the rooms are very pricey.  other than pricey, i would highly recommend this hotel.

simple but convenient hotel with nice staff and breakfast. great for kids. note, lots of stairs. 

a bunch of ants invaded our room but that was likely due to heavy rains while we were there
parking is very tight for big cars/suvs. overall very nice staff.

the hotel is located strategically right next to the beach, restaurants, and cute little shops in the cannery. the free breakfast was a great perk. parking is straightforward, with a small garage right underneath the hotel. when we came back on a friday night around 9 pm, all spots were taken. however, there is plenty of street parking as well.

i really liked the location, breakfast and parking at the hotel. we came to the area to see the aquarium and it was walkable with a stroller for 2 young children. 

the bed situation could have been better. i didn’t anticipate the beds which were doubles being so small. i felt like my back hurt from the bedding, maybe it was too soft for my comfort? and when i asked for any additional types of rooms i was told the property was sold out.

the facility was in a great location, but access to the room was difficult. we are in our seventies and dragging luggage up and down stairs was very difficult. ice machines and vending machines were 3 floors away. probably won’t stay there again.
clean room. i like the dove personal  hygiene products that are by thhe sink and in the shower.
i loved the location and layout of this facility. i would stay here again any time i am in the area.
totally met expectations.  location is great.  no elevator to 1st floor so be prepared to carry luggage and front desk associate was wicked nice and helpful and offered to find someone to help us.
easy walk everywhere. 2 nd time stayed here. reasonable price.

always comfortable and clean. nice remodeled lobby. good breakfast, pancakes, eggs, bacon, fruit, cinnamon rolls. coffee all day in the lobby with good creamers. close walking distance to everything we want to do without being too pricey.

our room was clean, but for what we paid i expected a little bigger room. the beds were comfortable, but because of the social distances our hot breakfast was packaged cold foods.
we might stay again once this virus is over to try the hot breakfast. then maybe i can rate a little better.
room overlooked vacant house w/ vacant cars and several drums of some thing (who knows what was in them) and house and lot were in complete disarray.
very close, walking distance to everything we wanted to see and do
|MASK| inn was conveniently located to both the wharf and cannery row, both an easy walk.  free underground parking was another plus.  check-in and out was quick and efficient.

staff members were pleasant, dining area was clean, our room was large but could have been better decorated, food was ok, lots of stairs to get to room from elevator, could hear street traffic and noise from guests.
great rooms.
very clean,staff are friendly,breakfast are excellent.easy access to the freeway.
good location
would recommend to anyone wanting to stay near cannery row. easy parking, good breakfast, large and clean rooms
we had a wonderful time here it is close to cannery row and the staff is very nice.
hotel is very clean and comfortable and it’s in great location. will stay again.
very clean and spacious room. downtown restaurants are close-by.  very convenient location.
staff service excellent, good breakfast. clean and spacious room. great location

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: good hotel with free parking near cannery row.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: good hotel near everything around cannery row. we parked our car and walked everywhere. located just off the monterey bay coastal trail as well. we were able to walk to downtown monterey as well as pacific grove.
great
proximity to the aquarium and cannery row
great location, will definitely stay here again!

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great location
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: we loved the room. it's in a great location close to everything. the room was large and clean. hotel staff was very friendly. the wine and cheese in the afternoon was a great snack. nothing special but agreat snack. breakfast was better tha just fruit and muffins but again nothing special.
it was in a very prime location, everything was very accessible
great value with a great location, ocean views, free parking, and free breakfast. would book again in the future.

great location great price
estaban remodelándola la habitación de a lado mucho ruido muy temprano
noisy
location was perfect. amazing oven views right from our bed :)
our stay was very nice!  we were able to park the car and walk everywhere.
free breakfast, walking distance to aquarium, free coffee 24/7 in thr lobby
i really liked the staff. every employee i interacted with was friendly and helpful.
locations is great! walking distance to the aquarium and the beach to see hermit crabs. rooms are newly renovated & very comfortable. breakfast is great!

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: this hotel is as nice as it was first visit 8 yrs
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: the staff was efficient on check in,  polite desk person and helpful.  the place is clean and quiet and close to everything we wanted to do and see.  i love it here
we like everything. good location, good staff, clean
good location for walking cannery row.  comfortable mattress.  very good breakfasts.  so good to have the parking on site.
gutes frühstück , kaffee den ganzen tag kostenlos zur verfügung .

when we stayed at the |MASK| inn |MASK| it was the last stay of a long journey and because of the staff, it was the most memorable. the rooms were clean and welcoming and the breakfast was an added plus. the parking has something to be desired but with everything else considered it was a mild inconvenience. i would highly recommend the |MASK| inn |MASK| in monterey.
great location right off the seafront. underground parking for guests so you don’t have to street park. room was nice and clean, staff was great!

nice hotel with friendly staff. i like that everything is walking distance. awesome breakfast and i love that checking out is at noon. they could improve on parking space, there wasn’t enough parking to accommodate our vehicle on the premises.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great location, w/in walking distance to everythin
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: loved location. easy to locate with parking. great room size for 3 adults.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: staff is amazing
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: i cannot say enough positive things about our stay in monterey. from the moment we arrived max and the rest of the evening staff welcomed us with open arms. they were extremely helpful. joseph and the morning crew were just as helpful. the room was very nice and the walkability was perfect for getting to everything we wanted to do. i would recommend this hotel to anyone.

frınt frak ayağa was great

walls are super thin. you can hear everything. if your room is right by the street, don't plan on getting any rest.
