fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: the hotel was a in a great location, walking distance to cannery row and the wharf.  the room was spacious ( we had 2 adults and 3 grown children).  the pull out sofa was extremely uncomfortable, my son felt like he was sleeping directly on the springs and you heard it every time he moved.  the tv was way too far from the beds so watching tv was a bit difficult.  the breakfast was very good.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: hotel location very convenient
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: cannery row within walking distance.  free breakfast and newspaper a nice touch.

nice proximity to things that are walkable. parking was a little limited for large vehicles but the front staff was helpful to make sure we had somewhere to park. rooms were clean and comfortable with reasonable prices.

overall stay was good. the bathroom door in our room would get stuck on occasion and the foldout couch bed did not look like it has been changed/cleaned in awhile. otherwise, we enjoyed our stay, it was close to the attractions we were interested in, the breakfast was ok, the staff was very friendly and overall the hotel was clean and orderly.
unfortunately the power went out on the town, not their fault, so we couldnt enjoy the hotel until that was fixed after a few hours.
todo estuvo muy buen, el desayuno rico
very clean

everything looks old, dirty and outdated. all kick boards are missing since the carpet was replaced, it smells like paint all throughout the facility. bath tub was disgusting, old towels and crappy soaps and shampoo.
excellent!
exelent hotel good location i’m recommend to everyone the breakfast exelent i’m come back for next time i like it,

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: excelente localização e custo
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: não há o que se reclamar desse hotel, apenas que há escadas para se chegar aos quartos apesar de ter elevador, pois há desníveis por andar. outra questão chata foi o pagamento da garantia, que apesar de já ter dado outro cartão para pagamento efetivo, ainda não retiraram o bloqueio de garantia, 12 dias depois

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: excellent location. walking distance to everything
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: check in and out were a breeze. never had it so easy. booking with expedia made it a pleasure

needs smart tv’s, so you can watch netflix, hulu, etc for kids. we stayed on second floor, and even though we took the elevator, you still have to go down a good flight of stairs carrying luggage. the cart can’t go down the stairs. our truck wouldn’t fit (clearance) in the parking garage. other than that, it’s clean, breakfast was decent, staff was very helpful. view is really gross from windows on both sides.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: surprisingly spacious room
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: only complaint was hallway noise.  we could hear every time anyone passed our room outside.  hotel walking distance to cannery row and to the aquarium.  the walk to the wharf was doable, but a bit longer.  the room was much more spacious than i was expecting.  very comfortable.  appreciated the free breakfast.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: unmittelbare nähe zur cannery row
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: wir wurden sehr freundlich empfangen. das hotel ist einfach, aber sauber. das im preis inbegriffene frühstück war gut. es gab alles, was man für den start in den tag benötigt. das hotel hat keinen fahrstuhl. das gepäck wurde uns ohne nachfrage in die 3. etage getragen. bei schönem wetter kann man im innenhof verweilen. bei uns war das wetter leider nicht so schön. zur bekannten cannery row mit geschäften und restaurants sind es nur wenige schritte. zum fisherman´s wharf etwas weiter, aber dafür ein schöner spaziergang.
cleanliness and location.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: on cannery row and close to all.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: have stayed there multiple times and never disappointed.location and amenities
my wife and i had a wonderful stay staff we’re all super friendly, comfortable bed clean room. the breakfast was really good never used our car once while we were there
staff was very friendly and helpful.
very easy check in
perfect pit stop in monterey!
this |MASK| |MASK| is totally different from the itg
very friendly staff and great location.

the staff was great, the breakfast was substantial, and the hotel is within walkable distance of the aquarium and restaurants. the room was nicely furnished and immaculate. my only concern was that we were at the back, which borders foam street. traffic sounds were often an issue--fortunately, not after 9pm, however. i would stay here again, but would request a room further to the front  or on the side of the facility.
i wish i knew about all the stairs. i would have asked for a first floor or handicapped room. wish it also wasn’t so expensive.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: nice hotel walking distance to monterey aquarium
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: clean, charming. good sizes room. good breakfast. loved the automatic pancake maker. staff was very helpful.  recommendations for places to eat were spot on.
great location. normal room size. very clean and great staff.

hotel in einer ausgezeichneten lage. aquarium und cannery row quasi um die ecke. 
sehr freundliches personal.
zimmer zur straße war relativ laut. ansonsten sehr gute lage, einbegriffenes frühstück relativ vielfältig. 
zimmer und anlage sehr sauber.
im innenhof sitzplätze vorhanden.
location is excellent. clean. breakfast was good.
great location
outdated
difficult to find entrance
easy location for walking to most everything. it was convenient to keep the car parked most all weekend.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: nice hotel walking distance to the aquarium
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: good location and walking distance to aquarium. free parking at hotel. decent breakfast spread and serve good coffee.
our room was right by the street, we could hear the card pass by even at night. sleep wasn’t restful at all. wish they put us in a different room and not one by the road.
very clean room with a great balcony. close drive to fabulous wineries. the staff was friendly and helpful - would come back to stay.
we had a great room overlooking the water.  hotel staff at the front desk were super friendly and helpful.  breakfast was great with lots of options and continually being refreshed.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: estadia corta pero buena
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: pase solo una noche pero el hotel esta limpio y bueno
staff was friendly.  breakfast was great.  i love that pancake machine.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: difficult
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: we are in our 60s and found the hotel very hard to manoeuvre with luggage. too many stairs. great location and very friendly staff.
the hotel is in a great location. room was really clean and spacious with a great view. staff was very helpful and their breakfast was surprisingly good.
extremely quiet and perfect spot for the beaches and the aquarium

renavated and in good clean condition 
good breakfast.
under complete construction, very smelly room.  but wonderful parking!!!

staff was friendly and the property was well kept. the complimentary breakfast was great. the property was within walking distance of almost everything. the only negative was our room was street side and next to where the dumpster is. the 5am trash pick-up was little annoying but tolerable. would definitely stay there again
too much noise.

the levels are all split, so although there was an elevator, you still had to carry luggage up half a flight of stairs twice due to the layout.  monterey is dirty and like a cheap carnival.  tourism blogs over rate it dramatically!  wish i knew about the close proximity of carmel, it was way way better!

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great location and clean!
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: nice location and the hotel had a lovely outdoor area

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: nice no frills hotel with extensive breakfast
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: nice clean rooms and secure underground parking. breakfast was great as were the staff. nothing fancy here but a nicely located hotel for the seafront and cannery row shops and restaurants.

staff is super friendly and helpful. the breakfast was good. basic but nice for kids. the beds were very comfortable. lobby is nice. hotel rooms are out dated but this is location is awesome. we were very close to the aquarium and it was an easy walk to get there. definitely would stay here again because the parking is free and the staff is nice.
very good location staff were friendly had a great time

they should either close or offer half rates while doing renovations. my mother had a horrible time getting to and from the room and breakfast. also the bathroom door would not close all the way!!!!(sliding door) kids and grandma couldn't carry their bf trays to the room we had to eat in down the stairs on their own...

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: nice place to stay close to cannery row
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: clean, convenient and comfortable!  nice place to stay and good rates!

we had a wonderful stay here. the location of this hotel was perfect for walking to the wharf or cannery row. the hotel was clean and the staff was really friendly. the breakfast in the morning was a huge plus for us.
great bargain and can walk to all of the area attractions

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: quiet, clean,affordable
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: personal very helpful, very clean rooms, the daily breakfast a plus, good parking,

we booked this hotel last minute. it was a small room but the perks of this place is the location. we parked our car and never moved it until we left. we were able to walk to all the locations we wanted to visit. the monterey bay aquarium is a short walk away. i needed to stop at a drug store and cvs was even shorter away. want a starbucks? just a few minutes walk or a small coffee shop literally across the street. lots of little beach access points all over within walking distance. the room was clean, the staff was nice, and if you eat meat they have a very nice offering of breakfast for you. i don’t eat meat, so the breakfast didn’t appeal to me but they did have pancakes and other items i could eat. they have coffee and hot tea available all day in the lobby. i would definitely book this place again if i was to return.
perfect location for walking everywhere.  perfect service.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: glad we chose to stay here!
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: nice hotel, very clean and comfortable. staff is friendly, breakfast is good and we also enjoyed a small afternoon break with cheese and crackers. i stayed with my little one and was happy that everything was walkable: beach, shops, restaurants, acquarium. bike rentals is just a few steps away as well as a bus stop from where free trolley could take us to fisherman's wharf and monterey downtown. when we plan to come back, we'll book it again!

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: nice hotel in great location!
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: a very nice hotel in a great location of cannery row, at a reasonable rate.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: nice hotel close to the aquarium
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: nice hotel with free breakfast and with wine tasting in the evening. close to the aquarium and plenty of parking
good location; select hotel with the aquarium is a great deal.

convenient location, clean. 

power outage at check in lasted 30 minutes

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: friendly staff and clean room
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: my fiancé and i wanted decided to stay overnight in monterey. i checked in and the staff member at the front desk was very friendly and was full of enthusiasm. he made me feel very welcomed and gave us a wonderful room with a nice view. the room was very clean and the bed was extremely comfortable. i highly recommend this place to anyone who is looking for a good place to stay that is within walking distance of cannery row and the aquarium.
i loved the location

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: nice hotel
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: comfortable beds and pillows and the rooms are updated. the free breakfast in the morning was nice and the food was good. they also have a free wine and cheese reception nightly in the breakfast area and during the month of august they had pancakes from 8:00 pm-12:00am. the staff was very helpful in giving us directions and suggestions of restaurants. the layout of the hotel is a little odd but not a big deal. they have a very nice outdoor courtyard too. the hotel is well maintained. i would stay here again.

l’hôtel est en rénovation c’est perturbant quand on arrive mais finalement c’est bien organisé. la réception est au 2ème étage, les chambres sont propres, l’hôtel est calme et le petit déjeuner est très complet.
na

the location was excellent and the rooms were very nice and very clean.  once the lobby construction is complete, it will likely be very nice.  but in the meantime, the hotel entrance is completely under construction, utterly barron.  it was offputting to arrive at night and not find a reception area (poor signage directing us to look for the hotel reception area on second floor).  but the rooms themselves were good quality and the location was terrific, so we will stay there again after the lobby is installed.
stayed one night.  overall good hotel.  walls are thin and we were on the road.

greatly located conveniently in between all stores and beach drop downs. the room was clean and organized bed very comfortable. did wish i had a microwave in room but other than that great experience.

this is our new go to place to stay for monterey!  the staff is the best part!  they all were so friendly, welcoming and helpful!  it is so inexpensive for what you get too!  we can't wait to return!  thanks for the hospitality!

only issue was the elevator was not working

the 2 young male staff at check in were very courteous. enthusiasti.  offering to assist with luggage and knowledgeablw about the area

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: wonderful stay
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: large clean room, located in the middle of all the attractions.

in anbetracht der bewertungen und des preises im vergleich zu anderen hotels inder region habe ich deutlich mehr erwartet. das hotel ist meines erachtens nach nur durchschnittlich und zwar in allen belangen.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: excellent
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: it’s was great stay and the room were clean and comfortable to sleep in. my daughters enjoyed it too.
the ability to walk everywhere and safe.

excellent place to stay when in monterey. close to everything. spacious rooms and free breakfast and parking was excellent. also, sergio  were wonderful hotel managers as he pointed out where we can go and was just so helpful to us. thanks |MASK| inn! we highly recommend this hotel.  my family and i truly appreciate everything. free parking, free breakfast, nice and clean hotel rooms and close proximity to the cannery row. thanks a lot!

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: location
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: we stayed here for a one night quick trip to monterey. this hotel is convenient and reliable. it is walking distance to the aquarium and downtown, the breakfast in the lobby wasn’t great but it was pretty good. eggs and sausage were luke -warm,  but there was a wide variety of pastries fruit yogurt etc and my youngest  really liked the pancake machine.  it was nice to have it right there and not have to go out for breakfast. the room was clean and quiet.
excellent location. good breakfast.
amazing find right by cannery row!  friendly staff, extremely clean rooms!
front desk very kind and helpful . property very clean . great location , walk to cannery row

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: nice hotel close to cannery row
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: nice hotel, good value. staff was wonderful. continental breakfast was great.
somewhat overpriced.
the hotel was cute. clean room, basic breakfast items. huge plus was that its right next to cannery row and the beach.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: très bien situé
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: holyday inn |MASK| très bon rapport qualité prix.  chambre toute rénovée et très confortable.  petit déjeuner complet.  très bien situé.  pas de piscine...

great location and staff were great— only negative is walls are thin.
room accommodations and interior were very pleasing.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: gutes hotel gute lage
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: wir haben nur eine nacht dort verbracht! aber können dieses hotel weiterempfehlen
really pleased with this hotel.  very quaint and comfortable in a good location  exactly what we needed
it's older with most of the rooms facing the courtyard. you will be hauling your luggage up and down steps!
great location and very helpful and attentive staff. would definitely stay here again
good breakfast. served wine an cheese in the evening. room too close to street

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: close to the aquarium and shops
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: clean and spacious. room accommodated 5 of us very comfortably. good breakfast!
très grande chambre, propre, relativement près du bord de l'eau. moins apprécié est l'eau du robinet qui avait une texture légèrement visqueuse.

amazing location and facility. the staff was friendly and the hotel itself is very unique in layout - very peaceful and relaxing. and it is only steps from cannery row! will definitely book there again.

staff was super helpful. i spoke with at least 5 staff members and they're all kind and welcoming. the room was very clean. the location is just the best as well, they also offer free parking!! definitely staying here again!
very good and clean 😃
great location. walking distance to lots of restaurants and beach. friendly staff. checking in and out was quick. room was nice, had no complaints. would recommend this hotel.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: love this hotel
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: this was our second stay at this |MASK| inn |MASK|. all the rooms are different and very tastefully decorated. it is a short walk to the shops and aquarium and yet away from the crowd.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: amazing hotel stay
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text:
my friends and i had a field trip at the monterey bay aquarium for one of our classes so we decided to book a hotel here so we didn't have to drive a far distance in the morning. 
this hotel was absolutely perfect for our stay. the staff was very nice and the room was clean and comfortable. in the morning they had the most delicious hotel breakfast i had ever had. they literally had the best omelettes, bacons, biscuits, muffins, fruits, pancakes, you name it! they even had a fridge with not just any yogurt but chobani yogurt!! the good brand! they restocked the breakfast area during the entire breakfast: it was great service. 
another bonus was that the staff allowed us to keep our car in their parking garage until after our field trip was done ( around 4) even though we had to check out by 12. this was perfect considering the fact that this hotel is near everything! literally walking distance to the aquirium and walking distance to cannery row. truly great stay for a great price!! :)
short walk to the beach and restaurants. bed was very comfortable...

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great trip!
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: arrived to a beautiful sunny day in monterey! check-in went smoothly and quickly. room was large and very clean. hotel was in a great location! i traveled with my sister and her 5yr old daughter, along with me having to carry my infant son in a front pack- we were in perfectly comfortable walking distance to the aquarium and the wharf in the opposite direction. the complimentary breakfast the hotel provided in the lobby was one of the better ones i've ever seen from a hotel. i normally dont even partake in the offering lets just say, however my niece wanted a snack the first morning as we got ready and when i seen all they had to offer, i quickly made myself a little goodie plate lol! the following morning i was excited to grab one of the delicious muffins i had grabbed the morning prior. overall, it was a great, very much needed little get away and i would definitely stay here again!

the location was really good. but the hotel itself is  clean but needs so much improvement. we have reserved two rooms and they both smells (the carpet). good thing i always bring my lavender infussion machine so it helps eliminates the smell.the bathroom needs more thorough cleaning especially the sink. lots of black stuff in the drainaige part which is so yucky. had to spray it with microban. surroundings were kinda of noisy, we can hear everyone from walking, running, 
showering etc. overall, staff are great and location is really good. but the price is kind of not what we expected for the room outcomes.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: small but clean and friendly
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: the room was a little on the small side but very clean.  it had air conditioning which was a huge plus, i understand many hotels do not, in monterey and we were there when it was unusually hot. the beds were very comfortable and the room was clean. the staff we found to be very friendly, every one of them.  the free breakfast was what you would expect from a free breakfast bar not great but plenty of options and you will most likely find something you like.  we pretty much used the breakfast as a tide over until we were ready for brunch.  the location was great!  the location is really what you are paying for.  not only would i recommend to a friend, i already have.  our friends stayed at another hotel which had a larger room and was nicer looking from pictures but they were very unhappy,  to the point their room ended up being comped due to all the problems.  not to mention they spent over $40 in parking for the two days plus had to pay parking and wi-fi at the hotel.  we walked everywhere and the staff even allowed us to remain parked for a few hours, after check out. the only real downfall was the size of the room, if you plan on being in the room much, we were not.  oh and there was a little fridge, although we didn't use it, it was there :)
i like everything.

the location of the hotel is good, pleasant walk to all of cannery row.  we barely slept as our room faced foam street and we could hear cars and trucks as if our windows were wide open all night long.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great hotel near cannery row
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: i was attending a conference at the monterey plaza hotel but the block of rooms reserved was sold out by the time i registered for the conference.  i went to my expedia account and found the |MASK| inn |MASK| literally just steps away on wave st and for a room rate 40% less.  no view to speak of, at least from my room, but plenty close enough to all the attractions of that part of monterey and cannery row.  the room was fresh, clean, well appointed and welcoming.  the breakfast (included) was ok - scrambled eggs, veggie omelets, cinnamon rolls etc.  nothing gourmet but gets it done.  also good to have covered parking.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: nettes hotel in der nähe der cannery row
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text:
das hotel ist recht zentral und auch von den zimmern her schön. einziges manko am zimmer war die schiebetür zum bad hin.
etwas nervig war auch, dass wir nach dem aufzug noch zwei treppen zu unserem zimmer mit den koffern überwinden mussten.

great location so we could walk to cannery room and the aquarium. the staff was friendly and helpful. the rooms were good size and comfortable. the free breakfast was excellent and they had wine a cheese at night.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: nice hotel, close to the aquarium
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: we arrived when it was raining so did not get to see the hotel until the next morning.  the rooms were nice, the parking structure was low and hard to turn with a big suv.
steps away from the ocean and major attractions.
the staff was welcoming. the breakfast was good. however, we didn't like that they were in the middle of remodeling.
staff were very friendly
super friendly staff! very nice location. easy walk to restaurants and sights. very clean, nicely decorated room.  very comfortable bed.
visiting friends in the area
onsite underground hotel parking is a huge plus in monterey. however, note that underground height and space is limited so vehicles with cargo boxes are a no-go.
definitely a great location to cannery row without a hefty price tag. they’re doing renovations so i imagine it’s only going to get nicer. we will definitely be back!
the underground parking is very steep to go down and up. just a note for customers with big trucks or roof racks on the top their suv/truck. the ceiling clearance is low for the parking area.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: very nice hotel, and very close to everything
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: first time to california with family on vacation. there to visit the aquarium and check out the coast line. great trip, and hotel was close to everything. walked everywhere, wine tasting, dinner, shopping and whale watching.
it?was good
property is conveniently located. breakfast is  very good and so is the coffee that is served all day. disappointed that there was no on-site gym. staff was very nice.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: happy families
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: we were booked into lovers point hotel for 2 nights but only stayed 1 as it was soooo   bad. we booked our second night at |MASK| inn |MASK| and it was like night and day. fantastic hotel/staff/facilities
property is under construction, so lots of amenities are being moved around. the rooms are small and the bathrooms are poorly designed.
front desk staff was very friendly and helpful.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: convenient to cannery row in walking distance!
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: friendly staff, great evening cheese & wine and breakfast included!

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: close to the action without all the noise
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: you can literally walk to all the good stuff from this location, including the aquarium and the beach. the breakfast buffet is plentiful and well stocked, with an in room fridge for storing goodies, and the room was huge and comfortable. i love that you have a choice of pillow softness.

check- in was at 3pm .. they checked us in but the room was not ready at all!! we were made to wait for almost an hour in the corridor because the room was in the 3rd floor and it was a hassle for us to go down again with all of our luggages and all !

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: praktisches hotel, fußläufig zum pier von monterey
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text:
zimmer geräumig.  im eg etwas dunkel, da fenster kurz hinter einer wand.
es gab ein großes doppelbett und ein etwas hartes ausklappsofa.
bad wohl relativ frisch renoviert.
übliches amerikanischen frühstück wird in eingangshalle serviert. zweckmäßig, aber nicht sehr gemütlich. 
wir waren zu dritt, ein erwachsener und zwei jugendlicher. 
preis-leistungs-verhältnis angemessen.
small room, no safe, looks nothing like pic.  couldn't get in wi fi per instructions and staff came to fix tv because it wasn't working.  needs updating.

great location and the free parking in that area is a huge benefit. try and get a room on the wave st side. ours was the other side and it’s a noisy road at night. 
staff were friendly and my kids enjoyed the free breakfast.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: stayed 12/24/14
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: the breakfadt buffet is a joke. it is more of a kitchen countertop, no vareity or good quality ingredients. the room was clean and spacious, but the ac unit was so loud that i could barely sleep. i could also hear the water pumps/ pipes from the other rooms whenever someone turned their water on. it is definitely a waste of money.
staff was very friendly and helpful. the location is a short walk to the monterey bay aquarium.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: convenient location.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: very close w youalking distance to the beach, the wharf, cannery row, and the aquarium.  if you fly, it's a ten minute cab ride to the airport.
friendly staff, always willing to help, and answer all your questions, clean rooms.
staff was very accommodating, breakfast was good with quite a few options. within walking distance to the aquarium, cannery row sights - very convenient.
nice hotel. close to cannery row and fisherman's wharf.
very clean but dated rooms. noisy when people are on the walkway. the bench in the room easily slides, beware if you have little ones.

great walkable location. quiet clean rooms. and most important honest staff with amazing integrity!! one person in our group lost $150 out of her pocket without realizing it. we returned from supper and the amazing evening staff person flagged her down and returned the cash. i am awed and humbled by the character demonstrated by this act of kindness. just can’t say enough good things! we have stayed here several times and it’s always a great experience.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: prima hotel
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: prima hotel, ruime kamer, eenvoudig ontbijt, vraag kamer aan zijkant hotel anders lig je aan een drukke weg. uitstekende locatie
lovely spacious room, comfortable bed, excellent location, good breakfast choices (hot food a bit more limited). great coffee available all the time.
great location and facility

expected breakfast options to be a tad bit better but other than that everything was good 

room was clean 
free parking
location was great
one side of the hotel is very close to street that has loud trucks/cars passing by at night. it's old building and not very sound proof.
it was a wonderful
very friendly staff.  great location.
nice hotel close to the aquarium and the wharf. decent breakfast. very friendly and accommodating staff.

pros: great location and newly renovated, clean, spacious room. free parking and breakfast. 
cons: it is very loud in the room. the walls/windows are thin so we heard every car passing below (was on the 2nd floor) as if the window was wide open. woke up multiple times at night and in the morning. easy to hear upstairs and next door neighbors. also noticed the door to the room is not flushed against the frame- you can see a little space and light peaking through. important to know that there are a few steps you have to walk up/down to get to certain rooms.
i didn’t like if you were on the 3rd or 2nd floor it wasn’t stroller or wheelchair accessible. the layout going down and up stairs. otherwise i loved the hotel and staff was amazing

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: hotel in a great location
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: conveniently located near cannery row.  easy to walk to all shopping, eating and aquarium.
ótima localização nas proximidades do centro turístico e aquário de monterey. café da manhã razoável. estacionamento incluído na diária

stuff  very friendly. a lot of noise from other rooms, ac from another rooms you can hear at night times was giving me a hard time to sleep, and also noise from the busy street. not to mention expensive $150 for a night on wednesday.
convenient and comfortable great spot close to the beach.
friendly service and clean rooms. all we could ask for.

the rooms were not very sound proof; we could hear our neighbor's tv next door late into the night, as well as others walking around outside of the door past midnight. 

the garage is great and we could leave our car there after check out. would be great to have ev chargers though!

we are new to dealing with accessibility issues so were distressed to learn our room was up some stairs with no option. but, the room itself, once we got to it, was a delight. so different. very modern and appealing.
we went to the monterey bay aquarium and were able to leave our car in the garage. that was so helpful.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: convenient to aquarium
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: some rooms are more convenient than others. to get to our room on the second floor, we took an elevator, but then had at least 8 steps to go down to get to our room. not easy if you have luggage or foot trouble. sofa bed was very uncomfortable. however, king bed was good. morning breakfast was informal, but adequate for us. all in all, this motel was ok for an overnight or two.
i really like this place, great location monterey bay aquarium.
great location, free decent breakfast and parking.  comfortable beds.
great location

very convenient location to cannery row, the aquarium and the monterey coastal trail.  great restaurants nearby.  appreciate the continental breakfast provided.  i would have like more variety of tea options but that was not a huge deal.  staff was very friendly and always available.
en person ami me gusta la tienda..

lovely quaint hotel just off of cannery row. free parking and breakfast was nice and convenient. 

hotel is trilevel with several rows of stairs even after taking elevator to 3rd floor. would caution individual with wheelchair needs.
some rooms are noisy, besides that, a great hotel
hard finding hotel parking but everything else was great
enjoyed our stay.  lovely area!
huge room, friendly staff, decent breakfast. booked last min but happy with our choice. location was amazing!

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: excellent location
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: very good location. easy check in and out. staff very friendly and great breakfast.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: perfect location
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: i loved how close it was to cannery row, shopping, restaurants, beach & old fishermans wharf. clean spacious rooms & friendly staff. free breakfast was good & there was always hot coffee. would highly recommend. also all |MASK| inn expresses have the most comfortable beds.
great location, very clean
the stairs are a killer when you have luggages that can be easily pushed if the ground was flat. but since the rooms were up a flight of stairs it was a big inconvenience.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: nice hotel close to cannery row!
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: enjoyed our stay. price was reasonable and within walking distance to cannery row. the room was spacious. beds were comfortable and had pillow options!

great place! breakfast was amazing! lots of options. very convenient and walkable to many dining and site seeing places. great for kids. parking was decent. couldn’t imagine if it was busy tho. maybe they will give a voucher to park in front of the hotel during busy season. we had no issues on parking. definitely will stay here again.

a clean, spacious room with a sofa bed and a view of th he bay....great for 3 of us and our granddaughter was comfy.  we chose this hotel because it allowed us to walk to the monterey bay aquarium,  cannery row and fisherman's wharf to explore the sites and as much seafood as we could handle. the breakfast offered lots of hot and cold options to start our day.  we would definitely stay here again.
i had an important zoom call they let me use the conference room this was 3 hours before we could chrck in. staff helpful and friendly

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great choice
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: this was a great hotel. i have no complaints whatsoever. it was in the heart of monterey. you can walk to all the attractions. it was a quiet hotel. the staff were great. the breakfast was great too. i will definitely book this hotel again.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great hotel for families....walking to aquarium.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: family room was perfect for the 5 of us...quiet and plenty of breakfast choices. our kiddos said they would give it a thumbs up!!
nice staff,  clean.  wish we had waters provided for the cost.  good location
very clean and nice staff. prompt and easy check in
it was close to the aquarium and cannery row. the coast guard pier was close-by and it only took 10 min. to walk to the monterey fisherman's wharf and downtown monterey.
nice and quiet

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: clean, comfortable, and great location.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: very surprised by how nice this hotel was. nothing fancy, but very clean, and the beds and pillows were ultra comfortable. the staff was great, and very helpful. complimentary breakfast was good, and the afternoon cheese and wine hour was a treat. the location is also excellent.  great experience overall.
professional,  kind, family friendly. room was perfect, breakfast had great variety.
clean room check in was fast.  walking distance to shops and red

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: clean
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: location is perfect for walking ,clean rooms and nice staff

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: good enough
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text:
there isn't anything spectacular about this hotel. if you are looking for a comfortable bed in a good location then this will do. the breakfast was pretty good as far as continental breakfasts go. we were able to walk everywhere (including the aquarium) which was convenient as well. free parking and wifi are great perks, but we did not utilize the wifi.
we heard a lot of noise from the ice dispenser at all hours of the night but that isn't the hotel's fault. who gets ice at 4am? we also heard the guests upstairs walking around. 
i was surprised that the hotel didn't have central heating and air, but instead had a small window unit that was quite noisy.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: stairs alert
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: ask for the first floor, unless you don't mind navigating as many as two small sets of stairs with your luggage. some street noise too on the wave street side of the hotel.

i had a wonderful stay at this hotel.
the only thing that bothered us was out neighbor next door are loud and you can hear the children crying.

staff was excellent but we were disappointed room wasn’t ready when promised. the full double beds in the family suite are definitely waay to small for 2 grown adults making it extremely uncomfortable. the breakfast was great for families.
great location. friendly staff. the free breakfast is always good and sufficient.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: nice hotel good price
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text:
excellent personnel. very friedly and helpful.

nice place for a family. 
breakfast room small for rush hour.

free indoor parking included
very friendly and helpful staff. very convenient to local attractions
i liked their 24 hours coffee and tea service in the lobby. also, the hotel was nice and clean, and front desk staff was friendly and took much care of the guest too.
perfect location, friendly staff, nice and clean room, easy parking, good breakfast

rooms looked updated 
breakfast was good lots to chose from 
walking distance to almost anything u want to go do

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: good but know this
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: staff was great thru out the stay. room was clean and kept clean by the cleaning staff which were very friendly also. the 2 problems i had, were we stayed on the back side next to frost street (i believe) and you could really hear the traffic outside especially in the morning starting about 5:30am. and the constant slamming of the room doors, of course this is because of inconsiderate people and their kids not thinking that there is any one else in the hotel. the breakfast area is pretty small and gets congested. the good it is close to cannery row, the beach, good places to eat and you can walk from one end to the other really easy on the bike, walking trail.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: central and handy to cannery row of steinbeck fame
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: fun place to see whales and take in steinbeck.world super ole champs were on at laguna so there were lots of bikes there to add to the atmosphere >:)
a real breakfast eggs, beacon, sausage & pancakes with all the other things that go with breakfast.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: nice hotel
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: quiet, clean hotel,walking distance to cannery row shops and restaurants, aquarium, underground parking. would return.

location was awesome and perfectly in the middle to walk down easily to cannery row and san carlos beach. conveniently across a 7/11 for late night needs, lots of options for food nearby. place was clean, housekeeping was awesome, most staff at the desk were friendly. only downside was no microwave in the room and you could hear the people above us stomping back and forth very late at night! also if you take a steamy shower beware of setting off the smoke detector. i set ours off very late at night and i was woken up in the morning to multiple neighboring rooms having theirs go off. overall for the price and location i would definitely come back again.
great staff! good location and service. would recommend to all my relatives and friends..

very clean and comfortable room. hotel is close to cannery row and walking distance from fisherman’s wharf. my wife and i visit monterey at least once a year and this hotel is our favorite place to stay.
clean and well kept.  good breakfast.  centrally located
wow! great location.
it is close to the water. enjoy being able to walk to restaurants and shopping.
w
customer service was impeccable, friendly and professional!
perfect location, property is newly renovated and beautiful.

nice and quiet.  comfortable bed. nice that it’s an easy walk from the hotel to cannery row and the aquarium.  the coffee pot in the room didn’t work, but there was coffee and breakfast in the lobby that made up for it.
inflexible. entered a reservation for wrong date in error. property refuses to honor change request and charged $200! penalty despite being contacted within an hour of the mistaken reservation entry.
it’s near to attractions and restaurants. i like also the pedestrian and bike trail.
loved the location! we parked, checked in, and walked everywhere we wanted to go, including nearby beaches and the aquarium. staff were friendly and my 2 year old loved the breakfast.

front desk guy was awesome!  funny, genuine and had some great restaurant recommendations that were off the tourist strip.  i can’t remember his name unfortunately, he was gone on our last day.  i will stay here again for sure.  beautiful area!

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great location!
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: first off i would like to say, the hotel staff or very friendly!my family and i stayed there for 2 nights and the first day we arrived we went straight to the aquarium at about 11:00 am because hotel check in wasn't until 3:00 pm so after the 4 hour visit we arrived at our hotel to check in and the hotel employee explained to us that we could have checked in early and saved on a purchase of 2 day aquarium tickets for the price of 1 and the hotel offers free parking so that would have saved us $15.00.what a steal...oh well next time we know. i'm writing this review because i want people to know what i didn't and so you can get a good deal:) also have to say that the hotel offers free breakfast. i thought it was just going to be cereal and fruit but it was the works, pancakes,eggs,bacon,oatmeal.toast,bagels,muffins,fruit,raisin bread,yogurt,juice,milk,coffee...it was pretty good for being free can't complain!
best location to be at in monterey! everything is just steps away from the hotel!
cleanliness
convenient
nice condition after renovation
room large, clean and comfortable. good location. good breakfast.
very nice hotel.  staff were very friendly and welcoming.  great access to walking/bike trail and coast. tons of shops/coffee/dining options. beautiful outdoor courtyard and sitting area.

my wife and myself are close to 70 and we had to carry our luggage up and down flights of stairs, there was no one to help us at the time. they said if you can wait till morning someone can help you, which wasn't an option. there needs to be some sort of warning that you might have to go through an obstacle course to get to your room.

the location was great.  the staff was great.  unfortunately, the view from my window was terrible.  also, there was alot of noise, especially from the room above---it sounded like an elephant training ground!  also, access to the room was poor---after getting off the elevator, people have to go down 6 steps, with luggage, before getting to their rooms.
property was great. nice rooms. easy parking. great location. breakfast spread was very nice and that was great fir our family.
check in service was great! great location! walking distance to the aquarium!
good
es un lugar tranquilo la habitacion esta de buen tamańo
the breakfast was cereal with milk, a orange and orange juice and pudding. fresh coffee or tea
we will definitely return! very relaxing  environment.
very,very clean property. great stuff. great location.
clean. convenient. comfortable.
great location and nice free breakfast. good to have underground parking.
the property is one street away from cannery row and only 10min walk to the aquarium super convenient.
good location near cannery row, walking distance to many restaurants and sights.
too many steps. no elevator access on higher floors.
it was an easy walk to my conference and dinning. but the rooms were old and smelled old. there was no spa, no pool, no gym, and no free breakfast.
super close to cannery row. easy walk to the aquarium and cannery row. this property is within walking to the beach, but not on the beach.
hyggeligt hotel med en rigtig god beliggenhed. rigtig fin morgenmad.
the hotel is walking distance to the aquarium and a number of restaurants. was perfect for a couple nights with our young kids
amazing location, not the quieter hotel though
location, free parking and breakfast were all fantastic.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: close to cannery row
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: nice, clean room close to cannery row. staff was great and breakfast was good for a continental breakfast.
very nice room, clean and comfortable. great location. staff was very nice and helpful. i would recommend and return in the future.
this was a very cute property. there was a courtyard in the center with flowers. staff was so so friendly and helpful. the room was great and clean.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: perfect location
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: my family of five only stayed one night, but there was enough room for us all. the tv was a little small considering it was at the far end of the room. the rest of the room was fine. breakfast was included and there was plenty of food and a good variety. the front desk personnel were very friendly. the parking lot was very helpful. the location was the best feature. right at cannery row and a short walk to fishermans wharf. there's also a free shuttle that takes you to the tourist sights. they even let us leave our car there the rest of the day after we checked out.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: muito perto do centrinho
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: quarto grande õtimo para família, café da manhã padrão mas muito bom....
what was nice about this property was its location to cannery row. very walkable!
clean and very well kept. it’s a little noisy from outside traffic.

close to many local attractions. we were able to park our car in the hotel lot and walk to all oir desired sightseeing spots. room was recently renovated and bathroom was enormous. bed spacious and window shade mechanically open/close with window that opened to receive ocean air if desired. loved my stay there.
that it was close to the aquarium.

very good location, free breakfast and 24 hr coffee tea bar. room is spacious and clean. only downside is some sewer gas smell in the washroom sometimes. the hotel rooms surrounds a beautiful garden in the middle of the hotel.

property was in a great location, staff was very friendly and attentive. everything looked clean except the room carpet. it was gross. hotel itself was kept up well. beware of construction right next door. expect noise if staying on the back side rooms from street or right side from workers.

close to the event we were going to,  
best bag breakfast ever all fresh
clean, great location, and reasonable price ! would stay again!
the hotel is nicely clean. stores and restaurants and walking distance from the hotel.
the smell of cleaning chemicals was overwhelming
stayed before. convenient location

my family and i loved staying here. it's in close walking distance to cannery row and the ocean. i especially loved that it was right next door to an awesome antique mall. they have underground free parking for guests. the room is clean and updated. the only frown is on the feeling of the carpet on my bare feet. it was like i can feel a film from them shampooing the carpet and a slight odor from when it was once damp. i was able to get over that though because overall the rest of the room and especually the bathrooms were so clean. it looked like it was newly built. now the best part was the free hot breakfast. it was such a pleasant experience.  they opened up a whole area with omelettes, yogurt, fruit, coffee, orange juice, cereal and even a pancake making machine. the machine had a few hiccups when trying to work but the staff was so helpful to get it back up and running. anyway, it was a nice communal area where all of the hotel guests were able to exchange smiles, conversations and excitement to start their day. i would definitely stay here again.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: spacious and comfortable
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: our room was spacious and comfortable.  we used the pullout out bed for our kids and it was already made up for us when we arrived with plenty of blankets and pillows.  the pullout bed was quite comfortable, too.  the hotel was quiet, the breakfast was good and we had a view of the ocean.
location was fabulous! one block from cannery row. room was clean and large with a great free breakfast and wonderful welcoming friendly knowledgeable staff!!!!

we had a very clean, newly updated room.  it was a perfect spot for us while traveling through the area. we loved walking to the beach and nearby shops.  i felt safe at the hotel.  my only complaint is the noisy street at night, but it’s in a happening area, so that’s to be expected.  we also loved the free continental breakfast - that was a great perk!
nice place to stay.
friendly staff and easy to get around
great location! walking distance to the aquarium and the main streets. the room was comfortable for 4 adults.
i liked the breakfast options. the room was spacious for 5 people as well. overall, nice stay.

overall very good.
sound proof not very good, difficult to take a nap in the afternoon, but it is quiet at night.
the staff was awesome and the location is absolutely walkable to all the cannery row shops, restaurants and the aquarium.  room and property very comfortable. the breakfast was very generous.

the property is exceptional for the price.  the young lady that checked us in gave us great tips for dinner and the general area.  the property was very clean and well-kept.  i would definitley stay here again.
helpful and kind staff. complimentary hot breakfast in the morning .and wine and cheese hour in the afternoon.
close to hotspots, excellent parking, check in was quick and friendly.
location was great. close to everything (restaurants, beaches)

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: short walk to town centre.  good breakfast choice.
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: sanjay checked us in & out and was really helpful answering any questions we had. room was comfortable and in a good position. good value for money.
loved the hospitality and breakfast was delicious, definitely recommended and will be booking in the future for another monterey trip.
location

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: quiet room. great location. walkable
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: secluded setting for a very busy area. wine and cheese complimentary at happy hour was a nice touch.

very good value for money. close to cannery row, very nice and spacious rooms, including a wine and cheese thing in the afternoon an a nice and small breakfast that supplies everything you need. loved it.

the morning breakfast was very good with a lot of choices.
the property is so well located, walking distance to canary row, fishermen's warf and the aquarium.
jay is a very friendly and  engaging gentleman.
great spot
great location one street up from cannery row. plenty of food choices within easy walking distance.
n
we enjoyed our stay. great location. but when we checked in, our room was not ready yet and we have to wait for at least 20 mins.
i had made a reservation and payment for a room, but upon arrival around 6 p.m., i found that the room had been sold and the front desk lady was not going to accommodate us.
the staff was great and extremely friendly, give us great advise on where to eat. hotel is super quiet. the only thing i didn’t like that the hotel has so many stairs.

king bed was comfortable and the room was well kept. breakfast options had decent variety. on checkout day, the hotel lets you stay parked in their garage for the rest of the day. super comvenient location within walking distance of monterey bay aquarium, cannery row, and the beach!
location, nice grounds, excellent service, and breakfast!

the room was spacious and clean. the location was convenient and parking was included.
i'd love to return when i have more time to enjoy the area.
staff efficient and courteous walking distance to areas of interest. would recommend

what i liked about the property is that everything is walking distance. my kids enjoyed the breakfast lots of options for them. my son enjoyed watching his pancakes being made. the  only thing that confused us is when we got there is the entrance because the gps took us one way that didn’t have an entrance so we had to go around and look for the entrance.
nice area good location

i stayed here overnight for a family trip to the aquarium. it was an enjoyable walking distance to our attraction along with the stores we visited along the way. the room we stayed in was meticulous and spacious for 2 adults, 2 teens, and one child. cvs is also nearby which was convenient for us when we needed to grab a few things. we just walked there and we walked there at around 10pm. it’s a quiet location—no dogs barking, didn’t hear people talking, and traffic sounds were very minimal. breakfast was also pretty good with variety of options. the service desk was considerably kind. i would highly recommend this place!
room was clean and functional, staff were polite and friendly, hotel is near attractions , restaurants and restaurants, it’s a good choice especially with free parking
great location
great location , walking distance to our favorite restaurant and stores
staff was very friendly and helpful.

my stay here was to see the area famous from the steinbeck book cannery row.  this hotel is adequate, and has convenient under ground parking.  however, during my stay, it was full of young children chaperoned by adults who failed to control them.  they spent the 24hr period i stayed at the hotel running around the floor, causing a lot of noise due to the central atrium design of the hotel.  staff unsuccessfully tried to control the children, however i wouldn't stay here again for sure.
cleanliness of the room and grounds. easy walk to the cannery row and aquarium. short drive to downtown and fisherman’s wharf. only downside was the loud hvac system.
clean great location
we love the free breakfast and clean rooms. staff were amazing and nice.

clean, spacious, professional front desk, friendly 
excellent customer service, close to everything in cannery row, affordable compared to other hotels next to it
will come back for sure

we had two deluxe king rooms, the rooms were clean and spacious, comfy beds and pillows. ac worked perfecly, black out shades were nice. as for noise i thought it was fine, never heard anyone else in their rooms. the morning hours you could hear familes coming and going, but it wasn't a big deal. also, when we sleep, we always have ear plugs. the food was good, it was a great free breakfast. we all enjoyed going down there and getting our coffee and breakfast. the coffee was really good, the pancake machine was cool! i would like to suggest a few more gluten free options. my daughter couldnt have the potatoes because they almost looked breaded but the facilty had no information on them. they did however provide a binder showing what is gf but the potatoes were the only thing not listed. and the cereals they had, none of them were gluten free. this was the only minor inconvenience.

great place! will definitely be back! 
just make sure to ask for a room not facing the street.
great location
would stay again
this hotel located in a convenient place. it is also a high quality hotel.
nice and quiet
we had a very nice stay here. comfortable rooms and conveniently located to so many restaurants and attractions.
great 👍
great location. right near the water and very walkable location. the bike path goes right by.

this was my first time staying at a |MASK| inn. hotel was clean and breakfast was provided. not too many amenities but still a pleasant stay. the only thing i did not like were the flight of stairs to get to our room. we stayed on the 2nd floor and due to the building being built on a slope, there were stairs going down after you got off the elevator and stairs going up to the room that we were staying. i would have paid a bellman to help carry our luggage but they didn’t offer the service so i had to make multiple trips from my car to our room and was drenched in sweat after i was done. overall, it was a good stay and i got a good workout.

this |MASK| inn |MASK| is an absolute gem.  located in the literal heart of cannery row.  we've been staying here off and on since covid, and one of the biggest attractions is the staff, who have been the same during each visit and remember us well.  clean, modern, great parking.  5/5 stars.
great for the aquarium. 5 min drive to warf.

i give such low review because we got the room face to foam st, very noisy at night time, vehicle sounds are terrible, i can’t fall asleep, in the morning 4am, the sound of the garbage truck emptying the garbage woke up our whole family，the room windows are very poorly soundproofed

very clean and close to town. the room has the sink, toilet, and shower all in the bathroom. this made it very hard for 4 of us to get ready in the morning. in the evening i wanted to make a hot cocoa but i couldnt get to the sink because my son was showering. you dont realize how important it is to have the sink and bathroom counter accesible and how much it will slow you down in the morning. would probably not be so bad for just a couple or a family woth small kids, but it was a huge time suck for a family of 4 with mature children that need privacy.
we loved our stay, real close to everything
really bad floor plan and parking design
great spot, staff was really nice. a lot within walking distance. would stay here again.

loved everything about the property: a walking distance to the peer, cleanness, very friendly staff, breakfast, and very comfortable beds. we all enjoyed the stay and would certainly stay in this place again when we are in the area next time.
staff very helpful and friendly. check in and check out were fast. breakfast was good.

updated, remodeled, clean, quite, comfortable, centrally and perfectly located hotel a few minutes away from cannery row and 10 minutes away from old fisherman’s wharf (walking distance).

breakfast is included and includes all that you may need, from yogurt, to fresh fruit, toast, english muffins, bagels, biscuits, oatmeal, pancakes, brew-yourself coffee and more.

we stayed 2 nights, beds comfortable.
parking is included!

highly recommend it.

the staff are not very friendly and didn’t mention anything about breakfast or where to park our car. we were handed our room key. 

i’ve stayed at other |MASK| hotels and the room we got was small. the two beds looked like full and not queen sized beds. the two small little windows overlooked the roof or something. additionally, there’s no microwave and there were no cups in the room for beverages! the beds were great and room was clean but this is not the |MASK| standard i’m used to so i’m disappointed at this property. 

the location was great and close to cannery row which was good. however, my family will not be staying at this location next time!
restaurants and shops walkable! felt very safe
friendly staff, clean, comfortable rooms.
staff was very friendly. like the close proximity to the restaurants and bars on cannery row easy walk.

loved the location and that we could walk and felt safe after dark. free parking and a good breakfast. very clean.
didn't like the stairs on the property. very few rooms can be accessed from getting off the elevator and walking without stairs.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: made an amazing place even better
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: my wife, granddaughter and i had a wonderful three day stay at the |MASK| inn |MASK| on cannery row.  we were able to park our car in the ultra safe underground parking structure and walk everywhere.  the room was clean and very comfortable.  there was a real attention to details.  example: we loved having the choice of firm or soft pillows.  we started the day with an excellent breakfast with choice of omelets, bagels, breads and cinnamon buns.  juices, fruits and of course coffee and teas.  coffee and tea was available throughout the day.   later in the day after returning from the amazing experiences of whale watching and visits to the monterrey aquarium we had cheeses, crackers and wines available.  the staff was friendly and helpful.  and the flowering grounds beautifully calming and pleasing.  a great stay!
our bathroom didn’t have bar of soap, my daughters room shower was broken, stairs to get to the room even with elevator. i have knee problems so walking steps is hard

we used to stay at this hotel all the time and have paid a lot of money in the past because we always had a great experience. this time was not that. upon arriving to our room, there were stains on the floor, mold in the shower and worst of all, the sheets did not look clean. i pulled the sheets back and there was hair in the sheets, black stains on them and they were wrinkled like they had been slept in and shoved down and then just pulled back up again. they weren’t fresh and i knew it. i have never complained at a hotel before. when my husband called down to have them change the sheets he was told that they didn’t have anyone to change them and that they would have to call someone in. we told them to just bring a clean set of linens and we would do it ourselves. instead of agreeing they got defensive and said there was no way the sheets weren’t clean and made my husband feel stupid for even asking. they never brought up sheets and even when they cleaned our room the next day the sheets weren’t changed. we would have left if my kids weren’t with us and we could be sure we could get a room somewhere else and get our money back. we will never return to this location.
very clean hotel just walking distance to cannery row.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: great location
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: the hotel was easy to find and is within a short walking distance to cannery row.  the beds were comfortable, the free breakfast was great, as were the parking facilities and staff.  great stay!!

the receptionist at check-in wasn't very friendly. breakfast could be better with more options.
the rooms were clean and i loved that you can have coffee/tea available 24/7.

fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.title: localização
fa014137b3ea9af6a90c0a86a1d099e46f7e56d6.text: hotel muito bem localizado, quarto confortável e limpo.... chegamos um pouco antes do horário de checkin.... perguntei se era possível fazer o checkin naquele horário ou não.... o funcionário nos disse sim que era possível.... mas, acabei tendo que esperar pouco mais de uma hora porque o quarto ainda não estava limpo e arrumado
schönes und großes zimmer, jedoch recht schmale betten. cannery row zu fuß erreichbar. viele restaurants und shoppingmöglichkeiten in direkter nähe.
the smoke detectors on friday night kept going off in other rooms. terrible night sleep. definitely not the fault of the hotel. the desk clerk said if patron smokes in the room the alarm will sound.

the hotel was nice and clean and great location. but the breakfast was not the greatest and the pancake machine was broken. also this hotel is loud. parents need to not let kids run around and scream in the mornings but the walls are just thin because you hear everything! even people rolling luggage
closed to shipping and restaurants

great location and solid stay overall, but with a few key things to know. the hotel is steps from the walking/biking trail, beach, monterey bay aquarium, cannery row, and tons of restaurants and shops. we felt safe walking around at night—even our 21-year-old son walking alone. free parking is a plus, and the complimentary breakfast was a great way to start the day and save a little money.

juan, the manager, was absolutely wonderful—kind, helpful, and responsive. he really made a difference in our stay.

however, be very cautious if you're driving a vehicle with any added height. the parking garage has a very low clearance (6'6"), and the warning sign blends into the building and is hard to read. although the sign says "no pickups, vans, or campers," our suv with a yakima rack hit overhead pipes, causing damage. we got stuck and had to back out—causing even more damage. when we told the front desk, they were dismissive and unapologetic, which was frustrating. thankfully, juan later handled the situation with professionalism and kindness.

also worth noting: rooms don’t have blackout curtains, so expect to wake up when the sun rises.

if location and walkability are your priorities, this place delivers. just double-check your vehicle height before pulling into the garage!
the room was big enough for all 5 people.  very clean and comfortable bed. breakfast was great! very satisfying.
exceptional stuff and service providing great hospitality. beautful rooms and great breakfas.  would recommend and stay here again.
great location- very walkable - we enjoyed watching the marine life from a nearby outside cafe (schooners) and had a terrific meal at osteria al mare.

unique |MASK| inn |MASK|, we choose this hotel because we only had one night and wanted to be able to walk to everything.  allowed us to see the sights with little time.  room was clean, breakfast ok.
some staff and one of the managers had a very bad attitude over the phone
enjoyed my stay totally

we love the comfortable beds, and the nice breakfast. this is a great location in walking distance to the beach and restaurants. our favorite place to stay with the family.
great location and friendly staff. decent cold breakfast.

hello,
this property is under construction and as we were not informed, i am looking into a discount from the $253. the lobby was closed, there was a crew of workmen outside my window in an inaccessible alley at 8 a.m., and we had to walk through a construction area - with a ladder and drywall etc... - to get to our room (which was unheated). i don't think this is acceptable to charge premium prices and not inform guests in advance. thanks in advance for your help in resolving this expedia.

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: i stayed there with some friends during labor day weekend, and i was so impressed with the friendliness of the staff.  from being checked in to the lady who cooks the free breakfast, everyone was so pleasant and really seemed to want to help and seemed to enjoy their job.  the hotel is comfortable and clean.  the staff also had fresh cookies ready.  my friends and i really enjoyed our stay there.

my husband called to make a reservation the day before and was told they would have a room for us facing away from the expressway because this is where most of the noise occurs. 
   when we arrived at noon the next day, we were told they did not have a room for us and they did not know when they would have one available, as this was the weekend the hotels were booked because there were two football games this weekend.  after much frustration, i stood my ground, saying we drove all the way from ft. lauderdale and did not know where to go.  we were finally given a room, but it was on the same side as the expressway.
     also, if you miss access to the only entrance, you have to make a u-turn, go under the expressway, and turn around again.  very inconvenient, especially with all the traffic that weekend.

the window had a significant leak during a heavy rain storm, water pooled inside room. bathroom had several areas of visible rust, decay and mold. the room is in need of repairs. all that and it was the most expensive stay we had on our journey.

the entrance to the hotel is too easy to miss as it's shared with a texaco. the hard flooring material is not holding up well and moves as you walk on it. i was happy to find that the rooms are quiet, being so close to the interstate. the beds are comfortable and there was good hot water in the shower.
needs updating
great place
you have to push the door handle up instead of down to get in- very unusual. my bathroom has mold around the tub. entire bathroom could be a little bigger (it’s a little tight)
wifi connection was very bad.

there was very little to like. i don't know what was happening outside, but every night sounded like they were drag-racing. housekeeping never visited (we were there 5 nights), and we kept having to ask for towels and toilet paper. lightbulbs were burned out (2 of 3 in bathroom), and hinge on toilet seat was broken. very disappointed.
property was dirty

i requested to speak to the hotel manager as my room had no phone and my initial conversation with the desk clerk was not well as she was rude and abrasive. i was in house for 3 days and never heard from the manager. will not stay at another |MASK| property based on this experience.
property very clean, only problem , the cleaning lady knock on my door and opened at 8:45 when the check out time was at 12:00. very very disappointed and angry!!
i love staying at the |MASK| inn.
staff was not available when for an hour to let me in my room where i left my key.  she was outside smoking a cigarette
pull out bed had no linens, no blanket. i had to attend front desk to get them.

even though it’s a location......management is not doing work well. rooms have been cleaning after noon, something after 2pm and they are not cleaning the rooms well sometimes after they clean you still have to go downstairs and ask for clean towels because they forgot to leave clean one in room. property manager doesn’t have the minimum required qualification for being into customer servive business. most of the time she’s unease, hard to be located. for a 20min spending at the lobby of this hotel i noticed she only cares about the group or campaniles rentals.
due to the quarantine breakfast was not available but a to go bag was. the bowls for the cereal had dirt in them. the bags were not sealable so it defeated the purpose of clean.
ok
