7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: stayed two days for my husbands birthday.  hotel was a good location for getting on and off the highway.  nice indoor pool.  staff was very friendly.  great breakfast buffet.  loved the cookies too :)
pour une halte d’un soir c’est parfait! localisation, tranquillité et petit déjeuner 😀
it was good only problem we had was with one keycard not working not that big of a deal great place

employees were friendly, we were there for 8 hours, sleep woke up and left. there was a roach crawling in the bathroom that we had to kill, the room had a nasty smell to it like there had been smoking in there before and the curtains that are suppose to block the light was broken, so while trying to sleep the street light was shining right into the window.

the staff was incredibly friendly and helpful. the room was lacking a bit. there was leftover food in the mini fridge, 2/3 bathroom lights out, one towel and there was water damage all around the window above the air conditioner.

this was horrible. i don’t recommend this.  the manager was horrible. we had numerous issues with the room from the day we checked in. the phone didn’t work,i had to make numerous trips from the 5th floor to get towels, cups garbage bag etc..the  dresser had big gaping hole in  it. the  tub clogged up during shower, the light kept going out in the bathroom, the ac didn’t work, the cleaning staff partly clean room, didn’t replace towels, cups, garbage bags etc hence the multiple trips to the front desk. the partly cleaned the room like made the bed but didnt sweep the floor. should i continue? the staff was not helpful. i spent 400 for 3 days and it was horrible.
bathroom lacking counter. toilet top for toiletries?
room was dirty, floor was not mopped. fences outside in disrepair, ceiling of pool falling in, toilet handle broken room406, tub dirty and old, entire hotel smelled moldy.
i came in from the airport at 2am. the lady at the front desk treated me like her best friend. i was sooo impressed with her customer service.

rooms were nice and clean. bathroom needed a shelf or counter space. 
staff was rude when i had asked if my room was by any chance available prior to the typical check-in time. 
breakfast was mediocre. pool and fitness room were tiny.

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.title: just an overnight
7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: finding the entrance is a big challenge-it's shared with the gas station next door and no signs to indicate where to enter!!. lobby had renovations done but money would have been better spent putting new windows in the entire hotel.our window was not in its frame properly so we heard a lot of road noise from the time we got there till the time we left. being on a main road in ocala doesn't help. not the most restful night's sleep. windows needed a thorough cleaning inside and out. staff friendly and helpful. breakfast offered enough variety to select from. handy where they place the coffee carafes if you just want coffee. we may decide to stay elsewhere if we are in the area again.

water pressure was the primary problem.  had to use waste basket in room to add water to assist with flushing of toilet. lavatory water pressure also low.  not advised there would be no room service wrt to cleaning of room over weekend.  if no such service, should have been so advised by front desk at check-in.

shower was horrible.tv only had one channel as the remote didn’t work 
i told the front desk about tv problem on my way out to dinner, and when returning 3 hours later, still didn’t work
very small hotel , everyone was friendly. bathrooms needed some updating and scrubbing. pool was small, not a lot of parking. hotel was close to shopping and restaurants.
access to the property is awkward. need to be very careful leaving the hotel parking.
gentleman who checked us in was very discourteous.
service was great    check and check out was quick and easy.  property needs to be refreshed as the carpets where really bad in the hall ways and common areas

the hotel was conveniently right off the highway and easy to get to. staff was pleasant and hotel looked clean. the room was clean, but noticed privacy door lock was broken. i also noticed damaged areas in the bathroom. nothing major, just cosmetic things that caught my eye. nothing that would prevent me from staying again. they also had a real breakfast bar with eggs and sausage, and beverages.

the shower head was broken

the microwave didn’t work

an their was a strange odor coming from the ac unit 

the key cards kept deactivating and you had to keep going to the service desk to reactivate them

only three pillows in king size bed had to request more, had to request bath towels as there were none in the room. no floor mat. lobby coffee and tea water were both cold and only creamer was irish cream and no regular creamer to be found both in lobby and dining area. noise from the highway and from door to the stairs were irritating. brittany in the lobby was the only shining part of the stay.

the first room we had the ac didn’t work so they switched our rooms. then that room the ac worked but it didn’t work very good. then the toilet kept running and wouldn’t flush so my husband checked it & the chain in the back of the toilet was off so he hooked it back up then it came off again. the first room had a terrible smell but then the second room did too, just not as bad. then i was charged twice for the room (on 2 different cards) which i’m still waiting to be credited back!! we stay in hotels a lot at the least 1x per month as we travel for my husband’s band & we also own a business that we sometimes have to travel for jobs. just very disappointing this time.
tub base felt uneven and insecure. soap shelves limited space for showering.
very old run down property,  hard to get in and out of.  could only get a suite,  very much wasted space, refrigerator inefficient
rooms are very spacious and clean.
was nice for what i needed to do. have a place to sleep and less than hilton. harder to get back from hilton .was comfortable sleeping.

i found this place very clean. our children had a great time in the pool. we had forgotten a child’s favorite toy there, and they had it saved for us when we returned five days later, even though we weren’t able to get a hold of them because we were on a boat. they were very thoughtful couldn’t ask for anything more.
pets are allow
indoor pool to use in cool weather

i didn't even stay here. i checked into my room and checked right back out. it was dirty and musty smelling. stray hairs on the bed and bathroom floor. three one bright spot is the lady at the front desk. i don't remember her name. she was so sweet. the door to the stairwell that goes outside was open and would not shut. not safe at all. and the only way to get into the hotel parking lot from west bound 200 is  to turn at i75. and then you have to drive through the bp gas station to leave the hotel. i went down the road to the hilton. it was more expensive but i felt safer there.
nicht zu empfehlen, sollte dringend renoviert werden, total abgwohnt. sehr laut, da hotel direkt an der interstate liegt, kaum an schlaf zu denken.
man at front desk was super breakfast ess excellrmt
good location.  only complaint was hard to find the driveway entrance.  close to lots of restaurants.

hotel is very clean!  parking stinks!  we had to park in the gas station next door at 1am.  not very comfortable with that. the plus side michelle was fantastic trying to help us.  wish i could say the same for the morning girl.  wow no personality!  they billed my card and i was complaining that was not okay... all she could say was 'well it will be 7 to 10 day'.  really!   the manager did call and the charges were dropped. they keep your card in case someone smokes in the room.  does that really happen that often?  breakfast was ok.
i had to change my own sheets only good thing was inside pool
the room was spacious; the wifi was fast and the work space and chair were perfect.
value was excellent. door latch did not work - had to use deadbolt secure door

late check-in. warm in the room. the air-conditioner did not work. very noisy due to outside traffic. tv remote would not allow the channel to be changed. too late to request a room change. will not go there again.
nothing unique, did not like the smell of chlorine as soon as you walk in, it wasn’t the best bed ever and pillows were no to my liking. breakfast was ok
ok hotel, but in a poor location. minimal parking. no sidewalks for walking to nearby restaurants. poor driveway entrance and exit.

we found it almost impossible to enter the parking lot,  we could see the hotel, but it took 40 minutes of groping to actually get there.  once we did we were impressed.  the room was large and well appointed; the breakfast was unusually good, the cookies were a great treat.  i wish there had been a fitness center, and that the wireless had worked.  we gave up on that after a while.
my room had bed bugs i got bitten all up.
clean clean clean i can't stress enough how clean it was.
hotel was nice but for the price the towels could have been bigger and softer. the king mattress is also sagging to the middle.

the property was nice and clean. the ice machine wasn't working on my floor and housekeeping didn't clean the room while we were there. the vending machines didn't take credit cards only cash. there is a gas station right next door so i went there for drinks. breakfast was pretty good and they had someone serving it to you due to covid-19. overall it was a good stay and i would recommend it.
location is great. near restaurants. room was a little dated but sufficient. jetted tub was the greatest part of my stay

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.title: convenient and affordable hotel near ocala
7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: decent hotel with great staff. entry and exit from hotel by car a little awkward due to corner location. the rooms on rear of hotel allowed for a quiet stay from i75 traffic noise. only an indoor pool, but hours allow for swimming to midnight. be advised, the hotel is starting to renovate their rooms... we only heard an occasional amount of noise associated with that but it could become an issue in the future.
it was an ok place. the staff was great and the room was newly renovated.

staff friendly and helpful! facilities had poorly kept common areas… only cart had badly damaged wheel and was not steerable… tv would only turn on and off… no changing channels… internet speed was 1 mbps and completely unusable. lock on door quit working so someone had to stay inside at all times. the front desk girl offered to change rooms, but we had already unpacked and it was getting late.
el cuarto tenía mucho olor a humo de cigarro y yo no pude dormir del olor a humo y el aire acondicionado no servía
easy check in. friendly personnel. room was large and clean. the breakfast was sufficient. check out easy
easy walk to restaurants
not much parking
like nothing.  dislike everything.

our recent stay at the |MASK| inn in ocala, fl was not worth the price that i paid.  i reserved a 1 king bed with sofa bed and we checked into the hotel on june 24th.  the air conditioner in room #404 did not work properly, so we were moved to another room of the same type.  when we walked in to room #304, we were met with a very strong unpleasant odor that smelled like stale cigarette smoke.  fortunately i had some air freshener.  the air conditioner worked though!  the rooms are not soundproofed and our room (#304) faced i-75, so i didn't sleep well at all.  so once again, we moved to room #209 (which was not the same room type) but it did not face the highway.  i rested well that night.  the next morning i noticed a stain on the bed sheet.  a budget hotel does not have to sacrifice quality.  i know this because we stayed at a comfort inn immediately prior to our stay at the |MASK| inn.  if you are a light sleeper, be sure to request a room that does not face i-75 and take earplugs as a back up.  i wish that i could have written a better review, but in this case it's impossible.

i loved having the option to choose a room that had a separate bedroom so my daughter and i could have private space. it did cost a little more, but was very reasonable. despite the renovations taking place, the hotel was quite clean as compared to other places i have stayed for the same money. the choices for breakfast was great except for having no milk for the cereal.
the room was dirty, there was stuff all over the floors, the sheets looked like they were already slept on, i didn’t want lay my son on the bed. not happy at all with the money spent.
the property was cleaned, the room was well maintained except that inside the bathroom tub had black stained.
very clean and the breakfast was nicely done. we enjoyed our stay.
room floor was dirty and water drizzled out of shower head.
great location for everything, poor wifi no phone service at all
property has seen better days
i was traveling and stopped here fir the night.  there were no towels in the room.  the tv didn't work without a code.  i am glad i was only there long enough to rest.

older hotel that is not updated. room was dirty with candy wrappers in couch. tv did not work. no blanket for sofa bed. shower did not work well. towels were older and rough. arrived later after a 10 hour drive. no parking available. had to park at gas station next door and hope i would not get towed. front desk person said there is not enough parking for hotel and staff. pitiful. would not stay here ever again especially for over $200 a night!!

had trouble getting the remote to connect to the tv. tried to call front office to tell them and the phone didn’t work. there was mold in the shower that was very visible. the security latch on the door was missing so i didn’t really feel comfortable knowing anyone with a key could just walk in at anytime.
no toilet paper in bathroom tv and phone didn’t work when we arrived

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.title: hgtv fixer upper
7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: the lobby was a mess, the room had equipment that was noisey and was not working well. the beakfast was ok but not a very small for a lunch room.

hotel itself was nice and clean but very loud (located right on an interstate exit so lots of traffic noise) and there was no internet in our room.  we tried to connect but the signal wasn't strong enough on any of our device

i will never stay at this resort again. firstly they wouldn't give me the teacher discount or upgraded room because i booked through expedia even though i paid the hotel directly. the pool was closed for 3 out of 4 days we were there, plus the pool is indoor and no sunshine. the laundry room was a joke. filthy. filthy. filthy. so  discusting i didn't do my laundry because i didn't want my clothes in the washer or dryer. the staff were always on their phones and the room phone didn't work, which i told them the first day we were there and it never was replaced. i'm very disappointed.
the hotel was very nice. super clean. the bed was amazing. we only stayed one night as we travelled through the area, but it was great.
very comfortable room.a/c was slow to start but after 4 hours did cool the room to my like.

i was a senior lady traveling alone. i stayed one night in what was supposed to be an accessible suite. the room itself was very nice but the bathroom was a big disappointment. it was large enough but very poorly designed and not particularly safe for anyone. the door opened inward and covered access to the tub. when the door was open it not only covered the tub it came right up to the commode. it also barely missed the edge of the sink when closing. in order to close the door after entering you had to edge around the commode. therefore, if you were using a walker or chair you were out of luck to take a shower in the tub.also the entire bathroom had only one grab bar and that was on the far side of the tub very low and unsafe for anyone.any seniors or handicapped folks should probably look for other accommodations.
indoor pool

not enough parking. we had to park our uhual wth a car being pulled at in of building in a gas station parking lot and some one parked right behind us and it was very difficult to get out. hotel staff didn’t take its plate number like they are suppose to do we couldn’t get them to move it. bathtub was stained. toilet barely flushed. free breakfast should start earlier than 7:00 am. beds were very uncomfortable. price to stay was to high for the quality.
quiet and peaceful, very enjoyable.  would recommend to anyone.
just off i-75.  unfortunately, hard to get o because you have to go through a bp station to get to the hotel.
seems like the staff are really short handed. felt sorry for them having to run around like crazy doing more than one job.
the bed was really comfy.  the room was fine.  breakfast was reasonable, but not great.

staff was very rude. doesn’t follow their own covid safety protocol but jump down your throat if you don’t wear a mask. horrible experience. room was musky and not clean. many crumbs on the floor and there was clothes tags under our sheets. don’t think they cleaned or changed bedding. do not stay here! choose somewhere else.

staff was almost unavailable. no toilet paper in the room. no extra bedding for the fold out hardly any towels in the room. vending machines were empty. clean but missing a lot of the typical extras. staff was nice but hard to find.

the staff was super friendly and helpful, the facilities seemed a little outdated though. our toilet would take 2-3 times before it fully flushed anything down, but we were able to switch rooms with no problem so that was not a continuous issue. the location is great too as it is right off the highway and down the street from shopping/dining areas.
not supplying enough toilet paper in the bathrooms.

very noisy property....cheap construction materials were obviously used...absolutely the most sound penetration through the walls, hallway, doors and outside traffic though poorly sealed  cheap windows ever encountered...do not stay here....you will not sleep...terrible property
toilet not working properly.  wireless very slow. used wireless from hotel next door.  elevator sooo slow. room was not as pictured not a suite as reserved
i really liked the new flooring (without carpet) no smells. clean and fresh. enjoyed the hot breakfast and watching a big screen tv in my room.

my overall stay was pleasing. i spent most of my days on the road.
was disappointed the room was not cleaned on the first day
the staff were very friendly, helpful and provided great customer service. i would recommend to others and stay there again.
pleasant employees

the only thing is that the parking lot  gets filled up quickly so it's hard to find a parking space.
easy check in and out. had a very good breakfast.was real clean and the staff was very helpful
simple, comfortable and clean.  no frills.  staff was friendly. entrance to hotel hard to see due to road work.  breakfast was okay, but limited. price of stay was perfect.

we were able to upgrade to the newly done family suite during check-in. the room was beautiful and huge! with an added roll away bed we all slept really well and had a nice breakfast in the morning. the kids loved the indoor pool and said the water was nice and warm. all the staff were so friendly and helpful.  i would definitely recommend this hotel to others and if we need to come back to ocala we will be staying here again.
as always the staff made everything very simple. a wonderful staff.

we had no tv service-i had to unplug the phone because of a constant beeping.  the flag outside looked as though it had been in a war.  the downstairs bathroom was disgusting.  will not stay there again very disappointed!!!
traffic noise because of construction. breakfast was very good
other than the attendant in the breakfast area, the staff was terrible  they definitely were not up to the level that i expect from a |MASK| inn and |MASK|.

tried to check in late night and they said their system was down. we had to find another hotel at 1:30am. i contacted expedia the next day for a refund and the hotel reported that we stayed there. when i called the hotel to sort it out, the manager hung up on me twice then stopped answering phone.  finally getting her to speak with me she said to have expedia call back to confirm. then expedia reported that the hotel "isn't responding" im still waiting for my refund. what a fraud. done bother complaining to management for anything there. the snowflake can't handle it and will hang up on you. worst customer service i've ever experienced. will never use this chain again.
loved it my second time here will be back soon first time was anniversary this time was wife’s birthday 🎂
muy buena ubicacion,exelente servicio,personal y limpieza
it's located right next to the fwy so it's easy to find. that said it wasn't too noisy and i slept good. as a single lady i felt safe there. easy and close parking. located next to gas station.
such a nice place to stay. me and my family enjoyed our weekend stay! nice, comfortable,  clean, etc

breakfast bar was good.
did not like driveway into property.  sign is too small.  if you miss driveway you will need to make u-turn, go back under i75, make another u-turn and hope you see the driveway.  there should be an entrance from the back where two other hotels are located, not off busy sr200/college rd.
waiting on the phone forever on hold for someone to make a reservation finally went online and got it. surly gentleman at the front desk.
i thought it was a blood property for the price.
the smell in the room was musky. i had to go out and i buy febreeze to spray in my room. i slept with the bathroom fan on so it would help ventilate the room.

this hotel is conveniently located right off the i-75 exit, which makes it perfect for an overnight stay when traveling north or south.  lots of dining options nearby.  friendly staff, comfortable room.  you might think that it would be noisy because of its location by the interstate, but i did not find that to be the case at all.  good place to stay.
hotel was loud, unable to sleep due to noise. floor was wooden surface with no rug
very difficult to access, parking is tight, room was cramped and lacked amenities,

the front person was very rude and said my reservations were canceled. didn’t apologize or make us feel comfortable. when asked why, he rolled his eyes and mentioned card was declined. 
we mentioned we had other cards and why were they charging the card when we said we would pay at registration thru expedia.
he upgraded us to room we could have booked online for way less and mentioned it was an upgrade

we are in our mid-40s, and this is not our first time in ocala, and not our first time at this establishment. this hotel has gone down hill so bad in the past couple years it is sad.

very outdated. bed was horrific, i would rather sleep on the gravel outside. they did not leave any soap or anything, only a bath towel. 

the elevator had a cigar shredded open all over the floor and the whole building smelled like marijuana. the person at the front desk had an attitude problem as well.
5 stars because everything was good

we picked this hotel because of the ability to take our cat with us as we were having work done on our house.  we stayed 2 nights and next time we will choose another establishment.  the floors were tile in our room which was great because we didn't want to have any chance of "accidents".  the noise level was the loudest i have ever experienced at any hotel.  the first night we heard loud talking in the hall and one of the guests had their metal security slider thing on the door pushed in so they can easily go in and out their door without it completely shutting.  until around 2am every time the guest would go in and out their room (which seemed to be every couple of minutes for some reason) there would be a loud banging sound.  the next night the noise didn't start up until 11pm and by 12am i had enough.  i opened the door and spoke to 2 individuals in the hallway and after that it was quiet.  the room was dusty and gross.  the shower curtain rod was broken and bent downward.  it was held up on one side with a plastic zip tie.  the shower curtain would slide to the center of the rod no matter how many times i pulled it.  i almost slipped doing so but i caught my balance.  i would never stay at this establishment ever again.  with or without my cat.  personally i would not recommend this hotel to anyone.  i've never seen my cat more excited to get in his carrier and go home!
outdated! staff is not friendly! not too many parking lot space.

staff was very friendly and outgoing.  seemed to genuinely enjoy working there.  very helpful to correct oversights in housekeeping.(not enough towels)   due to location near highway intersection (on and off ramps) there was a lot of traffic noise.  also the wifi while technically existing as a free connection, was so weak as to be unusable. we were not advised when we booked that we'd be charged a deposit since we prepaid the room but that's not on the hotel.

when we first got to the room the fridge was leaking. i'm assuming the seal was bad. there was only the roll of half used toilet paper in the bathroom. when we got a "new" roll from the front desk it was stained with brown stuff. there was only 1 ice maker and it was on the 1st floor. it wasnt working in the morning. the breakfast was good though. my kids really enjoyed the indoor pool.
very nice place to stop
the hotel smelled like marijuana everywhere we went. the rooms were so basic, there was no clock in the room. definitely will not stay there again.
i didn’t like that the bathroom door had a crack and they put a nail in it and it was pointed out and it scratched me really bad.
nice stay

disappointed that there was no whirlpool in pool area. i thought all |MASK| inns had them. very quiet room for a very noisy intersection. also some construction going on in the hotel. overall experience was still quite restful and pleasant. really nice front desk staff!
there was no parking upon arrival and i had to make parking arrangements off site.

the property was updated.  the pool was clean.  i left an important item in the room and the staff found it, held it, and i picked it up 3 days later.  

overalll it was a wonderful hotel!
it was very nasty and smell really bad.
my checkout amount was higher than the price i originally ordered and paid.  (i'm not sure which amount will appear on my credit card bill.)

this was an extended stay for us, but would not recommend this property to others. they cancelled my reservation before we even got there because my card didn't preauthorize their charge (bank flagged as fraud). front desk staff was very rude about it. the rooms are very run down and the air systems are disgusting (had to ask for our filter to be cleaned). several nights someone was smoking on our floor and staff didn't do much to stop it. the one gal that cleaned our room was very nice though. breakfast was okay. hotel wifi was very inconsistent. appliances in the room were older and very small. overall a run down property that needs to be remodeled. also stayed close to christmas and no decorations were hung anywhere!! very sad.

worst hotel and staff
had to fight to get refund
felt unsafe
google search revealed a list of violations
avoid at all costs
