close to highway and close to many restaurants and bars

when you walk in the lobby looks very clean and nice, but i noticed the elevator was dirty and no one would clean it, the hallway carpets looked filthy. the rooms were nice but i expected more, i’ve been to some very beautiful |MASK| inns and this one just felt like they bought an old run down hotel, renovated the lobby, left everything else as is and slapped on the |MASK| inn name
courtesy by front desk staff (plural) and manager.
i like that it's right off the highway. the room feels very plain and empty. plus the walls are thin. i could hear the washer and dryer from the laundry room.
easy access to the interstate, and it’s only an hour from orlando.
very nice redecorated hotel.  not quite done with renovation and tv didn’t work.  but once all is completed it will be very nice.  beds comfortable and was very clean.

the worst maintained hotel we have stayed in, in years.  can’t believe this place is associated with |MASK|. they should be ashamed to have their name on this hotel.  dirty, worn out hotel.  internet worked only half the time and when i tried to call the front desk even the phone did not work.  so sorry we stayed here.  never, never again at a |MASK|.

the hotel is convenient to the interstate and was generally clean and well kept.  before you book, be aware that the hotel has only one elevator and is large, with 5 stories, which makes elevator use challenging. secondly, the walls are paper thin, you will think your neighboring guest is in the room with you!  finally, the breakfast area is very small, though the breakfast itself was quite good.

first off to enter and the place is a joke. you have to use the gas station entry and exit. you have to go and do a u-turn to get back to the interstate.  secondly the doors have steel frames and every time someone enters or leaves their room it sounds like a bomb going off. a little felt tape to dampen the slam would be a cheap fix. for $180+ a night i expect much better.
i didn't like the fact , that the staff didn't clean the room my entire stay. 3-6 may 2021. i even spoke to one employee and asked them to clean the room and they still didn't.
the property abuts i-75 and is very noisy outside. the parking is limited and the driveway is not marked well.
had a problem. called front desk nobody ever showed up.will recommend another property to others

while it took a long time for someone to greet us at the desk to check in, the staff was friendly, the pool was great, there was still a breakfast (despite covid), and the location was easy to access from the interstate. i'd stay again.
everyone here was friendly and helpful rooms were clean and housekeeping came daily
everything was ok. first time we had gotten a dirty room but she was so nice and kept apologizing for it. she fixed in in a minute and we went in our way. great place for stopping over night.
it wasn’t clean enough
michelle the overnight desk clerk was the best! she went above and beyond for us!
we liked the welcoming atmosphere…. clean and comfortable room.

the check in was great... they are a pet friendly hotel but there is no area at all to walk your pet. not even anywhere close. the morning of check out we were interrogated about if i had paid the pet fee. to the point of harassment by morning staff.

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.title: bad staff rude
7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text:
staff was rude as well as the general manager at check in.  

will not stay at another |MASK| inn again even though have generally had a good experenice at most.

right off the interstate, not a very good location and hard to get to. when we arrived an hour early was told check in wasn't until 4 and she wouldn't give our keys, which is fine. we went back, the room was super hot and we were traveling with two little kids. the ac did not work in the room the vents were filthy. asked to be moved to a room that had ac and was told they didn't have any rooms.we booked for 3 nights months in advance. front desk said she would look for a fan but came up empty handed. outside temp was in the 90s and our room registered 84. she said nothing they could do. we ended up not staying and found a hotel an hour away. extremely disappointed as we've stayed in |MASK| inn and |MASK| before and had a fantastic time.
the handheld shower head was awful.... very little water flow unless you turn it all the way up and it was not angled well.
the ratings were not accurate. the mattress was terrible. you could feel the springs. lumpy comforter. towels were stained. upholstered chair was stained. old stained tile around shower.

this hotel was dirty!  there were quite a few guests that left their shoes outside their doors.  there was dirty in piles outside the doors.  the room we were first given had been smoked in.  even after it was sprayed, it reeked of smoke.  the ac systems don't have functional buttons.  you can change the temperature but it makes no difference.  you can change the fan speed and it makes no difference.  the evacuation plan was for a different room.  it did not reflect the proper evacuation.

will never book there again! guy at front desk was very rude, said i didn’t have a reservation and wouldn’t accept my confirmation number, refused to help me in any way other than saying to call the company about the situation.
great hotel. clean, comfortable beds, spacious rooms and a good hot breakfast.

everything was real nice and clean.
the traffic was loud on the front side.

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.title: 5 night stay for horse competition
7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: nice place, they are undergoing an update but everything was clean.

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.title: nice great stay
7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: great place to stay friendly staff clean would definitely stay here again.

great location, very clean, nice staff, very bad bed for a king size it collapsed to the middle, breakfast could have been better no biscuits & gravy plus breakfast staff watch everyone like a hawk very disturbing.
i liked the courteous staff and also liked the room accommodations.

locatiion is great!
place need remodeling, looks dirty.
there was no one on the check in area. took a while. not friendly.
will never stay there again
the room was clean. breakfast was included. it was quiet in a nice area.
light bulbs were flickering or out; shower controls was missing a part and had tape around it.  furniture was pretty beat up.

easy off the interstate. good location.  the tv didn't work (no signal). called desk. said they'd come up. after 20 minutes i called again.  busy.  told them to not bother, the show i wanted to watch was almost over. i checked all connections and those were not the problem. water pressure in sink is way too low, despite saving water as a need.  abbreviated breakfast is considered due to covid.
good place to stay and rest, caring staff members and good breakfast!
the room was clean , easy checking and indoor pool was  heated very nice , also parking easy , breakfast nice.

very dissatisfied with the cleanliness of this hotel. didn’t even sleep under the sheets, bathroom was dirty. walls were extremely thin and we were woken up all night with doors slamming shut. absolutely will not stay here again 😣
it did not feel pristine

very difficult to get in and out of parking. smal, small indoor pool with smokers outside in tiny area. located on a very busy street and right next to highway; so noisy. no clock in the room. hardly any outlets in the room. archaic bathroom with no storage or countertop. bags of garbage from guests in hallway.
everything was ok
reservation confirmed and paid to expedia. upon check in i was informed that no rooms were available.

front desk person was nice and the lobby looks really chic and cozy but the hallways and the room had a weird smell like cigarettes and humidity mixed in. once inside the room, which was a non-smoking room, it smelled the same way and i guess at some point they tried covering it up and had a super strong cleaning product smell, one of the locks on the door wasn’t broken, bathroom needs major upgrades, mini fridge didn’t work and walls are so thin you can literally listen to peoples conversation, at some point i actually thought they were trying to open my door but then realized they were just hanging outside on the hallway i guess... water bottles in the vending machines are $3 (if you want cold water) or front desk offers room temperature ones but ice machines don’t work... only one elevator, and as soon as you walk out there’s a trash can that hasn’t been emptied in days i assume because they were bags with trash and food even outside of it. ac worked ok and bed was clean and comfortable and we were exhausted from a long drive so we just fell asleep quick. i cant  comment on the free breakfast because i was dying to get out of the place. i guess you get what you pay for, it wasn’t horrible but for a few dollars more you can stay in a nicer  place. but for the record, i‘ve stayed in at other  |MASK| inns before and they’re usually pretty good.
everything was great, the staff was friendly and helpful.
the eating area was very clean and the food items were very magnificent. the only issue i have was the road construction.
very nice hotel and convenient to i 75 so it was great for us traveling to tampa bay

i got to the hotel at 2pm where i was abruptly told check in isn't until 3.  i don't even think she lifted her head to look at me.  once i checked in later, the room was horrible.  there were clumps of dust all around the room. there was a used pillow behind a chair, one of our "clean" pillows had black stuff all over the case, vent above the tub was disgusting and was blackish due to the amount of dirt and dust, large hole in the ceiling that was just painted over (6-8"), the jetted tub still had a spot of thick soap residue on the edge and i wiped the tub out with lysol wipes and they definitely didn't even try to wipe it down.  the countertop was dirty and still had a sticker stuck to it from the previous people.  our comforter was ridiculous. i can't believe they kept it on the bed.  it looked as though it was stuffed with filler in various spots. lumpy would be an understatement.  i had to call down front to request a couple new pillows since ours were dirty, the young lady said i'd have to get them because she's by herself and no one can bring them to me.   let me note, this was not a $100 room, but a $225 per night room.  i've had a lot better from a $75 room.  i highly do not recommend and i'm sure i won't get a penny back for this horrible experience.

liked that it was clean and didn’t smell. breakfast service was perfect and they were friendly.

however , room 500 had bed bugs and i’m a guy that doesn’t wake up easily.  both nights they forgot my wake up call for the morning . parking is limited so get ready to park your rental at the gas station next to the elements .

my reservation from expedia was not accepted so i had to pay a daily room rate, which varied each day. please credit my credit card for the amount of $107.19 which was on my credit card twice.

thank you.
the experience was nice but nothing spectacular

the desk staff were pretty brusque and reprimanded us for not putting towels outside room to get fresh ones. we had for 2 days and did not get replacements. they were out smoking quite often. the breakfast lady was extremely nice and helpful.
the front desk did not care about any issues. if you like cereal then yes, they serve breakfast.

my stay was for 4 days and the room was never cleaned.  i went to the front desk on the 3rd night and the attendant said cleaning was "on request" (i was never told this) and she would put me on the list for tomorrow.  when i returned on the 4th night the room was not cleaned again.  when i inquired at the front desk i was told the list must have not transferred. i tried to speak to someone upon checkout but nobody ever came to the front desk.
in room jacuzzi just made my night
great place to stay
the property is easily accessed from i-75.  parking is a slight challenge, but everything else was fine, new, clean and pleasant.

the bathroom smelled like a cognac had been spilled in there and there was hair and dirt all over the floor. when i shared this with person at the desk, she simply made a note of it. nothing was done. i was left in that room with my three year old. the phone didn’t work in the room. when i woke up the refrigerator leaked water all over the floor.

property was located in great area near restaurants, shopping malls and highway. only 1 1/2 hours from orlando. downtown area nice to walk and many places and fun activities (bowling, theater, zip line, kayak, museums, tours, etc).

the internet did not work most of the time.  we complained to the staff and nothing was fixed.  the toilet in our bathroom had to be fixed by my husband many times because it was running.  i told the staff and was informed they would have someone fix it but it was never fixed.  very noisy also since it is by the interstate.  the rooms were veryyyy out dated and old.  would not recommend anyone to stay here.
the hotel is in a weird spot. i feel like the gas station that is next to it through off my vibe, also, getting in and out of the hotel was not convenient.

very friendly staff, very clean place, the carpet on third floor needs replaced as worn in spots.  breakfast was good and menu changed everyday so it wasn't the same old thing every morning.  the entrance and exit is on a one way street next  to i-75 shared with a gas station, so prepare to do some u-turns.
nice hotel, finely kept for being on a non touristic area. staff was great and very accommodating. area was great and convenient.
nice layout, quite.  very limited parking for large vehicle and no way to drive around.

the hotel was clean, but falling apart. no maid service, ice machine broken, and wi-go was unusable. the free hot breakfast was horrible.
no towels at the pool and when i went to the front desk to ask for some, the large 50  year old woman with stringy, blonde, curly hair (staff doesn’t wear name tags) walked away from the desk without acknowledging me after i’d been waiting 10 minutes for her to check someone in. she filed, she looked for a pen, she talked to her buddy (tall man with longish gray hair) and eventually sauntered over to “help me”. “yes i need some pool towels, please” 
“yeah, i’ll get them in a minute.”
“ummm, when? we’re getting out of the pool now”
“in just a minute!”
the epic conclusion commensed when we watched the front desk and housekeeping staff get into a near brawl in the parking lot with a furious female customer in town for a funeral. the tall gray haired front desk agent was screaming in the customer’s face while the large blonde stringy haired woman continued to taunt the customer escalating the situation. 
y’all need to get your act together or find another job.

the property is overall good, needs updates. breakfast was disappointing,  service was slow to replenish, no silverware available. asked for spoons, 1 was brought out, no knives for butter,  waffle machine wasnt working, 3 of 4 toaster spots didnt work - had to hold down to get the toaster to work. told eggs were coming "soon" took over 1/2 hour to replenish.  not a good start to the day
well maintained

stayed there for 3 nights and never did receive clean towels only by going and getting them ourselves. there also was no trash pick up for these days. we were on the fifth floor facing the interstate which was very loud. they also will charge you an extra $100 for insurance coverage i was told by the clerk.

the property is conveniently located near i-75 and offers many options for dining and shopping at this exit. the hotel was clean and our suite was spacious and inviting. the view from the 3rd floor was amazing and the amenities were plentiful, i.e. heated indoor pool and delicious continental breakfast (even during covid).
good

this property was decent for the price. you have to drive through a gas station parking lot to get in out of the hotel. there was something nasty smeared on the bathroom door the rest of the bathroom was clean but the toilet was an antique and the old small round bowl type. the worst bed i’ve slept on in a long time it was like a bowl, very sunk down in the middle. the 4 pillows were very small like couch throw pillows not real bed pillows. the staff was pleasant and the common areas were well kept. this stay was because of a family medical emergency so i didn’t complain but i don’t think i would stay here again.
nice good customer service

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.title: excellent motel
7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: friendly welcome, rooms were great. what else to say

we were assigned a handicapped room by chance. the only issue was the lack of shelf space in the bathroom. there was no place to set toiletries or my hot rollers, just a minor inconvenience. hot breakfast was ample and well managed considering safety during the virus.
rooms need to be updated
the hotel was good. the only thing i didn’t like was the bed sheets didn’t look clean.
rooms were not clean and ready upon check in.  staff poorly trained.
the staff was excellent and the actual room was very clean. however, the floor of the shower wasn’t so clean. the bed wasn’t hard, but it wasn’t soft either
very comfortable.
the bathroom sink leaked all over the floor and the table in my room was broken. it was close to the interstate and was easy to navigate to but parking was tight and not enough parking available.

the check in attendant was super friendly and very understanding of having to park our move in truck. the suite was super clean and a nice stay. i would stay here for a few nights or a quick one night stop again.
the bathroom's sink was tiny and there was no counter space.

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.title: normally a great hotel with full value
7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: odell is the person that normally checks us in.  his professional attitude and helpfulness is supreme.  the breakfasts are great.  this time the elevator was not working and the staff assisted everyone with luggage and were kind.
odell was awesome.  helpful and caring. room was nice but could’ve been a little cleaner.

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.title: clean convenient
7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: a bit humid in the room, but it’s florida. turned on the ac and it was fine. very conveniently located right off 75.
defective room lock which made me lat to my job. charged a "smoking" fee to someone who does not smoke!
the free breakfast was weak at best. proximity to a loud highway was intolerable.
good price, convenient, clean, nice room, very good breakfast, friendly staff

the hotel was beautiful and very clean and the staff was very welcoming....it was a bit of a wait with 1 elevator....one of my rooms had an ac leak and ended up switching to another room the next day other than that very nice hotel
. it was good. the breakfast was good and we had no problems.
night desk clerk was rude. bed was not comfortable.

got in an midnight, woke up for breakfast at 8am and there was absolutely nothing ready. made a waffle and they had no syrup and made a rude remark when i asked. there were no coffee cups to make a coffee. pool was closed for cleaning so didnt get to enjoy anything the short time we were there

i’ve stayed at plenty |MASK| inns. and usually have a great experience. the staff at this location was very rude my kids went down for breakfast the staff had packed up breakfast a half an hour early and yelled at my kids not to touch anything.
not one of my best experiences. cant really share any more.
both staff and visitors where extremely kind, there was a jr baseball team staying at the hotel, a lot of kids having a great time

it was very convenient to where i was working and for supplies however the maid service was terrible when i checked in rooms was dirty and did not get service the three days i was there had to go to the front desk to get towels and toilet paper

the beds seem smaller than advertised.  there were 3 adults and 1 child staying in the room and only 3 towels were provided.  there were no comforters on the beds, we needed to request both towels and comforters.
older property, needs some tlc
i loved breakfast buffet,cleanliness of the room and no carpet is a very good idea thanks
bed was comfortable, price was right, they did have elevator down for a bit, due to cleaning..

loved the wood floors, no more carpet. looked nice and felt so much cleaner. also, the jacuzi in our room was just wonderful. didnt have a breakfast as was shown when we booked, also was suppised to be able to check in at 3 and it was after 4 before we could get into our room. but overall it was quite nice. would definately stay again.

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.title: great hotel
7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text:
we enjoyed our stay at this hotel.  we were traveling from the keys to panama city, and it was a great stopping place.  we stopped earlier than we normally would have, but it was a nice reprieve.  the television in the living room was not working, so when we went down to go to dinner, we told the hotel clerk.  he said when got back to call him and he would come up and fix it.  and, he did immediately after we called when we got back.  

i was a great relaxing stay.
average to slightly below average room condition. very small parking area, difficulty walking to adjacent restaurants (had to walk on roadway or across unkept property lines.
bathroom was  smelly, bathroom lights flickered, toilet wouldn't stop running, and didn't fully flush, mini fridge rattled, the decor was plain and worn
the only problem i had was my room didn’t have a phone. other than that everything was excellent

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.title: disappointed
7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: the parking is horrendous not enough spots  - our 1st night we were instructed to park at the gas station next door! crazy! the breakfast room seats about 20 but the hotel has 50 or more rooms - do the math! i've stayed at many |MASK| inns - i'm sorry to say this was our worst experience with this chain.

i am so impressed with everything at this hotel. i will definitely stay here again and will recommend to others.

thank you for a great experience in ocala.
nice and clean hotel very well located for our purposes. the parking entrance was a little weird, but not a problem.
area around toilet and shower moldy, cracked. furniture all chipped up
nice place. due to covid no housekeeping, which is understandable, except, they do not check to see if you need anything. if you ask them they do give you gladly. all in very nice place.

we booked this room for our employees while they were working out of town and they stated it was the dirtiest hotel they have stayed in.  the towels were dirty, the room had plumbing issues and the ac system did not work.
efficient, clean and basic.
fantastic

good location 
but tuff to geon the north bound side of 75 but area seems safe

bathroom had not been cleaned.  there were used towels laying over the tub, open soap bars laying everywhere, full trash can and no new towels, coffee or coffee cups.  no ice machines. seemed to be one employee running the entire building, was no one there to clean so she gave me a stack of towels.  also after getting out of elevator the hallways completely reeked of weed. definitely not worth the 150$   a night we were charged.
fairly standard chain property within walking distance of several restaurants. standard boring breakfast offering.
nothing unusual, but was clean and friendly.
we basically just slept here as busy visiting family. needed a toilet plunger and had to call down teice
i like how clean it is. and i love how nice the faculty are. the only thing i wish was different was how to get into the hotel.

difficulty seeing entrance to parking lot - had to go through gas station to get there. not enough parking spaces for guests. breakfast was a hot mess (no plates, coffee cups, or cereal bowls, insufficient seating, juice machine broken, etc.). tub filled with water from leaky faucet upon arrival. refrigerator in room was leaking. dresser to was significantly damaged. staff was nice though. |MASK| inn just needs to apply some money to spruce up the place and add some breakfast dishes.
everything was good for a one night stay, front desk was nice and handled everything well

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.title: traveling nurse
7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text:
excellent hotel, excellent location 
quiet and wonderful room

horrible place! the hallway and room smelled like mold and mildew. it looked like they had a flood issue on the 4th floor and have dehumidifiers in the hall way. we left to go eat and thought maybe when we got back to the room it might smell better but it doesn’t. when we went to complain and check out within 2 hours, no offer for another room was given. i’m not risking our health just to sleep one night. wouldn’t even give me a print out when i checked out.
there was a chair in the room with stains on it. there was no phone in the room. the bathtub did not drain properly. we were told that we could have another regular room aside from the suite we had.
it was fine.
everything fine with the hotel and the room but the front desk staff must be more understandable and friendly.

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.title: nice hotel
7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: great time but a little hard to get into from roadway
hotel was under construction in the lobby and hallways but all went well.
it is located in a great location near by restaurants and shopping center.

the walls were very thin. i am not sure where the mix up happened, but the night clerk double booked my room so at 11:30pm a man attempted to open the door to my room. considering it was myself and 8 year old son in the room it scared me to death. about 3-5 minutes later the desk clerk came up to tell me there was a mix up in the rooms. the gentleman was extremely apologetic, but i was unable to sleep for the rest of the night. when we checked out the only thing the girl at the front desk said was “i’m sorry”.
appreciate that they still have a real breakfast, not grab and go!
found cockroaches in the tub so we didn’t not stay the night

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.title: great place to stay
7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: staff was amazing room was spacious and fit our needs perfect. the kids were very happy with the pool. overall very happy that we stayed here. the girl that checked me in was the same who checked me out and she had the biggest most genuine smile the entire time. she talked to me and was happy to help.
the property did not have my expedia reservation then charged more than the expedia rate.  very upsetting.
staff helpful and friendly. installations clean and modern
road and truck noise made sleeping impossible

the staff was very nice and helpful.
we travel with our pets so was helful that it was pet friendly
clean but very outdated. furnishing was old. single bathroom sink with no countertop
the room was spacious and the bed was comfortable and big. the room was clean but it had a very strong humid smell. breakfast was better than expected and it was free.
hotel was ok. grounds are very small. very little support staff. no towels. had to use bath mat to dry off. probably won’t stay there again.
convenient to dining and things to keep the kids busy.

room was clean.  some others we were traveling with complained of smoke, but our room was fine.  
breakfast was pretty good actually.

stay here before but property now is in much need of an upgrade.
the good right on the highway but can be noisy at the same time depending on where your room is at. chilli's in walking distance, great for dinner. gas right next store, fill up and go.
awesome place and staff. highly recommended. will stay again!

i called the hotel to book one room for one night. was quoted a price from the hotel much higher than was on expedia. clerk advised to book through expedia to get the lower rate. i asked clerk to cancel my reservation that i just made and told  her i would book through expedia as suggested.  upon arrival to the hotel, there were two reservations in my name. the one i booked through expedia and the one they were supposed to cancel.  of course the person i saw when i checked in had no knowledge of my phone call because the person who took the reservation an hour earlier was off. the error was quickly corrected and  the clerk provided excellent customer service. it was 11 o’clock at night when i got there so i went right to bed. the next morning when i got up to take a shower i noticed a third of the ceiling over the tub was heavily water damaged with paint peeling off of it and there was mold around the bathtub where the wall tile  meets the tub. also, over by the window where the floor ac unit is located some of the paint wax peeling from moisture coming from somewhere. that perhaps explained the musty mildewy smell in the room. long story short, i would definitely not recommend this hotel to anyone or stay here again until all repairs have been made. on a positive note. the hotel breakfast was good.they did follow the guidelines for allowonly eight people in the dining area at a time and a hotel staff person served you breakfast.
not enough parking could use some updates
the location was perfect for seeing silver springs, ocala family members, and places to eat. i will stay here on future visits to family in the area.
staff was very helpful and accommodating. all of the questions and request made was answered.
everything was great!! clean room, good breakfast and friendly staff.

the v-shaped security lock that fits over the little metal ball as an additional safeguard to the twist-lock was broken. i brought it to the attention of the desk clerk upon checkout, and she was very receptive to the information.

close right off xway for overnight stay. lots of choices of restaurants, very clean and better than average breakfest. only neg. was front road construction tough to enter had to go thru gas station. did have trouble with wifi reception in our room but the big guy took care of us very well and moved us to another room and with upgrade to suite👍. would definently stay here again.

it was a wonderful stay everyone was so nice accept for the horrible woman the work in the breakfast room she was mean to everyone who comes in to get breakfast they really need to do something with her i'm a very joyful person even when you come in to eat breakfast your joy is broken because she yelled at this man for no good reason they really need to do something about her but everything else beside that issue was great

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.title: first and last impressions
7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: great check in and stay, like the comfortable place you seek. front side room was noisy from street traffic. check out and breakfast got us out refreshed. after departure request to staff went unheeded for a week and took a third call to get someone to admit personal responsibility to forward an article left behind. the evidence of good customer service is when the unexpected or unforeseen needs to be handled.
check in time was at 3 but our room was not ready until 4:05. the hotel is clean but definitely needs an update.
convenient on the busy hwy with all the shops and malls

it is to close expressways and is noisy al day and night , the bathroom is for someone with less than 4 foot tall
the pool is under roof is okay if they take care of the surrounding areas
everything was great staff room bathroom thank you for the great service
clean spacious rooms that were part of a very well kept property in a convenient but busy location in town

i was very disappointed with their policy in place when it came to my reservation. i booked the room several months ago for a trip for my sons, and i. the credit card that i used to book the room was no longer viable for me so i got a different one, so that day when they tried to charge it before i got to the hotel, it obviously declined because it didn’t exist anymore. instead of contacting me to let me know, and find out if i still wanted the room, they just gave away my room. when my sons and i arrived after driving for almost 4 hours, it was 11 pm and they told me they had given my room away , so i had to take whatever was available which was one bed and a pull out sofa. there was no messages left for me to let me know or to confirm if i was still coming or not, which is the main issue i have concerning that policy. i would’ve gladly provided a new credit card number.
no hot wwater to shower. changed room, the room had cigarette smoke odeor. please do not stay at this trerrible establshment
charged me for smoking and would not return my calls....
unfortunately the price didn’t match the overall accommodations.
shower was clean, but not renovated like the rest of the bathroom. breakfast was mediocre
fenomenal
we enjoyed our 4 night stay. bed was very comfortable. pool was nice. staff was wonderful. room to room noise and door slamming was a lot but typical.

well i really like the room. it obviously been well cleaned it was very comfortable and up-to-date, i was very concerned that they weren’t enforcing mandatory mask wearing of the gas in public areas. 

i take the covid-19 threat very seriously and was, quite frankly, dumbfounded by the general lack of concern from my observations in florida as compared to my home state of south carolina at a time that florida was experiencing one on the worst outbreaks and a rise in cases for the entire world. in fact, as i was checking out i saw a crowded room of people getting breakfast in a windowless room (rather than outdoors) with none of the guests apparently wearing mask, including some of the staff.

i left and placed an online at a nearby starbucks rather than risk what i saw as a very dangerous situation to receive a complementary breakfast.

granted, i have a higher risk because i’m over 60 and i am a cancer survivor, but i saw what i consider to be recklessness regarding the public spaces in a time of a pandemic.

the property was located in a very convenient area right off of i-75 and close to restaurants and shopping, the parking lot was very small and congested. the room needed updating but was very clean and reasonably priced.

i tried calling twice  (between 6-7pm) to let them know we would be coming in a little late.  unfortunately no one answered.  not a good sign. in the room the chair had a rip in it, the sheets looked  slept in and the drawers in the bedroom chest and tv unit were open. the linens(bath and bed) looked old.  while the bath vanity had been updated the shower was ancient. this place needs an overhaul. won’t be back.
adequate

i loved the suite we upgraded to with the jetted tub in the room. my husband and i stayed there the night of our wedding and it was perfect! the room was huge with a nice bathroom. the hot tub was also huge (definitely big enough for the 2 of us) and it was so relaxing after a long day of being on our feet. they mentioned that if they knew it was our wedding night they would've put rose petals in our room and prepared the bath for us with petals to (so newly weds this is your chance)! the only complaint i have about the hotel was the elevator... it was extremely slow! i thought it was broken at first because of how long we waited but another family came by and said it just takes a really long time. it took probably about 8 minutes. it's not the end of the world... it was just a little annoying because our hands were full. i would definitely recommend this hotel though and we would for sure return in the future.
the ice maker is broken, the microwave in my room is broken, the heat doesn’t work, i am sleeping with 2 blankets the hotel provided and 1i brought at the target in town.

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.title: nice hotel
7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text:
my stay there was great.  my room was comfortable and clean.  staff was nice
only concerns,. 
not enough parking
breakfast is limited
i asked for a wake up call and it never was made

it was the worst hotel stay i have ever had. the hotel smelled terrible on arrival. after getting to the room, there was food crumbs and even a chicken bone next to the bed. one of the pillow cases had stains on it. the bathroom smelled terrible and they refused to issue a refund even though i spent less than an hour in the hotel. it’s absurd and very disappointing for a hotel owned by |MASK|.

it was in a good location. cons was the hotel booked a party at same time and lobby and outside had tons of people. also in my room i found 2 small roaches. sat mirning lady in front of vending machine was high as a kite in front of my children.
property is in need of updating.  dehumidifiers running in the hallway tells me they may have a problem with leaks.

upon walking in the room it was as hot and muggy as it was outside. there was no staff at the front desk to greet and assist us. in the room the mini fridge also didn’t work so i couldn’t even have cold water to drink and the bottom of the tub was disgusting and black. the sheets felt sticky and looked as if they made the bed from the last guests those for sure were not clean sheets, to help with the room being so hot i had to ask for a plug in fan. asked for another room they said it was completely booked so we had no choice but to stay since i already paid, they withdrew a $100.00 pre auth charge incase of damage and we live 2 hours away. i spoke to carolyn at the front desk who was so rude as well as racist. she was yelling at her associate savannah and treating her like absolute garbage as well as the maids who ever the only pleasant portion of this experience. carolyn was very unprofessional. i was asking her how i can be compensated for such a horrible experience she shrugged her shoulders and said there’s nothing she can do. i left and decided to call expedia and see what can be done since the hotel didn’t want to take responsibility for their actions. the rep from expedia advised she was going to call the property, once she got back on the line with me she advised the manager told her i was lying about everything i said, then i decided to contact the manager of the hotel and ask why she would do such a thing. horrible experience.

the bathroom smell like urine was not properly cleaned.  the air conditioner was very noisy.  truly i did not have a good night sleep was very tired the day after til i arrived home and slept.   you should have to options of coffee as you only had medium which was light we had to go out to drink coffee.
the beds are so comfortable ,housekeeping staff are friendly and helpful

good pool beds are pretty comfy they keep it clean only thing that sort of sucked was the lighting from the building shined in through the curtains so it wasnt as dark as id prefer while sleeping almost like i had a night light on but eventually i fell asleep and it was dark lol
the beds were very hard

we spent 3 nights at this hotel they refused to give us an extra towel so we hung up our towels hoping to get 2 more and they took them and replaced them but not anything else they didn’t make the bed. i called the front desk 3 times because we had no hair dryer no one answered the phone come to find out when we went downstairs for breakfast the front desk staff was busy talking to the kitchen staff instead of being in the office. when we finished breakfast which was mediocre we asked about getting a hair dryer she said i’ll try but couldn’t promise. asked cleaning staff when we went back to our room and was told they didn’t have any. asked if we could get one from an empty room and was told no.

the cleaning and breakfast staff were very helpful and efficient. the wifi in my room kept cutting out or wouldn’t connect. overall it was just okay, but since i was there on business, i don’t think i would stay again.

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.title: stars at the front desk
7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: vanessa at the front desk was very pleasant, accommodating and very sympathetic to our situation (fleeing from h. irma). she took our phone calls in the afternoon to confirm reservation and assured us we would have a room regardless of when we where able to arrive.  when we arrived she gave us a big smile and welcome.  she got us checked in in minutes and had us in our room with delay.  she was on duty the next morning with the same big smile and wished us good luck and safe travels.
like that the property was very close to interstate 75 and various dining options.

this is my 4th time staying there. i'll never stay there again or suggest anyone else to stay there. we had to ask for toilet paper, coffee, and tissue on numerous occasions. the bathroom was small. no shelving for personal items. we had to go out and buy a tv table to put our person bathroom items on. the closet was so small and all of our clothes were partly on the floor. the mirrors on the jacuzzi was never cleaned.
we used candles in the bathroom and jacuzzi and was told on the last day it was illegal. why didn't they tell us on day 1. i got socked with a 504.28 bill and told it was cheaper than calling the fire department. never again.

the absolute worst hotel my wife and i have ever stayed in.  cannot believe |MASK| inn put their name on this dilapidated building. the staff was not friendly, elevator took forever and they only have one. noise outside our room. the blinds didn’t open they were attached together, mold in the ice maker.  the bathroom was an afterthought, so small. seedy people outside the hotel at night. when we came back from dinner seemed as though we were seeing multiple drug transactions. we would be idiots to eat their free breakfast.  a cheap motel on the side of the road would have been cleaner and safer! |MASK| inn should be ashamed!

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.title: wonderful staff but hotel needs work
7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: the staff at this hotel are wonderful. they are friendly, helpful professional people.  the hotel however was disappointing.  this hotel is in desperate need of renovation especially the bathrooms. it rained one night while i was there and when i woke up the carpet was wet because the window was leaking badly. i also noticed that some days the housekeeping staff did a wonderful job and other days they didn't even made the bed.  this will be a great hotel when they renovate.

muy tranquilo 
muy limpio
excellent!!!
it was easy to find and comfortable for my stay along the way.  nice breakfast, nice staff, nice room.  lots of dining options nearby and convenient to highway to continue to trip next day.

wifi was limited to non existent on their unsecured network. caulking around tub was old and cracked. there were rust stains on the shower walls, damaged floor tiles and a toilet tank cover that was the wrong size for the tank. hotel’s location is on a very busy/noisy street and 200 feet from interstate 75.
the only reason i chose this hotel was indiir pool. i understand maintenance,  but when said pool is going to be closed for a full week some notice would simply be the right thing to do
some bugs, loud highway noise. but staff was amazing especially carolyn.
got to hotel room, bathroom towel was dripping wet. ended up leaving hotel.
the staff was very friendly and helpful. it was a pleasant experience.

only one slow elevator
good breakfast
good service
good rate
room was loud because it was off road, but it was clean and well maintained.

third shift front desk was so rude!! are room found dirty underwear, curtains were broken when we complained she said we normally don’t switch rooms to people after 10pm cause i don’t want to was what i was told!!

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.title: hotel needs to be updated.
7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: bathroom was smelly and the room was way overpriced.
enjoyed our stay. surprised by indoor heated pool. great for the cold weather we had. thanks!

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.title: location is everything
7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: located right off the highway, restaurants close by,  provided everything i needed with friendly staff.  only downfall....parking was limited!  had to park in the gas station next door.

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.title: i'll pass
7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text:
get to the place after driving an hour and a half and there's no parking anywhere. walk in the lobby and there's a line of people scattered around the dusty jumbled up furniture waiting to be assisted. 15 min later we all are still there waiting to be checked-in. i called the hotel twice and during the second call someone finally came to the front to assist us. older guy was flippant,v rude and disrespectful and tested is like we were doing him a disservice by making him have to do his job.

there was renovation on going that was not listed on their site. it was not the most hygienic or comfortable situation with dusty every where and you serving cookies and breakfast amongst the chaos.

the carpets smelled like mildew and old beer. there was long blond hair in the bed after pulling back the sheets to inspect. we're african american so it wasn't ours. if we hadn't been really pressed for a place to stay and hadn't prepaid we would have dipped out.
every staff member was very down to earth and super helpful and friendly.  i was here for a difficult personal issue and it felt like home
front staff was great.  need more luggage carts
hotel was subpar.
this hotel is located right off the interstate and easy to find.  it is comfortable and quiet and they have a nice breakfast.
the place looks horrible we didnt even walk in  it looked so ruff out side wasted our money
quiet and safe surroundings. clean. hot breakfast with eggs sausage and potatoes.
clean and well maintand and needs a covering over door
limpieza fatal

a very friendly man at the front desk greeted us with warm cookies. sadly the kids put one of those cookies down and a family of cockroaches came out for a snack immediately. we were moved to another room that seemed to be clear of cockroaches. breakfast was decent, just ends pretty early. the lady at the front desk with long wavy dirty blonde hair was constantly on the phone yelling at people every time i walked by. i would probably stay somewhere else next time.
the room was dated, but clean. i stood around for 15-20 min waiting on someone to come to the front desk to check us in.
over-all a great hotel and price for that location.
nothing great but nothing bad.

our bathtub drained very slowly.  standing in two inches of water by the end of the shower.  bathtub needs to be regrouted and non-slip surface on bottom looked dirty brown.

entrance to hotel was difficult.  as you could only drive in from one direction.  had to do a u-turn under expressway to enter.

wifi was weak.  used wifi from other hotel in back.

toilet, at times, would not quit running after flushing.  had to remove tank top and jiggle handle.

security, side entrance door for patrons to use would not unlock with key.  found propped open many times with rock.

front desk personnel was not always there.  found x2 outside smoking by security door.

parking lot was undersized for number of patrons.  was full at midnight with only remaining spot.
they have a great breakfast. the tv don't work
reservation was not in the hotel system! had no rooms available. staff was extremely unaccomadating. had to drive around town at 1am to find another hotel!! want my money refunded immediately!,
inside pool
friendly staff, excellent facilities and overall great location
the service was just excellent.
it was cost efficient, clean and the service was excellent!
excellant for thr price.

i came from out of town got in late and i was told i couldn’t stay due to late check out and last stay room was a mess. both were lies and the property manager was very firm didn’t want to hear what i had to say. biiggg inconvenience this had never happened to me before. i checked in courty yard marriott waaay better anyway

car issues on the way home from orlando.  luckily in ocala the town is large enough to find a place to stay while car in shop and close to restaurants, stores and lyft and uber are quickly available.  the hotel had a good price with one of the lower pet fees and allowed us a late checkout since car would not be ready until around 1:00pm.  it is a little dated but staff was very friendly and met our needs for an overnight stay.  you are right of i-75 so can be a little noisy but it did not bother us and it has a small indoor pool and breakfast.

this is without doubt the dirtiest hotel i have ever stayed in. there is not one part of this hotel that is clean. i have given a couple of chances for the staff to correct the issues, but they do not care. the location is horrible. traffic noise all day and all night. kids running up and down the hall at all times. guest sitting in the hall on their phones at all hours. stains everywhere. needed wifi for work, wifi never works. stay as far away from this hotel as possible. checking out early and finding somewhere else.

when i first walked in, the lady at the front desk was extremely rude. she didn’t speak and it took her a few minutes to even acknowledge that i was standing there. when we got in the room the door would barely open and there wasn’t even a remote control in the room.
there were bugs in my bed biting me. i have a huge red bug bite on my chest. the bed had no support. i did not have a lot of sleep.
we only had one night stay here. it was suitable for just that one night. it was a comfortable bed and a large enough bathroom.

noisy.  the receptionist first put me on the 4th floor on the corner near interstate 75 and highway 200.  it was so loud i asked to be moved.  she then put me on the 3rd floor away from 75 but still on the highway 200 side.  i tolerated it but the traffic woke me up at 4:30.

overall the experience was good. we had to ask for a second roll of toilet paper and we only had 3 towels for two adults and two kids. i believe this to be an error on the part of the staff though. the property, the check in, the pool, and the breakfast were all very nice. very close to interstate so a little noisy. walking distance to dinner and convenience store.

old and beat up and not maintained.
restaurant not in building, poor food..

check in was the worst experience i’ve ever had!! the shift manager was extremely rude and unprofessional! then she got her boyfriend who works there to come into the lobby and threatened to split my head open!! i obviously didn’t stay at the hotel and would like to find out how to get a full refund?? we made a complaint to there corporate office and she supposedly was terminated.
great hotel and room. it was very clean, bed was super comfy and it was quiet for being right next to the interstate.
bien
bed was too soft and there was no counter space in bathroom to put personal items

trust me, the room looks bigger in the pictures then for real.  nothing big.  you get what you pay for.  my husband had to finish some work when we discovered that the internet for the whole hotel was out and had been out all week.  we were not informed and when asked the person was pretty unsympathetic.  sleep was a big problem.  i have never slept in a harder bed.  the pillows were tiny and did little for comfort.  the worst part was the road noise.  it was loud and never let up.  
lastly, in a pandemic i assume that when the sign says sanitized means it's at least clean.  the shower had mold and scum running down the wall.  i was able to rub a washcloth over it and it was removed.  so, not hard to clean = should have been clean.  i was not happy but we had a rough night of sleep and a early appointment so we did not say anything.  overall i was really unhappy with my choice.
beautiful property... i never stayed but from what i saw it was nice.
breakfast was great! place was amazing

room wasn't fully clean.  garbage cans on the table, no towels, toilet paper empty, only 2 pillows, shower looked dirty.  overall not a good experience.  i have stayed at |MASK| inn & |MASK| before in other locations and did not experience this.

generally very clean hotel...a little sterile feeling but that’s not all bad. breakfast was over too early at 9:30 & we missed it because we stayed up late watching the nat’l championship football game....should last until 10:00.
the room is horrible. dirty, mold, and needs repairs.
great customer service and clean rooms
the staff is great
bed was very uncomfortable for the price we paid
we liked that there were wide stairs to the second floor where our room was located (205). we enjoyed our stay and highly recommend this hotel.
bien

the fact that they upgraded us into a king suite after shortly learning i mistakingly booked an handicapped room (not needed) after a long and sore 3+ car ride to the hotel - ultimately won us over. a+ staff! will absolutely be coming back to stay. thank you.
i love this location. excellent friendly professional staff. extremely polite and helpful

indoor pool
comfortable beds
fresh cookies and fruit available

we really enjoyed the inside pool, the wall off windows and doors opening up to the outside was nice. although the pool was less than 5 feet deep it was still nice.  our room was clean and the staff were all nice. the only down sides to the stay was the elevator was very slow and the dryer did not work, which i found out after washing a load of laundry. thankfully there is a 24/7 laundry mat a mile down the road. the front desk was apologetic. the breakfast was actually good, and plenty of options. i would stay again if im in the area.
wer room, it smelled wet , the bathroom was very very old, shower old never again in that hotel
bathroom nothing in bathroom to hold makeup, toothbrush, no towel racks.
great service
it smelled in my bathroom, i even used an entire can of air freshener
easily accessible, great staff, nice breakfast. only complaint is rooms that gave  200 and i-75 can be loud at night, just turn up a/c and you are good

the room was a good size and the beds are large. easy to get to from the highway...but
1) asked for extra towels, they never came, called back and was told if someone was still there from housekeeping i could have some.
2) the room had no toilet paper in it. we called down and they told us we had to come down to the desk if we wanted to get a roll. they still have not returned our incidental deposit either and we did not charge anything.
room, carpet, floors very dirty throughout hotel. room smelled. no towels, comforter old and lumpy. washer works but not dryer. would not recommend, do not believe the good reviews and pictures.
the staff at the place were very helpful and excellent
staff was really friendly and accommodating. rooms were clean. overall, our stay was very pleasant.

there was only one towel set and we had two people on the reservation, no shampoo or soap, the exhaust fan above the whirlpool tub didn’t work so i was too terrified to use it because i didn’t want the steam from it to set off the fire alarm that was right in front of it. the room was smaller than expected. plus we were out on a floor full of children and pets so a relaxing anniversary wasn’t that.
comfortable and great for the price.
inside pool

this hotel stay was the worst we have experienced. the smell of animal was throughout the whole property. it was repulsive. we sprayed our entire room and the carpet outside our room with lysol spray hoping to cut down on the stench. the register in our room was caked with dust-everything seemed dirty and gross.
hotel had no water. were not sure when it would be back. we left.

the rooms were old and the bathrooms were not up to date. tile was scroungy and tub was dingy. there was no housekeeping at all so the garbage was overflowed. the elevator was extremely slow. and my credit card was charged twice for the same room.
conveniently located.  clean property. comfortable bed.
nice place and decent price.  the breakfast could have been better choices of real eggs, bacon, gravy/biscuits.  not terrible however.

as soon as we walked through the hall way i knew i wasn’t staying here. checked in and left the same day. carpets through out the property were dirty. the furniture in the room was so out dated and beat up. very old property. need get up to date.
excelente

entry into and exit from property was thru a gas station.  parking limited with no parking designated for checking in.  big guy at the front desk is not customer friendly.  he let a situation in lobby exterier outside get out of hand.  he has no skills in working with customers other then checkin.

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.title: passing thru on way south
7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text:
we stayed 1 nite on our way south. hotel lobby was under construction. our room had poor
ventilation. the wall unit a/c barely worked & kept making a moaning sound every 45 seconds. 
no tissue in bath when we checked in & toilet kept running. had to take top off tank after
every flush & fix chain. 
upon check out was told "system hadn't been updated" from day before so i couldn't have
a receipt at checkout. it was to be emailed but didn't happen.
key cards didn’t work for side entry, they only had rooms on the fourth floor or above.  breakfast is ok.  the area around is very busy.  room is large and comfortable.

7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.title: nice hotel, very busy!
7d027ef72c02eaa17af3c993fd5dba50d17b41a6.text: appreciate the stay.  we wanted a space close to mom as we came for dad's memorial service.  we wanted an indoor pool to entertain the children and we got that most of the time.  they prepared a nice breakfast as well.  the only problem i had with the hotel is the fact that they only allow two children in the room. my husband and i stayed there when we would rather have been with mom in order to accommodate the extra children.  what happens when the grandparents are not available?

overall, the property was ok. did not realize it was a pet friendly property and someone had let their dog poop in the hallway and did not clean it up. our shower curtain would not stay closed because the rack was falling down from the wall. it was fine for the one night we stayed, but would not want to stay more than that.
i like the fact they have heated pool even though i didn’t use. facility did not have free water in fridge for the price we pay it should have been included
noisy because it sits next to freeway

the room was not clean,trash on the floor.toilet dirty,urine under the rim,black spots on the bathroom floor,no spare toilet paper left in room,no  towels or wash cloth.trash in the toilet.
had to call the front desk to get supplies.it was brought up by front desk staff,after i refused to go down and get stuff that should have been in the room in the first place.he was very apologetic and picked up some of the trash that was in the room to leave for the manager to see.i was told there was no available room for me to switch,so i ended up cleaning the bathroom myself with stuff i brought from home.
on check out i asked for the manager but she was never called,no discount or anything offered.it was horrible.linens nasty,very dingy,not even sure if they were even changed.this was not my first time staying here but it will be my last.horrible experience,thank god i was only there for one night because i would definitely canceled the other nights.
rooms were very nice , staff was awesome and breakfast was good . pool was nice ! it was a great stay!!!

cute hotel, we had four of us in the room, there was not enough towels or soap to accommodate all of us, i did go downstairs to get more which seemed to maybe aggravate the person at the front desk. we planned on staying two nights and left after the first, i’m glad that decision was made because the next morning my door was knocked on at 9 am by house keeping and again at 10, when check out is at 12, then music was played i the hall way all morning until we left (honestly i didn’t mind that, but i could see it making others mad in the future. you get what you pay for in this case.
very pleasant and great staff, the area has plenty of restaurants
room was not as clean.. could also use some upgrades
my reservation was for 01/09 and the lady that was working that am shift was very unprofessional and did not want to assit me at all with what i needed.
the indoor pool was unique and welcome, but the amenities left a little bit to be desired. the room was cramped for what was advertised, and the bathroom was not very clean.
the room with the jacuzzi was nice, my only problem was the ac didn’t work, i went to the front desk they “ did all they can do”
sleep sofa not ready for use. had to get pillows, blanket. no big problem. staff very responsive.

the room had an unpleasant odor, similar to pet urine or a soiled diaper. the bedspread was very thin, more like a sheet than a comforter. the hallway carpets were uneven, making it difficult to roll luggage. the floors in the room felt sticky, and overall the property could benefit from a thorough deep cleaning. that said, it was an acceptable option for a quick, inexpensive overnight stay.
cleaned, and perfect location
the hotel was very clean and the locality was very central to all the restaurants.
rooms are clean, its a nice hotel. would stay again
phone didn’t work, staff was ok but powerless, room was very worn.
as awesome as always.

we booked our hotel drove there within ten mins of booking and they wouldn't let us check in or refund us. said our card was declined which is impossible considering there was money in the bank and we booked the hotel ten mins prior.drove up the road and booked another hotel with no issues and had to call expedia to get our money back

susan and grace were excellent and had superior customer service. susan went above and beyond the call of duty assisting us with our handicap accessible room. marcie was great with assisting us at breakfast. she greeted us daily with a smile and recognized us. she was great!  susan should be recognized for her superior customer service skills. she is truly a valuable asset to your organization.
excellent hotel close to plenty of places to grab a bite.  sadly covid makes everything feel more impersonal than it needs to be.

you could not ask for better front-end staff.  check-in and checkout were handled very effectively with no hassle and in a friendly customer-oriented fashion.

the hotel itself is a different story.  it has limited parking and the parking lot is poorly designed making getting in and out a hassle.  you must enter through a shared entrance with the gas station next door and the vehicles fueling up sometimes impede your path. leaving the parking lot requires that you exit through the gas station's parking area / fueling area.  did i mention,  that there is limited parking????  yep, if you get there and are able to get a parking space, you better stay parked because if you don't and you leave, you might not find a parking place.  

the rooms look okay, as they reflect a fairly decent decorator's touch, however, the air conditioning units are under the window units and they do not put out enough to cool the room.  the rooms are not sound-proof and the hallway noise is at times unbearable with screaming kids, slamming doors, loud talking, and other associated distractions.  the air conditioning units in the hallway was not functioning and the hallway was hot!!!  there are not any functioning ice machines on any of the floors.  there is only one slow moving elevator in the building and you can see your life tick away standing there waiting for the elevator.  the hallway carpeting is showing signs of wear and tear and it definitely needs to be replaced in the very near future.
no knocks, clean, easy to get to, food was good, room was nice.  only bad thing is road construction and lack of parking
this property was convenient to get to and was close to shopping and restaurants.
very nice! clean property and clean room. staff was very friendly and professional.  breakfast delicious.  75lb. dog was welcome.

no decent place for a dog to go do their thing unless you have a toy size dog! the vending machines were not workin g so i had to go to the gross gas station next door to get water. the hotel sits right next to the expressway on an off ramp. very noisy in the rooms facing it. no chairs or benches to sit on outside. the bathroom was ok with cleanliness. not a great stay! not a great location.
front desk staff was very dismissive regarding the roach problem.
el baño estaba con moho
convenient for travel and shopping and dinning. heated pool nice.
nice property. no information in room about the facility. thought that was strange.

i loved the warm indoor pool on a cold night. exceptional hospitality. right off the highway and surrounded by many food options. sam's club close by to refuel or if you need to buy goods. the room cane with a mini fridge and microwave. also came with 4 sets of towels including hand towels which worked out for my daughter and i. sometimes having more helps even thought we did not use all of them but great on their part for providing it. some other hotels you have to go tonthe front desk and wait for someone else to get you what you asked. lastly, they had fresh cookies in the afternoon was a plus. will book again. thank you.
very clean room! breakfast was nice. staff was amazing! everyone we spoke to was the nicest person!
rooms were clean and great pillows!

the owners of this property dooes not spend any money on maintenance. indoor pool with broken heater. room was ok with the exception of the bathroom. shower rod looked like it was used as a chin up bar and no liner for the shower curtain. no shower matt because housekeeping is not provided the items to maintain room. empty vending machines. 1 ice machine for entire building. too much room noise from interstate and local traffic.

3b984f3ba8df55b2609a1e33fd694cf8407842e1.text: staff on reception and at breakfast were very polite and welcoming. they gave us our vip welcome gifts and room upgrade. the room was spacious and had good air conditioning. a little dated in places, but overall very good. clean sheets and towels. the area was a little out of the centre, with a more local feel; but it felt as safe as any larger city would in the daytime and evening. 15 minutes walk to the bus stations. breakfast was a typical plate, plus fruit, toast and drinks; served in a bright dining room. the shower needed some hooks and shelves, but otherwise a perfectly decent place to stay.
excelente servicio y atención

3b984f3ba8df55b2609a1e33fd694cf8407842e1.title: good location, clean
3b984f3ba8df55b2609a1e33fd694cf8407842e1.text: does the job. not as noisy as other people say. hotel parking only fits 3 cars.
everything was okey

3b984f3ba8df55b2609a1e33fd694cf8407842e1.title: excelente
3b984f3ba8df55b2609a1e33fd694cf8407842e1.text: la pasamos excelentemente bien 😃😃😃😃😃😃😃😃😃😃😃😃😃
lugar bonito, personal amable y colaborador, limpieza excelente! buen desayuno!
muy buena atención y ubicación. además confortable para dormir.

3b984f3ba8df55b2609a1e33fd694cf8407842e1.title: hotel bien situė dans le centre de san isidro.

nice hotel, very friendly staff, restaurants are in walking distance.
hotel room was very affordable and clean. the in-house restaurant had excellent and very affordable food with private parking garage provided. it's in a busy part of town with the casino downstairs.

un hotel en proceso de remodelación que cuando finalicen será un hotel con todo lo necesario para quienes lleguen de negocio a la ciudad de pérez zeledón o quienes se alojen con el propósito de conocer la zona.

lo mejor que tiene es la atención del personal.

ubicado cerca del centro de la ciudad, cerca de buses a diferentes zonas como la capital del país.
muy chico el parqueo
there was no wifi in the room and it was a little bit noisy because a bar there is right in from of the room, crossing the street
very nice service and clean place.
muy buena ubicacion en el centro de pz, el casino y el restaurante todo bien el servicio al cliente muy bien. las habitaciones sencillas pero bien y el parqueo esta como a 150mts
very nice. everyone was great. breakfast was great
very clean nice small room   casino is a joke
el parqueo es muy pequeño e incomodo.  el internet muy lento

el personal de recepción sumamente amable, lo mismo del restaurante, la habitación (25) remodelada, espaciosa, cama confortable todo perfecto, lo único no tan cómodo es que es esquinera y si se percibe un poco de ruido externo pero realmente no opaca el buen servicio y calidad recibida.
los años pasan y el hotel sigue manteniendo la calidad en su servicio y personal, cuando vuelva a la zona de nuevo, regresaré definitivamente a hospedarme
lo único es que al estar tan céntrico hay ruido en la noche por los alrededores.
muy buen servicio

3b984f3ba8df55b2609a1e33fd694cf8407842e1.title: hotel per una notte di passaggio
3b984f3ba8df55b2609a1e33fd694cf8407842e1.text: hotel di medio livello con una sala giochi annessa. condizioni delle stanze migliorabili dalla porta che gigolava al wi-fi con qualche problema.buono per una notte ... se sei di passaggio.
only good for one night
muy céntrico, muy cerca de todo. si quieres tener todo a la mano es una muy buena opción.

the hotel is quirky and different. the room was clean and spacious. beautiful bathroom and shower. a let down that there was no good water pressure. the area around is a bit sketchy but they had a locked parking area

las habitaciones están en muy buen estado, amplias, limpias y el servicio es muy bueno, solo hay un pero, es sumamente ruidoso, el casino de la plata baja genera demasiada contaminación sónica, dormir no es lo mejor.
muy centrico.

|MASK| is an old hotel and casino that was bought and remodeled by the same company that owns the fiesta casinos in costa rica.. the rooms are brand new and beautiful. diego, the hotel manager was very helpful with all my needs. beautiful place. i’m not a gambler so i cannot speak for the casino but the hotel is very nice.

3b984f3ba8df55b2609a1e33fd694cf8407842e1.title: très bien situé!
3b984f3ba8df55b2609a1e33fd694cf8407842e1.text: très  propre, confortable personnel courtois et avenant, situé cartier populaire (restos, boutiques, cafés...) et du mercado municipal (bus) 7 min. à pieds et 7$ en taxi  de l’aéroport municipal , ah oui!  déjeuner compris et les coqs chantent très tôt 4:00...très bien pour escale vers chirripo, puerto jiménez...

3b984f3ba8df55b2609a1e33fd694cf8407842e1.title: excelente staff but hotel outdated
3b984f3ba8df55b2609a1e33fd694cf8407842e1.text: i had stayed in this hotel many times,  i really recommend some updates. . needs new towels(they're wear off) , bathrooms renovation( facets, drains, shower handle, head shower) new bedding  ( sheets and pillows cases had holes), new furniture and curtains( same since 2004) . the restaurant had a very nice location! but breakfast buffet  was cold and not variety. beautiful building, nice staff, just need some love!

3b984f3ba8df55b2609a1e33fd694cf8407842e1.title: interesting area
3b984f3ba8df55b2609a1e33fd694cf8407842e1.text: the room was small..bed very comfortable...bathroom adequate....some mismatched tiles...no smoke detectors...no fridge...breakfast was very basic...there must be more fruit choices then pineapple and watermelon?  food was cold...but coffee was hot. casino a friendly quiet place. lobby very nice.  area has several good restaurants and u can walk to downtown area easily.
limitado por el parqueo (muy pequeño); pero los anfitriones muy preocupados te colaboran en elnn bn parking
an excellent, affordable hotel in downtown san isidro del general. the staff are wonderful. it is walking distance too everything you would need.
very nice hotel, close to convenient stores
exc lugar, buenas habitaciones, exc servicio, conica muy buena
comfortable
habitaciones limpias, desayuno muy rico. la atención de es excelente y la ubicación es de fácil acceso. muchas gracias!
nice place. nothing fancy. central location to downtown. very friendly staff. gated parking. lots of restaurants within walking distance.
staff was very nice.  breakfast was included.  parking inside hotel was very limited.
has all your basic needs covered at an affordable price.  front desk staff very nice and helpful.
small room, not like the pictures. in the pictures the room was shown bigger

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: it is great for a cheap getaway. enjoyed the beach,  but there was a lot of people that were not staying there in the small parking lot.   you need a parking pass,  but  many times there were at least 5 cats in the very small lot without.
the bathroom was dirty.  property looked run down.  great location right on beach.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: close to the beach
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: nice location, rooms clean but little dated and still some significant storm damage from irma in september. was a little pricey for condition but it was presidents day weekend and busy in town.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: great location new smyrna beach
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: this was a last minute booking and it worked out great! we were lucky to get one of the beach front units. we stayed only 2 nights and loved the room on the 3 rd floor with a beautiful beach-ocean view! gorgeous ocean! the hotel is older but well maintained, the room was very clean, we had a huge wrap around balcony which was amazing. pool was clean and well maintained and had plenty of lounge chairs. nice staff, plenty of non-chain restaurants close by.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: great and convenient place
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: we were very impressed with the hotel. would definately recomend it and would stay again. we had the hotel room. would go to the 1 bedroom with kitchen next time.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: nice place on the beach
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: i little older type of rooms, but clean and located in a nice location to the beach and other activities in new symrna

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: excellent location ...
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: close to everything in nsb... only bad part were the small double beds. can’t fit two adults in one.  other then that... excellent place for the value !
great stay! thank you for having us we can’t wait to be back the finamore’s
older condo, but effort to keep clean and in good condition. good for a day or two. good location.
great place for our quick trip for some sun!!  love the proximity to restaurants, beach bar and conveniences.  we will be heading back for our quick trips!!

by the beach. great location to enjoy the sunrise.
the building needs a little of tlc.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: this is about the 3rd time i have stayed at |MASK| |MASK|. i love thi quaint little place. the staff is wonderful.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text:
had a good time enjoyed the beach 
came back to our room enjoyed the beautiful pool & gas grills what else could you ask for 😎
location, great right on the beach, not to crowded,staff was pleasant, however the small ac was in the living room for the whole unit, so it was pretty warm to sleep. some soft spots in the floor.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: very nice stay
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: the location of the hotel was excellent and we enjoyed a lovely time.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: terrible smells in the room.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: awful, room smells of mold and mildew, couldn't use the heat, smelled like urine when tried. brought our clothes home and straight from the car to the washer. threw the suitcase and bags out. they all stink. i would have gone somewhere else but during speedweek. ocean view was through salt crusted windows. could be a really nice place but severely neglected. after check out and home i reviewed card statement, they charged me $1.00. when i called they explained they charged $25.00 for deposit, then only refund $24.00 and say it's policy. mind you i paid for my stay 100% in advance on a non refundable booking.

the hotel is being operated as an airbnb and not a hotel. if i wanted this, i would have booked through airbnb not expedia. the advertising on expedia does not reflect this correctly along with all the other parts of this expedia won't let me leave a review on. no where in this comment am i mentioning: don't mention specific prices or room rates
leave out any profanity
don't reference personal information
exclude photos containing inappropriate or unrelated content. if expedia continues to censor unfavorable comments, i will post this online. note i have screen shotted both my comments, and your emails saying i must revise. if you want honest feedback, here it is. if you want me to post this in reddit and other sites, i will do it there.
close to beach stores restaurants and very relaxing
beds were a bit uncomfortable.
right on the beach!  you can’t get much closer without being in the ocean!!

we never saw or talked with a human!  had one bath towel no face towels! our spread on bed had blood stains!  i sent a picture!  got an i apologize, that didn’t help us with morning shower!  also no soap only shampoo in the shower! not a bad location, just not managed well for guests

perfect location,and the people were really friendly and helpfull,
       its was a great experience,
       really glad after my first trip to america.
            i can not praise the hole experience enough,
                :):):)
this was just what we needed. very nice people. good service.

the furniture was outdated, broken and old. i needed a get away place where i could get a peace of mind, but the constant banging made it impossible to do so. they should had warn you that the place was being work on.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: vacation
