did enjoyed this place.  room was cozy but a little warm (a/c).  parking was a nightmare.  was hoping for a hot tub.  i would go back.  overall great spot!

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: reminds me of an old time fl style hotel, try it!
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text:
this is a small hotel with a great location. we were on the beach and lucked out to have the rental truck parked nearby. you must bring your own beach towel or can purchase locally. we rented beach chairs. $8 for the day for 1 chair. not bad when the hotel was so reasonably priced. there was an ice machine at the pool area. if your looking for a bargain and don't mind a small room, older but clean hotel in a great location. this place is for you.
beware of the hotel connected to the tiki bar a mile or so up the beach. scary!
try panheads pizza and the gnarly bar and grill. excellent food. fun atmosphere. chases beach bar is 2 buildings from |MASK| |MASK|. easy to get to, okay food.
room was clean and i felt safe with all of the locked gates.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: great family accommodations
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: my husband, 2 children (ages 3 & 5) and i decided to stay at |MASK| |MASK| over the memorial day weekend. when we arrived i was told that we had been upgraded to a larger room with a full kitchen, living room, and dining area. we were extremely pleased with the room. my kids loved the large pool - so much so that we swam until 9 p.m. every night! this is a reasonable hotel right on the beach with a little playground nearby. also it is safe for kids since you can walk over one block and there is no driving allowed on the beach. nice, friendly staff and overall a great family trip!

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: it's just old and depressing room
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: everything was good but is just feels old and air was not working. i think it needs remodeling.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: family spring break on a budget
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: the hotel is an unpretentious beach place. great place to spend a weekend or a week soaking up some sun. the location is great as it allowed easy access to both the driving and no car sections of beach. staff was helpful and pleasant.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: nice.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: we stayed a few nights in january. the rooms are all owned, it is, i think, really a condominium. the staff was very pleasant, the room was comfortable and clean. the price was right, for needing a place to sleep for a few nights. i would stay again.

it was right on the beach!! new gates around property that made it very safe and private 
our room was updated. new paint and tvs and furniture flooring update to tub/sink. 
can’t wait to go back.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: now it’s obvious why it’s available
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: this hotel has had quick fixes by bad handymen. it’s outdated, has mold and water stains. smells musty, we moved rooms but same thing so we left. if there is an event in town and others are booked this is the last one to fill up and now i know why

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: great oceanfronf hotel
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: unbelievably nice for the price. great room, location and staff.
location

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: great hotel for staying right on the beach
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text:
it is not the ritz carlton, but affordable and close to the water. friendly, helpful staff. crystal clear, clean pool.

a great place to stay while at the beach!

the tv in the room would not reboot, tried many times,it would still not work! after 1 and 1/5 hours. they finally put us in another room. they wanted to change out the tv. but no maintenance personnel was available. not happy with the communication with front desk. very poor and management would not talk to us.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: clean, older beachfront hotel.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text:
this hotel is just what they advertise. it is a small,older complex but very quiet and well kept. it is located directly on the beach. we had a standard room with 2 double beds, a small microwave and mini fridge. we did get a look at the the full kitchen suite and for a little more would suggest that if you want to prepare meals other than just sandwhiches and microwave meals. pool was large. nice size kiddie pool. both very clean. this is a good time of year to visit the beach. still warm, enough sun and not crowded. the room did have a mildewy smell, but once the a/c was running and a little air freshner it was fine.
if you want to spend your money on things other than a fancy room, this is the place.
great location, perfect room, one bedroom suite. enjoyed the stay, would definitley stay here again

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: good location close to beach
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: the hotel is a little aged and tired and suffered some recent hurricane damage which is still being fixed. the room decor is dated and although the rooms were made up everyday. overall this is not a quality accommodation. i reported bugs in the room, which the hotel staff say they would get dealt with. i would stay here again, but it’s definitely not worth the $135 a night i paid during daytona 500 week.

|MASK| |MASK| is currently under major construction. aside from windows being blocked with biz clean plastic, shower heads falling off hitting my son in the head and leaky faucets. i rented one of my rooms with a kitchen to cook a 25th anniversary dinner and the oven did not work! it is a charming place and would definitely come back after construction is done.
friendly staff that went above and beyond to accommodate our request. very clean and comfortable rooms and property was extremely clean.

i enjoyed the beach front room. but did not make up for noise control. walls and ceilings paper thin. the guest above me could be heard every single step. sounded like he was moving furniture or bowling all night. very annoying. not at all a peaceful relaxing stay.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: no frills
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: it had everything you need; a/c, cable, microwave, frig and hot water. the room smelled old but that's my only complaint.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: nice hotel on beach
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: pleasant staff, right on new smyrna beach. easy access to beach.
bad weather for our weekend, but nice destination with some nice areas to dine at.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: being repaired after 2 hurricanes and not ready
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: the location was great and the staff outstanding.  major work was being done to the building from the damage down by hurricanes irma & matthew.  they did their best considering their situation.  the rooms were way too small and the bathroom needed redoing and was way too small.  our room was one what had repairs done to it, but still lacked what i expected for the price we paid.  the staff was so nice and the location great, but was very disappointed in the rooms.   betty

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: nice property right on beach
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text:
this hotel is very nice, a few bugs but typical for florida. we had a one bedroom suite with separate kitchen and living room. close to beach, adequate parking, prompt responses to service requests. a portable fan/ac unit in bedroom was inadequate, but main ac unit in living room was great. 
    we had a great stay and great time in new smyrna beach.
older but nice. needs some maintenance on some things.  nice location on beach.
the tv was broken, floor covered in sand and then day 2 the air broke. the moved us to a nicer room which was a plus but then they had no towels for us to use to shower for 2 days.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: perfect stay!
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: it was a girlfriend getaway and we had a great time!  we were on the ground floor right by the pool and then just a short walk to the beach. it is close to everything we wanted to do and we will definitely be back!!

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: close to beach hotel.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: double occupancy room were not as advertised, much smaller than expected, and no bath tub so i had to change my room. which in that suite my wife was happy with a tub, but the shower did not work. that hotel staff needs some training in customer/guest care. there is a nice thing about this hotel, it's close to the beach.
internet was an issue other than that it was very nice

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: our stay was just okay.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text:
the hotel was pretty and right on the beach.  parking was ample and location was convenient.  the staff was nice and helpful.
negative was that the only air conditioner in our unit was in the main room.  no air could get into the bedroom so we were hot while sleeping.  we had to go to walmart and buy a fan.  
it was nice to have the kitchenette - fridge, dishes and pans were all spotless.  
we will not stay there again, but it was an okay place.

we arrived late at night and the lobby was closed. we had called and they told us where to find the key, which we did find. however, all parking places on the side by the gates were taken. the envelope with the key needs to have more specific instructions about how to get in. poor instructions for one arriving late.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: old & outdated motel.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: room was old & outdated. had a musty smell to it. no plug-ins for electronics.  refrigerator didn't work.  toilet was dirty.  ice machine was broken.  clock in room was broken.  could not get  into the office until 8:00 am for coffee. overall the place was a dump.  will never stay there again,  none the lamps worked. just overhead light.
its on the beach so setting is beautiful. the suites are nice but regular rooms are very dated and leave a lot to be desired. cleaning staff needs to do a better job.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: spacious, nice room amenities, oceanview
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: i'm an artist and booked this hotel while i was in town for the images art show in downtown. the hotel was accommodating to my minivan and trailer for parking. the room was spacious and divided into a bedroom and living room with a tv in both rooms. the kitchen had a full size refridge, mini stove and microwave along with dishes and silverware and dishwasher. the room was clean, smelled fresh and the two double beds were very comfortable. i would definitely book this hotel again for business and for pleasure. the price of the room per night was very reasonable compared to other hotels and for what it included.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: oceanfront
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: i asked for oceanfront room overlooked pool and then view of ocean. i suppose i should of asked for direct ocean front. was very loud at night unruly guests-unfortunate. staff and room were nice got in early. great location. very pricey for accomadations. not enough parking spaces!

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: nothing fancy but nice
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: small room, very clean! right on the water. it was great for us!
we had a great time the location was perfect. we could see the ocean from our deck and the beach was just a few steps away. we will stay there again.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: felt like home...
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: we enjoyed a very pleasant, very relaxing weekend. the unit was very clean, very accomodating, the kitchen was well equipped. the unit was so cute!

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: |MASK| |MASK| review.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: hotel location was great for access to the beach. size of room was a little small. staff kept room clean each day. would go back and stay there again.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: old rundown on the beach
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: old rundown on the beach  as soon as we drove up to the hotel we knew it was the wrong place no elevator finally got to our room smelled like mildew nasty dirty coffee pot and totally on sanitary wouldn't recommend that with a friend and a dog

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: nice little hotel on the ocean
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: only stayed one night, but it was a good night. hotel staff was great. view is amazing!

the room was terrible.  it was a cheap motel room-2 beds and a small bathroom. no kitchen, no dishes and no silverware.  as soon as i saw the room, i wanted to  leave.  but it was all paid for, soooo i had stay.  good by expedia .  you should pay me back!!!!
it was a pleasant place to stay! having a small kitchen with basic cooking supplies was amazing! super clean and beautiful.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: nice hotel.  good location.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: hotel was very clean and well maintained.  upon checkout the office was not open as the information sheet indicated.  not a good way to start a long day of travel.
the staff was great, and hotel was perfect for needs.  i will stay here again in the future.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: proximity to the beach is its greatest asset!
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: booked a room with 2dbl beds but was provided one with a king size and a pull-out sofa. we arrived late and were tired so decided to try it....had to spend a miserable night on decrepit sofa (spring were worn and mattress was falling through frame). could not find anyone from front desk to ask to change room. our phone did not ring into the front desk (gave a busy signal) and the office was locked up when we went looking for someone to complain about discomfort. our second night (saturday) we were told they were full to capacity so we resigned to stay. around 11pm or so we were sitting talking near the kitchen area when we saw a palmetto bug (roach) crawl from or near the toaster and scurry across the wall to disappear down behind the stove... the guy was kind enough to spray around the area and left us the can of roach spray but needless to say it was an uneasy night!

property was smaller (narrower) than expected. unfortunately for us there was a large group that monopolized almost all available space in the common area and most of the parking. bad luck weekend, but no big deal really.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: great location, needs maintenance.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: right on the beach, but the building and the unit both are showing their age with pealing paint, worn rugs, etc. beds were not very comfortable. but for the price it was a fair deal. you get what you pay for.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: friendly staff
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: the staff are very friendly the hotel was clean in all areas and the price are flexible i would recommend.
much more spacious than i thought. very cozy. big bathroom and they have 2 fans in the bedroom. big balcony too

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: close to beach
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: room was small. right on rhe ocean. needs updating on facilities.
great condo friendly people can’t wait to go back.  such a great location

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: nice on the beach.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: nice layout of room with pull out couch and full kitchen. ac unit was in living room so bedroom was a little warm for august. right on the beach with private gate entrance back to hotel property. nearby we had breakfast place (cj's) within 0.5 miles.

it’s a very moderately priced hotel right on the beach. it’s not first rate by any means, it’s a bit run down, but it was clean enough and comfortable enough and at a very decent price given its location. we needed a place to stay just one night before we could move into our condo and it worked very well. we would stay there again.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: nice, older clean hotel
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: very nice older hotel. we had a roof leak in the bathroom one night and the next morning they moved us to a different room. also the ac wasn't working, they replaced it within an hour. the maintenance guy wasn't happy about it but had to do it anyway.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: very nice budget hotel right on the beach
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: nice place to stay - clean, comfortable and right on the beach. we do not go on vacation to stay in a hotel room, so fancy amenities are wasted on us. clean and comfortable are what we look for - and good price and excellent location mean that we will return!

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: very close to the beach. easy parking access
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: we had a wonderful time with this stay. would have like to know in advance that there were no beach chairs or towels available. the staff was fabulous and very helpful.
very clean the beds were very comfortable! excellent location right on the beach.  view of the beach from our room.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: just an average accommodation...small and old room
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: room was bleak, and showed signs of wear but was liveable. older micro and refrigerator,but handy. problem with coffee plugin.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: right on the beach
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: the hotel is right on the beach. you can hear the ocean, there is a nice little bar/restaurant you can walk to. the rooms are powder puffed new bedding but the shower was nasty. the price is right for the hotel though, the pool seemed nice though to chilly when we were there. should take down the fence it blocks the views for the ground floor rooms, or have a chain link that you can see through.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: great location
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: nice warm water pool and wonderful beach nice people

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: great beach hotel for everyone!
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: beautiful setting and well cared for hotel. pool was wonderful and front desk helpful.

the property is on the beach with access to beach. rooms was clean, prepared and spacious with more than enough room for one or two people. the room had small kitchenette with refrigerator and stove and adequate cooking utensils. there has not been much renovation, but if that keeps the costs down, ok with me. the staff were friendly and helpful. i had a balcony with good view of beach and ocean. 
no elevators with only exterior stairs was major difficulty. anyone with disabilities or difficulty lifting suitcases wouldn't be able to stay. if inclement weather or high heat, that would compound the problem. that is the biggest negative for this place. also, front office is not open during the night.
i would stay again and was very satisfied with accommodations.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: small condos on the beach
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text:
this "hotel" is actually a set of small condos on the ocean.  the designation is needed because you do not get the services common for a hotel. "maid" services consist of clean towels and a fresh coffee packet each day.  the most disappointing part of my stay was the fact that i reserved two suites, each with a pair of double beds.  trouble is they don't have condos with two double beds - yet expedia sold me that configuration.

lesson is it always pays to call the hotel to be sure what you think you have reserved matches what you actually reserved.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: nice location on the beach
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: needed lighting in the living area. clean and modest furnishings.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: perfect hotel!
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: nice hotel right on the beach. watched the sun rise one morning from my hotel room. the pool was the perfect temperature! we would go back!

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: nice basic place to stay.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: |MASK| |MASK| was a very nice place to stay. i had little interaction with the staff but what contact i did have was very good. i arrived late (after the front desk had closed) and called the night manager number and was checked in within minutes. staff members from cleaning crew and others all greeted me each day and all seemed to just enjoy what they did. have to say, pool was the cleanest pool i have seen in a while at a public place. rooms were basic but clean. lodge is a bit away from the business area of the beach but, you do have great beach access and i discovered some great walking trails off a side street within walking distance. overall, a nice place to stay providing value for the dollar.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: be careful - no elevators!
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: there were only two negatives about this hotel: there is no elevator (and both my husband and mother had a very difficult time using the stairs every time), and the bedroom did not have an a/c vent so that room was about 8+/- degrees warmer than the main outer room.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: older but clean. right on the ocean.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: the room was good size but bathroom was very small. we had a few issues with the water temp and getting the air conditioning set properly. the view and location is great.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: right on the beach.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: have stayed at this hotel many times. older hotel but always clean. very nice pool. quick and easy access to beach.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: on the beach at reasonable rates
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: this small, 3 story motel is right on one of florida's best east coast beaches in one of florida's best beach towns.  though it is dated and in need of some updates it is very clean and the beds were very comfortable to sleep in.  the rooms are very small unless you rent an efficiency and the bathrooms even smaller.  but unless you plan to spend much time in your room who cares, what matters is cleanliness, comfort and everything in good working order.  the pool is clean and well maintained (not heated).  there is even a kiddie pool. there are several gas grills for customers to use.  the staff is very helpful.  i will stay here again.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: fun at the beach
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text:
the hotel is older, but being right on the beach and the price were hard to beat.
we would stay there again.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: ok hotel with walking distance to beach
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: the only great thing this place has going for them is that it's super close to the beach. the staff was ok. it was very clean however you can really tell that this was a motel turned into an inn/hotel. it felt dinghy, it smelled old, and the tv was extremely small..like 23" whaaatttt!! if you're just wanting to crash for the night, it's not bad...if you're going to make a weekend out of it, go somewhere else

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: great location close to the beach
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: my daughter, son, his wife and 2 kids had a nice time. the pool is nice. the beach was fun.
dirty, and still under construction from irma. you may have said something to us about that

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: great location
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: great location, close to shops and restaurants. directly on the beach.
great location but in dire need of upgrades and renovation.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: depressing
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: this is the kind of place the down and out main character in a movie ends up when she’s hit rock bottom. the odor of mold was overwhelming and even my usually potent scentsy spray couldn’t help. since i’m allergic to mold, i awoke sick each day. i couldn’t get out of there fast enough. it would be worth it if it didn’t cost the same as a nicer accommodation. but over $300 for 2 nights was a rip off.
dried up washcloth in shower. bed looked like it was just slept in
beach and pool were great. suite was comfortable and nice.
obviously being on the ocean is unbeatable. the outside of the property is in nice good looking condition. the room was a bit dated and the bathroom needs to be remodeled but overall was ok.
older property, badly remodeled, nice location, staff alright.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: good location, that's all !
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: condition of exterior is disgusting. room was clean and pool was clean. in real need of renovation. great location, lots of beach. a/c was not sufficient for entire unit....bedroom and bathroom stayed warm.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: great beach motel
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: clean and spacious with a lot of amenities. great beach access. the only reason i gave it 4/5 instead of a 5, was because the blinds in windows and sliding doors had missing panels. anyone who walked by could see into our room. everything else was great! very good value.
beautiful beach out front, vehicle access to beach, close to goods and services.  staff was friendly and responsive.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: cute & clean.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: cure place. only thing i would change is location of bathroom in king suite. everyone had to travel through the bedroom to use it, disurbing the person sleeping in there.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: needs updating
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: needs to be updated. nothing more can be said. great location . price ok but was expecting more...

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: we love being on the beach😀
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: they are repairing damage from the hurricane 😟 mildew smells

what disturbed me was the poor lighting  around the staircases.  the night of arrival we had difficulty finding our way in the dark.

enjoyed the unit very much.  found the women cleaning each day especially friendly.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: great family hotel
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: we have stayed at |MASK| |MASK| now for a 3rd year this spring break. it is by far in the best shape this year than before. new mattresses, painting is fresh and the property is upkept and clean. it's a great place for a family vacation.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: welcoming front desk
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: when we arrived we were greeted pleasantly and was able to check in right away. that was a plus. we got a room by the pool which was very noisy on friday evening.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: great location
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: pleasant and convenient. great location on the beach

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: quaint great a hotel room used for sleeping.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: first, the bottom floor of the hotel is about 60 years old, but as you go up in floors the younger they are. i have to say only reason i did not give 5 stars is the size of the room. the hotel is centaly located on atlantic ave, and is right on the beach. the room size would be better if they would hang the flat screen on the wall and remove or move the dresser to the closet area to make room to walk then make the smaller rooms i bed only then they would rate five stars also as it is an older hotel room it is musky but not so bad you need a new room. i am an actual floridian, and this hotel reminded me of going to the keys for lobster season or fishing when i was a kid in the 80's. staff great, hotel again you use them to sleep in, it is not marriott or any of the high end hotels so if you have to have a latte or want free free free crap then do not bother this is an economic hotel that works for a family wanting a quick trip to the beach or for a fun get away, all other need not apply. we will stay here again and again.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: under construction without notice
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: blocked in to pool area from suite over night, no discount, poor furniture, roaches.
the staff said that every room has an ocean view. that is totally incorrect. we stayed in room 111. it had a view of the staircase and the light from the staircase shined in our room all night long.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: hotel has stay was good.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text:
i reserved a room with 2 beds. i arrived at 1:30 friday for reservation. waited for room for 1 1/2 hours . check in is 3:00 . i was told they were full but have a different room . it had one bed no pull out bed.
3 flights up carried everything to find this out. now carry everything back down. she had one room open, it had only one bed and pull out couch that was not at all sturdy . i was told when you book with someone else you do not always get what you reserve. i do not think reserving a room paying up-front should eliminate you from getting what you expected and paid for. 
please contact me and let me know about this.
thank you

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: clean, comfy, safe
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: it was a pleasant stay. the staff was extremely nice and the room was cleaned daily. the bed could have been more comfortable. i did enjoy the facility and i felt very safe..
great location budget friendly nice staff.  been coming there for years
the property was great, only negative was that there are no elevators!
stay was ok  rooms were nice  pool was nice and  clean

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: great location on the beach but a mediocre hotel.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: very old building. old school keys as well, no key cards. minimal parking - most of which is in the sand. ramp to the beach was overgrown with sharp sand burrs. gate into the pool area is broken. shower and hose located inside pool area, not a practical location where it should be at entry to the beach. bathroom was spacious but the vanity stood on metal bars with no storage underneath. odd smell inside room and window/sliding door blinds are broken. furniture is like used office furniture. i chose to stay here only because i got a late start and availability on the beach was extremely limited. i definitely would not stay here again.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: on the beach by 7/11
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: the hotel is old and in dire need of repairs. we saw a little bug in the room. however, the bed was really comfortable and the location is great. there is a breakfast place have a mile south that was really good. 7-eleven is next-door, and so is this cute ice cream place. the staff was very friendly.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: nice beach front motel.
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: very clean and comfortable. very close to no drive beach. staff was accommodating.
on the beach, next to no drive beach, but still close to town

this was the worst stay i've ever experienced with expedia. i do not recommend this place are comforter, sheets and bed covered in stuff all layers it was disgusting, there was no shampoo or hair dryer. there was no key pad on the door for code i was given there was only lockbox for physical key. i reported all this to contact and sent photos of everything. including this place had so much damage from what seemed like it flooded , stains on couches and everything we wanted to leave thankfully they at least had someone drop off clean sheets as at first they told us it would be morning before we could get clean bedding so we slept on top of those

i wish i could upload the pictures i took. the furniture was stained and gross. the place smelled of mold. what was really upsetting was the pictures online were beautiful. once i walked in the kitchen was a dump. the bathroom was gross. i immediately tried to speak with somebody. i was only able to text. they did offer me another suite. i immediately declined. i just wanted to go home. i wish i could have gotten my money back. it is what it is. i know the place was super cheap for the weekend. i immediately found out way. do not waste your time and money.

the property was really run down and dirty. we had problems with our first room, and they gave us a free upgrade. it really made me want to like the place since they were trying, but even the next room was a disaster. the bathroom smelled horrible of urine, the shower curtain was yellowing, and everything was just old and not very clean. 
having a pool was nice but it was not clean, and had brown walls and floor. could use a major cleaning. it does have direct beach access which was the best part. 
would never stay here again.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: okay hotel - cheap for the beach!
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: nothing particularly bad with this place, just a nice, okay sort of stay. an older hotel, it could use a makeover, but the location is superb and the price can't be beat. we've stayed before, we'll stay again. it's the best use of our limited dollars when we want to visit new smyrna. and, it's a short walk to chases on the beach, a fun beachside bar/restaurant.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: under construction
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: i booked this through expedia, so once we got there and weren't thrilled with it, we couldn't get any money back....the hotel is under renovations...every moning there was a man lift right outside our bedroom....walking out through the office we had to duck ladders...our room had recently been painted and new carpet installed, so that was nice. the staff was very friendly and helpful, especially shirley, the cleaning lady. if you want to swim in the winter, the pool is not heated, so this is not the place to come to in jan...i'd call to see if the renovations are completed before i would book this hotel. on the plus side, it is right on the ocean, and we enjoyed walking on the beach. hope this is helpful.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: stay away from this property
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text:
between terrible condition of furniture, insects crawling in bathroom and kitchen, peeling paint in unit and dirty carpeting(could not walk without shoes in room feet were black) and this was after i received an upgraded room. the first room was even worse did not receive maid service or linen exchange one day. sat on couch and could barely see outside pool and ocean, windows looked like they have not been cleaned in months.
i have stayed in many rentals during my 35 years on the road...this is by far the worst i have ever experienced. complained on checkout..but got no satisfaction.
i never ever write reviews but i had towrite one on this stay.
great location. still repairing irma damage. interior clean but very dated.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: gutes motel für durchreisende
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: preis-leistungsverhältnis war gut, personal sehr entgegenkommend.
it was a wonderful facility for the price and the staff was always helpful.
i loved the location to the beach. it was quite easy to find.

f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.title: vacation
f2d8d9557208d58577e9df7ff34e42bf86fb5b10.text: deted furnishings and water temperature was uncontrollable. location was good and room had plenty of space with good ocean view.

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: i would wholeheartedly recommend this place to anyone and everyone. staff was very kind and helpful. breakfast and espresso were wonderful. you are literally at the entrance to pompeii. the train station is across the street. i have nothing negative to say! we were very happy!
très bien sauf à l'arrivée à l'aéroport où la navette a été oubliée
this is part of a camp ground. breakfast was adequate but not the best.
migliorare la pulizia e la qualità del materasso........

hotel very clean, day reception staff kind and friendly, night staff talk no english and were rude when we used translators to talk with them and try to book in, area around hotel all shuts at 5pm and a walk down hill to main town around 2 miles.
dirty area but good for a quick visit to pompaii.

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.title: sono camere di un campeggio non un hotel
110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text:
non ha le caratteristiche di un hotel le camere sono piccole senza un armadio e fredde.
la colazione meglio non parlarne. il costo della camere vale appena 35/40 €

hat den stil einer herberge. alles ist minimalistisch. zimmer u bad sehr klein, kaum für wohlbeleibte geeignet. kein schrank- man lebt aus dem koffer.
frühstück für deutsche gewohnheiten mit tägl. selbe 2 sorten wurst, 1 art käse, nur toastbrot.
für 1- 2 nächte geeignet.
excellent location for walking to |MASK| ruins. nice walk to downtown area & train station.
perfect location for visiting ruins and train station walking distance.  closet food sources close as soon as pompeii closes so nothing close to eat.
ubicación excelente para visitar pompeya

easy, fast train ride from the naples central station. took the train from rome, and the local train to the |MASK| scavi station, which is across the street from the hotel. the |MASK| ruins are maybe 200 meters from there, maybe closer.

excellent location and room. but, gutter smell in bathroom was nauseating. mold in bathroom. also the ac did not work. room remained hot. had room changed next day. here too ac fan did not work. small things but should be corrected asap.
excellent property, close from pompeii archaeology park.
ok
superbe hotel avec un personnel tres agréables et tres pret des ruines de |MASK| et beaucoup de restaurants a proximité  passer un très agréable sejour
hotel comodo in quanto vicino all'entrata degli scavi

liked location and staff helpfulness
rooms could do with some sound proofing
great stay, simple but everything you needed. clean. freindly. very comfortable bed. even brought breakfast tray to the room without us asking.

this property is located 50m from the pompeii scavi train station.  there are two pompeii train stations make sure you use pompeii scavi.  the hotel door is 100m from the entrance to the pompeii ruins.  it was unbelievable.  you catch the vesuvius bus from pompeii scavi.  the front desk guy spoke great english and was a huge reservoir of advice and recommendations.  he found out i like archelogy and recommended an extra visit to paestum which was one of the ten best archeology sites i have ever been too in my life.  the hotel was spotless too.

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.title: resort shuts down by 7pm
110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: |MASK| describes itself as having a restaurant but it was never open after 6pm. we had no means of getting a cup of tea or hot water to make a bed time cuppa. we asked for an early morning call which we did not get. no fault of |MASK| but the whole area of the |MASK| ruins shuts down at 7pm when the crowds go home.
one of the cleanest places we stayed on our trip. nice bright colors too.
l hôtel est très bien rénové récemment par contre la literie est très mauvaise

hotel |MASK| is in the perfect position to access the pompeii archeological site. it is also 100m from the train line making the commute from rome, naples or sorrento / amalfi coast super easy. rooms were clean and good value for the money we paid.
right by the train station and walking distance to the ruins. it's very convenient.

i chose to stay at hotel (camping) |MASK| at the recommendation of a friend, who has stayed there for years when working at pompeii. except for a few nights when i had to tolerate a loud neighbor, the room and grounds were quiet. the facilities were clean and in good repair, with excellent housekeeping and a staffed, friendly, and helpful front desk. i liked that the room had a mini-fridge, so i could keep some drinks, yogurt, fruit, and left-overs. the room also has a mini-safe to stash one’s travel docs and electronics.

people stay in the area for convenient access to the cirvumvesuviana and the main entrance of pompeii. unfortunately, most nearby restaurants close at 6:00 pm, so you need to stock your mini-fridge, walk into town, or up and around the corner to the few nearby restaurants for dinner.

my reservation came with breakfast every morning, which was very basic, continental: yogurt, espresso or cappuccino, cakes, croissants, ham or salami, and bread. the “juice” was really just a sweetened water drink. that said, the staff were very nice. for a more substantial breakfast, the bar/restaurant sgambati (owned by the same people?) serves omelettes, in addition to a regular menu of appetizers, salads, panini, pasta, and pizzas.

overall, i was very satisfied staying at hotel/camping |MASK| and look forward to returning.

hotel is located very close th |MASK| scavi train station, very convenient for visitor to the pompeii archeological site.  

finding the hotel is very confusing. you must go into a campground and then you see the small hotel. the hotel needs to improve their signs so that hotel guest know that the hotel is there. 

the room was small but comfortable. we checked in late. our room was not ready, but housekeeping got to it reasonably quickly. 

breakfast was adequate. quality of offerings mediocre for the most part. good coffee.  one of the wait staff seemed surly... appeared to be some kind of staff conflict
we check in after midnight and the front desk gentleman was very helpful.
super hotel um pompeji zu besuchen. alles sauber, nett,
this hotel was spotless, quiet, and staff was friendly.
this property was very close to the pompeii ruins and the railway station.

ottima sistemazione a due passi da uno degli ingressi agli scavi di |MASK|. 
pulito. buona colazione.

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.title: neues, genial gelegenes garni-hotel an den ruinen
110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: wer die ausgrabungen von pompeji auf dem plan hat und mit der bahn an der station pompeji scavi ankommt, hat es nicht weit zum garni hotel villa |MASK| am rande eines hübschen campingplatzes, gesäumt von orangenbäumen. supernettes personal!!!!
close to everything and the train station on property.

positiv:
das hotel ist für ausflüge mit und ohne mietwagen super zentral gelegen. man erreicht alles wichtige innerhalb kurzer zeit zu fuß:
den eingang zu pompeii innerhalb von 2 minuten, einen supermarkt innerhalb von 10 minuten, eine bahnstation liegt 1 minute entfernt.
es gibt viele fußläufig erreichbare restaurants. 
das zimmer wird jeden tag sehr gründlich gereinigt.
man bekommt jeden tag neue handtücher und neue pflegeprodukte.
die zimmer liegen mit der terrasse direkt am mit vielen orangenbäumen bepflanzten parkplatz des campingplatzes, was ich jedoch eher als positiv werten würde. man kann, wenn man einen mietwagen hat direkt "vor der tür" parken.
die zimmer sind ruhig gelegen und auch der parkplatz sowie der campingplatz sind stets ruhig.
das zimmer ist mit einer aussenjalousie ausgestattet, wodurch man es gut gegen die sonne/hitze abschirmen kann. der kühlschrank im zimmer ist zur privaten nutzung. auch die klimaanlage funktionierte bei uns einwandfrei.
die rezeption ist 24 h besetzt und das personal  dort sehr freundlich.
negativ:
das frühstück ist sehr einfach. es gibt das aller nötigste und jeden tag das selbe. 
der service im restaurant ist ausbaufähig.
der cappucino ist jedoch sehr gut :)

alles in allem waren wir sehr zufrieden und können das hotel mit bestem gewissen weiter empfehlen.

leider hatten wir zwei tage nur kaltes wasser zum duschen. das wurde dann am abend des zweiten tages behoben. das haus ist sehr hellhörig, wir hatten nachbarn, die glaubten, das haus für sich alleine zu haben. das personal im hotel ist sehr nett. die “damen” im frühstücksraum im restaurant gegenüber sind bis zur grenze der unhöflichkeit gleichgültig und nicht sehr service orientiert. insgesamt für eine bis zwei nächte für den besuch von pompeji und dem vesuv zu empfehlen, gerade auch für den preis. zum eingang von pompeji sind es ca 160 meter. zum bahnhof 100 meter.

very convenient location for both the |MASK| scavi railway station and the |MASK| ruins as well as the vesuvius bus. limited options for evening dining but there are a number of dining places about ten minutes walk down the hill. there is limited outside areas to sit. the internet in the rooms is poor but adequate if you go into the corridor near the router.
ottimo per chi come noi voleva visitare gli scavi di |MASK| hotel vicino sia all'ingresso che all'uscita

visited during late august 2024.

positives: 
- inexpensive
- exceptionally convenient for a visit to pompeii. you are as close as you can be without actually being inside the ruins
- the fellow at the front desk was kind and helpful and let us store our luggage while we visited pompeii
- the hotel is clean and the tvs and bathroom fixtures work
- breakfast is available and it's fair

negatives:
- the a/c works, but it does not go low enough. you can only lower your room to a certain degree and probably out of a desire to reduce energy usage, it does not go as low as you want it to go when you are there in the blazing summer.
- mosquitoes. we were killing them left and right. i'm a magnet for them so this is a bigger problem for me than most, but boy was it annoying to keep hunting them.

pros: very convenient location,  staff were helpful and nice, room was clean, aircond worked fine.
cons: noisy - its a busy area and the walls are thin. weird lumpy beds and pillows. breakfast was v disappointing: only a few sweet pastries, cornflakes, really woeful coffee and plastic cheese. eating in the nearby restaurants was very expensive, although the food was nice there. 
overall i felt it was ok for the cost of the hotel.

this property is literally on the |MASK| ruins doorstep. the staff were helpful and the hotel was clean. breakfast is self-service in the restaurant opposite. i am gluten free and when i asked them i was well catered for.
good hotel for one night stay. very close proximity to the train station and |MASK| ruins. area appears unsafe due to shared camping grounds. lastly, wifi is only functional in the lobby area.
great location near the ruins. nice property and a great experience in pompeii.
very very convenient location! staff is wonderful! good for people with cars or who take transport. perfect for visiting pompeii.
walking distance to the pompeii archaeological entrance. friendly and helpful staff, quick response time for any requests. nice complimentary continental breakfast.

the hotel was in a perfect location, right next to the ruins. breakfast croissants were delicious. the hotel staff was incredibly helpful with a tour issue and was supportive the entire stay! it was a great experience!

this is a tourist hotel at the entrance of pompeii. there is also a tour company booth outside and the train station is here. you cannot get any more convenient and it was so affordable.  extremely clean. multiple cafés in walking distance. please note many of them close at six. plan accordingly.  this is all i needed to tour pompeii and mount vesuvius.

ottima posizione vicino al sito archeologico, comodo parcheggio, buona colazione non compresa nel prezzo ma con supplemento di 5 euro a persona (non è molto, considerando che è a buffet quindi si può mangiare quanto si vuole), gentilissimo il personale che, in seguito a nostra richiesta, ci ha concesso di ritardare il check-out di un paio d'ore senza costi aggiuntivi. camere non grandi e soprattutto il bagno molto piccolo, ma nel complesso il soggiorno per noi è stato piacevole. buon rapporto qualità/prezzo.

need bigger garbage cans in the rooms.
water in the shower took a long time to drain.

we loved everything about the hotel.

thank you!

pour: bien situé pour visiter le site archéologique pompéi. stationnement devant la chambre. propre. personnel courtois. prix raisonnable (102$ cad).
contre: petit déjeuner médiocre avec peu de choix (pâtisseries grasses commerciales, à peine quelques tranches de jabon, fromage commercial emballé, etc). le wifi ne fonctionne pas dans la chambre. serviettes sont minces comme des serviettes de table. mal identifié (camping |MASK| et non hôtel |MASK|: confusion).

cet hôtel est bon pour une nuit si vous visitez le site pompéi. sans plus.

ベスヴィオ周遊鉄道の駅に近く、ポンペイ遺跡の目の前でロケーションがとても良いです。
トレニタリアのポンペイ駅の方がレストランや土産物屋が多いですが、こちらはポンペイ遺跡のメインエントランスから少し離れています。
(遺跡観光がメインであれば、ポンペイ遺跡からみて西側のホテルが良いです。)

施設は所々年季を感じますが、おそらくリノベしたのか総じて綺麗でした。シャワーの温度、水圧も許容範囲で、コスパは良いと思います。
ただ、閑散期のためか朝ごはんがクロワッサンとハム、チーズ、ヨーグルトのみだったのは少し残念。簡単なサラダなどあればなお良し。

旅の目的がポンペイ観光で、それ以外の条件にあまりこだわりがない方にはおすすめの宿です。
nice hotel right next to the pompeii ruins. lots of eating and shopping with in walking distance.
positief, minpuntje was dat het gehorig was, dwz niet bestand tegen italiaans gespreksvolume
that it was close to the main entrance of scavi di |MASK|
staff is really sweet!
it was very close to the pompeii ruins and the train station and very easy to navigate around.  the cappuccino needs improvement.
room was too small, bath room/restroom is way too small
next to superior marine entrance to pompeii ruins!

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.title: very comfortable hotel, very close to pompeii.
110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: the hotel was great, overall good experience. the staff were very helpful apart from the checking out. we had to check out early (before 8 am) for an early flight and encountered a night desk clerk/manager, who tried to charge us again for the room, was rude and very unfriendly. after what had been an excellent stay with very helpful staff, this was our departing memory of the hotel. i must stress before this, all the other staff were lovely and very accomodating.
gutes hotel direkt am eingang zum archäologischen park. frühstück etwas mager

if you want a place near the ruins of |MASK|, this is the hotel. we enjoyed our stay and visited both the ruins and mt vesuvius.  the |MASK| scavi train station is also very close and can take you to naples or sorrento.
very clean. close enough to walk to pompeii ruins. free breakfast was good.

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.title: non è un hotel .
110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: sono camere piccole con modesto arredamento  e riscaldamento inadeguato. no ha le caratteristiche di un hotel! per la colazione bisogna uscire fuori in un locale senza riscaldamento.

i travel the world..this property is like new inside..extremely clean, 1 minute from train, and 1 minute from main pompeii entry. the best location for sure. breakfast was great..and they will store bags while you see pompeii. 100% recommend.
das hotel entsprich (knapp) den 3 sternen.
everything shut at 17:30, they only cater for |MASK| scavi visitors
ottima posizione, buona pulizia e servizi. consigliato

nall'arrico la persona alla reception x nulla accogliente, nn da info se nn più volte richieste.camera con cimice dentro e pavimenti sporchi..inoltre nonostante avessi pagato x la familiare con richiesta speciale specificata di 3 ospiti con i 3 letti configurati divano matrimoniale e lettino nn trovo il 3 letto e mi si dice che nn ne avevo diritto..il supplemento è stato pagato, ma mi sento rispondere che nn vale quello scritto da expedia ma che si usa avere solo 2 letti x 3 persone.lanscelta della stanza era proprio xni 3 letti separati e ho pagato il doppio delle altre strutture..fatto presente agli altri receptionist mi hanno dato ragione..ma siamo stati costretti a prendere anche una singola e pagarla x intero senza sconti e senza rimborso del surplus della camera x il lettino che altri nn era che un puffi al max adatto ad un bimbo piccolo.x fortuna il resto del personale gentile e disponibile.la nstrafottenza ebl'ignoranza del primo receptionist ha rovinato metà della vacanza..certo che come prima esperienza con expedia nn è x nulla rassicurante.
great location and wonderful staff.
lo unico que no me gusto, es que el aire acondicionado no funcionaba y no se podia acceder a cambiar la temperatura. por lo demas muy buen lugar
close to pompeii entrance. nice rooms and quiet. friendly helpful staff.
great location right next to the pompeii entrance.
the office is really convenient but the rooms were a bit of a trek so just be aware.  the room was really nice.
it is within walking distance from the ruins.  enough space for five people.
good breakfast and very helpful daytime staff. our room had bulbs missing and exposed wiring. needs a bit more care and it will be fine. wi fi must improve. night staff must be able to speak english.
terrible experience!
posizione strategica davanti agli scavi superlativa.
nessuna criticità, personale molto disponibile
tranquilo e confortável. muito próximo a entrada porta marina das escavações arqueológicas de pompéia.

going to see |MASK|? this is the best location.
just 100 yards away. 
close to the train.
posizione molto comoda per gli scavi e per i ristoranti.
nice, everything we needed including a/c
i feel safe and free all at the same time. i slept like a baby here.
staff are friendly and very helpful, rooms are spacious and clean

we really enjoyed our stay! it is very convenient to the major sites. our favorite staff member was francesca, who works in the breakfast buffet. she makes great coffee and was very friendly and helpful.
best location

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.title: next to pompeii ruins
110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: internet connection is advertised but hardly works
clean, modern, airconditioned, 24h desk, near to train and pompeji ruins

it would be impossible to beat the location of this hotel. the hotel |MASK| is right next to the train station and almost directly across from the entry gate to the pompeii archaeological site. the neighborhood was quiet. even though it's right next to the train station we did not hear trains in our room. it was an easy walk to the downtown area. we found the food at the on-site restaurant to be very good. the room was spotless and everything functioned very very well. the beds were comfortable. and the small terrace was enjoyable.
the property is pefect and the location, parking

did not stay hotel |MASK|, stayed at hotel1/4mile away no tea/coffee tv not working changed rooms just as bad no,tea/coffee,aircon,hot water,phone happy we were out most of the time somebody should look into hotel |MASK| very very unhappy.
sauber verkehsmittel zu fuß erreichbar .
excellent staff
staff was courteous, room was clean, good location, and good value for money

the housekeeping staff was amazing. she helped me with speaking italian. the property in our courtyard was cleaned and well attended to. beautiful area and in walking distance to the pompeii ruins site. i would stay again.
the entrance to the historical site is right next door. very convenient. the scavi train station is right across the street and there are eateries and small shops only yards away.

nært sentralstasjonen, arkeologisk park og restauranter. veldig trivelig personale, god service og informasjon. hotellet vårt lå ikke ved resepsjonen, men måtte gå 7-10 minutter derfra. dårlig merking hvor vi skulle gå. fikk mye kløe etter nettene. etter 4 netter der er store deler av kroppen til meg og guttene fulle av prikket og sår. noe av dette er infisert. det kommer flere selv om vi er kommet hjem.

very accommodating staff. room was spacious for family of five. clean. bathroom was spacious and clean. right next btrain station. very good breakfast. right next to |MASK| ruins and two entrances. surprisingly positive  experience.
clean rooms very close to pompeii site access

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.title: super locatie en prima kamers
110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: vanuit het vliegveld in napels was het heel simpel en snel om met de alibus en trein bij de camping te komen waar wij twee prima kamers hadden. 1 minuut lopen van het stationnetje en naar de ingang van |MASK| dus heel handig als je geen auto hebt. 10 minuutjes naar het stadje met ruime keus restaurantjes en een grote carrefour. echt een aanrader en helemaal niet duur.
hotel |MASK| was the perfect spot for our stay. close proximity to the train station, which you cannot hear from your room, as well as |MASK|
it was located right where we wanted.  the city  streets are not clean.

very close to |MASK|!!
easy to park your car.

less than mediocre breakfast.
drinks prices were expensive
hotel in ottima posizione, comodo alla stazione per spostarsi. pulito, silenzioso, personale gentile. buona colazione! consigliato
awesome place to stay at and staff is welcoming.
it was normal italian breakfast
everything was fine, but we got disturb by the train which passes every 15 minutes. but the staffs were very nice and friendly.
colazione scarsa.

we enjoyed our stay here.  the hotel was clean, nice and toasty.  it is connected to their camp ground, which looked nice.  the staff were all friendly.  there is a cafe / restaurant / convenience store across the parking lot.  it is close to the archeological park and a train stop. there were restaurants, shops and a grocery store in walking distance.  we would be happy to stay again.

very noisy , not a spot for easy afternoon or evening… since they are few steps from train station and entrance to pompeii. but pretty affordable and parking including was a big plus, good breakfast! great coffee
todo muy bien
front desk staff somewhat abrupt and rude but overall ok

very handy for the ruins.  overall good value but could be excellant with a couple of changes.  the bathroom grouting is black in places and could easily be solved with some bleach!  also there seems to be 2 confusing systems going on in the bar/restaurant.  if you want a hot drink with the included breakfast you cant order it from a waiter on the verandah - you have to join a haphazard queue inside - some info in the room about this would be good.  sometimes very difficult to get attention inside where the coffee is made.  breakfast pretty basic with paper cups instead of china or glass.  didnt suit me but ok for someone that just wants quantity.  you cant even toast the bread! it only warms sandwiches....  however the room was very nice.  a bit noisy sometimes as the sound tends to echo through the building especially when a motor bike parks beneath the windows.

we had a great stay in pompeii at hotel |MASK|. i only wish there had been screens on the windows since there are a lot of mosquitoes in the area. otherwise the service was great and it’s a wonderful place to stay and very convenient.

if you are going to explore pompeii this is a great place to stay.  the entrance is a one minute walk and it’s not the entrance most groups use so you can get in quickly and start exploring the far end of the site for a couple of hours before the tour groups begin to reach you!  really made the time there more enjoyable.  hotel was clean - looked recently renovated, helpful staff.  breakfast was included at the restaurant across the street and there was lots of parking.   we took the train - make sure you book the right train to the station at the hotel otherwise it’s an expensive taxi ride from the other station- lesson learned.  not a lot of dining options nearby but enough for a decent meal.   stored luggage at hotel while exploring pompeii.

location superb as less than 150m  to hotel from station and very close to the entrance to the archaeological park of |MASK|. however the breakfast was poor, cleanliness average only, pictures of gardens and balconies in information not accurate.  the on site pizzeria closed at 6pm so not much use after being out all day. local restaurants some  close early by 8pm in some cases .

ideal location for the archiological site of pompeii (2min walk) (herculanium also via train/bus)  and the train station  is only 2min walk for 40min trips to napoli and/or sorrento. we  also went to rome at 2.5 hrs from napoli. morning breakfast very convinient (7-10am) and afternoon food/ adrink. only 5 minute walk into town for a good selection of restaurants and pizzerias and bars.
after the train ride from hell it was an oasis of calm
excellent location, proximity to pompeii archeological park was great, 5min walk to entrance and ticket booths. laundry on site in campground section.  staff were professional and very helpful.

we booked the |MASK| hotel......and got b&b diomede, a 10 min walk from |MASK|.  so, none of the pictures or descriptions applied.  we did get the same breakfast at |MASK|.  the room was incredibly small and bed was hard as a rock.  we got the old switch-a-roo.  booked one place and got another, less desirable place.  do not book the zues hotel without making sure where they will put you.
nella media! discreto!

the location is unbeatable for visiting pompeii. the room was fresh and clean. the ac is great. the accessibility of the restaurant and snack shop for meals was convenient and tasty. the staff was very helpful. great stay.

110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.title: nice and comfortable
110f01b8ae518a0ee41047bce5c22572988a435e.text: this hotel is right next to a campground of the same name so it was confusing at first when the taxi from the train station mentioned we were going to a campground.  the hotel is clean and staff is nice and friendly.  we of course stayed here because of visiting the pompeii ruins.  perfect location to the ruins, the beds were very comfortable and there is air conditioning although you can't control the thermostat.  the property lists they will hold your luggage while you are at the ruins, and this is true, however they leave your luggage right in the lobby and not locked up.  there was no problem with this but its a little un-nerving. i'd stay here again.  there was a place to do laundry which was needed after a week of traveling!

this is right by a train station and one of the entrances to the ancient pompeii entrances. very clean. i loved the flooring. it all seemed new but somehow 70’s. the staff was very friendly. breakfast was the most limited of our european vacation, but it was sufficient.

close to pompeii excavation and bus to vesuvius. feels like a new facility. after 5pm, there are not many tourists around, and most restaurants are empty. there is not much to do late around here. but if you want to get to pompeii/vesuvius early in the morning and save time on transportation it is a very good spot

hotel property is located adjacent to |MASK| ruins, and a the circumvesuviana train, which is a commuter train that runs from sorrento to naples including the hotel stop, |MASK| scavi. tickets to mt vesuvius with transportation, can be purchased just outside the train station near hotel. hotel offered free breakfast at a small cafe adjacent to hotel every morning. there are not many options to eat dinner late in the evening that are in walking distance, and their are zero activities after dark, the area is sort of "dead" after dark. if you want peace and quiet, except for the train passing thru, then stay here, otherwise, find a place in sorrento, which has more nightlife to offer.
fantastic location. right next to the entrance to pompeii and the station with links to sorento.

simple furnishings but very clean rooms. classic tiles everywhere. beds were decent. breakfast was great, espresso bar, pastries (coronetto), yogurt, meats, cheese. very friendly staff. attendant baggage check while in pompeii. seconds walk from pompeii entrance. highly recommend.
basic accommodations.  bathroom sink stopped up - nasty.  place to sleep

we were allocated a room in a seperate villa, about 10 mins walk from the main hotel. parking was available a few doors away in the grounds of an abandoned house. 
unfortunately the facilities described of a shop and on site restaurant were not correct, when we arrived all were under construction. the room was very basic and very old fashioned, the tv didn't work, no hot drink facilities, the shower was only a trickle and the room was very dark. this sadly was also the noisiest hotel i've ever stayed in, with a train track meters away, meaning the room shook with the vibrations every time the train past. the last train was at 11pm but started very early at 6am, so waking us every morning...not great.
we could also hear all of the neighbours talking and moving around. for breakfast we had to walk back to the main hotel each morning, for a small continental breakfast. the staff were very pleasant, and the location could not be beat- opposite the pompeii site- however we would not return.

e52d67a758ce4ad0229aacc97e5dfe89984c384c.title: 카오산과 왕궁에서 가까우면서도 조용한 호텔
e52d67a758ce4ad0229aacc97e5dfe89984c384c.text:
일단 카오산에서 도보로 10분 왕궁에서 도보로 25분 거리라 굳이 택시를 타지 않고 거리 구경을 하면서 주요 관광지를 걸어갈수 있다는 이점과 번화가와는 약간 떨어져 있어 숙면을 취할 수 있다는 이점이 있다. 세탁 서비스도 저렴하게 빨리 받을수있으며 직원들이 친절하고 조식도 푸짐하고 맛있다. 결정적으로 신축이라 내부 엄청 깨끗함. 단 나는 가장 저렴한 방을 이용해 창문이 없다는
것 말고는 완벽.

1. they didnt mentioned without window room.
2. airconditioner too old(so i've got a sick)
3. self make espresso at room, but housekeeping misunderstood and i made a smoking at room. and they charged me penalty.  
my smoking evidences are "coffee beans" and accused that coffee beans are cigarettes ashes...
geen ontbijt maar vlakbij genoeg mogelijkenheden en lekker rustig met alles op loopafstand

personal muy amable. los cuartos están pequeños s pero muy limpios y comodos. aolo el
baño esta dentro de la regadera aupongo que por espacio. muy bien ubicado del area de los templos y khaosan road. lo recomiendo. nos fue muy bien!!
propre en générale mais pas en dessous des mobiliers
spacious and clean room. staff was exceptional! very nice little area off |MASK| beaten path.
staff very nice and helpful ....room very good ...near to khao san road
very clean an comfortable bed , had a nice stay very close to river boat an other restaurants would definitely stay there again

it was a pleasant experience. |MASK| staff was very kind. i really enjoy |MASK| mattress, very comfortable! it is in a very quite place, with a little monastery nearby, but at |MASK| same time close to more busy areas with many dining options etc. walking distance to khaosan road and to |MASK| river, where one can take |MASK| boat and go to many places. raccomanded!
clean. quiet.  comfortable.  room. has no window which they advertise.  fine for me.  a few blocks from all |MASK| street vendors but nice and quiet.  staff friendly and helpful.

e52d67a758ce4ad0229aacc97e5dfe89984c384c.title: un sereno angolo a bangkok
e52d67a758ce4ad0229aacc97e5dfe89984c384c.text:
la zona è molto piacevole e tranquilla, si trova in una traversa di samsaen road; da qui a piedi è facile raggiungere khao san road, il molo dove prendere l'express boat.
l'hotel è davvero molto bello, nuovo, arredamento impeccabile! la pulizia perfetta! la camera spaziosa offriva tutti i servizi necessari, perfino accappatoio e ciabatte! la colazione buona.
 la padrona è stata molto cordiale, gentile e premurosa; ci ha ospitato anche dopo il check out la sera in attesa del treno e ci ha tenuto i bagagli pesanti per tutto il giorno gratuitamente!
davvero consigliatissimo!!
beautifully decorated, great, safe and clean for |MASK| price.
it is very clean, i like |MASK| design of |MASK| guest |MASK|. |MASK| staff are very nice. just a bit far from |MASK| bts n mrt.

this was my third stay at |MASK| |MASK| |MASK| and i’ve been satisfied each time. |MASK| room is clean and comfortable with food amenities and is on a quiet street close to restaurants and shopping. i would definitely recommend and plan to stay again on my next trip of bangkok.
great, clean and nicely decorated hotel!

e52d67a758ce4ad0229aacc97e5dfe89984c384c.title: hotel confortable proche du centre actif de bangko
e52d67a758ce4ad0229aacc97e5dfe89984c384c.text: dans un quartier calme, les chambres sont bien équipées, confortables, spacieuses. le personnel est attentif et accueillant

e52d67a758ce4ad0229aacc97e5dfe89984c384c.title: simplemente una joya!!
e52d67a758ce4ad0229aacc97e5dfe89984c384c.text: desde que llegamos fue una experiencia positiva, la belleza del lugar, la excelencia de su personal, la pulcritud de la habitación, internet excelente, desayuno delicioso, ubicación inmejorable, simplemente una joya de lugar.

i picked this hotel based on reviews and area. check in was fast and easy. our room was on |MASK| 2nd floor, no elevators so you do have to carry your luggage up flights. |MASK| air conditioner worked great, our room was nice and cold. room was small but fits 2 people great. they offer a safe and a robe in |MASK| closet and shampoo, soap, toothbrushes. there is a refrigerator, you can have 2 free waters a day. wifi worked great. it’s a short 10 min walk to khao san road which was great. a lot of local food but i will say a little more expensive because of |MASK| tourism in this area. we used public transit a lot here, buses, metro, ferries, |MASK| grab app (taxis/private cars). this hotel is close to |MASK| water so it was easy to take |MASK| ferry down |MASK| river to grand palace, wat phra or china town, 30 baht for 2 people. to chatuchak market we took |MASK| public bus to |MASK| metro, about 45 min or so, but an easy ride. overall i think with |MASK| hustle and bustle of |MASK| city, i’m glad we had a quit area to come back to. for |MASK| price, i would def consider it :)
es ist ein wirklich tolles haus mit charakter. sehr ruhig und angenehm. danke.
nice and clean place, very central from everything!

|MASK| hotel is beautiful, |MASK| staff is so friendly, breakfast was delicious ( thai fried rice with egg for me was lovely), quality vs price was very good, |MASK| only thing that i didn’t like was |MASK| toilet in |MASK| shower , but that is so popular in thailand 🤗

dit nieuwe hotel heeft veel potentie. ze hebben voor thaise begrippen zachte bedden en een keuze uit kussens, maar waar wij echt een kingbed hadden gereserveerd bleek bij aankomst dat dit alleen op beschikbaarheid was. gelukkig hebben ze een kamer wissel gedaan om dit te corrigeren. vraag het hotel dus altijd om een bevestiging van je kamer met de juiste bedden!!

1泊4,000円で泊まれたので満足です。施設は古いですが、素泊まりには十分です。無料の水かわ冷蔵庫にあり、無くなると補充してくれます。ドライヤーは部屋にありませんが、フロントで貸してもらえます。ホテルから1分歩くと大通りで飲食店や屋台やマッサージ店が沢山あり、とても有意義な旅行ができました。

e52d67a758ce4ad0229aacc97e5dfe89984c384c.text: hostal con buena ubicacion, ya que se encuentra a 5-10 minutos caminando de khaosan road, tambien se tiene cerca un 7 eleven. la habitacion es limpia, se duerme bien, lo unico malo es que el baño esta junto a la regadera, no hay separacion, es raro eso, de ahi en fuera todo muy bien y el personal amable.

premièrement, l'arrivée à l'hôtel, la gardienne de prison qui est derrière son comptoir, n'a pas répondu à mon bonjour en thai, elle ne sourit pas et m'a dit trois mots sous forme d'interrogatoire you have booking ? alors je répondis oui et ensuite elle m'a dit un seul mot passeport sans faire aucune phrase et toujours sans aucun sourire elle m'a donné la clé en disant second floor ... j'ai eu la folie de demander gentiment s'il serait possible d'avoir une aide pour monter mon gros sac car il n'y a pas d'ascenseur et pour seule réponse un no ! très très appuyè !

passons l'accueil déplorable, la chambre est bien défraîchie, la porte de la salle de bain est dans un état moisie / crade  et cerise sur le gâteau, un énorme cafard se baladait sur le sol de cette salle de bain. 
egalement hôtel extrêmement bruyant, les portes des chambres claquent ret ésonnent très fortement jusque dans la chambre et dans le couloir des parties communes, les voix des femmes de ménage le matin et certains vacanciers la nuit m'ont tenu éveillé... malgré des bouchons d'oreille !
point positif, la situation de l'hôtel, les chambres sont grandes et le prix bon marché… voilà, c'est tout alors j'ai quand même mis deux étoiles, mais je n'y reviendrai pas.
we’re delighted by |MASK| ambience and courtesy of |MASK| staff. they were attentive to our needs and helpful.

room was clean and simple. just what we needed! |MASK| location in old town bangkok was nice, pretty easy to walk around and explore otherwise grab was used to get around! breakfast was listed as an amenity but wasn’t offered to us during check in. there was a cafe on |MASK| corner we used.
excelente hotel bien ubicado.
nice

we loved our stay at |MASK| |MASK| |MASK|! |MASK| beds were super comfortable and |MASK| whole place had a cute, calming aesthetic with orchids in bloom. |MASK| only downside was |MASK| wet-room bathroom — |MASK| shower leaked and left |MASK| floor wet longer than ideal.

|MASK| location is perfect: a quiet street but steps from great restaurants, shops, and old city attractions. we visited |MASK| grand palace, wat pho, wat arun, khaosan road, went shopping, got a massage and took a nap — all in one day. super convenient and charming stay!

5f5a0cd8662f0ddf297f2d27358f680daab5d3ac.text: we had a great stay. the hosts were very friendly, they gave us a nice and warm welcome. they also gave us some advice about the activities in the region as we were not really familiar with it yet. there were many nice activities closeby because the accomodation is close to the black forrest. we would definitely recommend this accomodation.
sehr freundliche gastgeber, nah an freudenstadt und doch im grünen, mit weitblick, gemütliche gaststube, bequemes bett im neu gestaltetes zimmer, schön ruhig, sauber :) wir kommen gerne wieder!
ein sehr gutes familäres gasthaus. herzlicher empfang. deftiges essen. überschaubares frühstück ( nichr überladen ). ruhige gegend, genau richtig für alle die das einfache aber herzliche lieben

ein absolut wundervolles hotel mit grandiosem service! wir waren mit 2 kleinkindern vor ort und hatten ein modernes zimmer mit abgetrennter küche und essbereich. alle waren außergewöhnlich freundlich und haben uns jeden wunsch erfüllt. wir würden jederzeit wieder kommen!

we had an incredible stay here. the property is beautiful and the rooms are amazing. we had a beautiful view from our room and balcony, and the room was stunning too. incredible service from the delightful owners. the food was delicious and the drinks were brilliant. we wished we were staying here longer and will absolutely be back! thank you for an amazing stay! we cannot recommend it highly enough. it was perfect for our family!

sehr empfehlenswertes hotel.
die gastgeber sind so warmherzig und aufmerksam, da hat man sich wirklich sehr willkommen gefühlt.
das zimmer war unglaublich schön! 
groß und neu mit, viel holz und ein super bequemes bett.

das
preis-/leistungsverhältnis ist sensationell!

our room was nothing like the pictures featured on the internet. the floors were all tile and the overall look and feel was institutional grey, white and black.  it was not at all inviting, and i would never recommend it to anyone. also, despite advertising unlimited internet, even in the rooms, the only place that we could connect is in the lobby.  the only positive experience was the staff who were very nice.
